example: The sun radiates heat and light.
meaning: vt. vi. 散发，流露；发出 (光、辐射等) vi. 呈辐射状发散 (或伸展)
exampleTranslation: 太阳辐射热和光。

example: The sun was radiant in the clear sky.
meaning: adj. 容光焕发的；灿烂的；辐射的
exampleTranslation: 阳光普照在清朗的天空中。

example: The solution to this problem requires a radical change in policy.
meaning: adj. 根本的，彻底的；激进的 n. 激进分⼦；游离基
exampleTranslation: 这个问题的解决需要在政策上进行彻底的改变。

example: There are several small objects on the table.
meaning: n. 物体，物品；⽬标；对象；宾语 vi. 不同意，反对 vt. 提出…作为反对的理由
exampleTranslation: 桌子上有几个小物件。

example: The objective of the project is to reduce waste.
meaning: n. ⽬标，⽬的 adj. 客观的，不带个⼈感情的
exampleTranslation: 这个项目的目标是减少浪费。

example: You can raise an objection if you disagree with their decision.
meaning: n. 反对，异议，反对的理由
exampleTranslation: 如果你不同意他们的决定，你可以提出异议。

example: I have an obligation to take care of my family.
meaning: n. 义务，责任
exampleTranslation: 我有责任照顾我的家人。

example: I feel obliged to write and thank you for your help.
meaning: vt. (因法律或义务) 强迫，迫使 vi. vt. 帮忙，效劳
exampleTranslation: 我觉得我有责任写信感谢你的帮助。

example: The full moon was obscured by clouds.
meaning: adj. 鲜为⼈知的；难以理解的 vt. 掩盖，使模糊，使隐晦
exampleTranslation: 月亮被云遮住了。

example: The police are keeping the house under observation.
meaning: n. 观察，观测；评论，评述
exampleTranslation: 警察正在监视那幢房子。

example: I like to observe birds in their natural habitat.
meaning: vt. vi. 观察，注视 vt. 注意到；遵守；庆祝；评论
exampleTranslation: 我喜欢在鸟类的自然生态环境中观察它们。

example: He finally obtained the information he needed.
meaning: vt. 获得，实现 vi. 存在，流⾏
exampleTranslation: 他最终得到了他需要的信息。

example: It's obvious that he's not telling the truth.
meaning: adj. 明显的，显然的；⽆新意的
exampleTranslation: 很明显他在说谎。

example: She is an ideal candidate for the job.
meaning: adj. 理想的，最佳的 n. 理想；理想典范，完美典型
exampleTranslation: 她是这份工作的理想候选人。

example: His political ideology is conservative in nature.
meaning: n. 思想体系，意识形态
exampleTranslation: 他的政治理念本质上是保守的。

example: Their views on the subject are identical.
meaning: adj. 完全相同的，同样的
exampleTranslation: 他们在那个问题上的观点是完全一致的。

example: He forgot his identification at home, so he couldn't enter the club.
meaning: n. 确认，识别；⾝份证明；确定
exampleTranslation: 他忘了把身份证带出门，所以他不能进入俱乐部。

example: You must carry a document that can identify you.
meaning: vt. 认出，确认，识别；发现，查明 vt. 显⽰⾝份
exampleTranslation: 你必须携带一份可以确认你身份的文件。

example: Everyone has their own unique identity.
meaning: n. ⾝份，本体；特性，个性；相同
exampleTranslation: 每个人都有他们独特的身份。

example: I write in my journal every night before going to bed.
meaning: n. 期刊，杂志；报纸；⽇志，⽇记
exampleTranslation: 我每晚临睡前都会在日记本上写一些东西。

example: The journalist is working on a story about the upcoming election.
meaning: n. 记者，新闻⼯作者
exampleTranslation: 这个记者正在撰写一篇即将到来的选举的报道。

example: The journey across the mountains took three days.
meaning: n. 旅⾏，旅程 vi. (⻓途) 旅⾏
exampleTranslation: 穿越群山的旅程花了三天。

example: The judge will deliver his verdict later in the day.
meaning: n. 法官；裁判员；鉴定⼈ vi. vt. 判断；担任裁判；评价，指责 vt. 估计，猜测；审理，判决
exampleTranslation: 法官将在今天晚些时候宣判。

example: He is respected for his sound judgement.
meaning: n. 看法，评价；判断⼒；判决
exampleTranslation: 他因其明智的判断被人尊敬。

example: The judicial system is the system of courts that interprets and applies the law in the name of the state.
meaning: adj. 审判的，司法的，法庭的
exampleTranslation: 司法制度是一个解释并代表国家应用法律的法庭体系

example: The jury is still out on the case.
meaning: n. 陪审团；裁判委员会
exampleTranslation: 陪审团还未对此案做出裁定。

example: We must pursue justice, even if the road is hard.
meaning: n. 公平，正义；法官；司法制度
exampleTranslation: 我们必须追求正义，即使道路困难重重。

example: No argument can justify such a ghastly crime.
meaning: vt. 证明…有理；为…辩解
exampleTranslation: 没有任何理由可以为这么可怕的犯罪辩解。

example: The label on the dress says it's made of pure silk.
meaning: n. 标签，标牌；(不恰当的) 称谓 vt. 给…贴标签；(不公地) 把…称为
exampleTranslation: 这件裙子的标签上说是纯丝制成的

example: His progress in learning English lagged behind the rest of the class.
meaning: vi. 落后，滞后，缓慢移动 n. (两个事件) 相隔的时间
exampleTranslation: 他在英语学习上落后于全班其他学生。

example: The success of the project is largely due to her effort.
meaning: adv. 在很⼤程度上，主要地，⼤半地
exampleTranslation: 这个项目的成功主要归功于她的努力。

example: Jackie and Lucy both asked me out, but I prefer the latter.
meaning: adj. 后者的；后期的
exampleTranslation: 杰克和露西都约我出去，但我更喜欢后者。

example: This is the law of the land.
meaning: n. 法律，法规；法学；警⽅；法则
exampleTranslation: 这是国土法。

example: The company has threatened a lawsuit against the newspaper.
meaning: n. 诉讼，官司
exampleTranslation: 公司已威胁要对报纸提起诉讼。

example: The magnitude of the disaster is hard to comprehend.
meaning: n. 巨⼤，重要性；星等；震级
exampleTranslation: 灾难的严重程度让人难以理解。

example: He used a lens to magnify the image.
meaning: vt. 放⼤；使(问题等)加重；夸⼤
exampleTranslation: 他使用了一个镜头来放大这个图像。

example: The ancient cathedral was a magnificent sight to behold.
meaning: adj. 宏伟的，令⼈印象深刻的
exampleTranslation: 那座古老的大教堂壮观的景象令人瞩目。

example: We need to maintain a high level of security to prevent any incidents.
meaning: vt. 维持；维修，保养；坚称；供养
exampleTranslation: 我们需要保持高度的安全防护，以预防任何意外发生。

example: Regular maintenance ensures the longevity of your car.
meaning: n. 维护，养护；维持；赡养费
exampleTranslation: 定期的保养能确保你的车寿命长久。

example: She plays a major role in the play.
meaning: adj. 主要的，重要的，⼤的；⼤调的 n. 少校；专业；…专业的学⽣ vi. 主修
exampleTranslation: 她在这个剧中扮演主要角色。

example: The majority of students have completed the assignment.
meaning: n. ⼤部分，⼤多数；多数票
exampleTranslation: 大多数学生已经完成了作业。

example: Can you make a cake for my birthday?
meaning: vt. 做；出产；引发；使得；强迫 vlink. 成为；合计 n. 牌⼦，品牌
exampleTranslation: 你可以为我的生日做个蛋糕吗？

example: The theme of the conference is environmental conservation.
meaning: n. 主题；主旋律；主题⾳乐 adj. 有特定主题的
exampleTranslation: 会议的主题是环境保护。

example: Albert Einstein is famous for his theory of relativity.
meaning: n. 理论，学说；理论基础；观点
exampleTranslation: 爱因斯坦以他的相对论而闻名。

example: Einstein was a theoretical physicist who developed the theory of relativity.
meaning: adj. 理论的；理论上的，假设性的
exampleTranslation: 爱因斯坦是一个理论物理学家，发展了相对论。

example: After the accident, she had to undergo intensive physical therapy.
meaning: n. 疗法，治疗；⼼理治疗
exampleTranslation: 事故后，她需要接受密集的物理治疗。

example: She has all the qualifications needed for the job.
meaning: n. 资格证，学历；资历；合格，资格
exampleTranslation: 她具备做这份工作需要的所有资质。

example: You need a master's degree to qualify for this job.
meaning: vt. 使合格，使具备资格 vi. 取得资格 (或学历)，合格 vi. vt. (使) 有资格，(使) 有权；配得上
exampleTranslation: 你需要有硕士学位才有资格做这份工作。

example: The quality of their work has improved.
meaning: n. 质量，品质；优质；品德；特质 adj. 优质的，⾼质量的
exampleTranslation: 他们的工作质量已有所提高。

example: We need to conduct a qualitative analysis of the data to truly understand the trends.
meaning: adj. 质量的，定性的，性质的
exampleTranslation: 我们需要对数据进行质量分析，以便真正理解这些趋势。

example: As parents, we have a responsibility to safeguard our children.
meaning: vt. vi. 保护，保障，捍卫 n. 安全设施，保护措施
exampleTranslation: 作为父母，我们有责任保护我们的孩子。

example: The safety of the passengers is our primary concern.
meaning: n. 安全；安全场所；保险栓
exampleTranslation: 乘客的安全是我们的首要关心事项。

example: The lion's savage roar could be heard miles away.
meaning: adj. 凶恶的；猛烈抨击的；野蛮的 n. 野蛮⼈；残暴的⼈ vt. 凶猛地攻击；激烈抨击
exampleTranslation: 狮子凶猛的吼叫声可以听到好几英里之外。

example: Remember to save money for a rainy day.
meaning: vt. 救，救助；收集；保留；避免 vi. vt. 储蓄；节省；保存 prep. conj. 除了 n. (守⻔员的) 救球
exampleTranslation: 记得为难得的日子存钱。

example: We've made significant savings by buying in bulk.
meaning: n. 存款；节省下来的钱 (或物)
exampleTranslation: 我们通过批量购买节省了大量资金。

example: This map has a scale of 2cm to 5km.
meaning: n. 规模；等级；刻度；秤；鳞⽚ n. ⽐例尺；⾳阶 vt. 攀登；去鳞；改变…的⼤⼩
exampleTranslation: 这张地图的比例尺是2厘米等于5公里。

example: He returned to the scene of the accident.
meaning: n. 现场；场⾯；景⾊；圈⼦
exampleTranslation: 他回到了事故发生地。

example: The scenery of the sunset over the ocean was breathtaking.
meaning: n. ⻛景，景⾊；舞台布景
exampleTranslation: 日落时分，大海上的风景美得令人屏息。

example: I enjoy jogging at a slow pace.
meaning: n. (移动) 速度；步伐，节奏；⼀步 vi. vt. 来回踱步，⾛来⾛去 vt. 调整⾃⼰的⼯作节奏
exampleTranslation: 我喜欢慢慢地慢跑。

example: The antique oak panel was beautiful.
meaning: n. 专⻔⼩组；镶板；仪表盘 n. (⻋⾝的) ⾦属板 vt. (⽤镶板、玻璃等) 镶嵌
exampleTranslation: 那块古董橡木面板非常漂亮。

example: He needs to prove his innocence in the court.
meaning: vt. 证明，证实；展现 vlink. 证明是，被发现是 vi. 发酵
exampleTranslation: 他需要在法庭上证明他的清白。

example: She is unable to provide for her family.
meaning: vt. 提供；规定
exampleTranslation: 她无法供养家庭。

example: I will support your plan provided it is reasonable.
meaning: conj. 如果，只要，在…条件下
exampleTranslation: 只要你的计划合理，我就会支持。

example: The United Nations was called upon to mediate the conflict.
meaning: vt. vi. 调停，调解，斡旋 vt. 找到解决⽅法；调节，影响
exampleTranslation: 联合国被请来调解这场冲突。

example: The internet has become an important medium of communication.
meaning: adj. 中等的，中号的 n. 传播媒介；⼿段，⼯具；培养基
exampleTranslation: 互联网已成为重要的交流媒介。

example: Social media has changed the way we communicate.
meaning: n. 媒体，传播媒介
exampleTranslation: 社交媒体改变了我们的沟通方式。

example: She gave a very elaborate description of the party.
meaning: adj. 复杂的，详尽的，精⼼制作的 vi. vt. 详尽说明，详细阐述
exampleTranslation: 她给出了关于聚会的非常详细的描述。

example: She was elegant and stylish.
meaning: adj. 优雅的，雅致的；简洁巧妙的
exampleTranslation: 她既优雅又时尚。

example: Water is made up of the elements hydrogen and oxygen.
meaning: n. 要素，基本部分；元素；少量
exampleTranslation: 水是由氢和氧两种元素组成的。

example: He learned the elementary rules of chess.
meaning: adj. 基本的；初级的；⼩学的
exampleTranslation: 他学习了国际象棋的基本规则。

example: We need to eliminate the possibility of failure.
meaning: vt. 消除，清除；淘汰；消灭，⼲掉
exampleTranslation: 我们需要消除失败的可能性。

example: We should abolish the old rules.
meaning: vt. 废⽌，取消
exampleTranslation: 我们应该废止旧规则。

example: Your absence was noticed at the meeting.
meaning: n. 缺席，缺勤；不存在，缺乏
exampleTranslation: 你在会议上的缺席被注意到了。

example: John was absent from school yesterday because he was sick.
meaning: adj. 缺席的；缺少的；⼼不在焉的 vt. 缺席，不在场 prep. 没有
exampleTranslation: 形容词用法：Johnwasabsentfromschoolyesterdaybecausehewassick.翻译：约翰昨天因生病而缺席了学校。

example: Michael is studying abroad in the UK.
meaning: adv. 在国外，去国外；⼴为流传地
exampleTranslation: 迈克尔正在英国留学。

example: She has absolute faith in her doctor's abilities.
meaning: adj. 绝对的；⽆疑的；不受约束的 n. 绝对真理
exampleTranslation: 她对医生的能力有着绝对的信任。

example: Plants absorb carbon dioxide and give off oxygen.
meaning: vt. 吸收；理解，掌握；吞并；缓冲 vt. 吸引 (注意⼒)；承受，承担
exampleTranslation: 植物吸收二氧化碳并释放氧气。

example: He has trouble understanding abstract concepts.
meaning: adj. 抽象的；抽象派的 n. 摘要，梗概；抽象派艺术作品 vt. 提取，抽取；写…的摘要
exampleTranslation: 他理解抽象概念有些困难。

example: The government decided to ban smoking in all public places.
meaning: n. 禁⽌，禁令 vt. 禁⽌，取缔；禁⽌ (某⼈) 做某事
exampleTranslation: 政府决定在所有公共场所禁止吸烟。

example: He goes to the bar every night.
meaning: n. 酒吧；吧台；⼩馆；棒；律师界 vt. 闩上 (⻔或窗)；阻挡；禁⽌ prep. 除…之外
exampleTranslation: 他每晚都去酒吧。

example: Sarah applied sunscreen to her bare arms before going outside in the sun.
meaning: adj. ⾚裸的；荒芜的；基本的；空的 vt. 使暴露
exampleTranslation: Sarah在出去晒太阳前在她的裸露手臂上涂了些防晒霜。

example: I barely made it to the bus on time.
meaning: adv. 勉强才能；⼏乎不；仅仅；刚刚
exampleTranslation: 我几乎是刚好赶上公车。

example: This antique vase is a real bargain at $50.
meaning: n. 便宜货；协议，协定 vi. 讨价还价，洽谈，谈条件
exampleTranslation: 这个古董花瓶50美元真是一笔划算的买卖。

example: He is capable of running a mile in four minutes.
meaning: adj. 能做…的；能⼒强的，能⼲的
exampleTranslation: 他有能力在四分钟内跑完一英里。

example: The capacity of the fuel tank in my car is 50 liters.
meaning: n. 容量；能⼒；职责；⽣产量
exampleTranslation: 我的汽车的油箱容量是50公升。

example: Please write your name in capital letters.
meaning: n. ⾸都；资本，资⾦；⼤写字⺟ adj. 死刑的；⼤写的
exampleTranslation: 请用大写字母写你的名字。

example: The soldiers held the enemy as a captive.
meaning: adj. 被关押的；⾮⾃愿的 n. 俘虏，囚徒
exampleTranslation: 士兵们把敌人控制为俘虏。

example: The police were able to capture the criminal.
meaning: vt. 抓住，俘虏，捕捉；攻占，夺取 n. 捕获，攻占，夺取
exampleTranslation: 警察成功地捕获了罪犯。

example: He has made a successful career in finance.
meaning: n. 职业，事业；职业⽣涯 vi. (失控地) 猛冲，疾驶
exampleTranslation: 他在金融行业取得了成功的职业生涯。

example: Be careful when you cross the road.
meaning: adj. ⼩⼼谨慎的；细⼼的，周密的
exampleTranslation: 过马路时要小心。

example: Jones case provides a wealth of legal principles.
meaning: n. 情况，事例；案件；论据；箱，盒
exampleTranslation: 研究Smithv.Jones案例能获取丰富的法律原则。

example: The fisherman is casting his net.
meaning: vt. 扔，抛；向…投以；投射；选⻆ vt. 投 (票)；浇铸 vi. vt. 投 (钓线)，抛 (钓钩) n. 全体演员；铸造品；⽯膏绷带
exampleTranslation: 渔夫正在撒网。

example: I wear casual clothes on the weekends.
meaning: adj. 随意的；⾮正式的；临时的 n. 便装，便鞋；临时⼯
exampleTranslation: 周末我都穿休闲装。

example: There were no casualties in the car accident.
meaning: n. 伤亡⼈员；受害者；急诊室
exampleTranslation: 这次车祸没有造成人员伤亡。

example: I managed to catch the ball before it landed.
meaning: vt. 接住，抓住；逮捕；赶上；得病 vi. vt. 被绊住；烧着 n. 接 (球等)；总捕获量；扣件
exampleTranslation: 我设法在球降落之前抓住它。

example: Books in the library are arranged according to their categories.
meaning: n. 种类，类别
exampleTranslation: 图书馆的书按照它们的类别进行排列。

example: Can you cater for my son’s wedding?
meaning: vi. vt. 提供饮⻝，承办酒席 vi. 满⾜，迎合
exampleTranslation: 你可以为我儿子的婚礼提供饭菜吗？

example: His late arrival was caused by the heavy traffic.
meaning: n. 原因；理由；事业；诉讼案 vt. 导致，使发⽣
exampleTranslation: 他的迟到是由于交通堵塞引起的

example: Proceed with caution because the road is slippery.
meaning: n. ⼩⼼，谨慎；警告，告诫 vi. vt. 警告，告诫，提醒
exampleTranslation: 在路上小心行驶，因为路面很滑。

example: He is a cautious driver, always obeying the speed limits.
meaning: adj. 谨慎的，慎重的，⼩⼼的
exampleTranslation: 他是一个谨慎的司机，总是遵守速度限制。

example: Technical difficulties caused the broadcast to momentarily cease.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 停⽌
exampleTranslation: 技术故障导致广播短暂中断。

example: We will celebrate my brother's birthday next Monday.
meaning: vi. vt. 祝贺，庆贺 vt. 主持 (宗教仪式)；颂扬，赞美
exampleTranslation: 下周一我们将会庆祝我哥哥的生日。

example: The university will hold a commencement ceremony for the graduates.
meaning: n. 仪式，典礼；礼数，客套
exampleTranslation: 大学将为毕业生举行毕业典礼。

example: I am certain that he will come.
meaning: adj. 必然的；确信的；某个；⼀点 pron. 某些
exampleTranslation: 我确定他会来。

example: There is a great deal of certainty that we will win the competition.
meaning: n. 确实，确定性；必然的事
exampleTranslation: 我们赢得比赛的可能性非常大。

example: Sally received a certificate of merit for her volunteer work at the local hospital.
meaning: n. 证明，证书；结业证书
exampleTranslation: 萨莉因在当地医院的志愿者工作获得了荣誉证书。

example: The doctor certified his patient's death.
meaning: vt. 证明，证实；授予专业合格证书
exampleTranslation: 医生确认了他的病人的死亡。

example: I decided to decline his invitation to the party.
meaning: n. 下降，减少；衰退，恶化 vi. 下降，减少；衰退，恶化 vi. vt. 婉拒，谢绝
exampleTranslation: 我决定拒绝他的聚会邀请。

example: The government aims to decrease unemployment by 5% this year.
meaning: vi. vt. 减少，降低 n. 减少，降低
exampleTranslation: 政府计划今年将失业率降低5%。

example: The king issued a decree ordering all his subjects to pay higher taxes.
meaning: n. 法令，政令；判决，裁定 vt. vi. 判决，颁布
exampleTranslation: 国王颁布法令，要求所有臣民增加纳税。

example: I deem his efforts as vital to the project's success.
meaning: vt. 认为，视为，相信
exampleTranslation: 我认为他的努力对项目的成功至关重要。

example: She decided to dedicate her life to science.
meaning: vt. 献⾝，致⼒于；将 (书等) 献给
exampleTranslation: 她决定把自己的一生奉献给科学。

example: From the clues left at the scene, the detective was able to deduce the identity of the criminal.
meaning: vt. 推断，推理，演绎
exampleTranslation: 中文翻译是：通过现场留下的线索，侦探能够推断出罪犯的身份。

example: You can deduct the expenses from your taxable income.
meaning: vt. (从总量中) 扣除，减去
exampleTranslation: 你可以从应纳税收入中扣除这些费用。

example: The latest fashion in hairstyles is to let your hair grow naturally.
meaning: n. 时尚；流⾏款式；时装业；⽅式 vt. 制作，塑造
exampleTranslation: 发型的最新时尚是让你的头发自然生长。

example: This is a very fashionable restaurant with a modern design.
meaning: adj. 流⾏的，时尚的；有钱⼈光顾的
exampleTranslation: 这是一个很时髦的餐厅，设计都是现代风格的。

example: He did me a great favour by driving me to the airport.
meaning: n. 帮助，恩惠；赞同，⽀持；偏爱 vt. 更喜欢；偏爱；有利于
exampleTranslation: 他开车送我到机场，为我提供了很大的帮助。

example: He received a favourable review for his performance.
meaning: adj. 赞成的；讨⼈喜欢的；有利的
exampleTranslation: 他的表现得到了好评。

example: Ice cream is my favourite dessert.
meaning: adj. 最喜欢的，最喜爱的 n. 最喜欢的⼈或物；受宠的⼈
exampleTranslation: 冰淇淋是我最喜欢的甜点。

example: Please sit in the chair.
meaning: vi. 坐；坐落在，被放在；担任 vt. 使坐，使就座 vt. vi. 参加考试
exampleTranslation: 请坐在椅子上。

example: They chose a beautiful site for the new school.
meaning: n. 场所，地点；⼯地；⽹站 vt. 使坐落于，为…选址
exampleTranslation: 他们为新学校选择了一个美丽的地点。

example: I am not happy about my current situation.
meaning: n. 情况，形势；位置，环境；⼯作
exampleTranslation: 我对我现在的情况不满意。

example: The human skeleton is made up of 206 bones.
meaning: n. ⻣骼；(建筑等的) 框架；梗概
exampleTranslation: 人的骨骼由206块骨头组成。

example: She was skeptical about his excuses.
meaning: adj. 表⽰怀疑的，持怀疑态度的
exampleTranslation: 她对他的借口表示怀疑。

example: She made a sketch of the new design.
meaning: n. 素描，草图；简报，概述；⼩品 vt. vi. 画素描，画速写 vt. 概述，简述
exampleTranslation: 她为新设计画了一个草图。

example: They embraced each other warmly.
meaning: vi. vt. 拥抱 vt. 欣然接受；包括 n. 拥抱；接受，信奉
exampleTranslation: 他们亲切地拥抱了对方。

example: You need to embed the video into the webpage.
meaning: vt. 使…嵌⼊；派遣 (战地记者)
exampleTranslation: 你需要将视频嵌入到网页中。

example: His paintings embody the spirit of the American West.
meaning: vt. 使具体化，体现；收录，包括
exampleTranslation: 他的画作体现了美国西部的精神。

example: The teacher tried to elicit responses from the students.
meaning: vt. 引出，诱出，套出
exampleTranslation: 老师试图引出学生的回应。

example: He is a member of the political elite.
meaning: n. 精英，上层⼈⼠ adj. 精英的，精锐的
exampleTranslation: 他是政治精英的一员。

example: He couldn't find what he wanted and decided to look elsewhere.
meaning: adv. 在别处，去别处
exampleTranslation: 他找不到他想要的，决定去别处寻找。

example: Tom drank water to quench his thirst.
meaning: n. ⼝渴；渴求 vi. 渴求
exampleTranslation: Tom喝水来解渴。

example: You must give this contract a thorough reading before you sign it.
meaning: adj. 全⾯的，彻底的；(⼈) 仔细的
exampleTranslation: 你必须在签字前对这个合同进行彻底阅读。

example: Even though it was raining, he did not carry an umbrella.
meaning: conj. 尽管，虽然 conj. adv. 可是，然⽽
exampleTranslation: 尽管正在下雨，他还是没有带伞。

example: The teacher provoked thought among the students.
meaning: n. 想法，主意；⼼思；思考；关⼼
exampleTranslation: 老师在学生中间激发了思考。

example: He's always so thoughtful, always remembering our anniversary.
meaning: adj. 沉思的；体贴的；深思熟虑的
exampleTranslation: 他总是这么贴心，记得我们的周年纪念日。

example: Your threats don't scare me.
meaning: n. 威胁；坏事发⽣的可能
exampleTranslation: 你的威胁并不能吓到我。

example: He threatened me with violence if I didn't do what he wanted.
meaning: vt. 威胁；危害到 vi. vt. (坏事) 可能发⽣，可能引发
exampleTranslation: 他以暴力威胁我，如果我不按他的意愿行事的话。

example: You need to update your computer to the latest version of the operating system.
meaning: vt. 更新，升级；提供最新消息 n. 更新，升级；最新消息
exampleTranslation: 你需要将你的电脑更新到最新的操作系统版本。

example: You should upgrade your old phone to a newer model.
meaning: vt. 升级；提拔 n. 改善，升级
exampleTranslation: 你应该把你的旧手机升级为新款型号。

example: We must uphold the principles of justice and equality.
meaning: vt. ⽀持，维护；维持 (原判)
exampleTranslation: 我们必须坚持公正和平等的原则。

example: The bad news upset him.
meaning: adj. 难过的，⼼烦的；肠胃不适的 vt. 使烦恼；打乱；使 (肠胃) 不适 n. 意外结果，冷⻔；肠胃病；苦恼
exampleTranslation: 这个坏消息他很生气。

example: He likes to keep his equipment up-to-date.
meaning: adj. 新式的；掌握最新信息的
exampleTranslation: 他喜欢保持他的设备最新。

example: The window needs to be kept open to ventilate the room.
meaning: vt. 使…通⻛；公开表达，公开讨论
exampleTranslation: 窗户需要保持开启，以便房间通风。Thewindowneedstobekeptopentoventilatetheroom.

example: Investing in the stock market is always a venture.
meaning: n. (有⻛险的) 投资活动，企业 vi. 冒险去某地 vt. 试探地说 (或做)
exampleTranslation: 投资股市总是一场冒险。

example: Widespread rains are expected in the city tomorrow.
meaning: adj. 普遍的，⼴泛的
exampleTranslation: 中文：预计城市明天将有大范围降雨。

example: Our team will win the match.
meaning: vi. vt. 赢，获胜 vt. 赢得，获得 n. 赢，胜利
exampleTranslation: 我们的队伍将会赢得这场比赛。

example: He is known for his sharp wit.
meaning: n. 机智⻛趣 (的⼈)；头脑；明智
exampleTranslation: 他以其敏锐的智慧而闻名。

example: You can withdraw money from your bank account at any time.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 撤回，撤离；(使) 退出 vt. 收回，撤销；取 (款)；停⽌供应 vi. 不与⼈交往
exampleTranslation: 你可以在任何时候从你的银行账户里取款。

example: He was a witness to the accident.
meaning: n. ⽬击者；(出庭的) 证⼈；⻅证⼈ vt. ⽬击，⽬睹；⻅证；连署
exampleTranslation: 他是那场事故的见证人。

example: They inaugurated the new headquarters with a brief ceremony.
meaning: vt. 使正式就任；为…举⾏落成仪式 vt. 开创
exampleTranslation: 他们通过一个简短的典礼来启动新的总部。

example: Johnny needs some sort of incentive to do well in school.
meaning: n. 激励，动机，刺激
exampleTranslation: 约翰尼需要某种刺激来在学校表现优秀。

example: The incidence of heart disease is increasing in developed countries.
meaning: n. 发⽣ (率)
exampleTranslation: 在发达国家，心脏病的发生率正在增加。

example: The police are now investigating the incident.
meaning: n. 事件；(两国间的) 冲突
exampleTranslation: 警方正在调查这个事件。

example: Incidentally, have you heard any news from your brother lately?
meaning: adv. 顺便提⼀下；偶然地，附带地
exampleTranslation: 顺便问一下，你最近有没有听到你兄弟的消息？

example: I incline to agree with you.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 倾向；(使) 倾斜 vt. 点 (头) n. 斜坡，斜⾯
exampleTranslation: 我倾向于同意你。

example: She has made great academic achievements in her field of study.
meaning: adj. 学术的；纯理论的；学习好的 n. 学者，⼤学教师
exampleTranslation: 她在她的研究领域取得了很大的学术成就。

example: She was educated at a private academy.
meaning: n. 学院；学会，研究院
exampleTranslation: 她在一所私立学院接受教育。

example: The car started to accelerate.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 加快 vi. (⻋辆等) 加速
exampleTranslation: 这车开始加速了。

example: I can't accept your gift.
meaning: vi. vt. 接受，同意 vt. 认可；承担；容忍；接纳
exampleTranslation: 我不能接受你的礼物。

example: Her acceptance into the team was an important step in her career.
meaning: n. 接受；认可，赞同；接纳
exampleTranslation: 她被团队接受是她职业生涯的重要一步。

example: You can access the information online.
meaning: n. 进⼊ (权)，通道；使⽤权 vt. 访问，存取；进⼊
exampleTranslation: 你可以在线访问这个信息。

example: The accessory kit includes a battery and a charger.
meaning: n. 配件，附属品；配饰；帮凶
exampleTranslation: 配件套装包括一个电池和一个充电器。

example: We will begin the meeting at nine o’clock.
meaning: vi. vt. 开始
exampleTranslation: 我们将在九点开始会议。

example: This is only the beginning of a long journey.
meaning: n. 开头，开始部分；起源，初期
exampleTranslation: 这只是长途旅行的开始。

example: I am speaking on behalf of my community at the city council meeting.
meaning: n. 代表 (某⼈)；为了…的利益
exampleTranslation: 我代表我的社区在市议会会议上发言

example: Children should learn to behave properly.
meaning: vi. 表现；产⽣⾃然反应，发⽣作⽤ vi. vt. 举⽌得体，有礼貌 vt. 表现得…的
exampleTranslation: 孩子们应该学会礼貌行为。

example: She was very upset about her son's behaviour.
meaning: n. ⾏为，举⽌；表现⽅式
exampleTranslation: 她对儿子的行为感到非常烦恼。

example: His belief in God gave him the strength to cope.
meaning: n. 信念；信任；信仰
exampleTranslation: 他对上帝的信仰给了他应对生活的力量。

example: I believe in your ability to complete the task.
meaning: vt. 相信 vi. vt. 认为 vi. 有宗教信仰
exampleTranslation: 我相信你有能力完成这个任务。

example: This book belongs to me.
meaning: vi. 属于；应在 (某处)；能适应
exampleTranslation: 这本书是我的。

example: Eating fruits and vegetables is beneficial for your health.
meaning: adj. 有益的，有利的
exampleTranslation: 吃水果和蔬菜对你的健康有益。

example: Regular exercise can benefit your health.
meaning: n. 好处；救济⾦；福利；慈善活动 vt. vi. 使受益，得益于
exampleTranslation: 规律锻炼有益于你的健康。

example: This job is a big challenge for him.
meaning: n. 挑战，艰巨任务；质疑 vt. 质疑；向…发出挑战
exampleTranslation: 对他来说，这份工作是一项大挑战。

example: There's a good chance of success.
meaning: n. 机会；可能性；⻛险；偶然 vt. 冒险，拿…去冒⻛险 vi. 偶然发⽣，碰巧
exampleTranslation: 成功的可能性很大。

example: Our teacher wants us to change our attitude towards study.
meaning: vi. 改变，变化 vt. vi. (使) 变换；换⾐服；换乘 vt. 使不同；转换；替代；互换 n. 改变，变化；替代；零钱
exampleTranslation: 我们的老师希望我们改变对学习的态度。

example: The channel between England and France is called the English Channel.
meaning: n. 频道；途径，渠道；海峡；⽔渠 vt. 为…输送 (资⾦等)；输送，传送
exampleTranslation: 英格兰和法国之间的海峡叫做英吉利海峡。

example: She showed great character in facing the adversity.
meaning: n. 性格；⻆⾊；特点；字符；名誉
exampleTranslation: 面对逆境，她展现出了极大的毅力。

example: One characteristic of the lion is its powerful roar.
meaning: n. 特⾊，特点 adj. 典型的，独特的，特有的
exampleTranslation: 狮子的一个特征就是它强大的咆哮。

example: He had to defend himself against the accusations.
meaning: vt. vi. 防御，保卫；防守；为被告辩护 vt. 为…辩护；卫冕
exampleTranslation: 他必须为自己面对的指控进行辩护。

example: How would you define success?
meaning: vt. 给…下定义；阐明，界定
exampleTranslation: 你怎么定义成功?

example: He has made a definite commitment to the cause.
meaning: adj. 确定的；清楚的；肯定的 n. 确定的事 (或⼈)
exampleTranslation: 他为这个事业做出了明确的承诺。

example: The professor gave a clear definition of the term.
meaning: n. 定义，释义；清晰，分明
exampleTranslation: 教授给了这个术语一个清晰的定义。

example: The villagers refused to defy the new safety rules.
meaning: vt. 违抗，违反；难以 (描述、解释等)
exampleTranslation: 村民们拒绝违反新的安全规定。

example: He has a degree in business administration.
meaning: n. 度；程度；学位
exampleTranslation: 他有一个工商管理学位。

example: Please don't delay your decision. It's important we act soon.
meaning: n. 延误，耽搁的时间；延期，延迟 vi. vt. 推迟，使延期 vt. 使延误，使耽搁
exampleTranslation: 请不要推迟你的决定，我们需要尽快采取行动。

example: Their movements were slow and deliberate.
meaning: adj. 故意的；(动作) 从容的 vi. vt. 慎重考虑
exampleTranslation: 他们的动作缓慢而刻意。

example: These flowers are very delicate, so handle them gently.
meaning: adj. 微妙的；易受损的；精美的 adj. (仪器等) 精密的；柔弱的
exampleTranslation: 这些花非常脆弱，所以请小心轻放。

example: Could you please deliver this message to your manager?
meaning: vt. vi. 递送，传送；履⾏，兑现 vt. 发表 (讲话)；交与；接⽣；分娩
exampleTranslation: 你能把这个信息给你们经理转达一下吗？

example: The pizza delivery has arrived.
meaning: n. 递送 (之物)；分娩；发⾔⽅式
exampleTranslation: 这句话展示了“delivery”在语境中的用法。

example: I enjoy reading science fiction.
meaning: n. ⼩说；虚构之事，幻想
exampleTranslation: 我喜欢读科幻小说。

example: The farmer ploughed his field for the spring planting.
meaning: n. ⽥，地；领域；运动场；实地 vi. 担任守队 (队员) vt. 使参加竞选；处理，应付
exampleTranslation: 农民正在犁他的田地，准备春季种植。

example: The lion is a fierce predator in the jungle.
meaning: adj. 凶猛的；激烈的；(天⽓) 猛烈的
exampleTranslation: 在丛林中，狮子是一种凶猛的掠食者。

example: Don't fight with your brother.
meaning: vt. vi. 战⽃；打架；⽃争；努⼒争取 vi. 争辩；奋⼒抵抗，还击 n. 打架；⽃争；竞赛；争吵
exampleTranslation: 不要和你的弟弟打架。

example: The figure was too high for me to afford.
meaning: n. 数字；算术；⼈物；⼈影；⾝材 n. 塑像；(书中的) 图表 vt. 认为，以为；计算 vt. vi. 弄懂，弄清楚
exampleTranslation: 这个数字对我来说太高了，我负担不起

example: The world of finance is fast-paced and intense.
meaning: n. 财政，⾦融；资⾦；财务状况 vt. 给…提供资⾦，资助
exampleTranslation: 金融世界的步伐很快，而且也很激烈。

example: I need to make a financial decision about renewing my lease.
meaning: adj. 财政的，⾦融的，财务的
exampleTranslation: 我需要就续租的事宜作出财务决定。

example: The finding of the court is that the defendant is not guilty.
meaning: n. 研究结果，发现；判决
exampleTranslation: "法庭的裁决是被告无罪。"

example: The resources of the earth are finite.
meaning: adj. 有尽的，有限的
exampleTranslation: 地球的资源是有限的。

example: Her decision is firm and she won't change it.
meaning: n. 公司，商⾏，事务所 adj. 坚硬的；牢固的；坚定的 vt. 使强壮，使坚固 vi. 回升，稳步上涨
exampleTranslation: 她的决定很坚定，她不会改变

example: This is the first time I've been to New York.
meaning: det. ord. 第⼀；最重要的，⾸要的 adv. ⾸先，第⼀；⾸次，第⼀次 n. 第⼀个⼈ (或事)；空前的成就
exampleTranslation: 这是我第一次来到纽约。

example: You need to do exercises everyday to stay fit.
meaning: vi. vt. 适合，合⾝；可容纳；符合 vt. 试穿；安装；使适合 (某⼯作) adj. 健壮的，健康的；适合的 n. (癫痫等的)发作；⼀阵；匹配
exampleTranslation: 你需要每天锻炼来保持健康。

example: Global warming is a serious issue that requires immediate action.
meaning: adj. 全球的；全⾯的，整体的
exampleTranslation: 全球暖化是一个严重的问题，需要立即采取行动。

example: Smith uses a globe to teach his students about world geography.
meaning: n. 地球，世界；地球仪；球状物
exampleTranslation: 作为一名地理教师，史密斯先生用地球仪来教学生们全球地理知识。

example: She decided to abandon the idea and start afresh.
meaning: vt. 放弃；抛弃；沉湎于 n. 放任，放纵
exampleTranslation: 她决定放弃这个想法，重新开始。

example: If you want to stay in this house, you have to abide by the rules.
meaning: vi. 遵守，遵从；逗留，居住 vt. 忍受，忍耐
exampleTranslation: 如果你想住在这个房子里，你必须遵守规则。

example: He has the ability to make people laugh.
meaning: n. 能⼒；才能，本领
exampleTranslation: 他有使人发笑的能力。

example: He was able to finish the task on time.
meaning: adj. 能做…的；有才⼲的
exampleTranslation: 他能够及时完成这项任务。

example: He left school at an abnormal early age.
meaning: adj. 不正常的，反常的
exampleTranslation: 他在异常年轻的年纪就离开了学校。

example: She has a strong background in biochemistry.
meaning: n. 背景；后景；背景⾳；底⾊
exampleTranslation: 她在生物化学方面有很深的底子。

example: In yoga, it's important to find your balance.
meaning: n. 平衡，均衡；余额；债务余款 vi. vt. (使) 保持平衡；相抵，抵消 vt. 使均衡；权衡；结平 (账⽬)
exampleTranslation: 瑜伽中，寻找平衡点是非常重要的。

example: The base of the tower is very sturdy.
meaning: n. 底部；基础，根据；基地；垒；碱 vt. 以…为基地；以…为基础 adj. 卑鄙的，⽆耻的
exampleTranslation: 塔的底部非常稳固。

example: Parents often use the basement as a play area for children.
meaning: n. 地下室
exampleTranslation: 父母经常把地下室作为孩子们的游玩区。

example: She learned basic survival skills in the army.
meaning: adj. 基本的；最简单的；最重要的
exampleTranslation: 她在军队里学习了基本的生存技巧。

example: The basis of this argument is a set of data from a recent study.
meaning: n. 基础，要素；⽅式；根据，依据
exampleTranslation: 这个争论的基础是一份来自最近研究的数据。

example: You can use this app to calculate your calorie intake.
meaning: vt. 计算，核算；预测，推测
exampleTranslation: 你可以使用这个应用程序来计算你的热量摄取。

example: Give me a call when you arrive.
meaning: vt. 把…称为；认为…是；打电话叫 vi. vt. ⼤声呼叫；召唤；给…打电话 n. 通话；叫喊；短暂拜访；呼吁
exampleTranslation: 你到了给我打个电话。

example: The sea is calm today.
meaning: adj. 平静的；⻛平浪静的；⽆⻛的 vt. 使平静，使镇静 n. 平静，宁静；冷静
exampleTranslation: 今天的海面很平静。

example: The company launched a new ad campaign to promote its brand.
meaning: n. (社会、政治) 运动，活动；战役 vi. vt. 发起运动，开展活动
exampleTranslation: 公司发起了一场新的广告活动来推广其品牌。

example: I believe I am a suitable candidate for the position.
meaning: n. 候选⼈，申请⼈；考⽣
exampleTranslation: 我相信我是这个职位的合适人选。

example: The data is still being analyzed.
meaning: n. 资料，数据
exampleTranslation: 数据仍在分析中。

example: Our employee information is stored in a database.
meaning: n. 数据库
exampleTranslation: 我们的员工信息存储在数据库中。

example: The expiry date of this product is two weeks from now.
meaning: n. ⽇期；时候；约会 (对象)；海枣 vt. 写上⽇期；确定年代 vt. vi. 与 (某⼈) 谈恋爱
exampleTranslation: 这个产品的过期日期是从现在开始的两周后。

example: The rising sun did dazzle my eyes.
meaning: vt. vi. (强光) 使⽬眩，使眼花 vt. 使倾倒，使惊叹 n. 令⼈赞叹的东西 (或品质)
exampleTranslation: 日出的阳光让我的眼睛感到刺目

example: We made a deal with the supplier for regular deliveries.
meaning: n. ⼤量，很多；交易，协议；待遇 vi. 处理，对付；与…做⽣意；涉及 vi. vt. 发牌；⾮法买卖毒品，贩毒
exampleTranslation: 我们和供货商达成了一个定期供货的协议。

example: He is a well-known dealer in luxury cars.
meaning: n. 商⼈；毒品贩⼦；发牌⼈
exampleTranslation: 他是一名知名的豪车经销商。

example: The presidential debate was broadcasted nationwide.
meaning: n. 辩论，讨论，争论 vt. vi. 辩论，讨论，争论；考虑，盘算
exampleTranslation: 总统辩论在全国范围内播放。

example: She has been working in this company for a decade.
meaning: n. ⼗年
exampleTranslation: 她在这家公司工作了十年。

example: I can't decide between the two options.
meaning: vt. vi. 决定；裁定 vt. 使…下定决⼼
exampleTranslation: 我在两个选项之间无法做出决定。

example: I support your decision to go back to school.
meaning: n. 决定；决断⼒；作出决定
exampleTranslation: 我支持你回学校的决定。

example: His decisive action saved us from disaster.
meaning: adj. 决定性的，关键的；果断的
exampleTranslation: 他果断的行动使我们免于灾难。

example: Every Christmas, we decorate the tree with lights and ornaments.
meaning: vt. 装饰；装修；授予…勋章
exampleTranslation: 每个圣诞节，我们都用灯饰和装饰物来装饰树。

example: Economic growth is a key factor in reducing poverty.
meaning: adj. 经济的；有利可图的
exampleTranslation: 经济增长是减少贫困的关键因素。

example: She found a more economical way to heat the house.
meaning: adj. 经济的，省钱的，节约的
exampleTranslation: 她找到了一个更节约的方式给房子供暖。

example: My major in university was economics.
meaning: n. 经济学；经济状况
exampleTranslation: 我大学的专业是经济学。

example: The global economy is experiencing a serious recession.
meaning: n. 经济；经济体；节约
exampleTranslation: 全球经济正在经历严重衰退。

example: It is a parent's duty to educate their children.
meaning: vt. 教育；教导，培养
exampleTranslation: 父母有责任教育他们的孩子

example: Every child has the right to get education.
meaning: n. 教育，培训；教育学
exampleTranslation: 每个孩子都有获得教育的权利。

example: The new president will take effect from February.
meaning: n. 影响，结果；特效，效果；财产 vt. 引起，使发⽣
exampleTranslation: 新的总统将在二月就职。

example: She's an incredibly effective teacher.
meaning: adj. 有效的；⽣效的；实际的
exampleTranslation: 她是一位非常有成效的教师。

example: Mike is an efficient worker, he finishes his tasks earlier than anyone else.
meaning: adj. 效率⾼的
exampleTranslation: 是一个工作效率高的员工，他总是比其他人先完成任务。

example: The efficiency of the whole process was impressive.
meaning: n. 效率，效能
exampleTranslation: 整个过程的效率令人印象深刻。

example: He made an enormous effort to pass the exam.
meaning: n. 努⼒，⼒⽓；特别⾏动
exampleTranslation: 他做出了巨大的努力来通过这场考试。

example: This skirt is made of fine silk fabric.
meaning: n. 织物，布料；结构，构造
exampleTranslation: 这条裙子是用上等丝绸面料制作的。

example: The company fabricates plastic chairs.
meaning: vt. 捏造，编造；制造，⽣产
exampleTranslation: 这家公司制造塑料椅子。

example: Wash your face every morning.
meaning: n. 脸；⾯部表情；表⾯；钟⾯ vt. vi. ⾯对，⾯向 vt. ⾯临；正视；对付
exampleTranslation: 每天早晨洗脸。

example: Each facet of the problem requires careful consideration.
exampleTranslation: 问题的每个方面都需要仔细考虑。

example: Her ability is a vital factor in her success.
meaning: n. 因素，要素；因⼦，因数；倍数 vt. 把…因素包括进去
exampleTranslation: 她的能力是她成功的关键因素。

example: The sun faded into the horizon.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 褪⾊，(使) 变暗淡 vi. 逐渐消失
exampleTranslation: 太阳逐渐消失在地平线以下。

example: She studied all night for the test but still failed.
meaning: vi. vt. 失败；不及格 vi. 未做；出故障；衰退；倒闭 vt. 使失望，有负于 n. 不及格
exampleTranslation: 她通宵复习准备考试，但是仍然失败了。

example: His attempts ended in failure.
meaning: n. 失败；失败者；未做；故障
exampleTranslation: 他的努力以失败告终。

example: Our teacher is always fair in her grading.
meaning: adj. 公平的；相当⼤的；不错的 adj. 浅⾊的；晴朗的；美丽的 n. 展销会；露天游乐场；集市 adv. 按照规则，公平合理地
exampleTranslation: 我们的老师打分总是非常公正。

example: He is fairly tall for his age.
meaning: adv. 相当地；公正地；简直
exampleTranslation: 他对于他的年龄来说相当高。

example: Don't let your spirits fall. Better days are ahead.
meaning: vi. 落下；跌倒；下跌；沦陷；发⽣ n. 下落；减少；沦陷；瀑布；秋季
exampleTranslation: 别让你的心情低落，美好的日子在前方等待。

example: She is a big fan of action movies.
meaning: n. 粉丝，狂热爱好者；⻛扇；扇⼦ vt. 扇 (⻛)；煽起，激起
exampleTranslation: 她是动作电影的超级粉丝。

example: I fancy a cup of coffee.
meaning: adj. 花哨的；精致的；奢华的 vt. 想要，想做；爱慕；⾃负；认为 vi. vt. 真没想到，竟然 n. 想象；想要，爱好
exampleTranslation: 我想喝一杯咖啡。

example: The mystery novels always fascinate him.
meaning: vt. vi. 使着迷，迷住
exampleTranslation: 他总是被那些神秘小说深深吸引。

example: I need to gain a better understanding of the situation before making a decision.
meaning: vt. 获得，赢得；增加；到达 vt. vi. 受益；增值 n. 增加；好处；利润
exampleTranslation: 我需要在做决定之前，对情况有更好的理解。

example: He lost all his money in a gamble on the gold market.
meaning: vi. vt. 赌博；冒险，以…为赌注 n. 冒险，赌博
exampleTranslation: 他在金市的投机中输光了所有的钱。

example: You need to mind the gap between the train and the platform.
meaning: n. 缝隙；(时间) 间隔；差距；漏洞
exampleTranslation: 你需要注意火车与站台之间的间隙

example: Scientists found a gene linked to the disease.
meaning: n. 基因
exampleTranslation: 科学家发现了一个与这种疾病有关的基因。

example: General admission is at noon.
meaning: adj. 普遍的，总的；通常的；⼤概的 adj. 泛的；⾸席的，总管的 n. 将军
exampleTranslation: "一般门票的入场时间是中午。"

example: Don't generalize from your own experience to everyone.
meaning: vi. 概括，归纳 vt. 普及，扩⼤…的运⽤
exampleTranslation: 不要以自己的经验对所有人进行概括。

example: He has a bad habit of biting his nails.
meaning: n. 习惯；(对毒品、烟酒的) 瘾
exampleTranslation: 他有咬指甲的坏习惯。

example: His progress was hampered by his lack of money.
meaning: vt. 妨碍，阻碍 n. ⻝品盒；脏⾐篓
exampleTranslation: 他的进步受到了他缺钱的阻碍。

example: His physical handicap didn't prevent him from leading a full a satisfying life.
meaning: n. ⽣理缺陷，残疾；障碍，阻碍 vt. 妨碍，阻碍
exampleTranslation: 他的身体残疾并没有阻止他过上充实和满足的生活。

example: The warrior raised his shield to block the attack.
meaning: n. 盾牌；掩护物；护罩；盾形奖牌 vt. 保护
exampleTranslation: 战士举起了他的盾牌来阻挡攻击。

example: The car won't shift into gear.
meaning: vi. vt. 转移，挪动；换 (挡) vi. (情况等) 改变 vt. 改变观点 (态度等)；推卸 (责任) n. 改变，转变；轮班 (职⼯)
exampleTranslation: 汽车无法换挡

example: My shoulder hurts because I carried a heavy backpack.
meaning: n. 肩膀；⾐肩；⼭肩；路肩 vt. 承担，负担；背，扛 vt. vi. 挤，闯
exampleTranslation: 我肩膀痛因为我背着一个重背包。

example: He decided to put on a magic show at the party.
meaning: vt. 出⽰；表明；教，演⽰；带领 vi. vt. 流露出；露出；展览，上映 vi. 出现，露⾯ n. 演出；电视节⽬；展览会；假象
exampleTranslation: 他决定在派对上表演一场魔术秀。

example: I took a quick shower before breakfast.
meaning: n. 浴室，淋浴器；淋浴；阵⾬ vi. (洗) 淋浴 vt. ⼤量地给
exampleTranslation: 我在早餐前快速洗了个淋浴。

example: The new policy will generate a lot of new jobs.
meaning: vt. 产⽣，引起；发电，产⽣ (能量)
exampleTranslation: 新政策将产生很多新的工作岗位。

example: Each generation faces its own challenges.
meaning: n. ⼀代；产⽣
exampleTranslation: 每一代人都会面对自己的挑战。

example: The city is investing in new a wind power generator.
meaning: n. 发电机；发⽣器，⽣成器
exampleTranslation: 城市正在投资新的风力发电机。

example: He made a generous donation to the charity.
meaning: adj. 慷慨的；⼤量的；宽宏⼤量的
exampleTranslation: 他对慈善机构做了慷慨的捐赠。

example: Albert Einstein was often considered a genius.
meaning: n. 天才⼈物；天才，天赋；本领
exampleTranslation: 艾伯特·爱因斯坦经常被认为是一个天才。

example: He gave a beautiful diamond ring as a gift to his wife.
meaning: n. 礼物；天赋，才能 vt. 赠送
exampleTranslation: 他把一枚美丽的钻石戒指作为礼物送给了他的妻子。

example: He is a giant in his field.
meaning: adj. 巨⼤的，伟⼤的 n. 巨⼈，巨兽；⼤公司；伟⼈
exampleTranslation: 具有非常高的地位和影响力

example: She has a gigantic task ahead of her.
meaning: adj. 巨⼤的，庞⼤的
exampleTranslation: 她面临着一项巨大的任务。

example: Please give me a clear answer.
meaning: vt. 给；提供；⽀付；举办；使产⽣ vt. vi. 赠送；捐赠
exampleTranslation: 请给我一个明确的答复。

example: Accidents can happen even in the safest homes.
meaning: vi. 发⽣，出现 vlink. 碰巧，恰好
exampleTranslation: 即使在最安全的家里，也可能发生意外事故。

example: Smoking does harm to your health.
meaning: n. 伤害，损害 vt. 伤害，损害
exampleTranslation: 吸烟有害健康。

example: The colours of the room must be in harmony.
meaning: n. 融洽，和睦；和声；和谐，协调
exampleTranslation: 房间的颜色必须协调。

example: The desert is a harsh environment for humans to live in.
meaning: adj. 严厉的；恶劣的；刺⽿的
exampleTranslation: 沙漠对人类来说是个严酷的环境。

example: Ignorance of the law is no excuse for breaking it.
meaning: n. ⽆知，愚昧
exampleTranslation: 对法律的无知不能成为触犯它的借口。

example: She was ignorant of the fact that her friend had left town.
meaning: adj. ⽆知的，愚昧的，不知情的
exampleTranslation: 她并不知道朋友已经离开城市。

example: You can't ignore the fact that many people are still living below the poverty line.
meaning: vt. 不理，忽视
exampleTranslation: 你不能忽视的事实是，许多人仍然生活在贫困线以下。

example: I am feeling ill today.
meaning: adj. 患病的，不适的；坏的，有害的 adv. 恶劣地；差劲地 n. 问题，弊端，疾病
exampleTranslation: 我今天感觉不舒服。

example: He is suffering from a terrible illness.
meaning: n. 病，疾病，患病期
exampleTranslation: 他正在遭受一场可怕的疾病。

example: The oasis in the desert was just an illusion caused by the heat.
meaning: n. 错觉，幻想，错误观念；假象
exampleTranslation: 沙漠中的绿洲只是由热气引起的错觉。

example: The teacher used a story to illustrate the point.
meaning: vt. 说明，阐明；给…加插图；表明
exampleTranslation: 老师用一个故事来阐明这个观点。

example: The book was filled with colorful illustrations.
meaning: n. 插图；例证，实例；说明，图解
exampleTranslation: 这本书充满了色彩斑斓的插图。

example: Can you see the image on the screen?
meaning: n. 图像；画像；形象；印象
exampleTranslation: 你能看到屏幕上的图像吗？

example: Imagine a city with no traffic jams.
meaning: vt. vi. 想象；猜想，猜测 vt. 胡思乱想，误以为
exampleTranslation: 想象一座没有交通堵塞的城市。

example: She has an imaginary friend named Bob.
meaning: adj. 想象中的，虚构的
exampleTranslation: 她有一个叫Bob的想象中的朋友。

example: Children usually have rich imagination.
meaning: n. 想象⼒；想象，幻想；创造⼒
exampleTranslation: 孩子们通常都有丰富的想象力。

example: Jake is an imaginative child who always dreams of exploring space.
meaning: adj. 有想象⼒的，有独创性的
exampleTranslation: 杰克是个有想象力的孩子，总是梦想着探索太空。

example: Children often imitate their parents.
meaning: vt. (为逗乐) 模仿；仿效，模拟
exampleTranslation: 孩子们经常模仿他们的父母。

example: He does an excellent imitation of the manager's mannerisms.
meaning: n. 模仿，效仿；仿制品；滑稽模仿
exampleTranslation: 他对经理的习性模仿得很像

example: She will lead the project to its completion.
meaning: vt. vi. 带路；领导；通往；处于⾸位 vi. 导致，造成 (后果) vt. 使得出 (观点)；过 (某种⽣活) n. 铅；领先地位；超前量；范例
exampleTranslation: 她将会引导这个项目完成。

example: His leadership skills enabled his team to finish the project on time.
meaning: n. 领导地位；领导才能；领导层
exampleTranslation: 他的领导能力使得他的团队能按时完成项目。

example: He is a leading expert in his field.
meaning: adj. 最重要的，最好的；领先的
exampleTranslation: 他是他领域的领先专家。

example: Smoking is not legal for people under 18 years old.
meaning: adj. 法律的，法律⽅⾯的；合法的
exampleTranslation: 18岁以下的人抽烟是不合法的。

example: The government is considering new legislation to prohibit the sale of firearms.
meaning: n. 法律，法规；⽴法
exampleTranslation: 政府正在考虑新的立法来禁止销售火器。

example: The police searched his house but found no legitimate evidence.
meaning: adj. 合法的；正当的；婚⽣的 vt. 使合法化，使合理化
exampleTranslation: 警察搜索了他的房子，但没有找到合法的证据。

example: He spends his leisure time reading.
meaning: n. 闲暇，空闲
exampleTranslation: 他把闲暇时间用来阅读。

example: She is at the top level in management.
meaning: n. ⽔平；级别；⽔平⾼度；楼层 adj. 平的；等⾼的，地位相同的 vt. 使平坦；摧毁，夷平；瞄准 vt. vi. 使相等，使平等
exampleTranslation: 她在管理层的最高级别。

example: He moved the large stone using a lever.
meaning: n. 操纵杆；杠杆，撬棒；施压⼿段 vt. 撬起，撬动
exampleTranslation: 他用杠杆移开了大石头。

example: The government plans to levy a tax on luxury goods.
meaning: n. 征收额，(尤指) 税款 vt. 征收，征 (税)
exampleTranslation: 政府计划对奢侈品征税。

example: I have been entrusted to manage this project.
meaning: vt. vi. 经营，管理；成功做到 vi. 勉强维持⽣活 vt. 合理使⽤ (资源)
exampleTranslation: 我被委托来负责这个项目。

example: The management of the company is in the hands of the directors.
meaning: n. 管理；管理层
exampleTranslation: 公司的管理权在董事们手中。

example: His affection for his wife is manifest in everything he does.
meaning: vt. 显现，表明 adj. 明显的 n. 载货单，旅客名单
exampleTranslation: 他对妻子的爱在他做的每件事情上都显而易见。

example: The child was able to manipulate the toy car easily.
meaning: vt. (暗中) 操纵；(熟练地) 操作
exampleTranslation: 孩子能够轻松操控这个玩具车。

example: She has a very pleasant manner.
meaning: n. ⽅式；态度，举⽌；礼貌，礼仪
exampleTranslation: 她的举止非常和善。

example: The text should be written with a one-inch margin.
meaning: n. ⻚边空⽩处；差额；利润；余地
exampleTranslation: 文本应该以一英寸的边距写就。

example: There's only a marginal difference between the two cars' performance.
meaning: adj. 微不⾜道的；⻚边的；边缘的
exampleTranslation: 这两辆车的性能之间只有微小的差异。

example: A mass of clouds covered the sky.
meaning: n. 团，块；⼤量；群众；质量 adj. ⼤量的，⼤批的 vi. vt. 集结，聚集
exampleTranslation: 一大片云遮住了天空。

example: The earthquake caused massive damage to the city.
meaning: adj. ⼤⽽重的；巨⼤的，严重的
exampleTranslation: 这次地震对城市造成了巨大的损害。

example: The war witnessed a brutal massacre where thousands of innocent civilians lost their lives.
meaning: n. ⼤屠杀 vt. 屠杀
exampleTranslation: 战争目睹了一场残酷的大屠杀，成千上万的无辜平民失去了生命。

example: His occupation is a doctor.
meaning: n. 职业；占领；居住，占⽤；消遣
exampleTranslation: 他的职业是医生。

example: Many students occupy the library during finals week.
meaning: vt. 占⽤；占领；使忙于；担任
exampleTranslation: 许多学生在期终考试周会占用图书馆。

example: It didn't occur to me to check the oil level in the car.
meaning: vi. (意外地) 发⽣；存在，出现
exampleTranslation: 我没想到要检查车里的油量。

example: It's a rare occurrence to see a lunar eclipse.
meaning: n. 发⽣的事，事件；发⽣，存在
exampleTranslation: 看见月食的事情非常罕见。

example: I didn't mean to offend you.
meaning: vt. vi. 冒犯，得罪 vt. 令⼈不适 vi. 违反 (法规、原则等)；犯罪
exampleTranslation: 我并没有要冒犯你的意思。

example: He offered me a lift to the station.
meaning: vt. vi. 主动提出，⾃愿给予 vt. 提供，供应 n. 提议；出价，报价；特价
exampleTranslation: 他主动提议送我去火车站。

example: We can offset the travel costs by doing some part-time work.
meaning: vt. 抵消，弥补
exampleTranslation: 我们可以通过做些兼职来补偿旅行费用。

example: Parents often hope their offspring will follow in their footsteps.
meaning: n. ⼦⼥，后代；幼崽，幼苗
exampleTranslation: 父母常常希望他们的子女能继承他们的事业。

example: I found the information in the third paragraph of the article.
meaning: n. 段落，节
exampleTranslation: 我在文章的第三段找到了信息。

example: The disease can paralyse the limbs and the body.
meaning: vt. 使瘫痪；使不能正常运作
exampleTranslation: 这种疾病能使四肢和身体瘫痪。

example: These two lines are parallel to each other.
meaning: adj. 平⾏的；相似的，同时发⽣的 n. 很相似的⼈ (情况等)；相似之处 vt. 与…相似，与…同时发⽣
exampleTranslation: 这两条线是平行的。

example: You have to play your part if this project is to succeed.
meaning: n. 部分；成员；零件；区域；⻆⾊ vi. 离开，分别 vt. 分离，分开 adv. 在⼀定程度上，部分地
exampleTranslation: 如果这个项目要成功，你必须做好你的部分

example: This is a partial list of the books recommended for reading.
meaning: adj. 部分的；偏袒的；钟爱的
exampleTranslation: 这是推荐阅读书籍的部分清单。

example: All the participants in the meeting were professionals.
meaning: n. 参与者，参加者
exampleTranslation: 会议中的所有参与者都是专业人士。

example: I often participate in community service activities on the weekends.
meaning: vi. 参与，参加
exampleTranslation: 我经常在周末参加社区服务活动。

example: There was not a particle of evidence to suggest they were guilty.
meaning: n. 微粒；粒⼦；⼩品词
exampleTranslation: 没有一点证据表明他们有罪

example: She has a particular interest in ancient history.
meaning: adj. 特定的；格外的；挑剔的 n. 细节，详情
exampleTranslation: 她对古代历史有特殊兴趣。

example: This book is partly based on the author's childhood.
meaning: adv. 部分地，在某种程度上
exampleTranslation: 这本书部分基于作者的童年经历。

example: He is my partner in crime.
meaning: n. 伙伴；配偶，伴侣；合伙⼈ vt. 做搭档
exampleTranslation: 他是我共犯的伙伴。

example: His passion for music is evident in every song he plays.
meaning: n. 热情，激情；热恋；热衷的爱好
exampleTranslation: 他对音乐的热情在他演奏的每一首歌曲中都表现得淋漓尽致。

example: He's a very passive person and always follows what others are doing.
meaning: adj. 被动的，消极的；被动语态的 n. 被动语态，被动式
exampleTranslation: 被动、无主见

example: Jonny made a quick decision.
meaning: adj. 快的；敏捷的；⽴竿⻅影的
exampleTranslation: 约翰尼做了一个快速的决定。

example: I've decided to quit my job.
meaning: vi. vt. 辞去 (⼯作)；停⽌；退出；离开
exampleTranslation: 我决定辞掉我的工作。

example: They embarked on a quest to discover the lost city.
meaning: n. 探索，寻找，追求 vi. 探索，探求
exampleTranslation: 他们开始了寻找失落之城的追求。

example: I'm filling out a questionnaire on customer satisfaction.
meaning: n. 调查问卷，调查表
exampleTranslation: 我正在填一份客户满意度调查问卷。

example: The article began with a quote from Shakespeare.
meaning: vt. vi. 引⽤，引述 vt. 举例说明；开价，报价 n. 引⽂，引语；报价，估价；引号
exampleTranslation: 这篇文章以莎士比亚的一句引文开头。

example: The span of the bridge is 500 feet.
meaning: n. 持续时间；范围；跨度；宽度 vt. 持续，贯穿；包括，涵盖；横跨
exampleTranslation: 桥的跨度是500英尺。

example: Could you spare me a moment?
meaning: adj. 闲置的；备⽤的；空闲的 vt. 留出；免去；放过；吝惜 n. 备⽤品，备胎；零件，备件
exampleTranslation: 你能抽出一点时间吗？

example: The meeting is scheduled for 10 a.
meaning: n. ⽇程表；时刻表；节⽬表 vt. 为…安排时间
exampleTranslation: 会议安排在早上10点。

example: They hatched a scheme to rob the bank.
meaning: n. 计划，⽅案；阴谋，诡计 vi. vt. 密谋，秘密策划
exampleTranslation: 他们密谋抢劫银行。

example: Science is a systematic pursuit of knowledge.
meaning: n. 科学；理科；学科
exampleTranslation: 科学是对知识的系统追求。

example: The laws of physics are fundamental to numerous scientific disciplines.
meaning: adj. 科学的；细致严谨的
exampleTranslation: 物理定律是诸多科学领域的基础

example: The scientist is having a breakthrough in her research.
meaning: n. 科学家
exampleTranslation: 研究员在她的研究中取得了突破性进展。

example: A patch of oil can be seen on the water.
meaning: n. ⼩块，斑点；补丁；⼩块地；眼罩 vt. 打补丁
exampleTranslation: 在水面上可以看到一块油斑。

example: He holds the patent for this invention.
meaning: n. 专利权 adj. 专利的；明显的 vt. 得到…的专利权
exampleTranslation: 他拥有这项发明的专利。

example: The wallpaper has a lovely floral pattern.
meaning: n. 模式，⽅式；图案；典范；样板 vt. 使形成 (某⾏为模式)
exampleTranslation: 这款壁纸有着可爱的花朵图案。

example: I need to pay the bills.
meaning: vt. vi. 付费，付酬；受益，划算 vt. 交纳，偿还 vi. 付出代价；盈利，创收 n. ⼯资，薪⽔
exampleTranslation: 我需要支付账单。

example: I made a payment for the laptop online.
meaning: n. 付款；付款额；报答，报应
exampleTranslation: 我在线支付了笔记本电脑的款项。

example: He has the most peculiar habit of biting his nails whenever he's nervous.
meaning: adj. 古怪的；特有的；有点不舒服的
exampleTranslation: 他有个非常奇特的习惯，每当他紧张时就会咬指甲。

example: She is competing with her peers for the promotion.
meaning: n. 同龄⼈，同辈；(英国的) 贵族 vi. 端详，费⼒地看
exampleTranslation: 她正在和同仁竞争晋升。

example: You are allowed 30 minutes per question during the exam.
meaning: prep. 每，每⼀
exampleTranslation: 你在考试中每题有30分钟的时间。

example: I could perceive a ship far away.
meaning: vt. 看待，视为；注意到，察觉
exampleTranslation: "我能看到远处的一艘船。"

example: It is estimated that a high percentage of crimes go unreported.
meaning: n. 百分⽐，百分率；提成
exampleTranslation: 预计有高比例的犯罪未被报告。

example: She has a perfect grasp of English.
meaning: adj. 完美的；完全的 vt. 使完善，使完美
exampleTranslation: 她的英语掌握得完美无缺。

example: The train moves on the rail.
meaning: n. 铁路；铁轨；栏杆，扶⼿ vi. vt. 怒斥，责骂
exampleTranslation: 火车在铁轨上行驶。

example: The railway station is right across the street.
meaning: n. 铁路，铁路系统
exampleTranslation: 火车站就在街对面。

example: I decided to raise my hand and ask the teacher a question.
meaning: vt. 举起；提⾼；筹募；提及；抚养 vt. 引起；饲养 n. 加薪，⼯资增⻓
exampleTranslation: 我决定举手向老师提问。

example: Thousands of people attended the pro-democracy rally.
meaning: n. 公众集会；拉⼒赛；⽌跌回升 vi. vt. 召集，集合 vi. 复原，恢复健康；⽌跌回升
exampleTranslation: 数以千计的人参加了这次支持民主的集会。

example: The winning lottery numbers are chosen at random.
meaning: adj. 随机的；不认识的；出⼈意料的
exampleTranslation: 中彩的号码是随机抽取的

example: The house is in the $150,000 to $200,000 price range.
meaning: n. ⼀系列；范围；射程；⼭脉 vi. (在⼀定的范围内) 变化；包括 vt. (按⼀定顺序) 排列 vi. vt. 徘徊，漫步
exampleTranslation: 这房子的价格在15万到20万美元之间。

example: His rank in the company is much higher than mine.
meaning: n. 级别，地位；军衔；成员，⾏列 vt. vi. 把…分等级，属于某等级 adj. 难闻的，恶臭的；糟糕的
exampleTranslation: 他在公司的职位比我高得多。

example: He is a master of playing piano.
meaning: n. 主⼈；⼤师；硕⼠学位；男教师 vt. 精通，掌握；控制 adj. 熟练的；最重要的
exampleTranslation: 他是一个钢琴大师。

example: Leonardo da Vinci's Mona Lisa is a true masterpiece.
meaning: n. 杰作，代表作
exampleTranslation: 达芬奇的《蒙娜丽莎》是一幅真正的杰作

example: He's my mate from college.
meaning: n. 朋友，伙伴；⽼兄；同伴；伴侣 vi. (动物) 交配
exampleTranslation: 他是我大学时的朋友。

example: The house is built with high-quality materials.
meaning: n. 材料；布料；素材 adj. 物质的
exampleTranslation: 这所房子是用高质量的材料建造的。

example: His mathematical skills are exceptional.
meaning: adj. 数学的
exampleTranslation: 他的数学技能非常出色。

example: It takes time for a tree to become mature.
meaning: adj. 成熟的；已酿熟的 vi. 成熟；到期 vi. vt. 酿成，发酵成熟
exampleTranslation: 树需要时间才能长成。

example: The maximum speed for my car is 70 mph.
meaning: adj. 最⼤数量的，最⾼限度的 n. 最⼤量，最⾼程度，最⼤限度
exampleTranslation: 我的车最高速度为70英里每小时。

example: Do you mean what you say?
meaning: vt. 意思是；打算；对某⼈重要 adj. ⼩⽓的；刻薄的；平均的 n. 平均数
exampleTranslation: 你说的话是当真的吗？

example: What is the meaning of his smile?
meaning: n. 意思；意义
exampleTranslation: 他的微笑是什么意思？

example: By all means, take your time to decide.
meaning: n. ⽅法，途径；财富，钱财
exampleTranslation: 你尽可以花时间来决定。

example: I'll make dinner, and in the meantime, you can set the table.
meaning: adv. 在此期间，与此同时 n. (在此) 期间，其间
exampleTranslation: 我做晚餐，其间你来布置餐桌。

example: He was reading a book, meanwhile, his daughter was playing in the yard.
meaning: adv. 在此期间；与此同时
exampleTranslation: 他正在看书，同时，他的女儿在院子里玩耍。

example: Would you help me measure the length of this table?
meaning: vt. 测量；估量，判定 vlink. (尺⼨、数量) 量度为 n. 措施，⽅法；度量单位；提案
exampleTranslation: 你能帮我测量一下这张桌子的长度吗？

example: He made a small opening in the box.
meaning: n. 开幕式；缺⼝；空缺；开放 adj. 开篇的，开头的
exampleTranslation: 他在箱子上打了一个小洞。

example: She is a famous opera singer.
meaning: n. 歌剧；歌剧院
exampleTranslation: 她是一位著名的歌剧演唱家。

example: The machine will not operate properly without oil.
meaning: vt. 操作，使运⾏ vi. 运转，⼯作；动⼿术；经营 vi. vt. (被) 使⽤，(使) 运转
exampleTranslation: 没有油机器就不能正常运作。

example: The operation of the company was left in the capable hands of his assistant.
meaning: n. ⼿术；运转，操作；⾏动；业务
exampleTranslation: 操作、运作意义

example: The system is operational now.
meaning: adj. 可运转的；运营的；军事⾏动的
exampleTranslation: 系统现在正在运作中。

example: He works as a machine operator at the factory.
meaning: n. 操作员，技⼯；接线员；经营者
exampleTranslation: 他在工厂里当机器操作员。

example: I respect your opinion, but I disagree.
meaning: n. 看法，观点；舆论；专家意⻅
exampleTranslation: 我尊重你的观点，但我不同意。

example: He saw a great business opportunity and decided to take advantage of it.
meaning: n. 机会，时机
exampleTranslation: 他看到一个绝佳的商机，决定抓住它。

example: He is my opponent in the final game.
meaning: n. 对⼿，竞争者；反对者
exampleTranslation: 他是我决赛的对手。

example: Many residents oppose the plan to cut down the trees.
meaning: vt. 反对，阻挠
exampleTranslation: 许多居民反对砍伐这些树的计划。

example: She lives in the house opposite.
meaning: adj. 对⾯的，另⼀边的；相反的 n. 对⽴的⼈ (或物) prep. 与…相对；与…合演 adv. 在对⾯
exampleTranslation: 她住在对面的房子里。

example: In the past, women were often oppressed by societal norms.
meaning: vt. 压迫，欺压；压抑，使烦恼
exampleTranslation: 过去，女性常常被社会规范所压迫。

example: The scope of this project includes designing a new building.
meaning: n. 范围；余地，机会；…镜 vt. 查清，探明
exampleTranslation: 这个项目的范围包括设计一栋新的大楼。

example: Our team is leading by one score.
meaning: n. 得分，分数；乐谱；⼆⼗；⼤量 vt. vi. 得分；获得胜利 vt. 评分；分值是；划下痕迹
exampleTranslation: 我们的队伍领先一分。

example: He felt a deep sense of scorn for them.
meaning: n. 轻蔑，鄙视 vt. 轻蔑，鄙视
exampleTranslation: 他对他们感到深深的鄙视。

example: We need to secure our networks against hackers.
meaning: adj. 安全的；牢靠的；安⼼的 vt. 获得，确保；固定；保卫
exampleTranslation: 我们需要保护我们的网络免受黑客攻击。

example: For your security, please don't share your password with anyone.
meaning: n. 安全，保障；安保措施；保安部⻔ n. 抵押品；证券
exampleTranslation: 为了你的安全，请不要与任何人共享你的密码。

example: Can you see the stars in the sky?
meaning: vt. vi. 看⻅；明⽩；弄清；考虑 vi. 看得⻅ vt. 观看；参⻅；看望；交往；认为
exampleTranslation: 你能看见天空中的星星吗？

example: We need to seek a solution to this problem.
meaning: vt. vi. 寻找；寻求，谋求 vt. (向⼈) 请求，寻求
exampleTranslation: 我们需要寻找解决这个问题的方法

example: The instructions seem simple at first.
meaning: vlink. 似乎，看来
exampleTranslation: 这些说明一开始看起来很简单。

example: She shrugged off his seemingly harsh criticism with a smile.
meaning: adv. 貌似，看似
exampleTranslation: 她笑着对他看似尖酸刻薄的批评不以为然。

example: She got a thrill out of watching the team win.
meaning: n. 兴奋感，激动；⼀阵强烈的感觉 vt. 使⾮常兴奋
exampleTranslation: 她看到队伍获胜，感到非常激动。

example: Children thrive in the right environment.
meaning: vi. 兴旺，繁荣，欣欣向荣
exampleTranslation: 孩子在适当的环境中会茁壮成长。

example: We drove through the tunnel.
meaning: prep. 穿过；⾃始⾄终；直⾄；凭借 adv. 通过；从头到尾；直达 adj. 直达的；完成的，结束的
exampleTranslation: 我们开车穿过了隧道。

example: The supermarket is open throughout the day.
meaning: prep. 遍及；⾃始⾄终，从头到尾 adv. ⾃始⾄终，从头到尾
exampleTranslation: 超市全天候开放。

example: The tip of this arrow is very sharp.
meaning: n. 建议，窍⻔；⼩费；尖端；密报 vi. vt. (使) 倾斜，侧倾；给⼩费 vt. 倾倒，倒出；轻触；预⾔…获胜
exampleTranslation: 这支箭的尖端非常锐利

example: The title of the book is To Kill a Mockingbird.
meaning: n. 标题，名称；称号，头衔；职称 vt. 加标题，命名
exampleTranslation: 这本书的标题是《杀死一只知更鸟》。

example: This area has undergone massive urban development.
meaning: adj. 城市的，城镇的；都市⾳乐的
exampleTranslation: 这个区域经历了大规模的市区开发。

example: I feel an urge to travel.
meaning: vt. 敦促，强烈要求；驱赶，鞭策 n. 冲动，强烈的欲望
exampleTranslation: 我有一种旅行的冲动。

example: The doctor attended to the urgent cases first.
meaning: adj. 紧迫的，紧急的；急切的
exampleTranslation: 医生先处理了紧急病例。

example: We should utilize solar energy more effectively.
meaning: vt. 利⽤，使⽤
exampleTranslation: 我们应该更有效地利用太阳能。

example: He didn't utter a word during the whole journey.
meaning: adj. 完全的，彻底的 vt. 发出 (声⾳)，说
exampleTranslation: 他在整个旅途中一句话都没说。

example: I wonder what time it is.
meaning: vt. vi. 想知道；感到诧异 vt. (礼貌地提问或请⼈做事时说) n. 奇迹，奇观；惊讶，惊奇；奇才
exampleTranslation: 我想知道现在几点了。

example: They worship in this church every Sunday.
meaning: n. (对神的) 敬奉；崇拜；阁下 vt. 崇拜，景仰 vt. vi. 敬奉 (神)
exampleTranslation: 他们在这个教堂里每个星期天都参加礼拜。

example: The diamond is worth a lot of money.
meaning: adj. 价值…的；值得…的 n. 价值…的东西；价值，意义
exampleTranslation: 这颗钻石价值连城。

example: It is worthwhile to read this book.
meaning: adj. 有价值的，值得的
exampleTranslation: 阅读这本书是值得的。

example: He is a worthy champion.
meaning: adj. 值得 (或应得)…的；值得尊敬的 n. 要⼈，知名⼈⼠
exampleTranslation: 他是一位值得尊敬的冠军。

example: I need to write a letter to my parents.
meaning: vt. vi. 写字；写作，作曲；写信；写道
exampleTranslation: 我需要给父母写封信。

example: She is a famous writer in my country.
meaning: n. 作家，作者；写…的⼈
exampleTranslation: 她是我的国家里的一位著名作家。

example: The broken car was towed to the garage.
meaning: vt. 牵引，拖，拉 (⻋或船) n. (⻋或船的) 牵引，拖，拉
exampleTranslation: 坏车被拖到了车库。

example: They are heading towards the station.
meaning: prep. 向；趋于；将近；对于；⽤于
exampleTranslation: 他们正朝向车站走去。

example: Can I take your order?
meaning: vt. 拿；带去；做；接受；乘坐 vt. vi. 花费 n. 镜头；收⼊额；看法，意⻅
exampleTranslation: 我可以为您点菜吗？

example: Sarah has a real talent for painting.
meaning: n. 天资，天赋；有才能的⼈
exampleTranslation: 萨拉真的对绘画有天赋。

example: Our first target is to win the championship.
meaning: n. ⽬标，指标；攻击对象；靶⼦ vt. 把…作为攻击⽬标；⾯向，针对
exampleTranslation: 我们的首要目标是赢得冠军

example: He took a small taste of the soup to test the seasoning.
meaning: n. 味道；味觉；品味；⼀⼝；爱好 vlink. 有…味道 vt. 尝出 (味道)；尝，品；吃，喝
exampleTranslation: 他尝了一小口汤，尝一下调味。

example: This is a highly technical operation.
meaning: adj. 技术的；技巧的；专业的
exampleTranslation: 这是一个高度技术化的操作。

example: He is a highly skilled technician in computer network repair.
meaning: n. 技术员，技师
exampleTranslation: 他是一名非常熟练的计算机网络维修技术员。

example: His technique for making cocktails is impeccable.
meaning: n. 技巧，⼯艺；技艺，技能
exampleTranslation: 他调制鸡尾酒的技巧无懈可击。

example: Modern technology has made our lives more comfortable.
meaning: n. 科技，技术
exampleTranslation: 现代科技使我们的生活更加舒适。

example: The book is primarily aimed at teenagers and young adults.
meaning: n. (13到19岁的) ⻘少年
exampleTranslation: 这本书主要是针对青少年和年轻人的。

example: He has a really bad temper when things don't go his way.
meaning: n. 脾⽓；怒⽓；⼼情 vt. 使缓和；使 (⾦属) 回⽕
exampleTranslation: 当事情不按他的方式进行时，他会非常暴躁。

example: The average temperature in summer is 30 degrees Celsius.
meaning: n. 温度，⽓温；体温
exampleTranslation: 夏天的平均温度是摄氏30度。

example: He found a temporary job in the summer vacation.
meaning: adj. 暂时的，临时的
exampleTranslation: 他在暑假找到了一份临时工作。

example: She was tempted to accept his offer.
meaning: vt. 引诱，怂恿
exampleTranslation: 她被他的提议打动，有接受的念头。

example: The bakery's sweet treats were a temptation too strong for him to resist.
meaning: n. 引诱，诱惑，诱惑⼈的事物
exampleTranslation: 面包店的甜点是他无法抗拒的诱惑。

example: The road tends to the right at the top of the hill.
meaning: vi. 往往会；倾向于 vt. vi. 照顾，照料 vt. 管理，打点 (商店、酒吧等)
exampleTranslation: 在山顶，道路向右倾斜。

example: There is a tendency for people to eat more when they are stressed.
meaning: n. 倾向；趋势
exampleTranslation: 当人们压力大的时候，他们有更多吃东西的倾向。

example: This is a tentative schedule and might be subject to change.
meaning: adj. 暂定的，不确定的；犹豫不定的
exampleTranslation: 这是一个暂定的时间表，可能会有改变。

example: The medical term for a heart attack is myocardial infarction.
meaning: n. 术语；学期；期限 n. 条款；措辞；关系 vt. 把…称为
exampleTranslation: 心脏病发作的医学术语是心肌梗死。

example: Disconnect the terminal before working on the wiring.
meaning: n. 终点站；航站楼；终端 adj. (疾病) 晚期的；末端的
exampleTranslation: 在线路作业前拔掉接线端。

example: My contract will terminate at the end of the month.
meaning: vt. vi. (使) 结束，(使) 终⽌ vi. 到达终点
exampleTranslation: 我的合同将在月底终止。

example: He was called to testify about the project's progress before the board.
meaning: vi. vt. (出庭) 作证；证实，证明
exampleTranslation: 他被召唤在董事会前作证该项目的进展。

example: There's a trace of sadness in his eyes.
meaning: vt. 追踪；追溯；追述…的历史 n. 痕迹，踪迹；微量，少许；追踪
exampleTranslation: 他的眼神中有一丝伤感。

example: Please keep off the track during the race.
meaning: n. ⼩径；踪迹；轨道；跑道；路线 n. 站台；⽥径；歌曲；⾳轨 vt. 跟踪，追踪；留下⾜迹
exampleTranslation: 请在比赛期间远离跑道。

example: It's a tradition in our family to open one gift on Christmas Eve.
meaning: n. 传统
exampleTranslation: 我们家有一个圣诞节前夕开一份礼物的传统。

example: This decision will have ultimate influence on the future of the company.
meaning: adj. 最终的，终极的；极度的；根本的 n. 极致，极限，最⾼典范
exampleTranslation: "这个决定将对公司的未来产生最终影响。"

example: Do not underestimate the difficulty of this task.
meaning: vt. 低估，轻视 n. 低估，轻视
exampleTranslation: 不要低估这项任务的难度。

example: The city is undergoing major changes.
meaning: vt. 经历，经受，遭受
exampleTranslation: 这个城市正在经历重大的变化。

example: The underlying principle of this theory is quite simple.
meaning: adj. 深层的，潜在的；表⾯以下的
exampleTranslation: 这个理论的基本原理其实很简单。

example: Please underline the important points in the text.
meaning: vt. 在…下画线；强调，突出
exampleTranslation: 请在文本中的重要部分划线。

example: I don't understand this problem.
meaning: vt. vi. 理解，懂得；认识到；体谅 vt. 得知，获悉
exampleTranslation: 我不明白这个问题。

example: I have a deep understanding of the subject matter.
meaning: n. 了解；协议；理解；看法 adj. 善解⼈意的，体谅⼈的
exampleTranslation: 我对这个主题有深入的理解。

example: I have decided to undertake a new project.
meaning: vt. 承担，着⼿做；承诺，保证
exampleTranslation: 我决定开始一个新项目。

example: He felt uneasy about the whole situation.
meaning: adj. 不安的，不⾃在的；不稳定的
exampleTranslation: 他对整个情况感到不安。

example: Unemployment rates have been soaring during the pandemic.
meaning: n. 失业⼈数；失业状态；失业救济
exampleTranslation: 疫情期间，失业率一直在上升。

example: I received an unexpected gift on my birthday.
meaning: adj. 出乎意料的，意想不到的
exampleTranslation: 我在生日那天收到了一个意外的礼物。

example: The government is trying to unify the country.
meaning: vt. vi. 使统⼀，使成⼀体
exampleTranslation: 政府正试图统一这个国家。

example: He is a member of the teachers' union.
meaning: n. ⼯会；协会；联盟；联合
exampleTranslation: 他是教师工会的一员。

example: His style of painting is very unique.
meaning: adj. 独⼀⽆⼆的；独特的；特有的
exampleTranslation: 他的绘画风格非常独特。

example: The desire for peace is universal.
meaning: adj. 普遍的，全体的，共同的 n. 普遍看法，普遍特征
exampleTranslation: 人人都渴望和平。

example: We live in an ever-expanding universe.
meaning: n. 宇宙；领域，范围
exampleTranslation: 我们生活在一个正在不断扩大的宇宙中。

example: Unlike his brother, John is very outgoing.
meaning: prep. 与…不同，不像；⾮…的特征 adj. 不同的，不相似的
exampleTranslation: 与他的哥哥不同，约翰非常外向

example: It is unlikely that he will turn up.
meaning: adj. 不太可能的；不可信的 adj. 不合适的
exampleTranslation: 他很可能不会出现。

example: It is rather unusual to see that kind of animal in this area.
meaning: adj. 不寻常的，特别的
exampleTranslation: 在這个區域看到那種動物實屬罕見。

example: I have a vague memory of our first family trip.
meaning: adj. 模糊的；含糊的，笼统的
exampleTranslation: 我对我们第一次全家旅行的记忆模糊不清。

example: She was so vain that she looked in every mirror she passed.
meaning: adj. 徒劳的；⾃负的，虚荣的
exampleTranslation: 她如此虚荣，走过每个镜子都会看一下。

example: Your argument is not valid because it is based on erroneous information.
meaning: adj. (法律上) 有效的；正当合理的
exampleTranslation: 你的论点是无效的，因为它基于错误的信息。

example: This painting is very valuable.
meaning: adj. 有价值的，珍贵的；值钱的
exampleTranslation: 这幅画非常有价值。

example: The value of the house has doubled in the last ten years.
meaning: n. 价值；划算程度；⽤处；价值观 vt. 重视；给…估价
exampleTranslation: 这座房子在过去的十年里价值翻倍了。

example: I turned around and he was gone as if he had vanished into thin air.
meaning: vi. 突然消失；消亡，灭绝
exampleTranslation: 我一回头，他竟然消失得无影无踪。

example: The weather is highly variable in this country.
meaning: adj. 多变的；可变的 n. 变量，可变因素
exampleTranslation: 这个国家的天气变化无常。

example: The variance in temperature from season to season is very dramatic.
meaning: n. 变化幅度，差额
exampleTranslation: 季节之间的温度差异非常激烈。

example: There is little variation in temperature throughout the year.
meaning: n. 变化，差异；变体，变种；变奏
exampleTranslation: 一年四季的温度变化不大。

example: The store sells a variety of fresh fruit.
meaning: n. 各种各样；多样化；种类，品种
exampleTranslation: 这家商店出售各种新鲜水果。

example: I've read various books on the subject.
meaning: adj. 各种各样的，不同的
exampleTranslation: 我阅读了关于这个主题的各种各样的书。

example: We need to vary our tactics.
meaning: vi. 不同，有差异；(根据情况) 变化 vt. 改变，使多样化
exampleTranslation: 改变，使有所不同。比如：Weneedtovaryourtactics.

example: The vast expanse of the ocean is beautiful and terrifying at the same time.
meaning: adj. 巨⼤的，⼴阔的
exampleTranslation: 海洋的广阔无垠既美丽又遥不可及。

example: Many people think that our boss/superior is not paying us a fair wage for our work.
meaning: n. ⼯资，⼯钱 vt. 发动，进⾏ (运动或战争)
exampleTranslation: 许多人认为我们的老板没有给我们支付公平的工资。

example: He likes to wander through the woods on his days off.
meaning: vi. vt. 闲逛，游荡 vi. 偏离 (正道)，⾛失；⾛神 n. 闲逛，游荡
exampleTranslation: 他喜欢在休息日在森林里闲逛。

example: I want a cup of coffee.
meaning: vt. 想，想要；需要；缺少，缺乏 n. 需要的东西；缺少；贫穷
exampleTranslation: 我想要一杯咖啡。

example: I like her way of thinking.
meaning: n. ⽅式，⽅法；作⻛；路；⽅向 adv. 很远；⾮常
exampleTranslation: 我喜欢她的思考方式。

example: He is weak from a month-long illness.
meaning: adj. 弱的；不牢固的；淡的
exampleTranslation: 他因为长期病患体弱。

example: He loves to wear hats.
meaning: vt. 穿，戴；留 (头发)；流露 vi. vt. 磨损，消耗 n. ⾐着；磨损，⽤坏
exampleTranslation: 他喜欢戴帽子。

example: After the long journey, they felt too weary to talk.
meaning: adj. 疲劳的，厌倦的；使⼈疲劳的 vt. 使疲劳，使疲倦 vi. 变得不耐烦，感到厌倦
exampleTranslation: 这句话展示了“weary”在语境中的用法。

example: How much do you weigh?
meaning: vlink. 有…重，重量是… vt. 称重量，量体重；考虑，权衡 vi. 有影响，有重要性
exampleTranslation: 你体重多少？

example: The weight of the package was about two kilos.
meaning: n. 重量，体重；重物；重担；秤锤 vt. 在…上加重量
exampleTranslation: 包裹的重量大约是两公斤。

example: He's wearing a weird hat.
meaning: adj. 古怪的，奇异的
exampleTranslation: 他戴着一顶奇怪的帽子。

example: In the Scandinavian countries, the welfare of the citizens is given high importance.
meaning: n. 幸福；社会福利；社会保障⾦
exampleTranslation: 在斯堪的纳维亚国家，公民的福利受到了高度重视。

example: She whirled around to face him.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 旋转，(使) 打转 vi. (思绪) 混乱，恍惚 n. 旋转，回旋；接连不断的活动
exampleTranslation: 她迅速转身对着他。

example: She leaned over to whisper something in his ear.
meaning: vi. vt. ⽿语，⼩声说 vt. 私下说，秘密告诉 vi. (叶⼦、⻛等) 沙沙作响 n. ⽿语 (声)；轻柔的声⾳；传闻
exampleTranslation: 她弯下腰对他耳语了几句。

example: The factory can yield a large number of shoes every day.
meaning: vt. 出产；产⽣；放弃，缴出 vi. 屈服，让步；给 (⻋辆) 让路 n. 产量，产出；(投资的) 收益
exampleTranslation: 工厂每天能生产大量的鞋子。

example: My youth was a time of great happiness and joy.
meaning: n. ⻘年时期；年轻⼈；⻘春，朝⽓
exampleTranslation: 我的青年时期是充满欢乐的一段时光。

example: This area is a no-smoking zone.
meaning: n. 地带，区域 vt. 将…划为某项⽤途的区域
exampleTranslation: 禁烟区

example: If the error persists, please contact the support team.
meaning: vi. 快速移动；飙升，猛涨 n. 变焦镜头；⻋辆疾⾏的声⾳
exampleTranslation: 这句话展示了“zoom”在语境中的用法。

example: His advice provided the key to solving the problem.
meaning: n. 钥匙；关键；键；答案 vt. ⽤键盘输⼊ adj. 主要的，关键的
exampleTranslation: 他的建议提供了解决问题的关键。

example: She learned to knit when she was young.
meaning: vt. vi. 编织，针织；(使) 紧密结合 n. 编织的⾐服，针织衫
exampleTranslation: 她年轻的时候就学会了织毛衣。

example: The weather is brisk, it's a good day for hiking.
meaning: adj. 轻快的；⿇利的；凉爽的 adj. 兴隆的
exampleTranslation: 天气清冷，适合远足。

example: He gave me a brief description of the plan.
meaning: adj. 短暂的；简洁的 n. 任务简介；案情摘要；辩护状 vt. 向 (某⼈) 介绍情况
exampleTranslation: 他给我简单描述了一下计划。

example: His foolish actions only served to aggravate the situation.
meaning: vt. 加重，使恶化；激怒，使恼⽕
exampleTranslation: 这里表示加重或恶化的意思

example: The aggregate amount of grants made was over $500,000.
meaning: n. 总数，集合体；⻣料 adj. 总数的，合计的 vt. 总计达到，使聚集
exampleTranslation: 整体的捐款额达到了$500,000。

example: The manager is very aggressive in implementing the new policy.
meaning: adj. 好⽃的，有侵略性的；进取的
exampleTranslation: 经理在实施新政策时表现得非常积极主动。

example: The weather was most agreeable.
meaning: adj. 令⼈愉快的；乐意的；可接受的
exampleTranslation: 天气非常宜人。

example: We are providing medical aid to the disaster area.
meaning: n. 援助，救援物资；辅助 (设备) vt. vi. 帮助，援助
exampleTranslation: 我们正在向灾区提供医疗援助。

example: My aim in life is to be a successful entrepreneur.
meaning: n. ⽬的，⽬标；瞄准 vi. vt. ⼒求达到；瞄准 vt. 旨在；针对
exampleTranslation: 我的人生目标是成为一位成功的企业家。

example: The fire alarm went off.
meaning: n. 警报器；警报；闹钟；惊恐 vt. 使惊恐，使忧虑；给…装警报器
exampleTranslation: 消防警报响起。

example: I felt completely alien to this new environment.
meaning: n. 外星⽣物；外国⼈，侨⺠ adj. 陌⽣的；外国的；与…不相容的 adj. 外星的
exampleTranslation: 我觉得这个新环境对我来说完全是陌生的。

example: His aloofness serves only to alienate him from his team.
meaning: vt. 使疏远，使不友好；使格格不⼊
exampleTranslation: 使疏远

example: The job of the committee is to allocate funds to the different departments.
meaning: vt. 分配，划拨
exampleTranslation: 常务委员会的职责是为各个部门分配资金。

example: You are not allowed to smoke in this area.
meaning: vt. 允许，听任；使可能；留出
exampleTranslation: 你不能在这个区域抽烟。

example: They had to alter the course of the ship to avoid collision.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 变化，(使) 改变 vt. 改动 (⾐服使其更合⾝)
exampleTranslation: 他们不得不改变船的航线以避免碰撞。

example: The meeting is held on alternate Sundays.
meaning: adj. 交替的；每隔…的；可替代的 vi. vt. (使) 轮流，(使) 交替 n. 替补者
exampleTranslation: 这个会议每隔一个星期日举行。

example: We had no alternative but to fire him.
meaning: adj. 可替代的，其他的；⾮传统的 n. 可供选择的事物
exampleTranslation: 我们没有选择只能解雇他。

example: Their strengths are comparable to ours.
meaning: adj. 有可⽐性的，类似的
exampleTranslation: 他们的优势与我们的相当

example: It is impossible to make a comparative evaluation without further information.
meaning: adj. ⽐较的；相对的；⽐较级的 n. (形容词或副词的) ⽐较级
exampleTranslation: 没有更多信息，就无法做出比较性评估。

example: Can you compare these two dresses and tell me which one looks better?
meaning: vt. ⽐较，对⽐；将…⽐作 vi. (与…) 相⽐
exampleTranslation: 你能对比一下这两件连衣裙，告诉我哪一件看起来更好吗？

example: The comparison between the two cars shows the new one is more efficient.
meaning: n. ⽐较，对⽐
exampleTranslation: 两辆车的比较显示新的那辆更有效率

example: The drought compelled farmers to ration their water use.
meaning: vt. 强迫，逼迫
exampleTranslation: 江干旱迫使农民开始节约用水。

example: I had to work extra hours to compensate for the time I had taken off last week.
meaning: vi. 弥补，补偿 vt. 给…赔偿
exampleTranslation: 我不得不加班以补偿上周请假的时间。

example: All the kids want to compete in the race.
meaning: vi. 竞争，对抗；参加⽐赛
exampleTranslation: 所有的孩子都想参加那个比赛。

example: Our team is preparing for the upcoming competition.
meaning: n. 竞争；⽐赛；竞争对⼿
exampleTranslation: 我们的队伍正在为即将到来的比赛做准备

example: The job market is very competitive, so you need to stand out via unique skills.
meaning: adj. 竞争的；有竞争⼒的；好胜的
exampleTranslation: 就业市场非常竞争激烈，所以你需要通过独特的技能来脱颖而出。

example: Nick is very competent at his job.
meaning: adj. 能胜任的；还⾏的；有法定权的
exampleTranslation: 尼克工作非常能干

example: The author compiled a book of short stories.
meaning: vt. 汇编，编纂；编译
exampleTranslation: 作者编辑了一本短篇小说集。

example: He often complains about the noise in the street.
meaning: vi. vt. 抱怨，投诉，发牢骚
exampleTranslation: 他经常抱怨街头的噪音。

example: I've made a complaint to the manager about the noise.
meaning: n. 抱怨，投诉；使⼈不满的事；疾病
exampleTranslation: 我已经向经理投诉了噪音问题。

example: The spicy flavors of the food are well complemented by the sweet wine.
meaning: vt. 补充，补⾜，使完美 n. 补充物，补⾜物；⾜额；补语
exampleTranslation: 美食的辛辣口感被甜酒很好地补充了。

example: I just need your signature to make the agreement complete.
meaning: adj. 完全的；全部的；完成的；包括 vt. 完成，结束；填 (表格)；使完整
exampleTranslation: 我只需要你的签名来使协议生效。

example: The human brain is a complex organ.
meaning: adj. 复杂的，难懂的 n. 综合建筑群；复合体；情结
exampleTranslation: 人脑是一个复杂的器官。

example: You will only complicate matters if you try to intervene.
meaning: vt. 使难以理解，使复杂化
exampleTranslation: 你若试图干预，只会使事情变得更复杂。

example: The situation is much more complicated than you think.
meaning: adj. 复杂的，难懂的
exampleTranslation: 你认为的情况比实际上要复杂得多。

example: All staff must comply with the safety regulations.
meaning: vi. 服从，遵守
exampleTranslation: 所有员工必须遵守安全规定。

example: I would like to compliment you on your excellent performance.
meaning: n. 称赞，赞美的话；致意，致敬 vt. 称赞，赞美
exampleTranslation: 我想要赞美你的卓越表现。

example: The views of the critics differ regarding this movie.
meaning: vi. 相异，不同；持不同看法
exampleTranslation: 对于这部电影，评论家的观点存在分歧。

example: The one difference between the twins is that one has freckles.
meaning: n. 差异；差额；分歧
exampleTranslation: 这对双胞胎唯一的不同点是其中一人有雀斑。

example: The curtains diffuse the bright afternoon light.
meaning: vt. vi. 扩散，渗透；传播，散布 vt. 舒缓，减弱，平息 adj. 扩散的，分散的；冗⻓的
exampleTranslation: 窗帘散射了午后强烈的光线。

example: The teacher put the emphasis on the importance of hard work.
meaning: n. 重视，重点，强调；重读
exampleTranslation: 老师强调了努力工作的重要性。

example: We must always emphasize that safety comes first.
meaning: vt. 强调，重视；重读；使突出
exampleTranslation: 我们必须始终强调安全第一。

example: We will employ your services for the duration of the project.
meaning: vt. 雇⽤，雇佣；使⽤，运⽤
exampleTranslation: 我们将会在项目期间雇佣你的服务。

example: He is an employee of Microsoft.
meaning: n. 雇员
exampleTranslation: 他是微软的员工。

example: My employer decided to give all employees a pay raise.
meaning: n. 雇主
exampleTranslation: 我的雇主决定给所有员工加薪。

example: I am seeking employment in the technology sector.
meaning: n. 在职；就业 (机会)；雇⽤；使⽤
exampleTranslation: 我正在寻求在科技领域的就业机会。

example: The donations enable us to continue our work.
meaning: vt. 使能够，使可能
exampleTranslation: 这些捐款让我们能够继续我们的工作。

example: I had an unexpected encounter with an old friend in the street.
meaning: vt. 遭遇；偶遇 n. 偶遇；冲突；经历
exampleTranslation: 我在街上意外遇到了一个老朋友。

example: My parents always encourage me to do my best.
meaning: vt. ⿎励；劝告，怂恿；促进，刺激
exampleTranslation: 我的父母总是鼓励我做最好的我。

example: This is the end of the story.
meaning: n. 结局，结尾；末端；结束；⽬标 vi. vt. 结束，终⽌
exampleTranslation: 这是故事的结局。

example: The red light indicates that the machine is in operation.
meaning: vt. 表明，暗⽰；指向，指⽰；代表
exampleTranslation: 红灯表明机器正在运行中。

example: The red sky was an indication of good weather to come.
meaning: n. 表明，迹象，象征
exampleTranslation: 红色的天空是即将到来好天气的迹象。

example: High energy prices can be indicative of a shortage.
meaning: adj. 表明的，表⽰的，暗⽰的
exampleTranslation: 高能源价格可能是供应短缺的标志。

example: The news about corruption caused a public outrage.
meaning: n. 愤怒，愤慨；暴⾏ vt. 使震怒，激怒
exampleTranslation: 翻译为：关于腐败的新闻引起了公众的愤怒。

example: At the outset of the project, we faced many challenges.
meaning: n. 开始，起始
exampleTranslation: 这个句子的翻译是：在项目开始的时候，我们遇到了很多挑战。

example: She is waiting for you outside the house.
meaning: adv. 在外⾯，向外⾯ prep. 在…外；不属于；除了 adj. 外部的，向外的；不属于…的 n. 外部，外观
exampleTranslation: 她在房子外面等你

example: On the outside, the box was painted in a beautiful outward design.
meaning: adj. 外表的，表⾯上的；向外的 adv. 向外，朝外
exampleTranslation: 表面上，这个盒子被画上了美丽的外部设计。

example: Today is a special day.
meaning: adj. 特殊的；格外重要的；专⻔的 n. 特别活动，特制产品；特价
exampleTranslation: 今天是个特别的日子

example: He is a specialist in computer science.
meaning: n. 专家；专科医⽣ adj. 专业的
exampleTranslation: 他是计算机科学的专家。

example: He decided to specialize in pediatric medicine.
meaning: vi. 专⻔从事，专⻔研究
exampleTranslation: 他决定专攻儿科医学。

example: There are about 20,000 species of bees.
meaning: n. 物种，种
exampleTranslation: 大约有20,000种蜜蜂。

example: He gave me specific instructions on how to do it.
meaning: adj. 明确具体的；特定的；特有的 n. 细节，详情
exampleTranslation: 他给了我具体的操作指示。

example: The construction project will be carried out according to the detailed specification.
meaning: n. 规格，具体要求
exampleTranslation: 这个建筑项目将按照详细的规格来进行。

example: Please specify what you mean by 'imminent'.
meaning: vt. 具体指明，明确说明
exampleTranslation: 请详述你所说的'即将发生'是什么意思。

example: We can only speculate as to the reasons for his resignation.
meaning: vi. vt. 推测，猜想 vi. 做投机买卖
exampleTranslation: 我们只能推测他辞职的原因。

example: The hotel can accommodate 500 guests.
meaning: vt. 容纳；为…提供住宿；迎合 vi. vt. (调整以) 适应
exampleTranslation: 这家酒店可以容纳500名客人。

example: I booked my accommodation through the internet.
meaning: n. 住宿，住处；和解，调解
exampleTranslation: 我通过互联网预定了住宿。

example: Can I accompany you to the party?
meaning: vt. 陪伴，陪同；伴随；为…伴奏
exampleTranslation: 我能陪你一起去舞会吗？

example: We have accomplished a great deal today.
meaning: vt. 完成，达成
exampleTranslation: 我们今天完成了大量的工作。

example: I forgot my password and can't access my account.
meaning: n. 账⼾；账⽬；叙述；解释，说明 vt. 认为是，视为
exampleTranslation: 我忘记了密码，无法进入我的账户。

example: An accountant can help you manage your taxes.
meaning: n. 会计，会计师
exampleTranslation: 翻译：会计可以帮你管理你的税务。

example: There is a bias against foreign-trained doctors.
meaning: n. 偏⻅，偏袒；偏好 vt. 使有偏⻅，使偏⼼
exampleTranslation: 对外国医生有种形式的偏见。

example: Several companies made a bid for the contract.
meaning: vi. vt. 出价；叫牌 vi. 投标；努⼒争取 vt. 向…表⽰问候，向…告别；吩咐 n. 出价；投标；争取，尝试；叫牌
exampleTranslation: 几家公司为这份合同投了标。

example: Would you please pay the bill?
meaning: n. 账单；议案；钞票；节⽬单；喙 vt. 开账单；把…宣传为
exampleTranslation: 账单场景

example: The company made a profit of two billion dollars last year.
meaning: num. ⼗亿；数以⼗亿计，⼤量
exampleTranslation: 公司去年赚了20亿美元

example: She gave birth to a baby boy.
meaning: n. 出⽣，分娩；诞⽣，起源；出⾝
exampleTranslation: 她生了个男婴。

example: The hotel will charge extra for breakfast.
meaning: n. 费⽤；指控；指责；掌管；电荷 vt. vi. 要价，收费；猛冲，猛攻，冲锋 vt. 指控；记在账上；指责；充电 vi. 向…⽅向冲去
exampleTranslation: 酒店会对早餐额外收费。

example: He has a certain charm that attracts people.
meaning: n. 魅⼒，吸引⼒；⼩挂件；咒语 vt. vi. 吸引，迷住 vt. ⽤魔法控制
exampleTranslation: 他具有某种魅力吸引人。

example: The police chased the thief through the city.
meaning: vt. vi. 追逐，追赶；追求，求爱 vt. 争取得到；催促 vi. 急奔，急赶，匆忙地⾛ n. 追逐，追赶；争取得到
exampleTranslation: 警察在城市中追赶小偷。

example: There is a high demand for skilled workers in the tech industry.
meaning: n. 要求；需求 vt. 要求；需要
exampleTranslation: 科技行业对技术熟练的工人需求很大。

example: The United States is often cited as an example of a democracy.
meaning: n. ⺠主，⺠主制；⺠主国家
exampleTranslation: 美国常被举为民主制度的例子。

example: The United States is a democratic country.
meaning: adj. ⺠主的
exampleTranslation: 美国是一个民主国家。

example: The teacher will demonstrate how to solve the problem to the students.
meaning: vt. 表明，证明；⽰范，演⽰；展露 vi. ⽰威，游⾏
exampleTranslation: 老师将为学生示范如何解决这个问题。

example: Her facial expression denotes that she is angry.
meaning: vt. (符号等) 代表；表⽰，意指
exampleTranslation: 她的面部表情表示她很生气。

example: His denial of the charges is quite convincing.
meaning: n. 否认；拒绝，拒绝给予
exampleTranslation: 他对这些指控的否认看起来相当有说服力。

example: He denied any involvement in the crime.
meaning: vt. 否认；拒绝接受；拒绝给予
exampleTranslation: 他否认了他在犯罪中有任何牵连。

example: He works in the marketing department.
meaning: n. 部⻔，科，系
exampleTranslation: 他在市场部工作。

example: I depend on you to take care of the kids this weekend.
meaning: vi. 取决于；依靠，信赖；确信
exampleTranslation: 这个周末我指望你照顾孩子。

example: She has three dependent children.
meaning: adj. 依赖的；有瘾的；取决于…的 n. 受抚养者
exampleTranslation: 她有三个需要照顾的孩子。

example: He made a deposit of $1,000 into his account.
meaning: n. 存款；订⾦；押⾦；沉积物 vt. 存⼊银⾏；放下，放置；使沉积
exampleTranslation: 他在他的账户中存了一千美元。

example: The constant rain would depress anyone.
meaning: vt. 使沮丧；降低 (价格等)；按下
exampleTranslation: 持续的下雨会让任何人感到沮丧。

example: After a long winter, the flowers began to emerge.
meaning: vi. 出现，浮现；开始为⼈所知 vi. vt. (事实) 显露，暴露 vi. (从困境中) 摆脱出来
exampleTranslation: 冬天过后，花儿开始破土而出。

example: She phoned the hospital in an emergency.
meaning: n. 紧急事件，意外事件
exampleTranslation: 她在紧急情况下给医院打电话。

example: Joy is a positive emotion.
meaning: n. 情感，情绪
exampleTranslation: 快乐是一种积极的情绪。

example: I fear that we might not get there on time.
meaning: n. 害怕，惧怕，担忧 vt. 害怕，惧怕 vt. vi. 担⼼，担忧 vi. 恐怕
exampleTranslation: 我担心我们可能没有及时到达。

example: I was fearful of the dark when I was a kid.
meaning: adj. 害怕的；可怕的；极坏的
exampleTranslation: 我小时候曾害怕黑暗。

example: This computer has several new features.
meaning: n. 特征，特点；特写，专题；五官 vt. 以…为特⾊ vi. 起重要作⽤
exampleTranslation: 这台电脑有几个新的特性。

example: The federal laws are applicable across the whole country.
meaning: adj. 联邦制的；联邦政府的
exampleTranslation: 全国范围内都适用联邦法律。

example: The Federation of Small Businesses is standing up for the rights of its members.
meaning: n. 联盟，联合会；联邦制国家
exampleTranslation: 小企业联合会正在维护其成员的权利

example: I feed my cat twice a day.
meaning: vt. 喂养；养活；施肥；灌输 vt. 将…塞进机器；满⾜；供给 vi. (婴⼉或动物) 进⻝ n. (婴⼉或动物) ⼀餐；饲料，肥料
exampleTranslation: 我每天喂我的猫两次。

example: We appreciate your feedback on our service.
meaning: n. 反馈
exampleTranslation: 我们很感谢您对我们服务的反馈。

example: I have a good feeling about this.
meaning: n. 情绪，感情；(⾝体) 感觉；看法
exampleTranslation: 我对此有好感觉

example: The fertile soil is perfect for growing vegetables.
meaning: adj. 肥沃的；能⽣育的；主意多的
exampleTranslation: 这块肥沃的土地非常适合种植蔬菜。

example: My goal is to become a successful artist.
meaning: n. ⽬标；进球得分；球⻔
exampleTranslation: 我的目标是成为一名成功的艺术家。

example: The store offers a variety of goods for sale.
meaning: n. 商品，货物；私⼈财产
exampleTranslation: 该店面向销售提供各种商品。

example: The country is governed by a democratic system.
meaning: vt. vi. 统治，治理 vt. ⽀配，控制，影响
exampleTranslation: 这个国家是由一个民主制度来治理的。

example: The government must implement policies to stimulate the economy.
meaning: n. 政府；政体；治理，统治
exampleTranslation: 政府必须实施政策来刺激经济。

example: The governor of California has declared a state of emergency due to the wildfires.
meaning: n. 州⻓，省⻓；总督；董事；主管
exampleTranslation: 加利福尼亚州的州长由于野火已宣布进入紧急状态。

example: The gradual decline of the industry has caused unemployment to rise.
meaning: adj. 逐渐的，逐步的；(斜坡) 平缓的
exampleTranslation: "工业的逐渐衰退导致了失业率的上升。"

example: Tom will graduate from the university next year.
meaning: n. 毕业⽣ vi. vt. 毕业 vt. 授予 (某⼈) 学位 vi. 逐渐发展
exampleTranslation: 汤姆明年将从大学毕业。

example: He lives in a grand house.
meaning: adj. 壮丽的；宏伟的；极好的 n. ⼀千英镑 (或美元)；三⻆钢琴
exampleTranslation: 他住在一座豪宅里。

example: I grant you permission to leave early.
meaning: vt. 批准，准予，给予；承认 n. 拨款，补助⾦
exampleTranslation: 我允许你早点离开。

example: There's a heap of work to do before the end of the week.
meaning: n. (凌乱的) ⼀堆；许多；破旧的⻋ vt. 堆放；对…⼤加赞扬 (或批评)
exampleTranslation: 这周末之前还有一大堆的工作要做。

example: The doctor said it would take a few weeks for the wound to heal.
meaning: vi. vt. 治愈；结束 (冲突)，修复 (关系)
exampleTranslation: 医生说这个伤口需要几周时间才能痊愈。

example: Physical health is as essential as intellectual health.
meaning: n. 健康状况；健康；医疗保健
exampleTranslation: 身体健康与智力健康同样重要。

example: She looks healthy and full of energy.
meaning: adj. 健康的；有益健康的；合情理的
exampleTranslation: 她看起来很健康，充满活力。

example: She didn't hesitate before jumping into the freezing water.
meaning: vi. vt. 犹豫，迟疑 vi. (因有顾虑⽽) 不愿意 (做某事)
exampleTranslation: 她跳入冰冷的水中时并不犹豫。

example: Could you highlight the key points in your report?
meaning: vt. 强调，突出；⽤彩笔做标记 n. 最突出 (精彩) 的部分
exampleTranslation: 你可以在报告中突出重要的部分吗?

example: This is a highly sensitive issue, so we need to handle it carefully.
meaning: adv. ⾮常；⾼⽔平地；赞许地
exampleTranslation: 这是一个极其敏感的问题，所以我们需要小心处理。

example: I need an immediate reply to this letter.
meaning: adj. ⽴即的；当前的；最接近的 adj. 直系的；直接的
exampleTranslation: 我需要对这封信立刻回复。

example: The universe is immense and contains countless stars.
meaning: adj. 巨⼤的，极⼤的
exampleTranslation: 宇宙是巨大的，包含了无数的星星。

example: Immerse the cloth in the dye.
meaning: vt. 使浸没于；(使) 深陷于，沉浸在
exampleTranslation: 将布块浸入染料中
