example: Many immigrants move to the United States in search of a better life.
meaning: n. (外来) 移⺠，侨⺠
exampleTranslation: 许多移民搬到美国寻找更好的生活。

example: Scientists say that an earthquake is imminent in this region.
meaning: adj. 即将发⽣的，逼近的
exampleTranslation: 科学家们说这个地区即将发生地震。

example: He is immune to the chickenpox since he had it as a child.
meaning: adj. 免疫的；不受影响的；被豁免的
exampleTranslation: 他小时候得过水痘，所以对此免疫了。

example: It is likely to rain tomorrow.
meaning: adj. 可能的；合适的 adv. ⼤概，很可能
exampleTranslation: 明天有可能会下雨。

example: The likelihood of him having the same disease is small.
meaning: n. 可能性，可能的事
exampleTranslation: 他患上同样疾病的可能性很小。

example: She's very good at playing the piano, and likewise, she's also skilled at playing the violin.
meaning: adv. 同样地，相似地；我也⼀样
exampleTranslation: 她钢琴弹得很好，同样的，她也擅长拉小提琴

example: He has a high sense of self.
meaning: n. 本来⾯⽬；⾃我；私⼼；⾃⼰ pref. 靠⾃⼰的；独⾃的，(对) ⾃⾝的
exampleTranslation: 他有很高的自我意识。

example: It was selfish of him to take the last seat.
meaning: adj. ⾃私的
exampleTranslation: 他占走最后一个座位很自私。

example: He almost choked on a piece of bread.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 窒息，噎住；使哽咽 vt. 掐死，勒死；阻塞，塞满 vi. (因紧张⽽) 失败，发挥失常 n. 窒息，哽噎声
exampleTranslation: 他几乎被一块面包闷到。

example: You need to chop the onions finely for the salad.
meaning: vt. 切碎，砍，劈；(⼤幅度地) 削减 n. 猪 (或⽺等) 排；砍，劈；掌劈
exampleTranslation: 你需要把洋葱剁成细末以备沙拉使用。

example: Given the circumstances, it was the best decision we could have made.
meaning: n. 情况，情形；⽣活状况；客观环境
exampleTranslation: 考虑到当时的情况，那是我们能做出来的最好的决策。

example: The professor always cites examples from the book in his lectures.
meaning: vt. 引⽤ (例⼦)；引述；传讯
exampleTranslation: 教授总是在他的演讲中引用书籍的例子。

example: Nancy made a claim for compensation after the car accident.
meaning: vt. 声称；要求拥有，认领；获得 vt. 夺去 (⽣命) vt. vi. 索要，索取 n. 声称；所有权；要求，索赔
exampleTranslation: 南希在车祸后提出了索赔。

example: This lake is very clear, you can see to the bottom.
meaning: adj. 清楚的；明显的；⽆疑的 vt. 清理，清除，移⾛；使⼈离开 vi. 变晴朗，变清澈；散去，消失 vt. vi. 兑现 (⽀票)；获利，净赚
exampleTranslation: 这个湖非常清澈，你可以看到湖底。

example: The garden is bordered by a row of tall trees.
meaning: n. 边界，国界；镶边；狭⻓花坛 vt. 与…接壤；沿…的边
exampleTranslation: 花园被一排高大的树木所环绕。

example: He is boring a hole in the wall.
meaning: vt. 使厌烦 vi. vt. 钻 (孔)，挖 (洞) vi. 盯着看 n. ⽆趣的⼈；⽆聊的事；孔，⼝径
exampleTranslation: 他正在墙上钻孔。

example: I was born in Beijing.
meaning: vt. 出⽣，出世；出现，形成 adj. 天⽣的
exampleTranslation: 我出生在北京。

example: Don't bother me when I'm working.
meaning: vt. 使…烦恼；打扰 vi. vt. 费⼼，费⼒，⿇烦 n. ⿇烦，困难；令⼈烦恼的情况
exampleTranslation: 我工作的时候不要打扰我。

example: She acquired a good knowledge of Chinese.
meaning: vt. 获得 (技能、习惯等)；购得，得到
exampleTranslation: 她获得了良好的中文知识。

example: The company is looking for new opportunities for acquisition.
meaning: n. 获得，习得；收购 (物)；购得物
exampleTranslation: 该公司正在寻找新的收购机会。

example: We need to act immediately to solve this problem.
meaning: n. ⾏为；法案；装样⼦；⼀幕 vi. ⾏动；表现得；假装；充当 vt. vi. 扮演
exampleTranslation: 我们需要立刻采取行动解决这个问题。

example: She took prompt action to deal with the problem.
meaning: n. ⾏动，措施；⾏为；诉讼；战⽃
exampleTranslation: 她迅速采取行动处理问题。

example: Please activate your new credit card before use.
meaning: vt. 激活，启动
exampleTranslation: 请在使用前激活你的新信用卡。

example: She is a very active member of the community.
meaning: adj. 活跃的；积极的；有效的
exampleTranslation: 她是社区里非常活跃的成员。

example: The club offers a variety of activities.
meaning: n. 活动；活跃
exampleTranslation: 俱乐部提供各种活动。

example: The actual product is different from what the advertisement described.
meaning: adj. 真实的，实际的
exampleTranslation: 实际的产品与广告描述的不同。

example: She suffered from acute appendicitis and was rushed to the hospital.
meaning: adj. 严重的，剧烈的；(疾病) 急性的 adj. (感官) 灵敏的；敏锐的；锐⻆的
exampleTranslation: 她患有急性阑尾炎，被迅速送到了医院。

example: He despises the people who brag about their wealth.
meaning: vt. 鄙视，蔑视
exampleTranslation: 他鄙视那些吹嘘自己财富的人。

example: Despite the heavy rain, we decided to go out.
meaning: prep. 尽管，虽然
exampleTranslation: 尽管下着大雨，我们决定要出去。

example: He is an energetic young man.
meaning: adj. (⼈) 充满活⼒的；(活动) 剧烈的
exampleTranslation: 他是一个充满活力的年轻人。

example: Solar energy is becoming more and more important as a source of world energy.
meaning: n. ⼒⽓，活⼒；能源；精⼒；能量
exampleTranslation: 太阳能作为世界能源的重要性越来越高。

example: Police will be there to enforce the law.
meaning: vt. 强制执⾏；迫使
exampleTranslation: 警察将在那里执行法律。

example: We need to engage a new teacher for our school.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 从事，参加；与…交战 vt. 吸引；聘⽤ vi. 与…建⽴密切关系
exampleTranslation: 我们需要为我们的学校聘约一位新老师。

example: John announced his engagement to Emma at the party.
meaning: n. 订婚；约定；交战；参加，卷⼊
exampleTranslation: 约翰在聚会上宣布他与艾玛订婚了。

example: Please fold the clothes and put them in the drawer.
meaning: vt. vi. 折叠，对折；包，裹 vi. 倒闭，停演 n. 褶，褶层；褶痕；⽺圈 suff. 由…部分组成的；倍
exampleTranslation: 请把衣服叠好，然后放进抽屉。

example: She has a lot in common with folks in her neighborhood.
meaning: n. ⼈们；各位；家属；⺠间⾳乐 adj. ⺠间的，⺠俗的；流传⺠间的
exampleTranslation: 她和邻里的人有很多共同点。

example: You should follow the rules.
meaning: vt. vi. 跟随；在…后发⽣；理解，明⽩ vt. 沿着；遵循，听从；追随；关注
exampleTranslation: 你应该遵守规则。

example: Pay attention to what I say in the following.
meaning: adj. (时间上) 接着的；下述的 n. 拥护者，追随者；下述，下列 prep. 在…之后，由于
exampleTranslation: 注意看我接下来说的话。PayattentiontowhatIsayinthefollowing.

example: The company used force to acquire the small startup.
meaning: n. 武⼒；⼒；影响⼤的事物；部队 vt. 强迫，迫使；强⾏移动；使发⽣
exampleTranslation: 这家公司用力量收购了小型创业公司。

example: In his speech, he mentioned a few forewarnings.
meaning: adj. 在前部的，在头部的 adv. 向 (或在) 船头，向 (或在) 机头
exampleTranslation: 在他的演说中，他提到了一些预警。

example: The weather forecast says it's going to rain tomorrow.
meaning: n. 预测，预报 vt. 预测，预报
exampleTranslation: 天气预报说明天会下雨。

example: I did not foresee the difficulties that we're now facing.
meaning: vt. 预⻅，预知，预料
exampleTranslation: 我未预见到我们现在面临的困难。

example: This signature is a forge.
meaning: vt. 缔造，建⽴；伪造；锻造，制作 vi. 稳步前进 n. 铁匠铺；锻造炉，锻造⻋间
exampleTranslation: 这个签名是伪造的。

example: Despite the grim weather conditions, they decided to proceed with the outdoor concert.
meaning: adj. 严肃的；令⼈沮丧的；阴森的
exampleTranslation: 尽管天气恶劣，他们还是决定进行户外音乐会。

example: He failed to grasp the main point of the lecture.
meaning: vt. 抓紧；理解；急忙抓住 (机会) n. 紧抓，控制；理解 (⼒)
exampleTranslation: 他没能理解课程的主要观点。

example: He has a strong grip.
meaning: n. 紧握，紧抓；掌控，控制；理解 vi. vt. 紧握，紧抓 vt. 使感兴趣；对…具有强烈影响
exampleTranslation: 他有稳定的握力。

example: His gross income is over 100,000 dollars a year.
meaning: adj. 总的；严重的；令⼈恶⼼的 adv. 总共，全部 vt. (税前) 总收⼊为 n. (影⽚的) 总收⼊
exampleTranslation: 他的总收入一年超过10万美元。

example: He was seated on the ground.
meaning: n. 地，⼟地；开阔地；领域；根据 vt. vi. (使) 搁浅 vt. 使停⻜，阻⽌…起⻜ adj. (⻝物) 磨细的，剁碎的
exampleTranslation: 他坐在地上。

example: She is part of an online discussion group.
meaning: n. 组，群；集团；乐队，组合 vt. vi. (使) 成群，(使) 成组 vt. 把…分组
exampleTranslation: 她是一个在线讨论小组的成员。

example: I can give you a guarantee that this will happen.
meaning: vt. 担保，确保；提供保修 n. 保证；保修单；保证⾦
exampleTranslation: 我可以向你保证这件事会发生。

example: We must guard our secrets.
meaning: n. 卫兵，看守；警戒，保卫；后卫 vt. 守卫，保卫；看守；提防
exampleTranslation: 我们必须保护我们的秘密。

example: Our expenses include rent, utilities, and food.
meaning: vt. 包括；使成为…的⼀部分
exampleTranslation: 我们的花费包括租金、公共事业费和食品。

example: The price is inclusive of meals and accommodation.
meaning: adj. 费⽤全包的，包括的；包容性强的
exampleTranslation: 价格包含了餐饮和住宿费用。

example: Her income increased after she changed jobs.
meaning: n. 收⼊，所得，收益
exampleTranslation: 她换工作后收入增加了。

example: We need to incorporate your suggestions into our plan.
meaning: vt. 把…并⼊，包含；使组成公司
exampleTranslation: 我们需要将你的建议纳入我们的计划中。

example: We need to increase production to meet demand.
meaning: vi. vt. 增加，增多，增⻓ n. 增加，增多，增⻓
exampleTranslation: 我们需要增加产量以满足需求。

example: We are becoming increasingly aware of the importance of healthy eating.
meaning: adv. 越来越多地
exampleTranslation: 我们越来越意识到健康饮食的重要性。

example: It's incredible that she managed to finish the project in such a short time.
meaning: adj. 极好的，极⼤的；难以置信的
exampleTranslation: 她能在如此短的时间内完成这个项目，真是难以置信。

example: If we continue to cut trees, we will incur the wrath of Mother Nature.
meaning: vt. 招致，引起，蒙受
exampleTranslation: 如果我们继续砍树，我们会招致大自然的愤怒

example: Could you please send me the link to the online meeting?
meaning: n. 联系；纽带；链接；交通路线 vt. 把…连接起来；使…相关联
exampleTranslation: 你能把网络会议的链接发给我吗？

example: Can you make a shopping list for me?
meaning: n. 名单，清单 vt. (按某次序) 把…列表；列举 vi. vt. (被) 列⼊销售清单，列⼊价⽬表 vi. (船) (向⼀侧) 倾斜
exampleTranslation: 你可以帮我做一个购物清单吗?

example: I was so embarrassed. I was literally blushing.
meaning: adv. 字⾯上地；确实地；简直
exampleTranslation: 我太尴尬了，我真的脸红了。

example: She is studying English literary history at college.
meaning: adj. ⽂学的；从事写作的
exampleTranslation: 她在大学学习英文文学历史

example: She is a professor of English literature at the university.
meaning: n. ⽂学 (作品)；⽂献，资料
exampleTranslation: 她是大学的英语文学教授。

example: Please take note of the points in this memo.
meaning: n. 备忘录，公务便条
exampleTranslation: 请注意这份备忘录中的要点。

example: The statue was erected as a memorial to those who died in the war.
meaning: n. 纪念碑；(追忆逝者的) 纪念物 adj. (对逝者) 纪念的
exampleTranslation: 这座雕像是为了纪念在战争中牺牲的人们而建立的。

example: I have a very clear memory of this incident.
meaning: n. 记忆⼒；回忆；内存
exampleTranslation: 我对这件事有非常清晰的记忆。

example: She has been under a lot of mental stress recently.
meaning: adj. 精神上的；智⼒的；疯狂的
exampleTranslation: 最近，她承受了很多心理压力。

example: I'll mention your ideas to the boss during the meeting later today.
meaning: vt. 提及，说起 n. 提及，说起
exampleTranslation: 我会在今天晚些时候的会议中把你的想法提到给老板听。

example: Please take the other book on the table.
meaning: adj. pron. 其他的，另外的；相反⽅向的
exampleTranslation: 请拿桌子上的另一本书。

example: Please be careful, otherwise you may get hurt.
meaning: adv. 否则；除此以外；以其他⽅式 adj. 不同的
exampleTranslation: 请小心，否则你可能会受伤。

example: The outcome of the game was a surprise to everyone.
meaning: n. 结果，后果
exampleTranslation: 游戏的结果让所有人都感到惊讶。

example: Turn left at the traffic sign.
meaning: n. 迹象，征兆；标牌，标志；⼿势 vt. vi. 签 (名)，签字；和…签约
exampleTranslation: 在交通标志处向左转。

example: Please provide your signature at the bottom of the form.
meaning: n. 签名，署名；签署；鲜明特征
exampleTranslation: 请在表格底部签名。

example: The traffic signal turned red, so he put his foot on the brake.
meaning: n. 信号；标志；信号灯 vi. vt. 发信号，⽰意 vt. 标志，预⽰；表达，显⽰
exampleTranslation: 交通信号变红了，于是他踩下了刹车。

example: We need to understand the full significance of these results.
meaning: n. 重要性，意义；意思，含义
exampleTranslation: 我们需要理解这些结果的全部意义。

example: Your support plays a significant role in our project's success.
meaning: adj. 重要的；数量⼤的；意味深⻓的
exampleTranslation: 你的支持对我们项目的成功起着重大的作用。

example: The white dove signifies peace.
meaning: vt. 表⽰，意味着；表达，表明 vi. 具有重要性，要紧
exampleTranslation: 白鸽象征着和平。

example: These two pictures are very similar.
meaning: adj. 相像的，类似的
exampleTranslation: 这两幅画非常相似。

example: Keep it simple and clear.
meaning: adj. 简单的；简朴的；普通的 adj. (⽤于强调) 纯粹的
exampleTranslation: 保持简单明了。

example: Expressed with simplicity, his speech was very touching.
meaning: n. 简单，容易；质朴，朴素
exampleTranslation: 他的演讲内容表达得极为简洁，触动人心。

example: We need to simplify the process to increase efficiency.
meaning: vt. 简化，使简洁
exampleTranslation: 我们需要简化流程以提高效率。

example: The instructions were simply written.
meaning: adv. 仅仅；简直；简单地；简朴地
exampleTranslation: 说明书写得很简单.

example: The rope became slack after the load was removed.
meaning: adj. 松弛的；萧条的；懈怠的 n. (绳索的) 松弛部分 vi. 懈怠，偷懒
exampleTranslation: 负载移走后绳子变松了。

example: He is an addict to video games.
meaning: n. 瘾君⼦；对…⼊迷的⼈
exampleTranslation: 他沉迷于电子游戏。

example: Can you add these numbers for me?
meaning: vi. vt. 增加，相加 vt. 补充说，继续说；添加 (特⾊)
exampleTranslation: 你能帮我把这些数字加起来吗？

example: Our company is planning an addition to the existing staff.
meaning: n. 增添；添加物；加法；增建部分
exampleTranslation: 我们公司正在计划增加现有的员工。

example: Additional resources were allocated to complete the project.
meaning: adj. 附加的，额外的
exampleTranslation: 分配了额外的资源来完成项目。

example: Please write down your address on this form.
meaning: n. 地址；⽹址；演讲；称呼 (⽅式) vt. 寄往；对…讲话；称呼；处理
exampleTranslation: 请在这个表格上写下你的地址。

example: I have adequate supplies to finish the project.
meaning: adj. ⾜够的，满⾜要求的
exampleTranslation: 我有足够的供应完成这个项目。

example: You may need to adjust your sleep schedule to beat jet lag.
meaning: vt. 调整，调节；整理 (⾐着) vi. vt. (使) 适应
exampleTranslation: 你可能需要调整你的睡眠时间来克服时差。

example: School administration needs to focus on improving the quality of education.
meaning: n. 管理，⾏政；政府，管理部⻔
exampleTranslation: 学校行政部门需要专注于提高教育质量。

example: I really admire your courage.
meaning: vt. 钦佩，仰慕；欣赏，观赏
exampleTranslation: 我真的很欣赏你的勇气。

example: The admission process for this college is quite competitive.
meaning: n. 准许加⼊；承认，招认；⻔票钱
exampleTranslation: 这所大学的入学过程相当竞争激烈。

example: He admitted his mistake and apologized.
meaning: vi. vt. 承认 vt. 准许…进⼊；准许…加⼊；收治
exampleTranslation: 他承认了他的错误并道歉

example: We need to adapt to the new environment quickly.
meaning: vi. vt. 适应 vt. 改造 (以适应新情况)；改编
exampleTranslation: 我们需要快速适应新环境。

example: They've adopted a baby girl.
meaning: vt. 采纳，采⽤；正式通过 vi. vt. 收养，领养
exampleTranslation: 他们已经领养了一个女婴。

example: He's an adult now and should be responsible for his own actions.
meaning: n. 成年⼈；成年动物 adj. 成年的，成熟的；成⼈的
exampleTranslation: 他现在是个成年人了，应该为自己的行为负责。

example: I need to brace the shelf with stronger supports.
meaning: n. ⽀架；⽛箍；背带 vt. 防备，做准备；顶住，抵住
exampleTranslation: 我需要用更强的支撑物固定这个架子。

example: The human brain is a complex organ.
meaning: n. ⼤脑；智⼒；⾮常聪明的⼈
exampleTranslation: 人的大脑是一个复杂的器官。

example: She works at a branch office in New York.
meaning: n. 树枝；分部；分⽀机构；分⽀ vi. (路或河) 分岔
exampleTranslation: 她在纽约的一个分公司工作。

example: Apple is a popular brand known for its innovative products.
meaning: n. 品牌；⼀种，⼀类；烙印 vt. 加污名于；(给牲畜)打烙印
exampleTranslation: 苹果是一个以创新产品著名的流行品牌。

example: He tossed the ball to me.
meaning: vt. 扔，掷，抛；甩 (以⽰愤怒) vi. vt. (使) 摇摆，颠簸；掷硬币决定 n. 掷硬币决定；猛仰头；投掷
exampleTranslation: 他把球扔给我。

example: The total duration of the movie is three hours.
meaning: adj. 全部的，总计的；完全的 n. 总数，合计 vt. 总计为；计算…的总和
exampleTranslation: 电影的总时长为三小时。

example: Please do not touch the wet paint.
meaning: vt. 触摸；移动；使感动；影响 vi. vt. 接触，触及 n. 触觉；触摸；润⾊；⼿法；少许
exampleTranslation: 请不要碰未干的油漆。

example: You'll need a pair of tough boots for this climb.
meaning: adj. 艰难的；严厉的，强硬的 adj. 坚强的；剽悍的；结实的 n. 暴徒，恶棍 v. 坚持，捱过
exampleTranslation: 你需要一双坚固的靴子溜这次攀岩。

example: How should we treat this situation?
meaning: vt. 对待；治疗；处理；款待 n. 款待
exampleTranslation: 我们应该如何处理这种情况？

example: The treaty was signed by the two countries to end the war.
meaning: n. 条约，协定
exampleTranslation: 这个条约是由两国签署的，以结束战争。

example: The trend of economic development is encouraging.
meaning: n. 趋势，倾向 vi. 趋向；在社交媒体上引起热议
exampleTranslation: 经济发展的趋势是令人鼓舞的。

example: His main vice is drinking too much.
meaning: n. 恶习；(⻩赌毒等) 罪⾏；⽼虎钳 pref. 副的，次的
exampleTranslation: 他的主要恶习是酗酒。

example: The dog is vicious and cannot be trusted around children.
meaning: adj. 残暴的，凶猛的 adj. 恶毒的；恶性的，严重的
exampleTranslation: 这只狗很凶恶，不能让它接近孩子。

example: The hapless victim of a practical joke.
meaning: n. 受害者，患者；祭品
exampleTranslation: 一个恶作剧的无辜受害者。

example: Click the left mouse button to open the file.
meaning: vi. vt. 发出咔嗒声；点击 vi. 恍然⼤悟；(与某⼈) 合得来 n. 咔嗒声；点击
exampleTranslation: 单击鼠标左键以打开文件。

example: The client was very satisfied with our service.
meaning: n. 客⼾，顾客，当事⼈，委托⼈
exampleTranslation: 中文翻译:该客户对我们的服务非常满意。

example: The dress clings to her body.
meaning: vi. 紧紧抓住；粘住；依恋；坚守
exampleTranslation: 这件裙子紧紧贴着她的身体。

example: Please close the window before you leave.
meaning: vt. vi. 关闭；不开放；停业；(使) 结束 vt. 合上，合拢；(使) 缩⼩，接近 adj. 接近的；可能的；亲密的 adv. 接近，靠近，紧挨着
exampleTranslation: 离开前请关上窗户。

example: She keeps all her clothes tidy in the closet.
meaning: n. 贮藏室，壁橱，⾐柜 adj. 隐藏 (⾝份等) 的 vt. 把…关在房间⾥
exampleTranslation: 她把所有衣服都整齐的放在衣柜里。

example: I'm trying to debug the code.
meaning: n. 密码，代码；⾏为准则，法规 vt. 给…编号；编程，编码
exampleTranslation: 我正在尝试调试这份代码。

example: She has her personal reasons for that decision.
meaning: adj. 个⼈的，私⼈的；亲⾃的
exampleTranslation: 她有她的个人原因做出那个决定。

example: He has a very outgoing/personable personality.
meaning: n. 性格；魅⼒，⽓质；名⼈；特⾊
exampleTranslation: 他有一种非常外向/亲和的性格。

example: The company is planning to cut its personnel.
meaning: n. ⼈员，员⼯；⼈事部⻔
exampleTranslation: 公司计划裁减人员。

example: The form of the building is modern.
meaning: n. 类型；形式；表格；形状；体能 vi. vt. (使) 出现；(使) 形成；建⽴ vt. (使) 成形，组成；塑造 (性格)
exampleTranslation: 这栋大楼的形式是现代的。

example: His formal attire made him stand out at the party.
meaning: adj. 正式的，正规的
exampleTranslation: 他的正式服装让他在聚会上很显眼。

example: Our report should be presented in the standard format.
meaning: n. 版式，格式，形式 vt. 格式化；安排版式
exampleTranslation: 我们的报告应按照标准格式呈现。

example: Geological events led to the formation of the mountains.
meaning: n. 形成，产⽣；组成物；编队
exampleTranslation: 地质活动导致了山脉的形成。

example: Bob is a former student of this university.
meaning: adj. 以前的；前者的
exampleTranslation: Bob是这所大学的前任学生。

example: She is a formidable woman who managed to raise six children all on her own.
meaning: adj. 令⼈敬畏的，难对付的
exampleTranslation: 她是一位令人敬畏的妇女，她自己成功抚养了六个孩子。

example: Scientists need to calculate the mathematical formula before the experiment.
meaning: n. 公式；分⼦式；⽅案；配⽅
exampleTranslation: 科学家们在实验之前需要计算数学公式。

example: We need to formulate a plan.
meaning: vt. 规划，策划，构想；确切表达
exampleTranslation: 我们需要制定一个计划。

example: He was fortunate to escape unhurt.
meaning: adj. 幸运的
exampleTranslation: 他很幸运，没有受伤。

example: I've had the good fortune to travel widely.
meaning: n. 运⽓；时运；命运；巨款
exampleTranslation: 我有幸能广泛地旅行。

example: He offered to guide us through the forest.
meaning: n. 指南；导游；有指导意义的事物 vt. 给…领路；指导，影响
exampleTranslation: 他提议带领我们穿过森林。

example: He provided guidance to the new employees.
meaning: n. 指导，引导；制导，导航
exampleTranslation: 他为新员工提供了指导。

example: The teacher provided the students with a guideline for their homework.
meaning: n. 指导⽅针，准则；参考
exampleTranslation: 老师为学生们提供了一套作业指引。

example: His guilt was written all over his face.
meaning: n. 内疚，悔恨；犯罪，罪⾏
exampleTranslation: 他的脸上写满了罪恶感。

example: The court found him guilty of theft.
meaning: adj. 内疚的；有罪的，有过失的
exampleTranslation: 法庭认定他犯了偷窃罪。

example: The teacher gave me a certificate in recognition of my hard work.
meaning: n. 认出，识别；承认，认可；赞赏
exampleTranslation: 老师给了我一份证书以表彰我辛勤的工作。

example: I immediately recognized him from his photo.
meaning: vt. 认出；承认；公认；表彰
exampleTranslation: 我立即从他的照片中认出了他。

example: I highly recommend this restaurant to you.
meaning: vt. 推荐；建议；使受欢迎
exampleTranslation: 我强烈推荐这家餐厅给你。

example: He is recovering from a serious illness.
meaning: vi. 恢复，复原；康复，痊愈 vt. 恢复 (知觉等)；全额收回；找回
exampleTranslation: 他正在从严重的疾病中恢复。

example: After a long period of recession, the economy is finally in recovery.
meaning: n. 康复，痊愈；恢复，复苏；收回
exampleTranslation: 经过长期的经济衰退后，经济终于开始恢复了

example: We are trying to recruit more members for our club.
meaning: vt. vi. 招收，招聘，征召 n. 新兵；新成员
exampleTranslation: 我们正在为我们的俱乐部招募更多的成员。

example: I decided to sell my old car.
meaning: vt. vi. 卖，出售 vt. 推荐，⾃荐 n. 销售品
exampleTranslation: 我决定把我的旧车卖掉。

example: Could you please send me that report by tomorrow?
meaning: vt. 寄，发送；传达；派遣；使得
exampleTranslation: 你能在明天前给我发送那份报告吗？

example: My brother is five years my senior.
meaning: adj. 级别⾼的；成⼈的；⽼年的 adj. 中学的；毕业年级的 n. 年⻓者；毕业班学⽣
exampleTranslation: 我哥哥比我大五岁。

example: She made a smart decision under pressure.
meaning: adj. 聪明的；⾐冠楚楚的；光鲜的 adj. 智能的 vi. 感到剧烈刺痛；因批评等难过
exampleTranslation: 她在压力下做出了明智的决定。

example: I could smell the flowers from a distance.
meaning: vi. 有…⽓味；散发着臭⽓ vt. 闻到；嗅；觉察出 n. ⽓味；嗅觉；臭味；嗅
exampleTranslation: 我能从远处闻到花的香味。

example: He had a long soak in the bath.
meaning: vt. vi. 浸泡，湿透 vt. 使湿透，把…浸湿；宰客 n. 浸泡，湿透；泡澡
exampleTranslation: 他在浴缸里泡了好久。

example: Eagles soar high into the sky.
meaning: vi. 升空；猛增；翱翔；耸⽴；⾼涨
exampleTranslation: 鹰高飞在天空。

example: He is not very social and prefers to stay at home.
meaning: adj. 社会的；社交的；群居的
exampleTranslation: 他不太喜欢社交，更喜欢待在家里。

example: He was advocating socialism to minimize the economic disparity in the country.
meaning: n. 社会主义
exampleTranslation: 他倡导社会主义以减少国内的经济差距。

example: He decided to withdraw from society and live in seclusion.
meaning: n. 社会；社团；上流社会；交往
exampleTranslation: 他决定退出社会，过隐居生活。

example: James is majoring in sociology at the university.
meaning: n. 社会学
exampleTranslation: 詹姆斯在大学里主修社会学。

example: Salt is soluble in water.
meaning: adj. 可溶解的；(问题) 可解决的
exampleTranslation: 盐是可溶解在水中的。

example: Make sure you mix the solution thoroughly.
meaning: n. 解决办法；谜底，答案；溶液
exampleTranslation: 化学液体相关

example: Let's solve this problem together.
meaning: vt. 解决，解答
exampleTranslation: 让我们一起解决这个问题。

example: I had to detach myself from the environment I was in.
meaning: vt. vi. (使) 分开，脱离，拆卸 vt. 摆脱，离开；派遣
exampleTranslation: 我不得不将自己从所处的环境中脱离出来。

example: We need to pay attention to every detail of the project.
meaning: n. 细节；详情；资料信息；⼩分队 vt. 详细列举，详述；派遣
exampleTranslation: 我们需要关注项目的每一个细节。

example: The police detained the suspect for further interrogation.
meaning: vt. 拘留，扣押；耽搁
exampleTranslation: 警方将嫌犯扣留下进行进一步的审讯。

example: The tree cast a long shadow on the grass.
meaning: n. 阴影；阴暗处；少许 vt. 跟踪，盯梢；跟随…实地学习 adj. 影⼦内阁的
exampleTranslation: 树在草地上投下了长长的影子。

example: He sat in the shade of a large tree.
meaning: n. 阴凉处；灯罩；⾊度；细微差别 vt. 给…遮挡光线；加灯罩；画阴影
exampleTranslation: 他坐在一棵大树的阴影下。

example: I need to sort out my closet.
meaning: n. 种类，类别；分类，排序 vt. 分类，整理；妥善处理
exampleTranslation: 我需要整理我的壁橱。

example: He is the soul of the company.
meaning: n. 灵魂；精神，精髓；某种⼈
exampleTranslation: 他是公司的灵魂

example: I enjoy the sound of rain on the roof.
meaning: n. 声⾳，声响 vt. vi. 听起来；鸣警报 adj. 合理的，正确的；完好的，健康的 adj. 透彻的，全⾯的；酣畅的
exampleTranslation: 我喜欢雨打在屋顶上的声音。

example: This lemon is too sour.
meaning: adj. 酸的；馊的；(⼈) 阴郁的 vi. vt. (关系、态度) 变坏；变味，变馊
exampleTranslation: 这个柠檬太酸了。

example: The river is the main source of fresh water in the region.
meaning: n. 来源，出处；消息来源；根源 vt. (从…) 获得
exampleTranslation: 这条河是该地区的主要淡水来源。

example: We need to advance our knowledge in this area.
meaning: n. 前进；进步，发展；预付款；上涨 vi. vt. 前进；进步，发展 vt. 促进；预付；提议；提前 adj. 预先的，事先的；先⾏的
exampleTranslation: 我们要在这个领域提高我们的知识。

example: She's taking an advanced English course.
meaning: adj. 先进的；(课程) ⾼级的；晚期的
exampleTranslation: 她正在参加高级英语课程

example: We have a significant advantage in this game.
meaning: n. 优点，有利条件，优势 vt. 使处于有利地位
exampleTranslation: 我们在这场比赛中有明显的优势

example: Sophie gave me some good advice before my interview.
meaning: n. 建议，忠告
exampleTranslation: 苏菲在我面试前给了我一些好的建议。

example: My teacher advised me to study harder.
meaning: vi. vt. 建议，忠告；提供专业咨询 vt. 正式通知
exampleTranslation: 我的老师建议我更努力的学习。

example: It is not advisable to swim in the river after heavy rainfall.
meaning: adj. 明智的，可取的
exampleTranslation: 大雨过后在河里游泳是不明智的。

example: I strongly advocate the use of renewable energy.
meaning: vt. 提倡，主张 n. 拥护者，提倡者；辩护律师
exampleTranslation: 我强烈建议使用可再生能源。

example: The aesthetic design of the website attracts a lot of users.
meaning: adj. 美学的，审美的 n. 美学，审美学；美感
exampleTranslation: 网站的美观设计吸引了很多用户。

example: The whole affair has been handled with great discretion.
meaning: n. 事务；私事；事情；暧昧关系
exampleTranslation: 整个事情都被非常慎重地处理了。

example: The heavy rainfall will no doubt affect the growth of crops.
meaning: vt. 影响；(疾病) 侵袭；打动；假装
exampleTranslation: 大量降雨无疑会影响农作物的生长。

example: She has deep affection for her parents.
meaning: n. 喜爱，钟爱；爱情，爱慕
exampleTranslation: 她对父母深有感情。

example: Many local radio stations are affiliated with national networks.
meaning: vt. vi. (使) ⾪属于，(使) 紧密联系 n. 分⽀机构，附属组织，分公司
exampleTranslation: 许多当地的广播电台都附属于全国性的广播网络。

example: They affirmed their commitment to the agreement.
meaning: vt. 证实，确认；断⾔，申明
exampleTranslation: 他们肯定了对协议的承诺。

example: They cannot afford a larger apartment yet.
meaning: vt. 买得起；承担得起；提供，给予
exampleTranslation: 他们暂时还负担不起更大的公寓。

example: He is being sued for breach of contract.
meaning: n. 违背，破坏；(关系) 中断；缺⼝ vt. 违反，违背；在…上打开缺⼝
exampleTranslation: 他因违反合同被起诉。

example: You might trip and break the vase.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 破，裂，碎；弄坏；暂停 vt. 违反；打破 (纪录)；弄破；中断 vi. 逃脱；开始，(⻛暴) 发作；透露 n. 休息，间歇；间断；终⽌，中断
exampleTranslation: 不要拿着剪刀跑，你可能会绊倒并打碎花瓶

example: My car had a breakdown on the highway.
meaning: n. 故障；破裂；精神崩溃；明细
exampleTranslation: 我的车在公路上抛锚了。

example: This breed of dog is known for its loyalty.
meaning: vi. (动物) 繁殖 vt. 饲养，培育；导致，酿成 n. 品种；(⼈或物的) 类型
exampleTranslation: 这个狗品种以其忠诚闻名。

example: The festival will coincide with the school holiday.
meaning: vi. 同时发⽣；(想法等) 相同；重叠
exampleTranslation: 这个节日将与学校假期同时到来。

example: The building might collapse at any moment.
meaning: vi. 倒塌；昏倒；崩溃；暴跌 vi. vt. 折叠，可折叠；(肺或⾎管) 萎陷 n. 崩溃；倒塌；暴跌
exampleTranslation: 这栋楼随时都有可能倒塌。

example: My colleague helped me on the project.
meaning: n. 同事，同僚
exampleTranslation: 我的同事在项目上帮助我。

example: She collects stamps as a hobby.
meaning: vt. 收集；收藏；领取，收⾛；收账 vi. vt. 聚积，积累；募捐，募集；赢得 vi. 聚集，集合，汇集 adj. (电话) 由受话⼈付费的
exampleTranslation: 她的爱好是收集邮票。

example: He has a big collection of vintage cars.
meaning: n. 收藏品；⼀群；取⾛；收集 n. 系列时装；作品集
exampleTranslation: 他有一大堆老式汽车收藏。

example: We all have a collective responsibility to protect the environment.
meaning: adj. 集体的，共同的 n. 集体企业，合作农场
exampleTranslation: 我们都有集体的责任保护环境。

example: The two cars collided at the intersection.
meaning: vi. 碰撞，相撞；相冲突，相抵触
exampleTranslation: 两辆汽车在十字路口相撞了。

example: The ancient Greeks were famous for their marble columns.
meaning: n. 柱，柱状物；列；栏；专栏
exampleTranslation: 古希腊人因他们的大理石柱子而闻名。

example: Our soldiers are always ready for combat.
meaning: n. 战⽃，搏⽃ vt. 与…作⽃争，打击，战⽃
exampleTranslation: 我们的士兵总是准备好应对战斗。

example: We must combine our efforts to finish this project on time.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 结合，组合；合并，协⼒ vt. 兼备，使融合；同时做 n. 联合收割机；集团，联合企业
exampleTranslation: 我们必须合力完成这个项目。

example: Please command your dog to sit.
meaning: n. 命令；指挥，管辖；掌握，精通 vt. 命令；应得，博得；掌握，掌管 vt. vi. 指挥，统率
exampleTranslation: 请让你的狗坐下。

example: Her teacher commended her for the improvements in her work.
meaning: vt. 赞扬；推荐；把…托付给
exampleTranslation: 她的老师表扬了她的工作成绩有所提升。

example: I'd like to hear your comments on this issue.
meaning: n. 评论，意⻅ vi. vt. 作出评论，发表意⻅
exampleTranslation: 我想听听你对这个问题的评论。

example: The rapid expansion of global commerce has increased the demand for shipping services.
meaning: n. 商业，贸易
exampleTranslation: 全球商业的迅速扩展增加了对航运服务的需求。

example: The city's commercial activity is thriving.
meaning: adj. 商业的；营利的；商业化的 n. (电视或电台) ⼴告
exampleTranslation: 这个城市的商业活动正在蓬勃发展。

example: He earned a 20% commission on all merchandise he sold.
meaning: n. 委员会；佣⾦；⼿续费；委托 vt. 正式委托；任命…为军官
exampleTranslation: 他销售的所有商品，他都可以获得20%的佣金。

example: I commit to you that I will complete this task.
meaning: vt. 犯 (错或罪)；承诺；花费 vi. 忠于，全⼼全意投⼊
exampleTranslation: 我承诺你我会完成这个任务。

example: The committee has agreed on the proposal.
meaning: n. 委员会
exampleTranslation: 委员会已经通过了这项提案。

example: Copper is an important commodity in the world's markets.
meaning: n. 商品，货物；有⽤的东西
exampleTranslation: 铜是世界市场上的重要商品。

example: It's a common practice to greet each other with a handshake.
meaning: adj. 常⻅的，普通的；共有的
exampleTranslation: 握手问候是一种常见的做法。

example: It's important to communicate your ideas clearly in a team meeting.
meaning: vi. vt. 交流，沟通；表达，传达
exampleTranslation: 在团队会议上，清晰地交流你的想法非常重要。

example: Open and honest communication is important in a relationship.
meaning: n. 交流，沟通；通信；信息
exampleTranslation: 在关系中，开放和诚实的沟通非常重要。

example: Communism is a socio-economic political movement.
meaning: n. 共产主义
exampleTranslation: 共产主义是一个社会经济政治运动。

example: The local community was devastated by the hurricane.
meaning: n. 社区，群体；群落
exampleTranslation: 当地的社区被飓风严重破坏。

example: The system can detect errors in the programming code.
meaning: vt. 发现，察觉，测出
exampleTranslation: 这个系统能在编程代码中察觉到错误。

example: We should repair the house before it deteriorates.
meaning: vi. 恶化，变坏，衰退
exampleTranslation: 我们应该在房子恶化之前修复它。

example: The examination results will determine whether she can get into the university.
meaning: vt. 确定，查明；决定 vt. vi. 决意，下决⼼
exampleTranslation: 考试结果将决定她能否进入大学。

example: We need to develop a marketing strategy for our new product.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 发展，成⻓；患 (病)；加强 vt. 开发，研制；修建；阐明；冲洗
exampleTranslation: 我们需要为我们的新产品开发一种营销策略。

example: She uses a special device to open the door.
meaning: n. 仪器，设备；⼿段；花招；炸弹
exampleTranslation: 她使用一个特殊的设备来开门

example: Can you devise a better method to solve this problem?
meaning: vt. 想出，发明，设计
exampleTranslation: 你能设计出一个更好的方法来解决这个问题吗？

example: You should ensure that all the lights are switched off when you leave the room.
meaning: vt. 确保
exampleTranslation: 当你离开房间的时候，要确保所有的灯都已经关了。

example: Owning a dog entails a lot of responsibilities.
meaning: vt. 牵涉，涉及，需要
exampleTranslation: 拥有一只狗需要承担很多责任。

example: Indeed, he finished the task in no time.
meaning: adv. 确实，的确；真正地；其实
exampleTranslation: 他说这事很容易。其实，他很快就完成了任务。

example: The country gained its independence from colonial rule.
exampleTranslation: 这个国家从殖民统治中获得了独立。

example: She has a very independent mind.
meaning: adj. 独⽴的；⾃⽴的，⾃主的 n. ⽆党派议员
exampleTranslation: 独立思考

example: The book has a thorough index at the back.
meaning: n. 索引；指数；标志，指标 vt. 为…编索引
exampleTranslation: 这本书的后面有一个详尽的索引。

example: The mere thought of him makes me nervous.
meaning: adj. 仅仅，只不过；极⼩的，单单 n. ⼩湖，池塘
exampleTranslation: 他的一想就让我紧张。

example: He was merely a child at that time.
meaning: adv. 只不过，仅仅
exampleTranslation: 那时他只是个孩子。

example: His story seemed plausible, but I still had doubts.
meaning: adj. (说法) 貌似合理的；花⾔巧语的
exampleTranslation: 他的话似乎可信，但我仍有疑问。

example: The defendant entered a plea of not guilty.
meaning: n. 恳求；抗辩；(犯罪的) 借⼝
exampleTranslation: 被告人提出了无罪抗辩。

example: She began to plead for help.
meaning: vi. vt. 恳求，央求；认罪，申辩；声援 vt. 陈述案情；以…为借⼝
exampleTranslation: 她开始恳求帮助。

example: He has hatched a plot to destroy the ambassador.
meaning: n. 故事情节；阴谋；⼩块⼟地 vi. vt. 密谋，暗中策划 vt. 绘制
exampleTranslation: 他策划了一个阴谋来铲除大使。

example: The government's economic policy has been widely criticized.
meaning: n. 政策；保险单；(处事) 原则
exampleTranslation: 政府的经济政策受到了广泛的批评。

example: It's always polite to say thank you when someone helps you.
meaning: adj. 有礼貌的，客⽓的
exampleTranslation: 当有人帮助你的时候，说声谢谢总是很有礼貌的。

example: He's been very active in political life ever since his college days.
meaning: adj. 政治的；政党的；关⼼政治的
exampleTranslation: 他在政治生活中一直非常活跃。

example: John has always dreamt of becoming a politician.
meaning: n. 从政者，政治家；玩弄权术者
exampleTranslation: John一直梦想成为一名政治家。

example: She is very interested in politics and often debates with her friends.
meaning: n. 政治；权⼒⽃争；政⻅；政治学
exampleTranslation: 她对政治非常感兴趣，经常和朋友们进行辩论。

example: The new poll shows that the president's approval rating is at an all-time low.
meaning: n. ⺠意调查；投票，投票站 vt. 做⺠意调查 vt. vi. 获得 (票数)
exampleTranslation: 这份新的民意调查显示总统的支持率已经到达历史最低点。

example: I need some time to ponder your proposal.
meaning: vi. vt. 沉思，考虑
exampleTranslation: 我需要一些时间来考虑你的提议。

example: The main beam of the house finally gave way under the weight.
meaning: n. 光束，光线；横梁；平衡⽊ vi. vt. 眉开眼笑；照耀 vt. 发射 (信号)
exampleTranslation: 那栋房子的主梁在重压下终于塌陷。

example: You need to study hard to become a scientist.
meaning: vlink. 成为，变得 vt. 适合，与…相称
exampleTranslation: 你需要努力学习才能成为一名科学家。

example: I would not want to deprive you of this opportunity.
meaning: vt. 剥夺，使不能享有
exampleTranslation: 我不想剥夺你的这个机会。

example: The student derived her information from the internet.
meaning: vi. 起源于，来⾃ vt. 从…中获得
exampleTranslation: 学生从互联网上获取了她的信息

example: Can you describe him to me?

example: Could you enlighten me on this subject?
meaning: vt. 启发，开导，教化

example: Rare birds are often spotted in this area.

example: She rarely eats dessert after dinner.

example: The ratio of men to women in the company is 2:3.

example: The city is within easy reach of the coast.

example: She didn't react to the news.

example: He gave a realistic estimate of the project's cost.

example: We must face reality and admit our mistakes.

example: Select the most relevant information for your report.

example: She had a strange sensation in her stomach.

example: His skin is very sensitive to the sun.

example: Please separate the white clothes from the colored ones before washing.

example: I lost my place in the sequence of events.
meaning: n. ⼀系列，⼀连串；顺序，次序 vt. 按顺序排列；测定…的序列
exampleTranslation: 我对事件的顺序弄混了。

example: The serial number of this product is on the bottom.
meaning: n. (电视或⼴播) 连续剧，连载故事 adj. (尤指犯罪) 连续的；顺序排列的
exampleTranslation: 这个产品的序列号在底部。

example: We have a series of meetings scheduled for next week.
meaning: n. ⼀系列；系列节⽬；系列⽐赛
exampleTranslation: 我们下周有一系列的会议安排。

example: She is a serious student who always does her assignments on time.
meaning: adj. 严重的；严肃的；⼤量的
exampleTranslation: 她是一个严肃的学生，总是按时完成作业。

example: Would you like some toast for breakfast?
meaning: n. 烤⾯包⽚，吐司；⼲杯，祝酒 vt. 为…举杯敬酒 vt. vi. 烤 (尤指⾯包)，把…烤得焦⻩
exampleTranslation: 你早餐想吃土司吗？

example: The children worked together to finish the puzzle.
meaning: adv. ⼀起，同时；结合起来；在⼀起
exampleTranslation: 孩子们一起完成了拼图。

example: This coin is a token of my appreciation for your help.
meaning: n. 代币；象征，标志；代⾦券 adj. 象征性的
exampleTranslation: 这枚硬币是我对你的帮助表示感谢的象征

example: It's important to teach our children about the value of tolerance.
meaning: n. 宽容，容忍；忍耐⼒；公差
exampleTranslation: 我们教育孩子接纳他人的价值是很重要的。

example: She is very tolerant of other people's faults.
meaning: adj. 宽容的，容忍的；能耐…的
exampleTranslation: 她对别人的错误十分宽容。

example: He can't tolerate laziness in his team.
meaning: vt. 容许；忍耐；对…有耐受性
exampleTranslation: 他无法容忍他的团队里的懒散。

example: Dust tends to accumulate in corners.
meaning: vt. 积累，积聚 vi. 累积，逐渐增加
exampleTranslation: 尘土往往在角落里堆积。

example: The accuracy of the information is questionable.
meaning: n. 准确性，精确性
exampleTranslation: 这个信息的精确性是值得怀疑的。

example: The watch is accurate to the second.
meaning: adj. 准确的，精确的
exampleTranslation: 这表准确到秒。

example: The teacher accused the little boy of cheating.
meaning: vt. 指责，指控，控告
exampleTranslation: 老师指控那个小男孩作弊

example: We can achieve our goals through hard work.
meaning: vt. 达到，获得，完成 vi. 成功
exampleTranslation: 我们可以通过努力实现我们的目标。

example: I hereby acknowledge receipt of your letter.
meaning: vt. 承认，认可；感谢 vt. 告知收到 (信件或信息等)
exampleTranslation: 我特此确认收到你的信。

example: The crowd gave a loud cheer when the team scored a goal.
meaning: n. 欢呼声；欢乐的⽓氛 vi. vt. 欢呼，加油 vt. ⿎励，⿎舞；(使) 振奋起来
exampleTranslation: 球队进球时，人群发出了热烈的欢呼。

example: The factory produces a variety of chemicals.
meaning: adj. 化学的，与化学有关的 n. 化学品，化学制品
exampleTranslation: 这家工厂生产各种化学品。

example: We should cherish the time we have.
meaning: vt. 珍爱，珍惜；怀有 (希望等)
exampleTranslation: 我们应该珍惜我们拥有的时间。

example: Can you pass me a bag of chips?
meaning: n. 薯条，薯⽚；芯⽚；缺⼝；碎屑 vt. vi. 打破，弄缺；打 (或踢) ⾼球 vt. 削下，凿下
exampleTranslation: 你能递给我一袋炸薯片吗？

example: You have a choice between tea and coffee.
meaning: n. 选择，挑选；选择权；⼊选者 adj. 精选的，上等的
exampleTranslation: 你可以在茶和咖啡间做选择。

example: She had to choose between two courses.
meaning: vi. vt. 选择，挑选
exampleTranslation: 她必须在两门课程中做出选择。

example: He is a member of the board of directors.
meaning: n. ⽊板，板；董事会；膳⻝ vi. vt. 上船 (或⻜机等) vi. 让乘客上船 (或登机)；在校寄宿
exampleTranslation: 他是董事会的一员。

example: He always boasts about his football skills.
meaning: vi. vt. ⾃吹⾃擂，⾃夸 vt. 有 (值得⾃豪的事物) n. ⾃吹⾃擂，⾃夸
exampleTranslation: 他总是吹嘘自己的足球技巧。

example: Employees receive a bonus at the end of the year.
meaning: n. 奖⾦，红利；额外的好处
exampleTranslation: 员工在年底会接到一笔奖金。

example: The lightning was followed by a loud boom.
meaning: n. 繁荣，激增；⻛靡的时期；轰鸣 vi. 轰鸣，轰响；繁荣，迅速发展 vt. vi. 以低沉有⼒的声⾳说话
exampleTranslation: 闪电过后是一声巨响。

example: We need to boost our business.
meaning: vt. 使增⻓，推动；偷窃 n. 激励；增加；向上⼀推
exampleTranslation: 我们需要提升我们的业务。

example: He gave a verbal agreement to finish the work by Friday.
meaning: adj. ⼝头的；⾔辞的；动词的
exampleTranslation: 他口头同意星期五之前完成这项工作。

example: The jury reached a unanimous verdict of guilty.
meaning: n. 裁决，裁定；意⻅，决定
exampleTranslation: 陪审团一致裁定他有罪。

example: Before you publish the report, please verify the data carefully.
meaning: vt. 证明，核实，查证
exampleTranslation: 在你公布报告之前，请仔细验证数据。

example: The child wrote a beautiful verse for his mother.
meaning: n. 诗；诗节；(《圣经》等中的) 节
exampleTranslation: 孩子为他妈妈写了一段美丽的诗歌

example: Do you have the latest version of this software?
meaning: n. 版本；描述，说法
exampleTranslation: 你有这个软件的最新版本吗?

example: The chemical reaction takes place in a sealed vessel.
meaning: n. 舰，轮船；容器，器⽫；⾎管
exampleTranslation: 这个化学反应在封闭的容器中进行。

example: The church is regarded as a holy place.
meaning: adj. 与上帝有关的，神圣的；虔诚的
exampleTranslation: 教堂被视作神圣的地方。

example: It’s a great honour to meet you.
meaning: n. 荣幸；荣誉；荣誉称号；道义 vt. 尊敬 (某⼈)；表彰；信守 (承诺)
exampleTranslation: 真荣幸能见到你。

example: He's an honourable man, you can totally trust him.
meaning: adj. 值得尊敬的；正直的；体⾯的
exampleTranslation: 他是一个有道德的人，你可以完全信任他。

example: I gazed out over the blue sea melting into the sky at the horizon.
meaning: n. 地平线；范围，眼界，⻅识
exampleTranslation: 我凝视着蔚蓝的海水在地平线处融入天空。

example: The paintings should be hung at a horizontal level.
meaning: adj. ⽔平的，横的 n. ⽔平位置；⽔平线，⽔平⾯
exampleTranslation: 画应该挂在水平线上。

example: The boy came up with an ingenious solution to the math problem.
meaning: adj. 精巧的，巧妙的；善于创造的
exampleTranslation: 这个男孩对数学问题提出了一个巧妙的解答。

example: The chef carefully measured each ingredient before adding it to the mixture.
meaning: n. 配料，成分；因素
exampleTranslation: 厨师在将每种材料加入混合物之前都仔细测量。

example: The initial response was very positive.
meaning: adj. 开始的，最初的 n. (名字的) ⾸字⺟ vt. ⽤姓名的⾸字⺟签名于
exampleTranslation: 最初的反应很积极。

example: I will initiate the project when all members are ready.
meaning: vt. 开始，发起；使初步了解；接纳 n. 新⼊会的⼈
exampleTranslation: 我会在所有成员准备就绪时启动这个项目。

example: Tom took the initiative to propose a solution to the problem.
meaning: n. 主动性；倡议，新⽅案；主动权
exampleTranslation: 汤姆主动提出了解决问题的办法。

example: This is a local shop for local people.
meaning: adj. 当地的，本地的；(⾝体) 局部的 n. 本地⼈；住处附近的酒吧
exampleTranslation: 这是一个专为当地人设立的商店。

example: This locality is known for its rich cultural history.
meaning: n. 地区，区域
exampleTranslation: 这个地方以其丰富的文化历史而闻名。

example: I can't locate the office on this map.
meaning: vt. 确定…的位置；使位于 vi. (公司) 落⼾于
exampleTranslation: 我在这张地图上找不到那个办公室。

example: The location of the hotel is very convenient for tourists.
meaning: n. 地点，位置；外景拍摄地；定位
exampleTranslation: 这家酒店的地理位置对游客来说非常方便。

example: We shouldn't neglect our responsibilities.
meaning: vt. 疏忽，忽略；未做 (某事) n. 疏忽，(被) 忽略
exampleTranslation: 我们不应该忽视我们的责任。

example: The amount of money spent on the project so far is negligible.
meaning: adj. 微不⾜道的，不值⼀提的
exampleTranslation: 到目前为止，投在这个项目上的资金微不足道。

example: The doctor prescribed some medication for my cough.
meaning: vt. 开 (药、处⽅)；规定
exampleTranslation: 医生为我的咳嗽开了些药。

example: The doctor gave me a prescription for my cough.
meaning: n. 处⽅；处⽅药；对策
exampleTranslation: 医生为我的咳嗽开了处方。

example: His presence at the meeting indicated his support for the new project.
meaning: n. 在场，出席；存在，出现；仪态
exampleTranslation: 他在会议中的出席表明了他对新项目的支持。

example: He bought a present for his mother's birthday.
meaning: adj. 当前的；在场的；存在的 n. 礼物；⽬前，现在；现在时 vt. 授予；提交；展现；使经历
exampleTranslation: 他为母亲的生日买了一个礼物。

example: I'll be with you presently.
meaning: adv. ⽬前，现在；⻢上，随即
exampleTranslation: 我马上就会和你在一起。

example: We need to preserve our natural resources for future generations.
meaning: vt. 维护，保护；保持；保存 (⻝物) n. 专⻔领域；蜜饯，果酱；保护区
exampleTranslation: 我们需要为未来的一代保护我们的自然资源。

example: The headmaster will preside at the graduation.
meaning: vi. 主持，负责 (会议等)
exampleTranslation: 校长将preside学校的毕业典礼。

example: Please press the button to start the machine.
meaning: n. 报刊；新闻界；印刷机；出版社 vt. vi. 压，按 vt. 把…按⼊；敦促；把…压平 vi. 拥挤着移动
exampleTranslation: 请按下按钮启动机器。

example: He is under a lot of pressure from his job.
meaning: n. 压⼒；挤压；液压，⽓压 vt. 对…施压，逼迫
exampleTranslation: 他的工作压力很大。

example: The university has a great deal of prestige around the world.
meaning: n. 威信，声望 adj. 令⼈敬仰的，受尊重的；名贵的
exampleTranslation: 这所大学在全世界有着很高的声望。

example: He's presumably very busy with the project.
meaning: adv. 很可能，据推测
exampleTranslation: 他大概正忙于这个项目。

example: I presume you're here on business?
meaning: vi. vt. 推测，猜测 vt. (尤指法庭上) 推定，假定；假设 vi. 妄⾏，越权⾏事
exampleTranslation: 我猜你是来办事的吧？

example: We must prevent the spread of disease.
meaning: vt. 防⽌，预防，阻⽌
exampleTranslation: 我们必须阻止疾病的传播。

example: He looked different from his previous appearance.
meaning: adj. 先前的；(时间或顺序上) 稍前的
exampleTranslation: 中文翻译：他看起来和以前不同。

example: The lion stalked its prey through the tall grass.
meaning: n. 猎物；受害者 vi. 捕⻝；坑骗
exampleTranslation: 狮子在高草丛中悄悄接近它的猎物。

example: He is a reliable friend you can always count on.
meaning: adj. 可信赖的，可依靠的
exampleTranslation: 他是一个你总是可以依靠的可靠朋友。

example: Our reliance on fossil fuels has caused many environmental problems.
meaning: n. 依赖，依靠
exampleTranslation: 我们对化石燃料的依赖引发了许多环境问题。

example: Her family is very strict about religion.
meaning: n. 宗教信仰；宗教
exampleTranslation: 她的家庭对宗教很严格

example: He is a deeply religious man who goes to church every Sunday.
meaning: adj. 宗教的；虔诚的，笃信宗教的
exampleTranslation: 他是一位深深的虔诚的人，每周日都要去教堂。

example: You can't rely on the weather in summer, it changes so quickly.
meaning: vi. 依靠；信任
exampleTranslation: 你不能依赖夏天的天气，它变化如此之快。

example: Keep going straight until you see the post office.
meaning: adv. 笔直地；直接；正，直；坦率地 adj. 直的；连续的；准的；坦率的 n. 直道
exampleTranslation: 继续直走，直到你看到邮局。

example: The instructions are simple and straightforward.
meaning: adj. 简单易懂的；坦率的，率直的
exampleTranslation: 说明书是简单而直白的。

example: Be careful not to strain your eyes by reading in poor light.
meaning: n. 压⼒；劳损，拉伤；品种 vt. 拉伤，扭伤，劳损；过度使⽤ vt. vi. 尽⼒，使劲 vi. ⽤⼒推 (或拉)，拉紧
exampleTranslation: 不要在光线不足的地方看书，以免眼睛过度疲劳。

example: The company is reevaluating its long-term strategy.
meaning: n. 战略，策略；战略学
exampleTranslation: 公司正在重新评估其长期策略。

example: His health continues to go from strength to strength.
meaning: n. ⼒量；实⼒；优势；强度
exampleTranslation: 他的健康状况持续好转。

example: We need to strengthen our defenses to prevent any possible attacks.
meaning: vi. vt. 加强，加固
exampleTranslation: 我们需要加强我们的防御能力以防止任何可能的攻击。

example: I just made a transaction with the seller for that antique vase.
meaning: n. 交易，业务；(业务) 办理
exampleTranslation: 我刚刚和卖家做了一个关于那个古董花瓶的交易。

example: Can you transfer the call to Mr.
meaning: vi. vt. 转移，调动；移交；转存；换乘 vt. 转账；转让；传染 n. 转移，调动；转会；换乘
exampleTranslation: 你能把电话转接给史密斯先生吗？

example: The furniture was transformed by a coat of paint.
meaning: vt. 转换，改变，改造
exampleTranslation: 一层漆让家具焕然一新。

example: The rain was transient and soon it was sunny again.
meaning: adj. 短暂的；流动的，临时的 n. 暂住者，流浪者
exampleTranslation: 雨水是短暂的，很快太阳又出来了。

example: She does the translation of literary works from English to Chinese.
meaning: n. 翻译，译⽂
exampleTranslation: 她负责从英语到汉语的文学作品翻译。

example: He is studying to become an architect.
meaning: n. 建筑师；发起者，创⽴者
exampleTranslation: 他正在学习成为一名建筑师。

example: He's studying architecture at college.
meaning: n. 建筑学；建筑⻛格；结构
exampleTranslation: 他在大学学习建筑学。

example: All the city's historical documents are kept in the archive.
meaning: n. 档案，档案馆 vt. 把 (⽂档等) 存档
exampleTranslation: 所有市里的历史文件都在档案室里。

example: This area is known for its beautiful scenery.
meaning: n. 区域，地区；⾯积；部位；领域
exampleTranslation: 这个区域以其美丽的风景而闻名。

example: The basketball team is practicing hard in the arena for the big game tomorrow.
meaning: n. 竞技场，剧场；活动场地
exampleTranslation: 篮球队正在体育馆中努力训练，为明天的大赛做准备。

example: They argue about politics all the time.
meaning: vi. 争吵，争论 vi. vt. 论证，主张 vt. 证明，表明
exampleTranslation: 他们一直在争论政治。

example: They had an argument about money.
meaning: n. 争论；论据，理由；争议，异议
exampleTranslation: 他们因为钱的问题发生了争论。

example: The sun arises in the east.
meaning: vi. 发⽣，出现；由…引起；起⾝
exampleTranslation: 太阳从东方升起。

example: His speech aroused a lot of interest among the listeners.
meaning: vt. 引起，激起，激发；唤醒
exampleTranslation: 他的演讲在听众中引起了很大的兴趣。

example: We saw a stunning array of colors as the sun set.
meaning: n. ⼀⼤批；数列；⼀整套 (设备) vt. 布阵，部署；给…盛装打扮
exampleTranslation: 我们看到了太阳落山时色彩斑斓的景象

example: The moon is visible in the sky tonight.
meaning: adj. 可⻅的；明显的
exampleTranslation: 今夜的月亮在天空中可见。

example: His vision for the company inspired the team.
meaning: n. 视⼒，视野；设想；幻象；远⻅
exampleTranslation: 他对公司的愿景鼓舞了团队。

example: The presentation was incredibly visual, filled with images and videos.
meaning: adj. 视觉的，视⼒的，可⻅的 n. 视觉材料
exampleTranslation: 演讲非常形象，充满了图片和视频。

example: Regular exercise is vital for maintaining good health.
meaning: adj. 极其重要的；维持⽣命所必需的 adj. 充满活⼒的，⽣机勃勃的
exampleTranslation: 规律的运动对于保持良好的健康至关重要。

example: She has a vivid imagination.
meaning: adj. ⽣动的，清晰的；鲜艳的
exampleTranslation: 她有丰富的想象力。

example: The contract became void after the deadline passed.
meaning: n. 空⽩，空虚感 adj. (合同) ⽆效的；缺乏…的；空的 vt. 使…作废；排泄
exampleTranslation: 截止日期过后合同变得无效。

example: The volume of traffic has increased enormously in recent years.
meaning: n. 体积，容积；量；⾳量；卷，册
exampleTranslation: 近些年来交通流量显著增长.

example: Actions have consequences, so think before you act.
meaning: n. 结果，后果；重要性，价值
exampleTranslation: 行动都会有后果的，所以在行动前要好好想清楚。

example: I overslept; consequently, I was late to work.
meaning: adv. 结果，因此，所以
exampleTranslation: 我睡过头了；因此，我上班迟到了。

example: The government has spent millions of dollars on conservation efforts.
meaning: n. 保护；节约，保存
exampleTranslation: 政府已经投入数百万美元用于保护工作。

example: He has conservative views on the role of the family in society.
meaning: adj. 保守的；保守党的 n. 保守党党员；保守的⼈
exampleTranslation: 他对社会中家庭的角色持有保守的观点。

example: You should consider all factors before making a decision.
meaning: vi. vt. 考虑，斟酌 vt. 认为；体谅；端详
exampleTranslation: 你在做决定之前应该考虑所有的因素。

example: There has been considerable improvement in her health.
meaning: adj. 相当多的，相当⼤的
exampleTranslation: 描述程度

example: He is very considerate about his parents.
meaning: adj. 体贴的，考虑周到的
exampleTranslation: 体现尊重和关心

example: I consume a lot of fruits and vegetables to stay healthy.
meaning: vt. 消耗，耗费；吃，喝；使充满…
exampleTranslation: 我为了保持身体健康，会消费大量的水果和蔬菜。

example: Consumption of natural resources has accelerated since the industrial revolution.
meaning: n. 消耗 (量)；⻝⽤ (量)；消费
exampleTranslation: 自工业革命以来，对自然资源的消耗已加速。

example: The two politicians were in a dispute over tax reforms.
meaning: n. 争论，争端 vt. 对…表⽰异议，对…表⽰质疑 vt. vi. 就…争论，就…争执
exampleTranslation: 两位政治家在税收改革问题上发生了争执。

example: I watched the sugar dissolve into the hot coffee.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 溶解；消除，(使) 消散 vt. 解除，终⽌，解散 vi. 禁不住 (笑起来或哭起来等)
exampleTranslation: 我看着糖溶入热咖啡中。

example: They exchange gifts every Christmas.
meaning: n. 交换，交流；交谈；兑换；互访 vt. 交换，交流；兑换，交易
exampleTranslation: 他们每到圣诞节就互赠礼物。

example: Children under 16 are excluded from the cinema after 9 pm.
meaning: vt. 将…排斥在外；不包括；排除
exampleTranslation: 9点后16岁以下的儿童不能进入电影院。

example: This is an exclusive offer for our members only.
meaning: adj. 独占的；⾼档的；排斥的 adj. 不包括…的 n. 独家新闻，独家报道
exampleTranslation: 这是我们会员的专享优惠。

example: I confined my remarks to the subject at hand.
meaning: vt. 限制，使…局限于；监禁，关押
exampleTranslation: 我局限我的讲话在手头的主题上。

example: Could you confirm the time of our meeting tomorrow?
meaning: vt. 证实，证明；确认 (安排)；批准
exampleTranslation: 你能确认一下我们明天开会的时间吗？

example: The siblings were in constant conflict over their inheritance.
meaning: n. 冲突，争执；⽭盾 vi. 相互⽭盾，冲突
exampleTranslation: 这几个兄弟姐妹为了继承问题经常发生冲突。

example: Practice gave her confidence before the speech.
meaning: n. 信⼼，信任；⾃信；把握；秘密
exampleTranslation: 练习让她在演讲前有了信心。

example: He was confident that he could finish the task.
meaning: adj. ⾃信的；有把握的，确信的
exampleTranslation: 他确信他能完成这个任务。

example: She asked me to keep the information confidential.
meaning: adj. 机密的；(讲话) 悄悄的
exampleTranslation: 她要求我保密这个信息。

example: This software supports many different configurations.
meaning: n. 布局，构造；配置
exampleTranslation: 这个软件支持许多不同的配置。

example: She walked slowly along the forest trail.
meaning: n. 痕迹，踪迹；(乡间) ⼩路；路线 vt. vi. (被) 拖，拉；落后，失利 vi. (尤指跟在他⼈后⾯) 疲惫地⾛ vt. 跟踪，追踪
exampleTranslation: 她沿着森林小路慢慢地走。

example: The train is running on the track.
meaning: n. ⽕⻋，列⻋；队列；⼀系列 vt. vi. (接受) 训练，(被) 培训 vt. 教育，培养…的能⼒
exampleTranslation: 火车正在铁轨上行驶。

example: I am in charge of training new employees.
meaning: n. 培训，训练；体育训练，锻炼
exampleTranslation: 我负责新员工的培训

example: She has the physical traits of her mother.
meaning: n. 特性，特质
exampleTranslation: 她有着母亲的身体特征

example: In my view, we should continue with the plan.
meaning: n. 看法；(思维) ⽅法；视野；景⾊ vt. 视为，看待；看，观看
exampleTranslation: 在我看来，我们应该继续实施这个计划。

example: From an economic viewpoint, the project was a great success.
meaning: n. 观点，看法；视⻆，⻆度
exampleTranslation: 从经济角度来看，这个项目非常成功。

example: The city has experienced an increase in gang-related violence.
meaning: n. 暴⼒，暴⾏；激烈，热烈
exampleTranslation: 这个城市已经经历了一个和帮派相关的暴力增长。

example: A violent storm damaged the old bridge.
meaning: adj. 暴⼒的；(情感) 强烈的；剧烈的
exampleTranslation: 一场猛烈的暴风雨损坏了旧桥。

example: Virtual reality technology is becoming more advanced.
meaning: adj. ⼏乎…的，实际上的；虚拟的
exampleTranslation: 虚拟现实技术正在变得越来越先进。

example: Patience is an important virtue for teachers.
meaning: n. 美德；优点，⻓处
exampleTranslation: 耐心是教师的一项重要美德。

example: His age is not immediately apparent.
meaning: adj. 显然的；表⾯上的，貌似的
exampleTranslation: 他的年龄并不是一看就能确定的。

example: The charity event was an appeal for funds.
meaning: vi. 吸引；呼吁，恳求；上诉；打动 n. 上诉；吸引⼒，魅⼒；呼吁
exampleTranslation: 这个慈善活动是一个募款的呼吁。

example: A rainbow appeared after the rain.
meaning: vi. 出现；起源；问世；演出；出庭 vlink. 似乎，好像
exampleTranslation: 雨后出现了一道彩虹。

example: His appearance changed after a year abroad.
meaning: n. 外观；公开露⾯；出现；问世
exampleTranslation: 出国一年后他的外表变了。

example: The kitchen is fitted with all modern appliances.
meaning: n. (家⽤) 电器，装置
exampleTranslation: 厨房配有所有现代化的设备。

example: This law is applicable to all citizens.
meaning: adj. 适合的，适⽤的
exampleTranslation: 这个法律适用于所有公民。

example: The application of heat will cause the chemical reaction.
meaning: n. 申请 (书)；运⽤；应⽤程序
exampleTranslation: 热的应用将会引起化学反应。

example: The president will appoint a new ambassador to France.
meaning: vt. 任命，指派；约定 (时间、地点)
exampleTranslation: 总统将任命一位新的驻法国大使。

example: I have an appointment with the dentist tomorrow.
meaning: n. 约定，预约；任命，指派；职位
exampleTranslation: 我明天有个看牙医的预约。

example: You should apply for the scholarship before Friday.
meaning: vi. vt. 申请；(对…) 适⽤ vt. 应⽤，运⽤；涂抹；按，踩
exampleTranslation: 你应该在星期五前申请奖学金。

example: I appreciate your help with this project.
meaning: vt. 欣赏；感激；理解，体会到 vi. 升值，增值
exampleTranslation: 我感谢你对这个项目的帮助。

example: We should never discriminate on the basis of color, religion, or nationality.
meaning: vi. 歧视，区别对待 vi. vt. 区分，辨别
exampleTranslation: 我们绝不应该因肤色、宗教或民族而歧视他人。

example: We need to discuss your performance at work.
meaning: vt. 讨论，谈论；论述，阐述
exampleTranslation: 我们需要讨论你的工作表现。

example: He was diagnosed with a rare disease.
meaning: n. 疾病；弊病，恶习
exampleTranslation: 他被诊断患有罕见的疾病。

example: He managed to escape from the burning building.
meaning: vi. 逃跑；幸免于难；泄漏 vi. vt. 逃脱，摆脱 vt. 避免；被忘掉，被忽视 n. 逃跑；解脱；渗出 (量)
exampleTranslation: 他设法逃出了燃烧的大楼。

example: I like sweets, especially chocolate.
meaning: adv. 特别，尤其；特地；⾮常
exampleTranslation: 我喜欢甜食,特别是巧克力。

example: Please write a 200-word essay on this topic.
meaning: n. ⽂章，论⽂；随笔，⼩品⽂ vt. 企图，尝试
exampleTranslation: 请就这个主题写一篇200字的短文。

example: The essence of her argument is that the economy is improving.
meaning: n. 本质，精髓；精油，⾹精
exampleTranslation: 她的论点的核心是经济正在改善。

example: Water is essential for life.
meaning: adj. 必不可少的；基本的，本质的 n. 必需品；要素，要点
exampleTranslation: 水对生命来说是必不可少的。

example: We need to establish a safe environment for these animals.
meaning: vt. 建⽴，创⽴；使被认可；证实
exampleTranslation: 我们需要为这些动物建立一个安全的环境。

example: I estimate that the journey will take two hours.
meaning: vt. 估计，估算，估价 n. 估计，估算，估价
exampleTranslation: 我估计这次旅行会需要两小时。

example: This is an ethnic museum which presents various cultures and histories.
meaning: adj. 种族的，⺠族的；有⺠族特⾊的 n. 少数⺠族的⼈
exampleTranslation: 这是一个展示各种文化和历史的民族博物馆。

example: Before making a decision, we need to evaluate all the options.
meaning: vt. 评价，评估
exampleTranslation: 在做决定之前，我们需要评估所有的选择。

example: Industrial development has progressed rapidly in the last decade.
meaning: adj. ⼯业的；⼯业发达的 adj. ⼯业制造的，⼯业⽤的
exampleTranslation: 在过去的十年中，工业发展进展迅速。

example: It took several years to industrialize the rural areas.
meaning: vt. vi. ⼯业化
exampleTranslation: 花了好几年才使农村地区实现工业化。

example: She has been working in the television industry for over 30 years.
meaning: n. ⼯业；⾏业，产业；勤奋
exampleTranslation: 她在电视行业工作了三十多年。

example: Change is an inevitable part of life.
meaning: adj. 不可避免的，必然发⽣的
exampleTranslation: 生活中的变化是不可避免的。

example: She's miserable living on her own.
meaning: adj. 痛苦的；令⼈难受的；不友善的
exampleTranslation: 她一个人生活感到很悲惨。

example: She witnessed the misery endured by the impoverished population.
meaning: n. 痛苦；穷困；不幸的事
exampleTranslation: 她目睹了贫穷人口所忍受的苦难。

example: The coach's advice might mislead the player.
meaning: vt. 误导，将…引⼊歧途
exampleTranslation: 教练的建议可能会误导球员。

example: We need to mix the paint before using it.
meaning: vt. vi. (使) 混合，掺和，融合 vt. 调配，配制 vi. 交往，相处，交际 n. 混合；配料；混录，混⾳
exampleTranslation: 我们在使用这个油漆之前需要把它搅拌一下。

example: Let the cake bake for 20 minutes after you combine the mixture.
meaning: n. 混合，混合体；混合物，混合料
exampleTranslation: 在你混合好奶油后，让蛋糕烘烤20分钟。

example: It is necessary to wear a coat in winter.
meaning: adj. 必需的，必要的；必然的
exampleTranslation: 冬天穿外套是必要的。

example: The extreme weather necessitated a change of plans.
meaning: vt. 使成为必需
exampleTranslation: 极端的天气迫使我们改变了计划。

example: Water is a basic necessity of life.
meaning: n. 必要；必需品；不可避免的情况
exampleTranslation: 水是生活的基本必需品。

example: The doctor told him that his test was negative.
meaning: adj. 有害的；消极的；否定的 adj. 负的；阴性的 n. 否定词，否定；底⽚ vt. 否定，拒绝
exampleTranslation: 医生告诉他，他的检测结果是阴性的。

example: We need to negotiate the terms of the contract.
meaning: vi. 谈判，洽谈 vt. 商定，达成 (协议)；顺利通过
exampleTranslation: 我们需要谈判合同的条款。

example: The outer layers of the onion are the easiest to peel.
meaning: adj. 在外的，外⾯的；远离中⼼的
exampleTranslation: 洋葱的外层最容易剥。

example: Make sure you unplug the device from the outlet when it's not in use.
meaning: n. 出⼝，发泄途径；经销店；折扣店 n. 媒体公司；插座；排放⼝
exampleTranslation: 在不使用设备时，请确保将其从电源插座上拔下。

example: The artist sketched an outline of his model's profile.
meaning: n. 概要，梗概；轮廓，外形 vt. 概述，概括；勾勒
exampleTranslation: 艺术家勾画了他的模特侧面的轮廓。

example: He has a positive outlook on life.
meaning: n. 世界观，观点；前景；景⾊
exampleTranslation: 他对生活持积极的态度

example: The factory has increased its output this year.
meaning: n. 产量，输出量；输出功率 vt. 输出
exampleTranslation: 今年这家工厂增加了产量。

example: Childhood poverty can affect lifelong mental health.
meaning: n. 贫穷，贫困；缺乏，短缺
exampleTranslation: 儿时的贫困可以影响终生的心理健康。

example: She has the power to change the company's direction.
meaning: n. 政权；影响⼒；能⼒；权⼒ n. 实⼒；⼒量；能量；电⼒供应 vt. 驱动 (机器或⻋辆) vi. vt. (使) 迅猛移动
exampleTranslation: "她有能力改变公司的方向。"

example: This is a very practical solution to our problem.
meaning: adj. 实际的；切实可⾏的；务实的 adj. (东西) 实⽤的 n. 实习课，实践课
exampleTranslation: 这是我们问题的一个非常实际的解决方案。

example: Daily practice improved her piano skills.
meaning: n. 练习，训练；实践；惯例，常规 vi. vt. 练习，训练 vt. 践⾏，信奉；从事 (医律等职业)
exampleTranslation: 每天练习提高了她的钢琴技巧。

example: You need to practise your English every day.
meaning: vi. vt. 练习，训练；(医⽣、律师) 执业 vt. 经常做，形成…的习惯
exampleTranslation: 你每天需要练习英语。

example: He used to preach the gospel in the countryside.
meaning: vi. vt. 讲道，布道；宣传，⿎吹 vi. 说教，唠叨
exampleTranslation: 他过去常在乡村里传播福音。

example: The movie was preceded by a short documentary.
meaning: vt. vi. 先于…(发⽣或存在) vt. ⾛在…之前
exampleTranslation: 这部电影之前播放了一个短片纪录片。

example: Wear your seat belt as a precaution against car accidents.
meaning: n. 预防措施，防备
exampleTranslation: 系上安全带以防车祸。

example: This ruling will set a precedent for future cases.
meaning: n. 可援引的例⼦；先例；惯例
exampleTranslation: 这个裁决将为未来的案件设定先例。

example: The preceding events left everyone in shock.
meaning: adj. 前⾯的，在先的
exampleTranslation: 之前的事件让每个人都感到震惊。

example: Water is precious in the desert.
meaning: adj. 珍贵的；珍稀的；被珍惜的 adv. (强调太少) ⾮常
exampleTranslation: 在沙漠中，水是非常宝贵的。

example: He made a precise measurement of the dimensions of the room.
meaning: adj. 精确的；确切的；⼀丝不苟的
exampleTranslation: 他精确地测量了房间的尺寸。

example: The machine can cut with extreme precision.
meaning: n. 精确，精密 adj. 精确的，精密的
exampleTranslation: 这个机器可以极其精确地切割。

example: I'm under a lot of stress from work.
meaning: n. 压⼒；重⾳；强调 vt. 强调；重读 vi. vt. (使) 焦虑不安
exampleTranslation: 我工作的压力很大。

example: After sitting for a long time, I needed to stretch.
meaning: vt. vi. 拉⻓，撑⼤；伸展；伸出 vi. (织物) 有弹性；绵延；延续 vt. 拉紧；消耗；使竭尽所能；滥⽤ n. ⼀段；⼀段时间；伸展；弹性
exampleTranslation: 坐久了，我需要伸一下身子。

example: I live in a remote village in the mountains.
meaning: adj. 偏远的，遥远的；久远的 adj. 微乎其微的；远程的；冷淡的 n. 遥控器
exampleTranslation: 我住在山里的一个偏远的村庄。

example: Could you please remove your shoes at the door?
meaning: vt. 移⾛；去除；脱掉；免除 (职位) n. 距离，差距
exampleTranslation: 请在门口除鞋好吗？

example: The removal of the old furniture took the whole day.
meaning: n. 移⾛，拿⾛；消除；免职；搬迁
exampleTranslation: 移走老旧的家具花了整整一天。

example: Even after the fire, the structure of the building remained intact.
meaning: vlink. 保持，仍是 vi. 余下；尚待…；留下，逗留
exampleTranslation: 即使火灾过后，建筑物的结构仍然完整。

example: The remainder of the class will be devoted to group discussions.
meaning: n. 剩余部分，剩余物；余数
exampleTranslation: 剩余的课程时间将用于小组讨论。

example: The best remedy for a headache is a good long sleep.
meaning: n. 解决⽅法；药品，疗法 vt. 纠正，补救
exampleTranslation: 头疼的最佳疗法是好好地睡一觉。

example: Please remember to lock the door before you leave.
meaning: vt. vi. 记得，想起 vt. 记住 (去做某事)；纪念
exampleTranslation: 请记住在离开之前锁上门。

example: Please remind me to buy milk.
meaning: vt. 提醒；使想起
exampleTranslation: 请提醒我买牛奶。

example: The artist rendered the landscape with great skill.
meaning: vt. 使变得；给予，提供；表达；翻译
exampleTranslation: 这个艺术家极具技巧地描绘了这片风景。

example: His theories were contemporary with those of Darwin.
meaning: adj. 当代的，现代的；同时代的 n. 同时期的⼈，同时代的⼈
exampleTranslation: 他的理论与达尔文的是同期的。

example: She contemptuously dismissed his objections.
meaning: n. 鄙视，蔑视；藐视法庭
exampleTranslation: 副词，表示轻蔑地，鄙视地例句：Shecontemptuouslydismissedhisobjections.翻译：她轻蔑地驳回了他的反对意见。

example: The content of the book is quite interesting.
meaning: n. 内容；⽬录；所含之物；含量 adj. 满⾜的，满意的；愿意的 vt. 使满意，使满⾜
exampleTranslation: 这本书的内容非常有趣。

example: She had to contend with his unpredictable temper.
meaning: vt. 声称，主张 vi. 竞争，争夺；处理，对付
exampleTranslation: 她不得不应对他难以预测的脾气。

example: This is no ordinary contest — it's a contest of wit and quick thinking.
meaning: n. ⽐赛，竞赛；争夺，竞争 vt. 争辩，提出异议；争取赢得
exampleTranslation: 中文翻译：这不是一场普通的比赛，而是一场智力和快速思考的比赛。

example: Let's consider the context of the situation before making a decision.
meaning: n. 背景，环境；上下⽂，语境
exampleTranslation: 让我们在做决定之前理解一下这个情况的背景。

example: We drafted a contract for the sale of the house.
meaning: n. 合同，合约，契约 vi. vt. (使) 缩⼩，收缩；签合同 vt. 患上 (疾病)
exampleTranslation: 我们起草了一份关于房子销售的合同。

example: Evidence seems to contradict this point of view.
meaning: vt. 反驳，否认；相⽭盾
exampleTranslation: 这些证据似乎驳斥了这种观点。

example: Your actions are contrary to your words.
meaning: adj. 相对⽴的，相反的
exampleTranslation: 你的行为与你的话语相反。

example: There is a sharp contrast between her fiction and her non-fiction.
meaning: n. 差异，差别；截然不同的事物 vt. 对照，对⽐ vi. 截然不同，有明显差异
exampleTranslation: 她的小说和非小说类作品之间存在着鲜明的对比。

example: The students in this school come from diverse backgrounds.
meaning: adj. 多样的，形形⾊⾊的
exampleTranslation: 这所学校的学生来自多元化的背景。

example: The wide variety of books in the library provided a much-needed diversion for Tom who has been stressed out.
meaning: n. 转向，转移；令⼈分⼼的事物 n. 消遣，娱乐
exampleTranslation: 图书馆里琳琅满目的书籍为压力过大的汤姆提供了急需的转移注意力的事物。

example: The traffic was diverted to a side road because of the street fair.
meaning: vt. 使转向；使分⼼；改变⽤途
exampleTranslation: 因为街头集市的关系，交通被转移到了一条旁路。

example: We have to divide the cake into eight pieces.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 分开，分成；除以，除 vt. 分配；使分离；使产⽣分歧 vi. (道路) 分岔 n. 不同，分歧；分⽔岭
exampleTranslation: 我们需要把蛋糕分成八块。

example: Most of the company's profits are paid out as dividends to shareholders.
meaning: n. 红利，股息；被除数
exampleTranslation: 公司的大部分利润都作为股息发放给股东。

example: The company announced a division of its business.
meaning: n. 分开，分配；分歧；除法；部⻔
exampleTranslation: 公司宣布业务分割。

example: You need to sign the document before we can proceed.
meaning: n. ⽂件，⽂档，⽂献 vt. 记录，记载；⽤⽂献证明
exampleTranslation: 你需要在文件上签字，我们才能继续。

example: The documentary on global warming stirred a lot of debate.
meaning: n. 纪录⽚，纪实节⽬ adj. 记录的，纪实的；⽂献的
exampleTranslation: 这部关于全球变暖的纪录片引发了很多争论。

example: The computer is to execute the command.
meaning: vt. 将…处死；执⾏；创作；使⽣效
exampleTranslation: 计算机要执行命令。

example: The executive decided to allocate more resources to the marketing department.
meaning: n. 经理，主管；⾏政部⻔ adj. 执⾏的，⾏政的；⾼级的
exampleTranslation: 公司高层决定给市场部门分配更多的资源。

example: These buildings exemplify the architecture of the period.
meaning: vt. 是…的典范；举例说明
exampleTranslation: 这些建筑物是该时期建筑风格的典型示例。

example: You will have to exert yourself to improve your grades.
meaning: vt. 施加，运⽤，⾏使；努⼒，竭⼒
exampleTranslation: 你得竭尽全力来提高成绩。

example: We've nearly exhausted our supply of firewood for the winter.
meaning: vt. 使…精疲⼒竭；耗尽；详尽探讨 n. (发动机排出的) 废⽓；排⽓管
exampleTranslation: 我们几乎已经耗尽了今年冬天的柴火供应。

example: Many rare animals exist only in this forest.
meaning: vi. 存在；⽣存
exampleTranslation: 许多珍稀动物只存在于这片森林中。

example: His doubts cast a shadow over the very existence of the institution.
meaning: n. 现实存在；⽣存，⽣活
exampleTranslation: 他的疑虑给这个机构的存在投下了阴影。

example: This dish has an exotic flavor, unlike anything I've tasted before.
meaning: adj. 异国⻛情的，外来的
exampleTranslation: 这道菜有一种异国情调的味道，不同于我以前吃过的任何东西。

example: As a moral being, we should always consider the consequences of our actions.
meaning: adj. 道德的；出于道义的；有道德的 n. 品⾏，道德；寓意
exampleTranslation: 作为有道德的生物，我们应该总是考虑我们行为的后果。

example: Morality cannot be legislated, but behaviour can be regulated.
meaning: n. 道德观，道德；道德性，正当性
exampleTranslation: 道德无法立法，但行为可以被规范。

example: He's an excellent team player; moreover, he brings a great deal of experience to the group.
meaning: adv. ⽽且，此外
exampleTranslation: 他是个优秀的团队成员；另外，他给团队带来了丰富的经验。

example: The area is mostly desert.
meaning: adv. ⼏乎全部地，主要地，通常
exampleTranslation: 这个地方主要是沙漠。

example: She had to finish her prior work before starting the new task.
meaning: adj. 先前的；优先的；在…前⾯的 n. 犯罪前科
exampleTranslation: 在开始新任务之前，她必须完成之前的工作。

example: Health and safety are our top priority.
meaning: n. 当务之急；优先权；优先通⾏权
exampleTranslation: 健康和安全是我们的头等大事。

example: Each student has his own privacy, and we should respect that.
meaning: n. 隐私；独处，清静
exampleTranslation: 每个学生都有他自己的隐私，我们应该尊重这一点。

example: This is a private conversation.
meaning: adj. 私⼈的；私下的；私营的 n. ⼆等兵，列兵；私处
exampleTranslation: 这是一场私人对话。

example: Being allowed to go out to play is a privilege, not a right.
meaning: n. 特权；荣幸；权势 vt. 给予…特权，给予…优待
exampleTranslation: 可出去玩是一种特权，不是一种权利。

example: It's prudent to save a part of your income for emergencies.
meaning: adj. 谨慎的，慎重的，精明的
exampleTranslation: 储备一部分收入用于应急是明智的

example: Please submit your homework on time.
meaning: vt. 提交，递呈；主张 vi. vt. 顺从，屈服，被迫接受
exampleTranslation: 请按时提交你的作业。

example: As a subordinate, she had to obey her manager's decision.
meaning: adj. 下级的， 从属的；次要的 n. 下级，下属 vt. 把…置于次要地位
exampleTranslation: 作为一个下级，她必须服从经理的决定。

example: I subscribe to a daily newspaper to keep up with the news.
meaning: vi. 订阅，订购；定期赞助；同意 vi. 申请，报名 vi. vt. 签署
exampleTranslation: 我订阅了一份每日报纸，以了解新闻。

example: The subsequent events were unpredictable.
meaning: adj. 随后的，后来的
exampleTranslation: 随后发生的事情是不可预测的。

example: The ring is made of a strange substance.
meaning: n. 物质；根据；主旨；重要性
exampleTranslation: 这个戒指是用一种奇特的物质制造的。

example: There is substantial evidence to prove his innocence.
meaning: adj. ⼤量的，重⼤的，实质性的 adj. ⼤⽽坚固的
exampleTranslation: 有充分的证据证明他是无辜的。

example: When the teacher was sick, a substitute was needed to take over the class.
meaning: n. 代替者，代替物；替补运动员 vi. vt. 替换，取代
exampleTranslation: 当老师生病时，需要一个替代老师来接管课堂。

example: The changes in the policy were subtle and took a while to be noticeable.
meaning: adj. 细微的，微妙的；含蓄的；巧妙的
exampleTranslation: 政策的变更非常微妙，花了一段时间才被注意到。

example: We often associate chocolate with Valentine's Day.
meaning: vt. 联想，联系 vi. 与…为伍，混在⼀起 n. 同事，(⽣意) 伙伴 adj. (等级或头衔) 准的，副的
exampleTranslation: 我们经常将巧克力与情人节关联起来。WeoftenassociatechocolatewithValentine'sDay.

example: I'm a member of the Trade Association.
meaning: n. 协会，社团；联系，关联；联想
exampleTranslation: 我是贸易协会的成员。

example: They agreed to amend the contract.
meaning: vt. 修订 (法律、⽂件等)
exampleTranslation: 他们同意修改合同。

example: He was standing among the crowds.
meaning: prep. 在…中；在⼀群⼈或物之中
exampleTranslation: 他站在人群之中

example: The amount of money he has is astonishing.
meaning: n. 数量；⾦额 vi. 共计；等同于；发展成
exampleTranslation: 名词用法

example: We have ample time to finish the project.
meaning: adj. ⼤量的，⾜够的；丰满的
exampleTranslation: 我们有足够的时间完成这个项目。

example: The cartoon character's silly antics never fail to amuse children.
meaning: vt. 逗笑，逗乐；给…提供娱乐
exampleTranslation: 这个卡通角色的愚蠢行为总能让孩子们感到好笑。

example: He picked up a stick to defend himself.
meaning: vt. vi. 刺⼊，插⼊；粘住 vt. 随⼿放置 vi. 卡住；被接受 n. 枝条；条状物；棍
exampleTranslation: 他拿起一根棒子来保护自己。

example: Bright colors can stimulate the senses.
meaning: vt. 刺激；激发，激励；使活跃
exampleTranslation: 明亮的颜色可以刺激感官

example: She used a spoon to stir the soup.
meaning: vt. vi. 搅动，搅拌；(使) 微动 vt. 引起，造成，激起 vi. (情绪等) 开始出现 n. 激动，愤怒；搅动，搅拌
exampleTranslation: 她用一把勺子搅拌汤。

example: We can infer his mood from his tone.
meaning: vt. 推断，推论；暗⽰
exampleTranslation: 我们可以从他的语气推断他的心情。

example: Based on the clues given in the story, my inference is that the character is hiding something.
meaning: n. 推论，推断的结果；推理，推断
exampleTranslation: 根据故事中给出的线索，我推断这个角色隐藏了什么。

example: His technical knowledge is inferior to mine.
meaning: adj. 较差的，较次的；级别低的 n. 下级，下属
exampleTranslation: 他的技术知识不如我。

example: Your friends have a strong influence on you.
meaning: n. 影响 (⼒)；有影响的⼈ (或事物) vt. 影响，对…起作⽤
exampleTranslation: 你的朋友对你有很大影响。

example: He is an influential figure in the music industry.
meaning: adj. 有影响⼒的，有权势的 n. 有影响⼒的⼈
exampleTranslation: 描述人

example: The detective informed them of their rights before questioning.
meaning: vt. 通知，告知；了解；影响
exampleTranslation: 在质询之前，侦探知会了他们的权利。

example: Could you give me more information about the conference?
meaning: n. 信息，情报；电话号码查询台
exampleTranslation: 你能给我提供更多关于这次会议的信息吗？

example: Can you approach the boss about a raise today?
meaning: vi. vt. 接近，靠近 vt. 接洽，要求；处理，对付 n. ⽅法，态度；接近，靠近；路径
exampleTranslation: 你今天能去找老板谈加薪的事情吗？

example: It was not appropriate to bring up personal issues in the meeting.
meaning: adj. 适当的，恰当的 vt. 盗⽤，挪⽤；拨出 (款项)
exampleTranslation: 在会议中提出个人问题是不合适的。

example: The project got the approval of the board.
meaning: n. 赞成，同意；批准，许可
exampleTranslation: 该项目得到了董事会的批准。

example: The boss did not approve the budget for the project.
meaning: vi. 同意，赞成，赞许 vt. 批准，通过；认证
exampleTranslation: 老板没有批准项目的预算。

example: He is apt to forget things under stress.
meaning: adj. 有…倾向的；恰当的；聪明的
exampleTranslation: 他在压力下容易忘事。

example: You must conform to the rules of the game.
meaning: vi. 遵守；顺应⼤流；相⼀致
exampleTranslation: 你必须按照游戏规则行事

example: You must confront your fears to overcome them.
meaning: vt. 直⾯，正视；使⾯对；对峙；对质
exampleTranslation: 你必须面对你的恐惧以克服它们。

example: I must confess that I'm rather confused.
meaning: vt. 使困惑；将…混淆；使复杂化
exampleTranslation: 我必须承认我相当困惑。

example: The sudden outburst of the crowd caused confusion.
meaning: n. 困惑；混淆；窘迫；混乱的局⾯
exampleTranslation: 群众的突然暴动导致了混乱。

example: The Congress passed the bill.
meaning: n. 代表⼤会；国会
exampleTranslation: 国会通过了这项提案。

example: Can you connect my phone to the Wi-Fi?
meaning: vt. vi. (使) 连接，(使) 联结 vt. 把…联系起来；为…接通电话 vi. 衔接；与某⼈建⽴关系；击中
exampleTranslation: 你能把我的手机连接到Wi-Fi吗？

example: She has a strong connection with her homeland.
meaning: n. 联系，关联；联结，连接；⼈脉
exampleTranslation: 她与自己的故乡有着深厚的联系。

example: He was conscious that she was watching him.
meaning: adj. 意识到的；清醒的；有意的 suff. 注重…的，有…意识的
exampleTranslation: 他知道她在看他。

example: We are in continual need of your support.
meaning: adj. 不停的，⽆间断的；频繁的
exampleTranslation: 我们常常需要你的支持。

example: The rain will continue until midnight.
meaning: vi. vt. 继续
exampleTranslation: 雨会一直持续到午夜。

example: The continuous noise from the construction site is disturbing.
meaning: adj. 持续的，连续的；进⾏式的
exampleTranslation: 来自建筑工地的连续噪音很扰人。

example: He dismissed the idea as foolish.
meaning: vt. 不予考虑；解雇，开除；消除 vt. 解散，让 (某⼈) 离开；驳回
exampleTranslation: 他认为这个主意很愚蠢，所以不去考虑。

example: The room was in a state of disorder after the party.
meaning: n. 失调，紊乱，疾病；混乱；动乱
exampleTranslation: 派对结束后，房间一片混乱。

example: After the protest, the police had to disperse the crowd.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 扩散，(使) 散开
exampleTranslation: 警方在抗议活动之后需要驱散人群。

example: Advances in technology could displace many traditional jobs.
meaning: vt. 取代；迫使…离开家园；移⾛
exampleTranslation: 技术的进步可能会取代很多传统的工作。

example: They display no awareness of the problems.
meaning: vt. 陈列，展⽰；显⽰，表现 n. 陈列；表演；显⽰，表现；显⽰器 vi. (为求偶⽽) 炫耀
exampleTranslation: 动词用法

example: The organization will distribute food to the poor.
meaning: vt. 分发，分配；分销；使分布
exampleTranslation: 这个组织会向穷人分发食物

example: The mirror distorted his reflection.
meaning: vt. 使变形，使扭曲；歪曲，曲解
exampleTranslation: 翻译：镜子扭曲了他的倒影。

example: The noise outside started to distract me from my study.
meaning: vt. 分散 (注意⼒)，使分⼼
exampleTranslation: 外面的噪音开始让我无法专心学习。

example: The evolution of music has led to a variety of new genres.
meaning: n. 进化；演变，发展
exampleTranslation: 音乐的演进导致了各种新的流派的出现。

example: The company has evolved over the years into a multi-million dollar organization.
meaning: vi. vt. 进化；逐步发展
exampleTranslation: 这家公司经过多年的发展，已经成为了一个价值数百万美元的组织。

example: Don't exaggerate, it wasn't that bad.
meaning: vi. vt. 夸张，夸⼤
exampleTranslation: 别夸大其词，事情没有那么糟

example: The doctor will examine you now.
meaning: vt. 仔细研究；仔细检查；测验
exampleTranslation: 现在医生来检查你了。

example: He often mocks his brother for being too sensitive.
meaning: vt. vi. 嘲笑，(通过模仿) 取笑 vt. 不尊重，轻慢 adj. 假装的；模拟的 n. (英国) 模拟考试
exampleTranslation: 他经常取笑他的弟弟过于敏感。

example: He is operating the device in safe mode.
meaning: n. ⽅式，⻛格；模式，状态
exampleTranslation: 他正在以安全模式操作设备。

example: She is a fashion model.
meaning: n. 模型；模特⼉；样式；范例 vi. 做模特⼉ vt. 将…做成模型；模仿
exampleTranslation: 她是一位时尚模特。

example: As a moderate eater, he is in greater control of his health.
meaning: adj. 中等的；温和的；有节制的 vt. vi. 缓和，使适中，调节；主持 n. 持温和观点者
exampleTranslation: 他食量适度，对自身的健康更加有控制力。

example: We live in a modern society with advanced technology.
meaning: adj. 现代的；新式的
exampleTranslation: 我们生活在一个科技先进的现代社会中。

example: The modernization of the city has greatly improved the living conditions of the residents.
meaning: n. 现代化
exampleTranslation: 城市的现代化大大改善了居民的生活条件。

example: He's very modest about his achievements.
meaning: adj. 谦虚的；不太⼤的；端庄的
exampleTranslation: 他对自己的成就非常谦虚。

example: Please modify the document as per our discussion.
meaning: vt. 修改，改进，调整；(语法) 修饰
exampleTranslation: 请根据我们的讨论修改这份文件。

example: His predecessor left him a fine legacy.
meaning: n. 前任，前辈；…的前⾝
exampleTranslation: 他的前任给他留下了丰富的遗产

example: Economists predict that house prices will rise by 3% this year.
meaning: vt. 预⾔，预测，预告
exampleTranslation: 经济学家们预测今年的房价将上涨3%。

example: The preface of the book gives a brief summary of the author's life.
meaning: n. (书的) 序⾔，前⾔，绪论 vt. 以…为开端，以…作为开场⽩
exampleTranslation: 书的序言部分给出了作者生平的简要总结。

example: It's preferable to finish the work today rather than tomorrow.
meaning: adj. 更好的，更可取的，更合适的
exampleTranslation: 今天完成工作比明天完成更好

example: His preference for classical music distinguishes him from his peers.
meaning: n. 偏好；优惠，优待
exampleTranslation: 他对古典音乐的偏好使他在同伴中脱颖而出。

example: It's not fair to prejudice her because of her background.
meaning: n. 偏⻅，成⻅ vt. 使有偏⻅；损害，危害
exampleTranslation: 仅仅因为她的背景就对她抱有偏见，这是不公平的。

example: She has won a preliminary victory in court.
meaning: adj. 初步的，预备的，开始的 n. 初步⾏动，准备⼯作
exampleTranslation: 她在法庭上获得了初步胜利。

example: This is a premier example of early American literature.
meaning: adj. ⾸要的，最好的 n. 总理，⾸相
exampleTranslation: 这是早期美国文学的首要典范。

example: The research project is based on the premise that not all diseases are caused by bacteria.
meaning: n. 前提；房屋及⼟地，经营场所
exampleTranslation: 那个研究项目建立在一个前提之上，即并非所有的疾病都是由细菌引起的。

example: You have to pay premiums to the insurance company every month.
meaning: n. 保险费；额外费⽤ adj. 优质的，⾼端的
exampleTranslation: 你需要每月向保险公司支付保险费。

example: The teacher's careful preparation for lessons impressed her students.
meaning: n. 准备；准备⼯作；制剂
exampleTranslation: 老师严谨的备课给她的学生留下了深刻的印象。

example: The sun's rays reflect off the surface of the water.
meaning: vt. 映出 (影像)；反射；反映，显⽰ vi. vt. 认真思考
exampleTranslation: 阳光从水面反射出来。

example: The mirror gave a perfect reflection of the room.
meaning: n. 映像；反射；反映；深思
exampleTranslation: 镜子完美地反射了房间的景象。

example: The reform of the tax system has been completed.
meaning: n. 变⾰，改⾰，⾰新 vt. 变⾰，改⾰，⾰新 vi. vt. (使) 改过⾃新
exampleTranslation: 税制的改革已经完成。

example: He rejected my offer of help.
meaning: vt. 拒绝接受；不录⽤；抛弃；排斥 n. 次品，不合格者
exampleTranslation: 他拒绝了我的帮助。

example: Let us rejoice at the good news.
meaning: vi. vt. ⾮常⾼兴，深感欣喜
exampleTranslation: "让我们为这个好消息欢喜。"

example: I can't relate the two events in my mind.
meaning: vt. vi. 联系，(使) 有关联 vt. 叙述，讲述 vi. 涉及，关于；理解，有共鸣
exampleTranslation: 我无法在脑海中将这两件事联系起来。

example: Our relation is more than purely business.
meaning: n. 关系，交往；联系；亲戚
exampleTranslation: 我们的关系不仅仅是商业关系。

example: They have a long-term relationship.
meaning: n. 关系，联系；恋爱关系
exampleTranslation: 他们有着长期的关系。

example: She is a distant relative of mine.
meaning: n. 亲戚，亲属 adj. 相对的；与…相⽐；关于…的
exampleTranslation: 她是我远方的亲戚。

example: The theory of relativity has changed our understanding of the universe.
meaning: n. 相对论，相对性
exampleTranslation: 相对论改变了我们对宇宙的理解。

example: The information may be relevant to our discussion.
meaning: adj. 有关的，切题的；有价值的
exampleTranslation: 这句话的中文翻译是：这些信息可能与我们的讨论有关。

example: He chose to overlook her mistakes this time.
meaning: vt. 忽略，忽视；不计较；俯视
exampleTranslation: 这句话展示了“overlook”在语境中的用法。

example: She found an overseas job after graduation.
meaning: adv. 在国外，在海外 adj. 国外的，海外的
exampleTranslation: 她毕业后找到了一份海外工作。

example: She can't stand for long periods because of her age.
meaning: vi. 站⽴；处于；保持有效；达到 vt. 使直⽴；容忍；经受，经得起 n. ⽴场；保卫；货摊；架；看台
exampleTranslation: 因年龄原因，她不能长时间站立。

example: This is the standard procedure for doing these experiments.
meaning: n. 标准，⽔平；道德⽔准；军旗 adj. 通常的，标准的；规范的
exampleTranslation: 这是做这些实验的标准程序。

example: From a technological standpoint, the project is feasible.
meaning: n. ⽴场，观点，⻆度，⽴⾜点
exampleTranslation: 翻译：从技术角度来看，这个项目是可行的。

example: The class will start in five minutes.
meaning: vt. vi. 开始；发动；开办；以…起家 vi. 出发，启程；(从…) 开始 n. 开端；开始
exampleTranslation: 课程将在五分钟后开始。

example: The sudden noise made me startle.
meaning: vt. 使…吓⼀跳，使…⼤吃⼀惊
exampleTranslation: 那突然的噪音使我惊吓了一跳。

example: We must find food, or we will starve.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 挨饿，(使) 饿死 vi. 渴望，迫切需要
exampleTranslation: 我们必须找到食物，否则我们会饿死。

example: The state has a responsibility to ensure justice for all its citizens.
meaning: n. 状况；国家；州；政府 vt. 陈述，说明；规定 adj. 国家的；国事的；州的
exampleTranslation: 国家有责任确保所有公民的正义。

example: He made a statement to the police about what he saw.
meaning: n. 声明；说法，陈述；报表
exampleTranslation: 他向警方作了关于他看到的事的陈述。

example: Throughout his career, Mr. Smith gained a reputation as a skilled statesman.
meaning: n. 政治家
exampleTranslation: 在他的职业生涯中，史密斯先生赢得了作为一个熟练的政治家的声誉。

example: Statistics show that people tend to eat more when they're stressed.
meaning: n. 统计数字 (或资料)；统计学
exampleTranslation: “统计显示，人们在压力过大的时候倾向于多吃。”

example: The statue stands in the middle of the square.
meaning: n. 雕像，雕塑
exampleTranslation: 雕像矗立在广场的中间。

example: John has achieved a high social status.
meaning: n. 地位，⾝份；状况，状态
exampleTranslation: 约翰达到了高社会地位

example: Please stay quiet while the teacher is talking.
meaning: vi. 停留；保持；暂住 n. 停留，逗留
exampleTranslation: 当老师讲话时，请保持安静。

example: His health condition remained steady after the treatment.
meaning: adj. 稳步的；稳定的；(⼈) 可靠的 vt. vi. 稳住；恢复平稳；使平静 adv. 稳定地，持续地
exampleTranslation: 他的健康状况在治疗后保持稳定。

example: I steered the car to the left to avoid the pedestrian.
meaning: vt. vi. 驾驶 (船、汽⻋等)；(船等) ⾏驶 vt. 操纵，控制，引导；带领 n. 阉公⽜，⾁⽤公⽜
exampleTranslation: 我把车向左转，避开了行人。

example: The stem of a flower supports the bud and leaves.
meaning: n. (植物的) 秆，茎；(烟⽃) 柄 vt. 阻⽌，遏制，制⽌ vi. 源于，由…造成
exampleTranslation: 花的茎支撑着花蕾和叶片。

example: Take one step back from the edge.
meaning: n. 脚步；步骤，措施；阶段；台阶 vi. 迈步，踩，踏
exampleTranslation: 从边缘向后退一步。

example: She gave him a stern look, indicating that he wasn't supposed to be there.
meaning: adj. 严厉的，苛刻的；难对付的 n. 船尾
exampleTranslation: 她给他一个严厉的眼神，表示他不应该在那里。

example: The donation was made anonymously.
meaning: adj. 匿名的；没特⾊的
exampleTranslation: 該捐款是匿名進行的。

example: Could you answer the phone, please?
meaning: n. 答复，回答；答案，解决⽅法 vi. vt. 答复，回答
exampleTranslation: 你能接一下电话吗？

example: I anticipate that our team will win the competition.
meaning: vt. 预料；期待，期盼；先于…做
exampleTranslation: 我预期我们的团队会赢得比赛。

example: She finally shared her secret anxiety with her best friend.
meaning: n. 忧虑，焦虑；渴望
exampleTranslation: 她终于把心中秘密的焦虑告诉了她最好的朋友。

example: He felt anxious and depressed.
meaning: adj. 焦虑的；让⼈担忧的；渴望的
exampleTranslation: 他感到焦虑和沮丧。

example: They live ten miles apart.
meaning: adv. 相距；分离；成碎⽚；除外
exampleTranslation: 他们住得有十英里远。

example: The plot to assassinate the president was discovered just in time.
meaning: vt. 暗杀，刺杀
exampleTranslation: 刺杀总统的阴谋被及时发现。

example: The victim was afraid to report the assault to the police.
meaning: n. 攻击，袭击；攻坚；抨击 vt. 袭击，殴打；使…感到难受
exampleTranslation: 受害人害怕向警方报告这次袭击。

example: The crowd started to assemble in the square.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 集合，(使) 聚集 vt. 组装，装配
exampleTranslation: 人群开始在广场上集合。

example: Assembly of the bookcase was surprisingly straightforward.
meaning: n. ⽴法机构，议会；集会；组装
exampleTranslation: 组装这个书架意外的简单。

example: I assert that this method is the most effective.
meaning: vt. 断⾔；坚持 (主张)；维护 (权威)
exampleTranslation: 我坚决宣称这个方法是最有效的。

example: Each component of this machine must function correctly for it to work.
meaning: n. 成分，部件，组成部分 adj. 组成的，构成的
exampleTranslation: 这台机器的每个部件都必须正常工作才能运行。

example: He will compose music for the film.
meaning: vt. 组成；使平静 vt. vi. 作(曲)，写（信、诗等）
exampleTranslation: 他将为这部电影作曲。

example: The composition of the committee has been the subject of intense debate.
meaning: n. 构成，成分；构图 n. 作品；创作，作曲；作⽂
exampleTranslation: 委员会的组成一直是激烈争论的主题。

example: He could not comprehend why she did what she did.
meaning: vi. vt. 理解，领悟
exampleTranslation: 他无法理解她为何做了她所做的事。

example: Reading comprehension is a vital skill for academic success.
meaning: n. 理解⼒；阅读 (听⼒) 理解测试
exampleTranslation: 阅读理解是学习成功的重要技能。

example: We offer a comprehensive range of services.
meaning: adj. 全⾯的，综合性的；综合教育的 n. (英国) 综合中学
exampleTranslation: 我们提供全面的服务范围。

example: The mayor was quick to condemn the terrorist attack.
meaning: vt. 谴责；判处；使陷⼊ vt. (因安全等原因⽽) 封闭 (建筑)
exampleTranslation: 市长快速谴责了恐怖袭击。

example: Water vapor will condense into water when it's cooled.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 凝结；(使) 浓缩，变浓稠 vt. 压缩，精简 (⽂章或讲话)
exampleTranslation: 当水蒸气被冷却时，它会凝结成水。

example: This machine is in excellent condition, it was well maintained.
meaning: n. 状态；健康状况；疾病；条件 vt. 训练，使习惯于；影响；养护
exampleTranslation: 对应中文：这台机器状态极好，得到了良好的维护。

example: He was criticized for his unprofessional conduct.
meaning: vt. 实施，执⾏；表现；传导；引导 vi. vt. 指挥 (歌唱或演奏) n. ⾏为，举⽌；实施办法
exampleTranslation: 他因为不专业的行为而受到批评。

example: The conductor raised his baton and the orchestra began to play.
meaning: n. 指挥；列⻋⻓；售票员；导体
exampleTranslation: 指挥家举起了指挥棒，乐队开始演奏。

example: Please disable the alarm before you open the door.
meaning: vt. 使伤残；使不能运转
exampleTranslation: 在你开门之前，请关闭闹钟。

example: The sun disappears behind the clouds.
meaning: vi. 消失，不⻅；不复存在；失踪
exampleTranslation: 太阳隐藏在云层之后

example: Don't let the bad news disappoint you.
meaning: vt. vi. (使) 失望 vt. 使…破灭
exampleTranslation: 不要让坏消息让你失望。

example: He has the discipline to get up at 5 AM every day.
meaning: n. 纪律；训练⽅法；⾃制⼒；学科 vt. 处罚；训导，管教；⾃我控制
exampleTranslation: 名词：Hehasthedisciplinetogetupat5AMeveryday.我每天都有纪律性地早上5点起床。

example: The company has yet to disclose its financial results.
meaning: vt. 透露，披露；使显露
exampleTranslation: 这家公司还未公开其财务业绩。

example: I hope to discover a new hobby this year.
meaning: vt. 发现；找到；了解到；发掘
exampleTranslation: 我希望今年能发现一个新的爱好。

example: The discovery of electricity changed the world.
meaning: n. 发现；被发现的事物 (或⼈)
exampleTranslation: 电的发现改变了世界。

example: They hoisted the flag at dawn.
meaning: vt. 吊起，升起，提起 n. 吊⻋，起重机
exampleTranslation: 他们在黎明时分升起了国旗。

example: Please hold my hand tightly.
meaning: vt. 拿着；保持；持有；举⾏；认为 vt. 拥抱；容纳，包含；担任 vt. vi. (打电话时) 不挂断 n. 拿，握；影响，控制；⽀撑点
exampleTranslation: 请紧紧握住我的手。

example: The entire household was asleep.
meaning: n. 家庭，⼀家⼈ adj. 家⽤的，家庭的；家喻⼾晓的
exampleTranslation: 整个家庭都在睡觉。

example: However, he failed the exam.
meaning: adv. 不管多么；⽆论如何；然⽽
exampleTranslation: 他学习很努力。然而，他还是没通过考试。

example: The teammates huddled to discuss the next play.
meaning: vi. 挤在⼀起；缩成⼀团 n. 拥挤的⼀群，杂乱的⼀堆
exampleTranslation: 队友们聚集在一起讨论下一步的比赛策略。

example: The author's narrative style is truly unique and captivating.
meaning: n. 叙事；记叙，叙述 adj. 记叙的，叙述的
exampleTranslation: 作者的叙述风格真的是独特且引人入胜。

example: The street was too narrow for cars.
meaning: adj. 狭窄的；勉强的；狭义的 vi. vt. 使变窄，缩⼩
exampleTranslation: 这条街太窄，车辆无法通行。
