example: There's a nasty smell in the kitchen.
meaning: adj. 不友善的；糟糕的；严重的 adj. 下流的；危险的
exampleTranslation: 厨房里有一股令人讨厌的气味。

example: Our nation is known for its rich cultural heritage.
meaning: n. 国家，⺠族；(全体) 国⺠
exampleTranslation: 我们的国家以其丰富的文化遗产而闻名。

example: Our national flag is an emblem of unity.
meaning: adj. 国家的，⺠族的；国有的 n. 国⺠，公⺠
exampleTranslation: 我们的国旗是团结的象征。

example: She changed her nationality from Canadian to American.
meaning: n. 国籍；⺠族，种族
exampleTranslation: 她将自己的国籍从加拿大改为美国。

example: As a native of New York, she knows the city like the back of her hand.
meaning: adj. 出⽣地的；本地的；与⽣俱来的 n. 出⽣于某地的⼈；本地⼈；⼟著
exampleTranslation: 作为一名纽约本地人，她对这个城市了如指掌。

example: The park provides a natural habitat for many different species.
meaning: adj. ⾃然的；正常的；天⽣的 n. 有天赋的⼈
exampleTranslation: 这个公园为很多不同的物种提供了自然的栖息地。

example: Man must respect nature in order to maintain ecological balance.
meaning: n. ⾃然；天性，性格；本质
exampleTranslation: 人必须尊重自然以维持生态平衡。

example: Overall, I think it was a good decision.
meaning: adj. 全⾯的，总体的 adv. 全部，总计；总体上 n. 连⾝⼯作服
exampleTranslation: 总的来说，我认为这是个好决定。

example: Even though the odds were against her, she managed to overcome her situation.
meaning: vt. 克服；击败；对…产⽣极⼤影响
exampleTranslation: 尽管形势对她不利，她还是设法克服了困境。

example: Our work schedules overlap, so we can share a ride to work.
meaning: vt. vi. (与…) 重叠；(时间等) 有重叠 n. 重叠部分
exampleTranslation: 我们的工作时间重叠，所以我们可以共享一次工作日的乘车。

example: He spent a large portion of his life in the United States.
meaning: n. 部分；(饭菜的) ⼀份 vt. 把…分成多份
exampleTranslation: 他在美国度过了他生命中的很大一部分时间。

example: There's a real possibility that he will win the race.
meaning: n. 可能性；可能的事；机会
exampleTranslation: 他赢得比赛的可能性很大。

example: Anything is possible if you believe in yourself.
meaning: adj. 可能的；可能存在的；合理的
exampleTranslation: Chinesetranslation:如果你相信自己，一切都有可能。

example: He shows great potential in music.
meaning: adj. 潜在的，可能的 n. 潜⼒，潜质；可能性；电势
exampleTranslation: 名词

example: She began to pour the tea.
meaning: vt. vi. 倾倒，倒出；下⼤⾬ vi. (液体、烟等) 涌流；不断涌向
exampleTranslation: 她开始倒茶。

example: The developer used the console to check the system's status.
meaning: vt. 安慰，抚慰，慰藉 n. 控制台，仪表盘
exampleTranslation: 开发者用控制台来检查系统的状态。

example: The meal consists of four courses.
meaning: vi. 由…组成；在于
exampleTranslation: 这顿饭有四道菜

example: He was able to deliver consistent results in his job.
meaning: adj. ⼀贯的；与…⼀致的；连续的
exampleTranslation: 他能在工作中产生稳定的成果。

example: His constant chattering is really annoying!
meaning: adj. 经常的，不断的；恒定的 n. 不变的事物，常数，常量
exampleTranslation: 他不停的闲聊真是让人烦躁！

example: As a constituent of the association, you have the right to vote.
meaning: n. 成分；选⺠ adj. 构成的，组成的
exampleTranslation: 作为协会的一员，你有投票权。

example: These events constitute a turning point in global history.
meaning: vlink. 构成，组成；相当于，可算作 vt. 设⽴，成⽴
exampleTranslation: 这些事件构成了全球历史的转折点

example: The constitution of the United States was written in 1787.
meaning: n. 宪法，章程；体质；构成，成分
exampleTranslation: 美国的宪法写在1787年。

example: Financial problems can often constrain a company's ability to invest in new resources.
meaning: vt. 限制，约束；强迫，迫使
exampleTranslation: 经济问题通常会限制公司投资新资源的能力。

example: They plan to construct a new shopping mall in the city.
meaning: vt. 建造，修建；组成，构成；绘制 n. 构想，概念，观念
exampleTranslation: 他们计划在城市中建造一个新的购物中心。

example: His voice is very distinct, you can recognize it easily.
meaning: adj. 截然不同的；清晰的；确实的
exampleTranslation: 他的声音十分独特，你可以很容易地识别出来。

example: There is a sharp distinction between the rich and the poor in this country.
meaning: n. 差别，不同；卓越；特点；荣誉
exampleTranslation: 在这个国家里，富人与穷人之间有着明显的区别。

example: It's important to distinguish fact from opinion.
meaning: vi. vt. 区分，辨别，分清 vt. 使有别于；辨别出；使表现突出
exampleTranslation: 重要的是要区分事实和观点。

example: Our meeting was very fruitful, we decided on a lot of key issues.
meaning: adj. 富有成效的；富饶的，多产的
exampleTranslation: 我们的会议非常成功，我们决定了很多关键问题。

example: His constant criticisms frustrate me a lot.
meaning: vt. 使灰⼼，使沮丧；阻⽌，挫败
exampleTranslation: 他的不断批评让我非常沮丧。

example: We will do our best to fulfill your expectations.
meaning: vt. 实现，达到；履⾏；使有成就感
exampleTranslation: 我们会尽力满足你的期待。

example: This tool has multiple functions.
meaning: n. 功能，职能；宴会；函数 vi. 起作⽤，运转
exampleTranslation: 这个工具有多重功能。

example: We set up a fund for our children's education.
meaning: n. 基⾦，专款；资⾦；⼤量 vt. 资助，为…提供资⾦
exampleTranslation: 我们为孩子的教育设立了基金。

example: Respect for others is a fundamental human right.
meaning: adj. 根本的，最重要的；基础的 n. 根本，基础
exampleTranslation: 尊重他人是一个基本的人权。

example: They found evidence of his innocence in his room.
meaning: n. 证据，证明 vt. 证明，表明
exampleTranslation: 他们在他的房间里发现了他无罪的证据。

example: It's evident that she's not happy with the situation.
meaning: adj. 明显的，显然的
exampleTranslation: 很明显，她对这种情况并不满意。

example: An evil wizard cast a curse on the entire kingdom.
meaning: adj. 邪恶的，道德败坏的；恶魔的 n. 邪恶；弊端，坏处
exampleTranslation: 一位邪恶的巫师对整个王国施加了诅咒。

example: We need to take care of our environment.
meaning: n. ⽣活环境，周围状况；⾃然环境
exampleTranslation: 我们需要照顾我们的环境。

example: He started his own enterprise right after graduation.
meaning: n. 企业；项⽬，规划；进取⼼
exampleTranslation: 他毕业后就开始了自己的企业。

example: I like to entertain my friends at my apartment.
meaning: vt. vi. 使快乐，使有兴趣，娱乐；款待 vt. 怀有…想法 (或感受)
exampleTranslation: 我喜欢在我的公寓里招待朋友。

example: Watching movies is a popular form of entertainment.
meaning: n. 娱乐节⽬，娱乐活动；招待
exampleTranslation: 看电影是一种受欢迎的娱乐方式

example: The company had a monopoly on the software market, so they could set their prices quite high.
meaning: n. 垄断；垄断企业；⼤富翁 (游戏)
exampleTranslation: 这家公司对软件市场具有垄断地位，所以它们可以将价格设定得很高。

example: She was in a cheerful mood.
meaning: n. 情绪，⼼情；坏⼼情；⽓氛
exampleTranslation: 她心情很愉快。

example: The transmission of data over the internet has become faster over the years.
meaning: n. (数据的) 传输；传播；节⽬播送
exampleTranslation: 随着岁月的流逝，通过互联网传输数据的速度变得越来越快。

example: The radio station transmits the late news every night at 10 pm.
meaning: vt. vi. 传送，发送 (信号、信息等) vt. 传播 (疾病)；传达 (思想)；传导
exampleTranslation: 这个广播电台每晚10点播送晚间新闻。

example: The doctors are preparing for a heart transplant.
meaning: n. 移植；移植的器官 vt. 移植；移栽；使迁移
exampleTranslation: 医生们正在为心脏移植做准备。

example: We need to transport the goods to the warehouse.
meaning: n. 交通运输系统；交通⼯具；运输 vt. 运输；使…仿佛置⾝于
exampleTranslation: 我们需要把货物运到仓库。

example: I own a considerable amount of stock in that company.
meaning: n. 库存；储备物；股票；家畜 vt. (商店) 存货；贮存，贮备 adj. ⽼⼀套的；(商店) 库存的，常备的
exampleTranslation: 我在那家公司有相当数量的股票。

example: He works in a clothing store.
meaning: n. 商店，店铺；储备，贮存物 vt. 贮藏；(在计算机⾥) 存储
exampleTranslation: 他在一家服装店工作

example: Please take these boxes to the storage room.
meaning: n. 储藏，贮存；(计算机) 存储
exampleTranslation: 请将这些箱子搬到储藏室。

example: He strode across the room to the window.
meaning: vi. ⼤步⾛，阔步⾏⾛ n. ⼤步；进展，进步；步伐
exampleTranslation: 他大步走到房间的窗户跟前。

example: He decided to strike while the iron was hot and ask his boss for a raise.
meaning: vt. 打，击；撞；突然想到；给…印象 vi. 罢⼯；⾏进 vi. vt. 袭击；侵袭；划 (⽕柴)；敲，鸣 n. 罢⼯；袭击；击，打；全中
exampleTranslation: 他决定趁热打铁，向老板要求加薪。

example: The girl has striking green eyes.
meaning: adj. 显著的，惊⼈的；容貌出众的
exampleTranslation: 那个女孩有一双引人注目的绿色眼睛。

example: She tied the package with string.
meaning: n. 细绳，线；⼀串；⼀系列；弦 vt. 悬挂，系；把…连在⼀起 adj. 弦乐器的；线织的
exampleTranslation: 她用绳子捆起这个包裹。

example: The structure of the building was weakened by the earthquake.
meaning: n. 结构，构造；建筑物；精⼼组织 vt. 组织，安排
exampleTranslation: 地震削弱了建筑物的结构

example: The sudden news seemed to stun everyone.
meaning: vt. 使震惊；使昏迷；使印象深刻
exampleTranslation: 这个突然的消息似乎震惊了所有人。

example: He finished the investigated the primary cause of the accident.
meaning: adj. ⾸要的，主要的；最早的；⼩学的 n. (美国的) 初选
exampleTranslation: 这里的primary表示"首要的"

example: This is prime real estate.
meaning: adj. ⾸要的；最好的；典型的 n. 盛年，⿍盛时期 vt. 准备；事先指点
exampleTranslation: 这是一流的房地产。

example: The village lived a primitive life with no electricity or modern conveniences.
meaning: adj. 原始的；落后的；原始本能的 n. 原始派艺术家
exampleTranslation: 该村庄的生活非常原始，没有电或者现代化的设施。

example: Our principal aim is to improve students' literacy.
meaning: adj. 主要的，最重要的 n. 校⻓；本⾦，资⾦；主⻆
exampleTranslation: 我们的主要目标是提高学生的文化素养。

example: He abides by the principle of honesty in everything he does.
meaning: n. 原则；原理；定律
exampleTranslation: 他做任何事都坚守诚实的原则。

example: John majored in Psychology at university.
meaning: n. ⼼理学；⼼理，⼼理特点
exampleTranslation: 约翰在大学主修心理学。

example: You are a liability to this team.
meaning: n. (法律上的) 责任；累赘；债务
exampleTranslation: 你对这个团队来说是一个负担。

example: If you don't dress warmly, you're liable to catch a cold.
meaning: adj. 可能做…的；有责任的；易遭受…
exampleTranslation: 如果你不穿得暖和，你就可能会感冒。

example: His liberal views on gay marriage caused some controversy.
meaning: adj. 开明的；(政治) ⾃由的；通识的 adj. 慷慨的；不完全准确的 n. ⽀持变⾰的⼈；⾃由党成员
exampleTranslation: 他对同性婚姻的开放观念引发了一些争议。

example: The soldiers worked to liberate the occupied city.
meaning: vt. 使⾃由，使解脱；解放
exampleTranslation: 士兵们努力解放被占领的城市。

example: He received his pilot's license last year.
meaning: n. 许可证，执照；放肆，放纵 vt. 批准，许可
exampleTranslation: 他去年拿到了他的飞行执照。

example: He was found innocent of the charges.
meaning: adj. ⽆罪的；⽆辜受害的；纯真的 n. ⽆辜的⼈，天真的⼈
exampleTranslation: 他被裁定无罪。

example: Rapid technological change requires substantial innovation on the part of manufacturers.
meaning: n. 创新，⾰新；新事物，新⽅法
exampleTranslation: “快速的技术变革要求制造商做出大量的创新。”

example: Your constant interruptions really annoy me.
meaning: vt. 使⽣⽓，使烦恼，烦扰
exampleTranslation: 你的不断打扰真的让我很烦。

example: The company holds an annual meeting every January.
meaning: adj. ⼀年⼀次的；年度的 n. 年刊，年册；⼀年⽣植物
exampleTranslation: 公司每年一月都会举行年度会议。

example: He's the anchor of the soccer team, and we can't win without him.
meaning: n. 锚；主持⼈；顶梁柱 vi. vt. 抛锚，使停泊；主持 (节⽬) vt. 使固定；使扎根
exampleTranslation: 他是球队的核心，没有他我们不能获胜。

example: The delay may pose a serious problem.
meaning: vt. 造成 (威胁、问题等)；提出 vi. 摆姿势；佯装，假扮 n. (为拍照等摆的) 姿势
exampleTranslation: 延误可能会造成严重问题。

example: She got a position in the sales department.
meaning: n. 位置；姿态，姿势；处境；⽴场 n. 地位；职位 vt. 安放，放置
exampleTranslation: 她在销售部门获得了一个职位。

example: I'm positive that he will succeed.
meaning: adj. 积极的；有益的；表⽰赞同的 adj. 确信的；阳性的 n. 优势，优点；阳性结果
exampleTranslation: 我深信他会成功的。

example: He does not possess a sense of right and wrong.
meaning: vt. 拥有；具有，具备；⽀配
exampleTranslation: 他没有是非之分的感觉。

example: My valuables are in my possession.
meaning: n. 具有，拥有；个⼈财产；殖⺠地
exampleTranslation: 我的贵重物品在我手中。

example: You need to dilute the paint with a little water before you use it.
meaning: vt. 稀释，冲淡；削弱，降低 adj. 稀释了的，冲淡了的
exampleTranslation: 你在使用这种油漆之前需要用一些水将其稀释。

example: The room was dim and cool.
meaning: adj. 昏暗的；模糊的；迟钝的 adj. 前景黯淡的 vi. vt. (使) 变昏暗；(使) 变渺茫
exampleTranslation: 这房间光线暗淡，凉爽宜人。

example: His influence has significantly diminished over the years.
meaning: vi. vt. 减少，降低，减弱 vt. 贬低，轻视
exampleTranslation: 他的影响力这些年来大大减少了。

example: Despite being an amateur, he painted a beautiful landscape.
meaning: n. 业余爱好者，外⾏ adj. ⾮职业的，业余的
exampleTranslation: 尽管他是个业余者，但他画了一幅美丽的山水画。

example: The magician's tricks amazed the children.
meaning: vt. 使惊奇，使⼤吃⼀惊
exampleTranslation: 这个魔术师的表演让孩子们惊讶不已。

example: His reply to my question was ambiguous.
meaning: adj. 模棱两可的，含糊不清的
exampleTranslation: 他对我问题的回答含糊不清。

example: His ambition was to become a pilot.
meaning: n. 野⼼，抱负，理想
exampleTranslation: 他的志向是成为一名飞行员。

example: He is ambitious for success in his career.
meaning: adj. 有野⼼的；规模宏⼤的，艰巨的
exampleTranslation: 他对自己的职业成功怀揣雄心勃勃。

example: Look at the bubbles in the soda.
meaning: n. ⽓泡；肥皂泡；经济泡沫 vi. 起泡，冒泡；(情绪等) 涌动
exampleTranslation: 看那瓶苏打水里的气泡。

example: We need to cut our household budget by 10 percent next month.
meaning: n. 预算；(政府的) 预算案 vi. vt. 把…计⼊预算；为…安排 (时间) adj. 低价的，低廉的
exampleTranslation: 我们下个月需要将家庭预算削减10%。

example: They decided to build a new bridge over the river.
meaning: vt. vi. 建筑，建造 vt. 创建，开发 vi. (感觉) 逐渐增强 n. 体格，体形，⾝材
exampleTranslation: 他们决定在河上建一座新桥。

example: He's in the telephone business.
meaning: n. 商业，⽣意；商务；企业；职责
exampleTranslation: 他在电信行业工作

example: We should compress the files to save space in the disk.
meaning: vt. vi. (使) 压紧，压缩 vt. 精简 (⽂章等) n. (⽤以退烧、⽌痛的) 敷布，压布
exampleTranslation: 我们应将文件压缩以节省磁盘空间。

example: The committee comprises eight members.
meaning: vt. 包括，由…组成；构成，组成
exampleTranslation: 这个委员会由八名成员组成。

example: We made a compromise to stop arguing about it.
meaning: n. 折中，妥协；折中办法 vi. 妥协，让步 vi. vt. 违背 (原则)，达不到 (标准) vt. 危及，有损
exampleTranslation: 我们做出了妥协，停止了争吵。

example: Even the greatest scientists couldn't conceive how the universe was made.
meaning: vt. vi. 想象，想出，构想；怀孕
exampleTranslation: 即使是最伟大的科学家也设想不出宇宙是如何形成的。

example: I find it hard to concentrate with so much noise around.
meaning: vi. vt. 全神贯注；(使) 集中 n. 浓缩液，浓缩物
exampleTranslation: 我发现在有这么多噪音的环境中很难集中注意力。

example: The concept of infinity is hard to grasp.
meaning: n. 概念，想法
exampleTranslation: 无限的概念很难理解

example: He doesn't have the slightest conception of teamwork.
meaning: n. 构思；概念；受孕
exampleTranslation: 理念的意思

example: She concerns herself with other people's business too much.
meaning: n. 担⼼；关⼼；对…重要的事 vt. 关于；使…担⼼；涉及，影响
exampleTranslation: 她过于关心别人的事情。

example: Please keep your explanation concise and to the point.
meaning: adj. 简洁的，简明的
exampleTranslation: 请保持解释简洁明了。

example: We need a concrete plan to solve this issue.
meaning: adj. 确实的，具体的；混凝⼟制的 n. 混凝⼟
exampleTranslation: 我们需要一个具体的计划来解决这个问题。

example: She concluded her speech with a funny joke.
meaning: vt. 推断出，作出结论；达成 (协议) vi. vt. (使) 结束，终⽌
exampleTranslation: 她以一个有趣的笑话结束她的演讲。

example: After much discussion, we came to the conclusion that we should go ahead with the plan.
meaning: n. 结论，推论；结束，结尾；签订
exampleTranslation: 经过深思熟虑后，我们得出结论应该继续这个计划。

example: The committee will confer about the budget next week.
meaning: vt. 授予，赋予 vi. 商议，协商
exampleTranslation: 委员会将于下周讨论预算。

example: We will attend a medical conference next weekend.
meaning: n. 会议
exampleTranslation: 下个周末我们将参加一场医学会议。

example: He finally confessed his feelings to her.
meaning: vi. vt. 供认，坦⽩；承认；忏悔
exampleTranslation: 他最终向她坦白了他的感情。

example: The flu epidemic of 1918 killed millions of people worldwide.
meaning: n. 流⾏病；泛滥，猖獗 adj. 泛滥的，猖獗的
exampleTranslation: 1918年的流感大流行造成了全世界数百万人的死亡。

example: We saw the final episode of the series last night.
meaning: n. ⼀段经历，⼩插曲；⼀集
exampleTranslation: 我们昨晚看了这个系列的最后一集。

example: The invention of gunpowder was an epoch in the history of warfare.
meaning: n. 时代，纪元；(地质中的) 世
exampleTranslation: 火药的发明是战争历史上的一个时代。

example: She seemed indifferent to the fact that her friend was in danger.
meaning: adj. 不感兴趣的，冷淡的；⼀般的
exampleTranslation: 她对于朋友处于危险中的事实似乎无动于衷。

example: He was indignant at the unfair treatment he received at work.
meaning: adj. 愤慨的，愤怒的
exampleTranslation: 他对工作中遭受的不公平待遇感到愤怒。

example: He felt a strong sense of indignation when he saw the bullying happening on the playground.
meaning: n. 愤慨，愤怒，义愤
exampleTranslation: 他看到操场上发生的欺凌行为时，强烈地感到愤慨。

example: Water is indispensable to human life.
meaning: adj. 必不可少的，不可或缺的
exampleTranslation: 水对人类生命是不可或缺的。

example: As an individual, I have my own opinions.
meaning: adj. 单独的；个⼈的；独特的 n. 个⼈；有个性的⼈
exampleTranslation: 作为个人，我有我自己的看法。

example: After the party, the house was a complete mess.
meaning: n. 杂乱；⿇烦，困境；不整洁的⼈ vt. 使不整洁，弄乱
exampleTranslation: 派对之后，房子完全乱成一团。

example: Could you deliver the message to Tom?
meaning: n. 信息，消息；要旨 vt. 给…发消息
exampleTranslation: 你能把消息传给汤姆吗？

example: The king sent a messenger to the enemy camp with a letter of peace.
meaning: n. 送信者，通信员
exampleTranslation: "国王派出一个信使，将一封和平信件送到敌营。"

example: We need to find a new method to solve this problem.
meaning: n. ⽅法，办法；条理
exampleTranslation: 我们需要找到一个新的方法来解决这个问题。

example: The militant group claimed responsibility for the bombing.
meaning: adj. 好战的，激进的 n. 好战分⼦，激进分⼦
exampleTranslation: 激进的团体声称对爆炸事件负责。

example: He is considering a career in the military.
meaning: adj. 军事的，军队的，军⽤的 n. 军队，军⽅，军⼈
exampleTranslation: 他正在考虑从军作为职业。

example: He has a sharp mind.
meaning: n. 头脑，思维；⼼思 vt. vi. 介意 vt. 当⼼，注意
exampleTranslation: 他头脑非常敏锐。

example: I have made an effort to reduce my carbon footprint.
meaning: vt. 减少，缩⼩，降低 vt. vi. (使) 蒸发 vi. 减轻体重，节⻝
exampleTranslation: 我尽力减少了我自己的碳足迹

example: The company has announced a reduction in prices.
meaning: n. 减少，缩⼩；脱氧
exampleTranslation: 这个公司已经宣布降价。

example: I refer to our conversation yesterday.
meaning: vi. 提及；指，关于；参考，查阅
exampleTranslation: 我在提到我们昨天的对话。

example: You can find more information in the reference section of the library.
meaning: n. 提到；参考 (书⽬)；推荐信 vt. 查阅，参考
exampleTranslation: 在图书馆的参考部分，你可以找到更多的信息。

example: The subject of our discussion was the future of the company.
meaning: n. 主题；学科；对象；主语；⾂⺠ adj. 易遭…的；取决于…的；受…⽀配 vt. 使⾂服，使顺从；使遭受
exampleTranslation: 我们讨论的主题是公司的未来。

example: The review was too subjective to be fair.
meaning: adj. 主观的；主语的
exampleTranslation: 这篇评论过于主观，难称公正。

example: Overcooking can spoil the taste of the food.
meaning: vt. 破坏，毁掉；宠坏，溺爱；善待 vi. (⻝物) 变质 n. 赃物，战利品
exampleTranslation: 过度烹饪会破坏食物的味道。

example: The tournament was sponsored by a local company.
meaning: n. 赞助商，资助者；倡议者；保⼈ vt. 赞助，资助；举办；倡议 (法案)
exampleTranslation: 这场比赛是由一家当地公司赞助的。

example: The news spread quickly throughout the city.
meaning: vt. 展开，摊开；伸开；使分散 vi. vt. 传播，散布；蔓延，扩散；涂 n. 传播，散布；区域；翼展
exampleTranslation: 这个消息迅速在城市中传播开

example: She kicked her horse with her spurs.
meaning: n. ⻢刺；鞭策，激励；⼭嘴 vt. 鞭策，激励；促进，加速
exampleTranslation: 她用马刺踢马。

example: He is a spy for the government.
meaning: n. 间谍，密探 vi. 从事间谍活动，搜集情报 vt. 突然看⻅，发现
exampleTranslation: 他是政府的间谍。

example: The boat has good stability in rough waters.
meaning: n. 稳定，稳固
exampleTranslation: 这艘船在糟糕的海水中拥有良好的稳定性。

example: The patient's condition is stable.
meaning: adj. 稳定的，稳固的；(⼈) 稳重的 n. ⻢厩；养⻢场 vt. 使 (⻢) ⼊厩
exampleTranslation: 翻译为：病人的状况稳定。

example: The staff at the hospital were very professional.
meaning: n. 全体职员；(学校) ⾏政⼈员 vt. 担当…职员，任职于
exampleTranslation: 医院的员工非常专业。

example: The play is on stage tonight.
meaning: n. 阶段；步骤；舞台 vt. 上演，举办；组织，筹划
exampleTranslation: 今晚的舞台剧已经开始

example: She twisted her ankle while playing basketball.
meaning: vt. vi. (使) 弯曲变形；扭动；缠绕 vi. 曲折，蜿蜒 vt. 使弯曲；转动，旋转；扭伤；曲解 n. 转动，旋转；转折；急转弯处
exampleTranslation: 她打篮球的时候扭伤了脚踝。

example: Don't bother me with such trivial matters.
meaning: adj. 琐碎的，微不⾜道的
exampleTranslation: 别为这样的琐事打扰我。

example: I will try to finish the work by tomorrow.
meaning: vi. vt. 试图，努⼒ vt. 试，试⽤；审讯，审判 n. 尝试，努⼒
exampleTranslation: 我会尽力明天完成这项工作。

example: The books tumbled to the floor as she bumped the shelf.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 跌倒，滚落 vi. 倒塌；暴跌；仓促移动；翻跟头 n. 跌倒，暴跌；混乱的⼀堆
exampleTranslation: 她撞到书架,书籍纷纷落到地上。

example: The country is going through a turbulent period.
meaning: adj. 动荡的，混乱的；湍急的
exampleTranslation: 这个国家正在经历一个动荡的时期。

example: Turn the key to start the car.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 旋转；转⾝；转弯；翻 (⻚) vt. 把…翻过来；(使) 松开；折起 vlink. (使) 变成，成为；到达 (年龄等) n. 旋转；(⻋) 转弯；机会；转变
exampleTranslation: 转动钥匙启动汽车

example: The annual turnover of the company is over 10 million dollars.
meaning: n. 营业额；⼈员流动率；三⻆馅饼
exampleTranslation: 这家公司的年营业额超过一千万美元。

example: She's my type of girl.
meaning: n. 类型，种类；某类⼈；印刷字体 vi. vt. 打 (字) vt. 确定…的类型，把…分类
exampleTranslation: 她是我喜欢的那型女孩。

example: This is a typical example of a Medieval castle.
meaning: adj. 典型的；⼀贯的；果不其然的
exampleTranslation: 这是一个中世纪城堡的典型例子。

example: She did this work on a voluntary basis.
meaning: adj. ⾃愿的；⽆偿的，志愿的
exampleTranslation: 她是自愿做这项工作的。

example: She is an active community volunteer.
meaning: n. 志愿者；⾃告奋勇者 vi. vt. ⾃愿做，⾃告奋勇 vt. 主动建议，主动提出 vi. ⾃愿参军
exampleTranslation: 作为名词

example: Every citizen has the right to vote.
meaning: vt. vi. 投票，表决，选举 vt. 选出，推举；表明，公认；提议 n. 选票；投票；投票权
exampleTranslation: 每位公民都有投票权。

example: His jokes are always so vulgar, I can't stand them.
meaning: adj. 粗俗的，俗⽓的；下流的
exampleTranslation: 他的笑话一直都那么粗俗，我受不了。

example: The ceasefire has left the city vulnerable to attack.
meaning: adj. 脆弱的，易受伤害的
exampleTranslation: 停火使得城市容易受到攻击。

example: He's the author of four best-selling books.
meaning: n. 作者，作家；(计划等的) 筹划者 vt. 创作，写作，撰写
exampleTranslation: 他是四本畅销书的作者。

example: The teacher is the authority in the classroom.
meaning: n. 权威；权⼒；当权者，官⽅；授权
exampleTranslation: 老师是课堂上的权威。

example: The hospital has an auxiliary power system in case of a blackout.
meaning: adj. 辅助的；备⽤的 n. 助动词
exampleTranslation: 医院备有一个辅助电源系统以防止电力中断。

example: No amount of struggle would avail.
meaning: vi. vt. 有帮助，有⽤；利⽤ (机会等) n. 效⽤，帮助
exampleTranslation: 中文

example: The book is now available in stores.
meaning: adj. 可获得的，可⽤的；有空的
exampleTranslation: 这本书现在在书店有售。

example: The critic gave the movie a good review.
meaning: n. 评论家，批评家；批评者
exampleTranslation: 评论家对这部电影的评价很好。

example: He has a very critical eye when it comes to art.
meaning: adj. 批判的；关键的；危急的
exampleTranslation: 他对于艺术有非常挑剔的眼光

example: His criticism of the government's handling of the crisis was well-founded.
meaning: n. 批评，指责；(对书等的) 评论
exampleTranslation: 他对政府处理危机的方式的批评是有依据的。

example: Don't criticize others in public.
meaning: vi. vt. 批评，指责，批判 vt. 评论，评价
exampleTranslation: 完整句子的中文翻译是：不要在公开场合批评他人。

example: Getting enough sleep is crucial for good health.
meaning: adj. ⾄关重要的，关键性的
exampleTranslation: 获取足够的睡眠对保持良好的健康至关重要。

example: The celebration will culminate in a firework display.
meaning: vi. 以…告终，达到…的顶点
exampleTranslation: 庆祝活动将以烟火表演作为高潮。

example: The farmer cultivates vegetables in his garden.
meaning: vt. 开垦；种植；建⽴ (友谊)；培养
exampleTranslation: 翻译：农夫在他的花园里种植蔬菜。

example: Every country has its own unique culture.
meaning: n. ⽂化；种植，栽培
exampleTranslation: 每个国家都有各自独特的文化。

example: The dual role of women as workers and mothers is now widely accepted.
meaning: adj. 双的，双重的，两部分的
exampleTranslation: 女性既是工作者又是母亲的双重角色现在被广泛接受了。

example: His alibi is dubious and doesn't match the facts.
meaning: adj. 怀疑的；可疑的；不光彩的
exampleTranslation: 他的不在场证明很可疑，与事实不符。

example: The assignment is due next Monday.
meaning: adj. 由于；预期的；应给的；到期的 n. 应有的权利，应得的东西 adv. 正对着，正向
exampleTranslation: 这个作业下周一交。

example: This pair of shoes is very durable.
meaning: adj. 耐⽤的，持久的
exampleTranslation: 这双鞋非常耐用，可以保持好几年都不损坏。

example: The duration of the movie is two hours.
meaning: n. 持续时间，期间
exampleTranslation: 这部电影的时长是两个小时

example: It's his duty to take care of his younger sister.
meaning: n. 责任，义务；职责；税
exampleTranslation: 他有责任照顾他的妹妹。

example: The dynamic nature of the business world means that companies must regularly adapt to new trends.
meaning: adj. 充满活⼒的；动态的 n. 动态；⼒学，动⼒学
exampleTranslation: 商业世界的动态特性意味着公司必须定期适应新的趋势。

example: The dinosaurs became extinct millions of years ago.
meaning: adj. 已灭绝的，消失的；(⽕⼭) 死的
exampleTranslation: 恐龙在几百万年前就灭绝了。

example: The firefighters worked tirelessly to extinguish the fire.
meaning: vt. 熄灭，扑灭；毁灭，使破灭
exampleTranslation: 消防员们不知疲倦地工作来扑灭火。

example: Can you introduce your friend to us?
meaning: vt. 介绍；使初次了解；推⾏；引⼊
exampleTranslation: 你能把你的朋友介绍给我们吗？

example: Let me give you a brief introduction.
meaning: n. 采⽤，引进；介绍；序⾔
exampleTranslation: 让我给你做个简短的介绍。

example: I decided to invest my savings in a mutual fund.
meaning: vi. vt. 投资；投⼊ (时间等)；授 (权)
exampleTranslation: 我决定把我的储蓄投资到一家共享基金中。

example: My investment in this project has finally paid off.
meaning: n. 投资；(时间、精⼒的) 投⼊
exampleTranslation: 我投入这个项目的投资终于得到了回报。

example: The police are investigating the matter.
meaning: vi. vt. 调查，研究
exampleTranslation: 警察正在調查此事。

example: They have a mutual respect for each other.
meaning: adj. 相互的，彼此的；共有的
exampleTranslation: 中文翻译为:他们彼此之间有着相互尊重。

example: She found his behaviour very mysterious.
meaning: adj. 神秘的；故弄⽞虚的
exampleTranslation: 她觉得他的行为很奇怪。

example: Her sudden disappearance is a complete mystery.
meaning: n. 谜；神秘的⼈ (或物)；神秘性
exampleTranslation: 她的突然失踪完全是个谜。

example: The book is based on ancient Greek myths.
meaning: n. 神话；(很多⼈相信的) 错误看法
exampleTranslation: 这本书是基于古希腊的神话。

example: He comes from a noble family.
meaning: adj. ⾼尚的；贵族的；壮观的 n. 贵族
exampleTranslation: 他来自一个贵族家庭。

example: It's the norm for people to shake hands when they meet for the first time.
meaning: n. 常态；规范，准则；平均⽔平
exampleTranslation: 当人们首次见面时，握手是一种常规。

example: It is normal to feel nervous before a big test.
meaning: adj. 正常的，平常的；⾝⼼健康的 n. 通常标准，常态
exampleTranslation: 在重大考试前感到紧张是正常的。

example: In deep learning, normalization is a common method to scale input values.
meaning: n. 正常化
exampleTranslation: 在深度学习中，规范化是一种常用的对输入值进行缩放的方法。

example: Please take a note of the meeting time.
meaning: n. 笔记；便条；注释；纸币 n. ⾳符；感情⾊彩，调⼦ vt. 注意；指出，特别提到
exampleTranslation: 名词用法

example: He has a very clear notion of what needs to be done.
meaning: n. 观念，理念，看法
exampleTranslation: 他对该做什么有非常清晰的想法。

example: This is a public park.
meaning: adj. ⼤众的；公共的；政府的；公开的 n. 公众，⺠众
exampleTranslation: 这是一个公共的公园。

example: The writer's first publication received widespread acclaim.
meaning: n. 出版，出版物；发表，公布
exampleTranslation: 那位作家的首部作品广受赞誉。

example: His latest film has received a lot of publicity.
meaning: n. (媒体的) 关注，报道；宣传
exampleTranslation: 他的最新电影得到了很多宣传。

example: The newspaper will publish the results tomorrow.
meaning: vt. 出版；刊登；公布 vt. vi. 发表 (作品)
exampleTranslation: 明天，这家报纸将会公布结果。

example: The result of the test was not what we expected.
meaning: n. 结果；得分，成绩；成果 vi. 由…引起；造成，导致
exampleTranslation: 测试的结果并不是我们所期待的。

example: As a resultant of their cooperation, the project was extremely successful.
meaning: adj. 作为结果的，因⽽发⽣的
exampleTranslation: 作为他们合作的结果，这个项目非常成功。

example: After the interruption, they resumed their conversation.
meaning: vt. vi. 继续，重新开始 vt. 恢复 (职位)，回到 (座位) n. 简历，履历；摘要，概述
exampleTranslation: 被打断后，他们恢复了他们的谈话。

example: This incident revealed his true character.
meaning: vt. 揭⽰，揭露；展现，显露
exampleTranslation: 这个事件揭示了他的真实性格。

example: The revelation of his true identity shocked everyone.
meaning: n. 被揭⽰的真相；揭露 n. (上帝的) 启⽰
exampleTranslation: 他真实身份的揭示使所有人都震惊。

example: She swore to take revenge on her enemies.
meaning: n. 报复，报仇；雪耻 vt. 报复，报仇
exampleTranslation: 她发誓要报复她的敌人。

example: The company's annual revenue was over 10 million dollars.
meaning: n. 收⼊，财政收⼊，税收
exampleTranslation: 公司的年度收入超过了1000万美元。

example: The city's water supply was polluted.
meaning: n. 供应量；补给；供给，供应 vt. 供给，供应
exampleTranslation: 城市的水源被污染了。

example: She supports her family with her full-time job.
meaning: vt. ⽀持；资助；养活；⽀撑；证实 n. ⽀持；资助；⽀撑物；证据
exampleTranslation: 她通过全职工作支持她的家庭。

example: Suppose it rains tomorrow, what will you do?
meaning: vi. vt. 认为，猜想；(婉转表达) 要不 vt. 假定，假设
exampleTranslation: 假设明天下雨，你会怎么办？

example: He suppressed his anger and frustration.
meaning: vt. 镇压；压抑；封锁，隐瞒；抑制
exampleTranslation: 他抑制了自己的怒火和挫败感。

example: He took vitamin supplements to stay healthy.
meaning: n. 增补 (物)，补充 (物)；增刊 vt. 增补，补充
exampleTranslation: 他吃维他命补充剂以保持健康。

example: The Supreme Court is the highest judicial body in the country.
meaning: adj. ⾄⾼⽆上的；(程度上) 最⼤的
exampleTranslation: 最高法院是国家最高的司法机构。

example: I have a system for sorting out the bills.
meaning: n. 体系，制度；系统
exampleTranslation: 我有一套整理账单的系统。

example: We need a systematic approach to solving this problem.
meaning: adj. 系统的，有条理的，有计划的
exampleTranslation: 我们需要系统地解决这个问题

example: The result can be proved by logic.
meaning: n. 逻辑 (思维)；逻辑学；逻辑系统
exampleTranslation: 可以通过逻辑推理证明此结果。

example: It's logical to assume that she will fail.
meaning: adj. 合情合理的；合乎逻辑的
exampleTranslation: 中文翻译：很符合逻辑的预测她会失败。

example: The firemen managed to rescue the boy from the burning house.
meaning: vt. 营救，救援 n. 营救，营救活动
exampleTranslation: 消防员成功地从燃烧的房子中救出了那个男孩。

example: We need to conduct some research into the cause of the problem.
meaning: n. 研究，调查 vi. vt. 研究，调查
exampleTranslation: 我们需要对问题的原因进行一些**研究**。

example: I really resent her for not inviting me to the party.
meaning: vt. 怨恨，憎恶
exampleTranslation: 我很生她的气，因为她没邀请我去派对。Ireallyresentherfornotinvitingmetotheparty.

example: Every morning, I refresh my mind with a cup of coffee.
meaning: vt. 使恢复活⼒；翻新；使记起 vt. vi. 刷新 (⽹⻚)
exampleTranslation: 每天早晨，我都用一杯咖啡来振奋自己的精神。

example: He was quick to refute the allegations made against him.
meaning: vt. 反驳，否认…的正确性
exampleTranslation: 他迅速反驳了对他的指控。

example: We are studying the cultural diversity in this region.
meaning: n. 地区，区域；⾏政区；⾝体部位
exampleTranslation: 我们正在研究这个地区的文化多样性。

example: We have a regular cleaning schedule at home.
meaning: adj. 有规律的；频繁的；通常的 n. 常客，⽼主顾；含铅汽油
exampleTranslation: 翻译为我们的家中有一个定期的清洁日程表。

example: The government body regulates the pharmaceutical industry to maintain a standard in medication production.
meaning: vt. vi. (以规章) 管理，约束 vt. 调整，调节
exampleTranslation: 政府机构管控药品行业以保持药品生产的标准。

example: The company operates under strict regulation from the government.
meaning: n. 规章，制度；调控，管理 adj. 规定的，正规的
exampleTranslation: 公司在政府的严格监管下运营。

example: Please replace the book on the shelf when you're finished.
meaning: vt. 替换；更换；把…放回原处
exampleTranslation: 当你看完书后，请把书放回书架。

example: She didn't reply to my e-mail.
meaning: vi. vt. 回复，答复 vi. 作出回应 n. 答复，回应
exampleTranslation: 她没有回复我的电子邮件。

example: He delivered his report to the manager.
meaning: vt. vi. 汇报，报告；报道，宣布 vt. 据说，传闻；举报，告发 vi. 报到 n. 报道；报告；传闻；成绩报告单
exampleTranslation: 他向经理汇报了情况。

example: The reporter asked the politician about his plans for education reform.
meaning: n. 记者
exampleTranslation: 这位记者询问了政治家关于他的教育改革计划。

example: His reputation for honesty is widely recognized.
meaning: n. 名誉，名声
exampleTranslation: 他的诚实名声广为人知。

example: I have a request to make.
meaning: n. 请求，要求；点播的歌曲 vt. 请求，要求
exampleTranslation: 我有个请求。

example: The recipe requires 200g of flour.
meaning: vt. 需要；要求，规定
exampleTranslation: 这个食谱需要200克面粉

example: The job has a requirement for proficiency in Microsoft Office.
meaning: n. 需求，必需品；必要条件
exampleTranslation: 这份工作要求熟练使用MicrosoftOffice。

example: We need to assess the impact of these changes.
meaning: vt. 评估；估算
exampleTranslation: 我们需要评估这些变化的影响。

example: It takes time to assimilate new ideas.
meaning: vt. 吸收，接受，学习 vi. vt. (使) 同化，融⼊
exampleTranslation: 要花时间去吸收新的观点。

example: I need someone to assist me with this task.
meaning: vi. vt. 帮助，协助 vt. 促进，有助于 n. 助攻
exampleTranslation: 我需要有人协助我完成这项任务。

example: Can you give me some assistance?
meaning: n. 帮助，援助，⽀持
exampleTranslation: 我不能自己移动这张桌子。你能帮助我吗？

example: Jim works as an assistant in a law firm.
meaning: n. 助⼿，助理；售货员 adj. 助理的，副的
exampleTranslation: 吉姆在一家法律公司担任助理工作。

example: I think we can safely assume that she will be here on time.
meaning: vt. 假设；承担，取得；呈现出；假装
exampleTranslation: 我想我们可以放心地假设她会准时到来。

example: The whole argument is based upon a false assumption.
meaning: n. 假设，臆断；(责任的) 承担
exampleTranslation: 整个论述基于一个错误的假设。

example: We can all contribute to the success of the project.
meaning: vt. vi. 捐赠，捐助；做贡献；撰稿 vi. 促使，是导致…的原因之⼀
exampleTranslation: 我们都可以为项目的成功做出贡献。

example: Your contribution to the project was invaluable.
meaning: n. 贡献；捐献；定期缴款；稿件
exampleTranslation: 你对这个项目的贡献是无价的。

example: His controversial book about the war has caused a lot of discussion.
meaning: adj. 有争议的，引发争论的
exampleTranslation: 他关于战争的争议性书籍引起了大量的讨论。

example: The decision to build the airport has caused considerable controversy.
meaning: n. 争论，争议
exampleTranslation: 建造机场的决策引发了很大的争议

example: He lost control of the vehicle and crashed into a tree.
meaning: n. 控制，限制；开关 vt. 控制，限制
exampleTranslation: 他失去了对车的控制，撞向了一棵树。

example: The council will convene tomorrow to discuss the issue.
meaning: vt. vi. 召集，召开，集合
exampleTranslation: 理事会将在明天召开会议讨论这个问题。

example: The annual trade convention will be held next week.
meaning: n. 习俗，惯例；⼤会；公约，协定
exampleTranslation: 下周将举行年度贸易大会。

example: The roads converge at the downtown area.
meaning: vi. 相交；聚集；趋同
exampleTranslation: 这些路在市中心交汇。

example: The teacher uses simple language to convey complex ideas.
meaning: vt. 表达，传递，传达；运输，运送
exampleTranslation: 老师使用简单的语言传达复杂的思想。

example: His domain is institutional finance.
meaning: n. 领域，范畴；领地；域
exampleTranslation: 他的领域是机构金融。

example: She is busy with her domestic chores.
meaning: adj. 国内的；家庭的；家养的 n. 佣⼈；家庭纠纷
exampleTranslation: 她忙于家务

example: He has a dominant personality, always taking the lead in group activities.
meaning: adj. 占⽀配 (统治) 地位的；显性的
exampleTranslation: 他有一种支配性的个性，总是在团体活动中起领导作用。

example: They completely dominate the entire market.
meaning: vt. vi. 主宰，统治，⽀配 vt. ⾼耸，耸⽴
exampleTranslation: 他们完全主宰了整个市场。

example: The prophecy predicted doom for the city.
meaning: n. 厄运，死亡，毁灭 vt. 使…注定遭受 (不幸等)
exampleTranslation: 预言预测这座城市的毁灭。

example: You'd better double-check your work before you submit it.
meaning: adj. 两倍的，双重的；双⼈的 n. 两倍，两倍量 vi. vt. 是…的两倍，使加倍 vt. 把…对折
exampleTranslation: 你最好在提交工作之前再检查一次。

example: I have no doubt about his honesty.
meaning: n. 怀疑，不确定 vt. 怀疑；不信任，对…没有信⼼
exampleTranslation: 我毫不怀疑他的诚实.

example: The scientist is using a probe to sample the ocean's depth.
meaning: vt. vi. 追问，探究，打探 vt. (⽤细⻓⼯具) 探查 n. 详细调查；航天探测器；探针
exampleTranslation: 科学家正在用探针测量海洋深度。

example: The lab technician explained the procedure for the experiment.
meaning: n. 步骤，程序；⼿术，治疗
exampleTranslation: 实验室技术员解释了实验的程序。

example: You may proceed with your project once the manager gives approval.
meaning: vi. 继续做，接着做；⾏进，前往
exampleTranslation: 一旦经理批准，你就可以进行你的项目了。

example: The entire proceeding was recorded on camera.
meaning: n. 诉讼；⼀系列⾏动；(会议) 记录
exampleTranslation: 整个过程都被摄像机记录下来了。

example: The baking process takes about two hours.
meaning: n. 过程，流程，⼯序 vt. 加⼯，处理；审阅，审核
exampleTranslation: 烘烤过程大约需要两个小时。

example: The wedding procession moved slowly down the street.
meaning: n. 队伍，⾏列，游⾏；⼀连串
exampleTranslation: 婚礼游行队伍沿街道缓缓前行。

example: The government proclaimed a state of emergency after the flood.
meaning: vt. 宣布，声明；表明，显⽰
exampleTranslation: "政府在洪水之后宣布进入紧急状态。"

example: Factories produce goods for the global market.
meaning: vt. ⽣产，制作；出产；引起；制⽚ n. (⻝品等) 农产品
exampleTranslation: 工厂为全球市场生产商品。

example: This is the latest product of our company.
meaning: n. 产品，制品；⽣成物；结果；积
exampleTranslation: 这是我们公司最新的产品。

example: The new factory will commence production next month.
meaning: n. ⽣产，制造；产量；产⽣，分泌 n. (电影等的) 制作
exampleTranslation: 新工厂将在下个月开始生产。

example: He had a very productive day at work.
meaning: adj. 多产的，⽣产的；有成效的
exampleTranslation: 他在工作中度过了相当有成效的一天。

example: Good management will usually increase a company's productivity.
meaning: n. ⽣产⼒，⽣产率
exampleTranslation: 好的管理通常会提高公司的生产力。

example: Teaching is a rewarding profession.
meaning: n. 职业；业界⼈⼠；公开，表明
exampleTranslation: 在浪漫电影中，公开表白常常是关键点。

example: We need a professional opinion on this matter.
meaning: adj. 职业的，专业的 n. 专业⼈⼠；职业运动员；内⾏
exampleTranslation: 我们需要这个问题的专业意见。

example: They need to expand the airport to handle increasing passenger traffic.
meaning: vi. vt. 扩充，扩⼤；扩展 (业务) vi. 详谈，详述
exampleTranslation: 他们需要扩展机场以处理增加的客流量。

example: The company is planning an expansion of its overseas market.
meaning: n. 扩张，扩充，扩⼤
exampleTranslation: 公司正在计划扩大其海外市场。

example: I expect to go to the park this weekend.
meaning: vt. 预计；盼望；要求，期望 vi. vt. 猜想
exampleTranslation: 我期待这个周末去公园。

example: He didn't live up to his parents' expectations.
meaning: n. 预料，预期；期望，指望
exampleTranslation: 他没有达到父母的期望。

example: He has five years of teaching experience.
meaning: n. 经验，阅历；(⼀次) 经历 vt. 经历；感受，体会
exampleTranslation: 他有五年的教学经验。

example: The scientist conducted an experiment to test his hypothesis.
meaning: n. 实验，试验；尝试，实践 vi. (⽤…) 做实验；进⾏试验，试⽤
exampleTranslation: 科学家进行了一个实验来测试他的假说。

example: He is an expert in abstract art.
meaning: n. 专家，⾏家 adj. 熟练的，专家的，内⾏的
exampleTranslation: 他是抽象艺术的专家。

example: His expertise in finance was well recognized in the company.
meaning: n. 专⻔技术，专⻔知识，专⻓
exampleTranslation: 他在财务方面的专长在公司内得到了广泛的认可。

example: My driver's license will expire next month.
meaning: vi. (协议等) 到期，失效；死亡
exampleTranslation: 我的驾驶执照下月就要过期了。

example: The mother's instinct to protect her child is very strong.
meaning: n. 本能，天性；直觉
exampleTranslation: 母亲保护孩子的本能非常强。

example: They decided to institute a weekly meeting.
meaning: n. 机构，协会，研究院，学院 vt. 建⽴ (体系等)，制定 (规章等)
exampleTranslation: 他们决定每周举行一次会议。

example: The government is an important institution in any country.
meaning: n. 机构；收容机构；习俗，制度
exampleTranslation: 政府是任何国家的重要机构。

example: She decided to buy some health insurance in case she got sick.
meaning: n. 保险 (业)；保险费；预防措施
exampleTranslation: 她决定购买一些健康保险，以防她生病。

example: We had insured our house against fire.
meaning: vt. vi. (给…) 投保 vt. 承保，为…提供保险；确保
exampleTranslation: 我们为房屋投了火险。

example: Respect is an integral part of our community.
meaning: adj. 必不可少的；作为组成部分的
exampleTranslation: 尊重是我们社区不可或缺的一部分。

example: We need to integrate the existing systems into a single unified one.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 合并；(使) 融⼊群体
exampleTranslation: 我们需要将现有的系统整合成一个统一的系统。

example: His integrity and dedication earned him the respect of his colleagues.
meaning: n. 正直，诚实；完整，完全
exampleTranslation: 中文翻译是：他的正直和敬业赢得了同事们的尊重。

example: He gave me a curious look.
meaning: adj. 好奇的；稀奇古怪的，不寻常的
exampleTranslation: 他给了我一个好奇的眼神。

example: Curiosity led him to explore the forest.
meaning: n. 好奇⼼；奇物，珍品
exampleTranslation: 他的好奇心使他去探索森林。

example: Currency exchange is a common practice for international travelers.
meaning: n. 通货，货币；通⽤，流传
exampleTranslation: 对国际旅行者来说，货币兑换是常见的做法。

example: The current situation in the company is tense.
meaning: adj. 当前的，现在的，流⾏的 n. ⽔流，⽓流；电流；思潮
exampleTranslation: 公司当前的情况很紧张。

example: He cut the cake into three pieces.
meaning: vt. 切，割，剪；削减；删节 vi. 可切割；停⽌拍⽚ n. 伤⼝；开⼝；削减；理发；删节
exampleTranslation: 他把蛋糕切成了三块。

example: His cumulative score in the game was impressive.
meaning: adj. 累加的，积累的
exampleTranslation: 他在游戏中的累积得分令人印象深刻。

example: The average income in our city is around $50,000 annually.
meaning: adj. 平均的；(数量) 中等的；普通的 n. 平均⽔平；平均数，均值 vt. 平均数是 vt. vi. 计算出…的平均数
exampleTranslation: 我们城市的平均收入每年大约为50,000美元。

example: I try to avoid eating too much sugar.
meaning: vt. 避免；回避；避免撞上
exampleTranslation: 我尽量避免吃太多糖。

example: I usually awake at six in the morning.
meaning: adj. 醒着的，没睡着的 vi. vt. (使) 醒来；唤起 (情感或记忆)
exampleTranslation: 我通常在早晨六点醒来。

example: The teacher will award a prize to the student with the best essay.
meaning: n. 奖，奖品；(赔偿) 裁定额 vt. 授予，奖励
exampleTranslation: 老师会给写的最好的文章的学生授予奖品。

example: We must make everyone aware of the dangers of smoking.
meaning: adj. 知道的；注意到的；有…意识的
exampleTranslation: 我们必须让每个人都意识到吸烟的危害。

example: He made an awkward attempt to be humorous.
meaning: adj. 尴尬的；难处理的；笨拙的
exampleTranslation: 他尽力想幽默一下，但很尴尬

example: She was known for her extravagant lifestyle.
meaning: adj. 奢侈的，铺张浪费的；离谱的
exampleTranslation: 她以奢华的生活方式而闻名。

example: The weather conditions are quite extreme today, with temperatures below zero.
meaning: adj. 极度的；严重的；偏激的 n. 极端，极度
exampleTranslation: 今天的天气条件非常极端，气温都在零度以下。

example: The bacteria are invisible to the naked eye.
meaning: adj. 看不⻅的，隐形的
exampleTranslation: 细菌是肉眼看不见的。

example: The entire operation involves many hours of preparatory work.
meaning: vt. 需要，包含；牵涉，涉及；使参与
exampleTranslation: 整个操作涉及许多小时的预备工作。

example: The safety issue of the car needs to be addressed.
meaning: n. 议题；问题；⼀期，期号 vt. 宣布；发放，签发；出版；发⾏
exampleTranslation: 这款汽车的安全问题需要解决。

example: I picked up an interesting item at the thrift shop.
meaning: n. ⼀件 (物品)；项⽬；⼀篇报道
exampleTranslation: 我在跳蚤市场买了一个有趣的物品。

example: The car skidded off the road and overturned.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 翻倒，打翻 vt. 推翻 (判决等)；颠覆 (政府等)
exampleTranslation: 汽车从路上滑下并翻了个头

example: The calamity overwhelmed the city with sadness and grief.
meaning: vt. 使不知所措；击败；压垮；淹没
exampleTranslation: 悲剧使整个城市都笼罩在悲痛之中。

example: I'd like to purchase a ticket for the concert.
meaning: vt. 购买，采购 n. 购买⾏为；所购之物；握紧
exampleTranslation: 我想购买一张音乐会的门票。

example: He decided to pursue a career in medicine.
meaning: vt. 追求，继续进⾏；追究；追赶
exampleTranslation: 他决定投身医学事业。

example: He left law school to devote more time to his musical pursuits.
meaning: n. 追求；追赶；爱好，消遣
exampleTranslation: 他离开了法学院，投入更多的时间在他的音乐追求上。

example: I can't solve this puzzle.
meaning: n. 谜，智⼒游戏；拼图；不解之谜 vt. 迷惑，使困惑
exampleTranslation: 我解不开这个谜题。

example: You can reverse the car into the garage.
meaning: vt. 逆转，扭转；撤销，推翻；使反转 vi. vt. 倒⻋ n. 相反的情况；背⾯；倒挡；损失 adj. 相反的，反⾯的
exampleTranslation: 你可以把车倒进车库。

example: We need to review our plans before we can proceed.
meaning: n. 评论；审查；回顾；复习 vt. 写评论；审查；回顾；复习
exampleTranslation: 我们需要在进行之前回顾我们的计划。

example: You need to revise your essay before you hand it in.
meaning: vt. 改变 (想法)；修改，修订 vi. vt. 复习
exampleTranslation: 你需要在上交之前修改你的论文。

example: Let's revive the tradition of family dinners.
meaning: vt. vi. (使) 苏醒，(使) 复活 vt. 使…复兴；重新上演
exampleTranslation: 我们来重振家庭晚餐的传统

example: The teacher gave me a reward for being the best student in class.
meaning: n. 奖赏，回报；赏⾦ vt. 奖励，酬谢
exampleTranslation: 老师因为我是班上最好的学生而给予我奖励。

example: The rich aroma of coffee filled the room.
meaning: adj. 富裕的；丰富多彩的；肥沃的 adj. ⼤量含有…的
exampleTranslation: 房间里充满了咖啡的浓郁香气。

example: The sun rises in the east.
meaning: vi. 上升，提⾼；起床，起⽴；耸⽴ n. 上升，提⾼；加薪；增强
exampleTranslation: 太阳从东方升起。』

example: There's always a risk in starting a new business.
meaning: n. ⻛险，危险；危险的事 (或⼈) vt. 使…冒⻛险；冒…的⻛险
exampleTranslation: 开创新业务总是有风险的。

example: Our main business rival has just launched a new product.
meaning: n. 竞争者，对⼿ vt. 能与…媲美
exampleTranslation: 我们的主要商业竞争对手刚刚发布了一个新产品。

example: He played a key role in the negotiation process.
meaning: n. 作⽤，职能；⻆⾊
exampleTranslation: 演绎角色

example: The car rolled into the ditch.
meaning: vi. vt. 翻滚；原地打转；翻⾝；移动 vt. 把…卷起来；使平坦；裹起来 n. 卷，卷轴；⼀管；⾯包条；名单
exampleTranslation: 汽车滚进了沟里。

example: The roots of this plant go deep into the ground.
meaning: n. 根；根部；根源；起源 vi. vt. (使) ⽣根 vi. 翻找
exampleTranslation: 这棵植物的根深入地下。

example: His usual route to work is through the park.
meaning: n. 路线，路途；途径，渠道 vt. 按某路线发送
exampleTranslation: 他通常的上班路线是穿过公园。

example: My morning routine includes a run in the park.
meaning: n. 惯例，常规；(演出的) ⼀套动作 adj. 常规的，例⾏公事的；乏味的
exampleTranslation: 我的早晨习惯包括在公园跑步。

example: There is a row of trees lining the street.
meaning: n. ⼀排，⼀⾏，⼀列；吵架；争议 vi. vt. 划船
exampleTranslation: 街道两边有一排树。

example: You must obey the school rules.
meaning: n. 规则；建议；定律；统治；常规 vt. vi. 控制，统治；裁定，判决 vt. ⽀配，操纵
exampleTranslation: 你必须遵守学校规定。

example: I used a ruler to draw the line.
meaning: n. 直尺，尺⼦；统治者
exampleTranslation: 我用了尺子来画线。

example: His achievements surpass those of his peers.
meaning: vt. 超过，胜过
exampleTranslation: 场景：比较个人成就

example: The company has a surplus of cash and is considering buying back its own shares.
meaning: n. 过剩，过剩量；盈余，顺差 adj. 过剩的，剩余的
exampleTranslation: 该公司有大量的现金剩余，正在考虑回购自身的股票。

example: His sudden arrival was a surprise to everyone.
meaning: n. 意想不到的事情；惊奇 vt. 使惊奇，使感到意外
exampleTranslation: 他的突然来访让大家都感到惊讶。

example: I am conducting a survey on consumer behavior.
meaning: n. 调查；勘测；概述 vt. 做调查；审视；勘测；概述
exampleTranslation: 我正在对消费者行为进行调研。

example: Our survival in the wild depends on our ability to adapt.
meaning: n. 幸存，⽣存；残存物
exampleTranslation: 我们在野外的生存依赖于我们适应的能力。

example: Many businesses may not survive in the competitive market.
meaning: vi. vt. 幸存；艰难渡过 vi. 继续维持⽣活；保存下来 vt. ⽐…活得久
exampleTranslation: 许多企业可能在竞争激烈的市场中无法生存下去。

example: Some people are more susceptible to stress than others.
meaning: adj. 易受影响的，易患病的；敏感的
exampleTranslation: 有些人比其他人更容易受到压力的影响

example: The game has been suspended due to heavy rain.
meaning: vt. 暂停，中⽌；使停职或停学 vt. 延缓；悬，吊；悬浮
exampleTranslation: 因为大雨比赛已被暂停。

example: The police suspect him of stealing the bike.
meaning: vt. vi. 怀疑，猜想 n. 嫌疑犯 adj. 骗⼈的，可疑的
exampleTranslation: 警方怀疑他偷了自行车。

example: I have a suspicion that he's not telling the truth.
meaning: n. 怀疑，嫌疑，猜疑；猜想，预感
exampleTranslation: 我怀疑他没说实话。

example: He looked at the stranger with a suspicious eye.
meaning: adj. 觉得可疑的；可疑的
exampleTranslation: 他用怀疑的眼神看着这个陌生人。

example: We bought a generator to sustain us during power cuts.
meaning: vt. 保持，维持；遭受；⽀撑；认可
exampleTranslation: 我们买了一个发电机以在停电时支持我们的需要。

example: I swear to uphold the law.
meaning: vi. 咒骂，诅咒，说脏话 vt. 发誓要；肯定地说；使起誓 vi. vt. 发誓，郑重承诺
exampleTranslation: 我发誓要维护法律。

example: Her ankle started to swell after she tripped and fell.
meaning: vi. 肿胀；变得更响亮；充满 (激情) vt. vi. (使) 增加，扩⼤ n. 海浪的涌动；隆起处；增加 adj. 很愉快的
exampleTranslation: 她跌倒后，脚踝开始肿大。

example: She enjoys the swing in the park.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 摆动；(使) 转弯；朝…打去 vi. vt. (使) 改变 (意⻅等) vt. (不正当地) 搞到，办成 n. 摆动；改变；秋千；挥杆动作
exampleTranslation: 她喜欢在公园里的秋千。

example: I flipped the switch and the room was suddenly bright.
meaning: n. (电路的) 开关；骤变，突变 vt. vi. (使) 改变，转变，突变；调班 vt. 交换，对调
exampleTranslation: 我按了开关，房间突然亮了起来。

example: The construction company has won a lucrative contract for a major project in downtown.
meaning: n. 项⽬，⽅案；专题研究；住宅区 vt. 规划；预测；投射；展现；投掷 vi. 突出，伸出
exampleTranslation: 这家建筑公司赢得了市区一项重大项目的合同，这对他们非常有利。

example: The company made a huge profit this year.
meaning: n. 利润，收益；益处，好处 vi. vt. 得益 (于)，对…有益
exampleTranslation: 这家公司今年赚了大钱。

example: Investing in real estate is often very profitable.
meaning: adj. 盈利的，有利润的；有益的
exampleTranslation: 投资房地产通常非常有利可图。

example: He has a profound understanding of the subject.
meaning: adj. 深远的；知识渊博的；⽞奥的
exampleTranslation: 他对这个主题有深厚的理解。

example: She finished the teacher training program last year.
meaning: n. 计划；程序；节⽬；课程 vt. vi. 编写程序 vt. 使…有倾向；预设
exampleTranslation: 她在去年完成了教师培训程序。

example: The treatment resulted in a progressive improvement in health.
meaning: adj. 进步的；逐步发⽣的；进⾏式的 n. 进步⼈⼠，开明⼈⼠
exampleTranslation: 治疗导致了健康状况的逐步改善。

example: Smoking is strictly prohibited in this area.
meaning: vt. 禁⽌；使不可能
exampleTranslation: 这个区域严禁吸烟。

example: The operation could prolong his life.
meaning: vt. 延⻓，拖延
exampleTranslation: 这个手术可以延长他的生命。

example: He played a prominent role in the campaign.
meaning: adj. 杰出的，重要的；显眼的
exampleTranslation: 他在这次活动中发挥了重要的作用。

example: I made a promise to help him.
meaning: vt. vi. 承诺，保证 vt. 使很可能，预⽰ n. 诺⾔；前途，潜质；迹象
exampleTranslation: 我向他承诺要帮助他

example: Despite the difficulties, the future looks promising.
meaning: adj. ⼤有希望的，很有前途的
exampleTranslation: 尽管有困难，但未来看起来充满希望。

example: The government launched a campaign to promote healthy eating habits.
meaning: vt. 促进；推销；晋升；提倡
exampleTranslation: 政府发起了一个促进健康饮食习惯的活动。

example: The alarm prompted him to leave the house quickly.
meaning: vt. 促使；引起，激起；提⽰ adj. 迅速的，⽴即的；准时的 n. 提⽰符 adv. 准时地
exampleTranslation: 警报促使他快速离开房子。

example: We need more proof to convict him of the crime.
meaning: n. 证据；证实；求证；校样 adj. 能防范的 suff. 防…的，抗…的 vt. 校对
exampleTranslation: 我们需要更多证据来证明他的犯罪。

example: I have made a reservation for two at the restaurant.
meaning: n. 预订，预约；保留意⻅；保留地
exampleTranslation: 我已经在餐厅预订了两个位置。

example: He has a reserve of energy that never seems to run out.
meaning: vt. 预订，预约；预留；保留 (权利) n. 储备 (量)；⾃然保护区；内向
exampleTranslation: 作名词使用

example: I can't resist chocolate, it's just too delicious.
meaning: vt. vi. 按捺，克制；抵抗，抵制；抵御 vt. 经得起，抗 (伤害)
exampleTranslation: 我无法抵挡巧克力，它就是太美味了。

example: Non-violent resistance is a powerful tool for social change.
meaning: n. 抵制；反抗；抵抗⼒；阻⼒
exampleTranslation: 非暴力抵抗是一种强大的社会变革工具。

example: The material is heat-resistant, meaning it can withstand high temperatures.
meaning: adj. 有抵抗⼒的；反对的，抵制的 suff. 抗…的，耐…的
exampleTranslation: 这种材料是耐热的,意味着它可以承受高温

example: This beach is a popular resort for tourists.
meaning: n. 度假胜地；采⽤的⽅法 vi. 诉诸，求助
exampleTranslation: 这个海滩是游客们的热门度假胜地。

example: The Internet is a valuable resource for learning.
meaning: n. 资源，物⼒；资料；机敏 vt. 向…提供资⾦ (或设备)
exampleTranslation: 互联网是学习的宝贵资源。

example: We should show respect to our teachers.
meaning: n. 尊敬，尊重；⽅⾯ vt. 尊敬，尊重；遵守
exampleTranslation: 我们应该尊重我们的老师。

example: They went to their respective homes after the meeting.
meaning: adj. 分别的，各⾃的
exampleTranslation: 会议结束后，他们各自回到了自己的家。

example: When I asked him how his day was, he didn't respond.
meaning: vi. vt. 回复，回答 vi. 作出反应；有良好反应
exampleTranslation: 当我问他今天过得怎么样，他没有回应。

example: Your response to the question was very clear.
meaning: n. 回答，答复；反应，回应
exampleTranslation: 你对这个问题的回答非常清楚。

example: Being a teacher carries a heavy responsibility.
meaning: n. 责任
exampleTranslation: 作为老师承担了很大的责任.

example: She is responsible for the whole project.
meaning: adj. 负责的；应担责的；作为原因的
exampleTranslation: 她负责整个项目。

example: With determination and hard work, anyone can succeed.
meaning: vi. 成功 vi. vt. 接替，继任，继承；随后出现
exampleTranslation: 只要有决心和肯努力，任何人都可以成功。

example: It is the courage to continue that counts.
meaning: n. 成功，胜利；成功的⼈ (或事物)
exampleTranslation: 成功不是终点，失败不是末路：重要的是持之以恒的勇气。

example: He is a successful businessman.
meaning: adj. 成功的，有成效的；有成就的
exampleTranslation: 他是一个成功的商人。

example: The King's eldest son is next in line of succession.
meaning: n. ⼀连串；继承，继承权
exampleTranslation: 国王的长子是下一个继承者。

example: The team won three successive games.
meaning: adj. 连续的，接连的，相继的
exampleTranslation: 这支队伍连续赢了三场比赛。

example: He was chosen as the successor to the throne.
meaning: n. 接任者，继承者
exampleTranslation: 他被选为皇位的继承者。

example: The nursing baby can suck milk from its mother.
meaning: vt. 吮，吸；抽 (空⽓等)；把…卷⼊ vi. vt. 含在嘴⾥吮 vi. 糟糕透顶，很差
exampleTranslation: 这个正在哺乳的婴儿可以从它母亲那里吸奶。

example: Sue me if you dare!
meaning: vt. vi. 控告，起诉 vi. (尤指在法庭上)提出请求
exampleTranslation: 你如果敢的话就来起诉我！

example: Many people in the area suffer from malnutrition.
meaning: vi. vt. 遭受，蒙受，受苦 vi. 变差，变糟
exampleTranslation: 该地区的很多人都患有营养不良。

example: A few more lamps would suffice to brighten the room.
meaning: vi. ⾜够，充⾜
exampleTranslation: 再多几盏灯就足以使房间变亮。

example: I have sufficient funds to purchase the car.
meaning: adj. 充⾜的，⾜够的
exampleTranslation: 我有足够的资金来购买这辆车。

example: He suggested that I should apply for the job.
meaning: vt. 提议，建议；推荐；表明；暗⽰
exampleTranslation: 他建议我去申请这份工作。

example: I have a suggestion on how we can fix this problem.
meaning: n. 建议，提议；迹象；微量；暗⽰
exampleTranslation: 我有一个关于如何解决这个问题的建议。

example: He was driven to suicide by his financial troubles.
meaning: n. ⾃杀；⾃杀性⾏为；⾃杀者
exampleTranslation: 他因财务问题而走上了自杀的道路。

example: He is in a navy blue suit.
meaning: n. 西服，套装；诉讼，起诉 vt. 适合；相配，合⾝
exampleTranslation: 他穿着一套深蓝色的西装。

example: This book is not suitable for children.
meaning: adj. 合适的，适宜的
exampleTranslation: 这本书不适合儿童阅读。

example: I had a super time at the party.
meaning: adj. 极好的，很棒的 adv. ⾮常，格外 pref. 超级 n. (⼤楼的) 看管⼈
exampleTranslation: 我在聚会上玩得特别开心。

example: The chef prepared a superb meal for us.
meaning: adj. 极好的，卓越的
exampleTranslation: 厨师为我们准备了一顿超级美味的餐。

example: The investigation only scratched the surface, it was very superficial.
meaning: adj. 肤浅的；表⾯的；表⽪的
exampleTranslation: 调查只是走个过场，非常肤浅。

example: His skills are superior to mine.
meaning: adj. 更好的；级别更⾼的；⾼傲的 n. 上级，上司
exampleTranslation: 他的技能比我优秀

example: Her superiority in ski racing made her a celebrity in her hometown.
meaning: n. 优越，优势；优越感，骄傲⾃⼤
exampleTranslation: 她在滑雪比赛中的优越性使她在家乡成为了名人。

example: He supervised the construction of the new bridge.
meaning: vt. vi. 监督，管理，指导，主管
exampleTranslation: 他监督了新桥的建设。

example: His rude remarks were the trigger for her anger.
meaning: n. 扳机；触发器；起因，诱因 vt. 引起，触发
exampleTranslation: 他粗鲁的评论激发了她的愤怒。

example: His victory in the competition was a personal triumph.
meaning: n. 成功，胜利；胜利的喜悦；典范 vi. 成功，获胜
exampleTranslation: 他在比赛中的胜利是个人的一次瑞雄。

example: I assure you that everything will be alright.
meaning: vt. 向…保证；弄清楚；确保
exampleTranslation: 我向你保证一切都会好起来的。

example: We have received an assurance from them that the goods will be delivered on time.
meaning: n. 担保，保证；把握；(⼈寿) 保险
exampleTranslation: 我们收到了他们的保证，货物将准时送达。

example: The magician's tricks never fail to astonish the children.
meaning: vt. 使吃惊，使惊讶
exampleTranslation: 魔术师的把戏总是能让孩子们惊讶不已。

example: The party had a festive atmosphere.
meaning: n. ⽓氛；⼤⽓层；空⽓；情调
exampleTranslation: 这个派对的气氛很热闹。

example: The student council planned a school trip for the entire grade.
meaning: n. 地⽅议会；委员会
exampleTranslation: 学生会为全年级的同学计划了一次学校旅行。

example: I seek your counsel on this matter.
meaning: n. 忠告，建议；辩护律师 vt. 建议，劝告；提供专业咨询
exampleTranslation: 我在此事上寻求你的建议。

example: The movie creates drama through strong performances and atmospheric cinematography.
meaning: n. 戏，剧，戏剧艺术；戏剧性事件
exampleTranslation: 电影通过强烈的表演和富有氛围的摄影创造了戏剧张力。

example: The movie has a dramatic ending which left the audience in suspense.
meaning: adj. 急剧的；激动⼈⼼的；戏剧的
exampleTranslation: 这部电影的结局充满戏剧性，让观众悬念重重。

example: Many companies are exploiting the intern's cheap labor.
meaning: vt. 剥削；利⽤；开采 n. 英勇的⾏为
exampleTranslation: 许多公司利用实习生的廉价劳动力。

example: We decided to explore the ancient ruins.
meaning: vt. vi. 探索，探测 vt. 探究，探讨
exampleTranslation: 我们决定探索古老的废墟。

example: I enjoy intellectual conversations with my friends.
meaning: adj. 智⼒的，脑⼒的；有才智的 n. 知识分⼦
exampleTranslation: 我喜欢和朋友们进行富有智慧的对话。

example: Her performance on the test showed a high level of intelligence.
meaning: n. 智⼒，理解⼒；情报，情报机构
exampleTranslation: 她在测试中的表现显示出了高度的智力。

example: My sister is very intelligent, she always gets good grades.
meaning: adj. 聪明的；有智⼒的；智能的
exampleTranslation: 我的姐姐非常聪明，她总是取得好成绩。

example: Her handwriting is barely intelligible.
meaning: adj. 可理解的，明⽩易懂的
exampleTranslation: 她的手写字几乎无法辨识。

example: He is a Polish immigrant.
meaning: vt. vi. 擦光，抛光 vt. 改善，润⾊ n. 抛光剂，亮光剂；抛光，擦亮
exampleTranslation: 他是一名波兰移民。

example: From my point of view, we need a break.
meaning: n. 观点；重点；特点；时刻；得分 n. 地点；尖端；意图，⽤处 vt. vi. 指向，瞄准 vi. 对着，朝向
exampleTranslation: 从我的角度来看，我们需要一个休息。

example: The new evidence will propel the case into the spotlight.
meaning: vt. 推动，激励；推进，推
exampleTranslation: 新的证据将把这个案件推入公众的视线。

example: Please use the proper tools for the job.
meaning: adj. 恰当的；像样的；得体的
exampleTranslation: 请使用适当的工具来做这项工作。

example: Her property portfolio includes homes in London and Dublin.
meaning: n. 财产，所有物；房地产；特性
exampleTranslation: 她的房产包括在伦敦和都柏林的房子。

example: The kitchen takes up a large proportion of the house.
meaning: n. 部分，份额；⽐例；匀称；规模
exampleTranslation: 厨房占了房子的大部分。

example: John's proposal for reforming the school system was very well-received.
meaning: n. 提议，提案；求婚
exampleTranslation: 约翰关于改革学校制度的提案得到了广泛的好评。

example: I propose that we delay our meeting until next week.
meaning: vt. 提议；打算；提出 (某观点等) vi. vt. 求婚
exampleTranslation: 我建议我们把会议推迟到下周。

example: His proposition sounds reasonable, but it would require a lot of work to implement.
meaning: n. 提议；主张；待处理的问题 vt. 向…求欢
exampleTranslation: 他的提议听起来很合理，但是实施起来需要做很多工作。

example: There is little prospect of a thaw in relations between the two countries.
meaning: n. 可能性；展望；前景，前途 vi. 勘探，探矿
exampleTranslation: 两国关系出现缓和的可能性甚微

example: Prospective students visited the campus today.
meaning: adj. 潜在的；可能发⽣的，预期的
exampleTranslation: 未来可能入学的学生今天参观了校园。

example: There's a strict protocol for meeting the Queen.
meaning: n. 礼节，礼仪；协议；治疗⽅案
exampleTranslation: 见到女王有严格的礼节规定

example: The damaged photo was skillfully restored.
meaning: vt. 恢复；修复，使复原；归还
exampleTranslation: 那张破损的照片被巧妙地恢复了。

example: I had to restrain myself from shouting at him.
meaning: vt. 制⽌，阻⽌；克制，抑制
exampleTranslation: 我必须控制自己不对他大声喊叫。

example: Exercise restraint when dealing with difficult issues.
meaning: n. 克制，抑制；限制；安全装置
exampleTranslation: 在处理难题时要保持克制

example: Some areas are restricted to authorized personnel only.
meaning: vt. 限制，约束
exampleTranslation: 某些区域只限于授权人员进入。

example: I attached a photo to the email.
meaning: vt. 附上，系上，贴上；认为…具有 vi. vt. (使) 与…有关联
exampleTranslation: 我在邮件中附加了一张照片。

example: The soldiers were ordered to attack at dawn.
meaning: n. 攻击，袭击；抨击；(疾病) 发作 vi. vt. 攻击，袭击 vt. 抨击；破坏，侵蚀；解决 (问题) vi. (在⾜球等⽐赛中) 进攻
exampleTranslation: 士兵们被命令在黎明时分发动攻击。

example: It took her many years to attain her goal.
meaning: vt. 获得，赢得；达到
exampleTranslation: 经历了很多年，她终于达到了她的目标。

example: I will attempt to fix the car by myself.
meaning: vt. 尝试，试图 n. 尝试，试图；谋杀企图
exampleTranslation: 我将尝试自己修理汽车。

example: I will attend the meeting tomorrow.
meaning: vi. vt. 出席，参加 vt. 去 (学校等)；陪同；伴随 vi. 注意，专⼼；照顾
exampleTranslation: 我将参加明天的会议。

example: Pay attention to the teacher during the lecture.
meaning: n. 注意；关注；照料；殷勤；⽴正 int. 注意；⽴正
exampleTranslation: 在讲座期间要注意听老师讲课。

example: Her attitude towards work is very professional.
meaning: n. 态度，看法；我⾏我素的作⻛
exampleTranslation: 她对工作的态度非常专业。

example: His wicked sense of humour is one of his best attributes.
meaning: vt. 把…归因于；认为是…所作 n. 特性，属性
exampleTranslation: 他那恶俏的幽默感是他最好的一种属性

example: He stood in the court charged with drunk driving.
meaning: n. 法庭；出庭⼈员；球场；宫廷 vt. 讨好；试图获得；招致；求爱 vi. (男⼥) 恋爱
exampleTranslation: 他因醉驾站在法庭上

example: Common courtesy dictates that we should at least reply to the email.
meaning: n. 谦恭有礼的举⽌，礼貌 adj. 可免费使⽤的
exampleTranslation: 常规礼貌规定我们至少应该回复电子邮件。

example: We need to cover the swimming pool before it rains.
meaning: vt. 遮盖；覆盖；包括；够付；报道 vi. 遮掩，敷衍 n. 覆盖物；封⾯，封⽪
exampleTranslation: 我们需要在下雨前把游泳池盖起来。

example: Scientists are hoping to create a new vaccine.
meaning: vt. 创造，创作，创建；授予，册封
exampleTranslation: 科学家们希望研制出一种新型疫苗。

example: The artists were asked to produce a creative piece for the exhibition.
meaning: adj. 创造性的，有创造⼒的 n. 创意⼈员，创作者
exampleTranslation: 艺术家们被要求为展览创作一个富有创意的作品。

example: I have enough credit to buy this house.
meaning: n. 信贷；赞扬；信誉；学分；结余 vt. 把钱存⼊ (账⼾)；把…归功于
exampleTranslation: 我有足够的信用购买这栋房子。

example: The world is facing an energy crisis.
meaning: n. 危机；病危期，危急关头
exampleTranslation: 世界正在面临能源危机。

example: Can you drive me to the airport?
meaning: vi. vt. 开⻋，驾驶 vt. 驾⻋送 (⼈)；驱动；迫使；驱赶 n. 驱⻋旅⾏；⻋道；本能需求 n. (为达到某⽬的的) 努⼒，运动
exampleTranslation: 你能开车送我去机场吗？

example: I'm on a drug for high blood pressure.
meaning: n. 毒品；药物 vt. 给…服⿇醉剂
exampleTranslation: 我正在服用降血压的药。

example: We export a large quantity of coffee to the United States.
meaning: vt. vi. 出⼝，输出 n. 出⼝，输出；出⼝商品
exampleTranslation: 我们向美国出口大量的咖啡。

example: The journalist exposed the scandal in the government.
meaning: vt. 显露；揭露；使遭受；使体验
exampleTranslation: "记者揭露了政府的丑闻。"

example: Over exposure to the sun can damage the skin.
meaning: n. 暴露；揭露；接触；曝光
exampleTranslation: 长时间暴露在阳光下会损害皮肤。

example: I want to express my thoughts better.
meaning: vt. 表达，表现；显⽽易⻅；代表 adj. 快速的，快递的；明确的 n. 特快列⻋；快递服务
exampleTranslation: 我想更好地表达我的想法。Iwanttoexpressmythoughtsbetter.

example: His face was void of any expression.
meaning: n. 表达；表情，神情；措词，说法
exampleTranslation: 他的脸上没有任何表情。

example: Can we extend the meeting for another 30 minutes?
meaning: vt. 延⻓；扩⼤；舒展；提供 vi. 延伸，延续；适⽤于；使达到
exampleTranslation: 我们能将会议延长30分钟吗？

example: There is an extension to submit the assignment due to the holiday.
meaning: n. 扩⼤，延伸；扩建部分；延期 n. 电话分机
exampleTranslation: 由于假期，作业的提交期限有所延长。

example: She has conducted extensive research on this subject.
meaning: adj. ⼴阔的，⼤量的；⼴泛的
exampleTranslation: 她对这个主题进行了广泛的研究。

example: The extent of the damage is still unknown.
meaning: n. 程度，地步；范围，⾯积
exampleTranslation: 损坏的程度仍无法确定。

example: Every human has the right to be free.
meaning: n. ⼈，⼈类 adj. ⼈的，⼈类的；有⼈情味的
exampleTranslation: 每个人都有权自由。

example: The whole of humanity was shocked by the disaster.
meaning: n. ⼈类；⼈性；⼈道；⼈⽂学科
exampleTranslation: 整个人类对这场灾难感到震惊。

example: He is a humble man, who never shows off.
meaning: adj. 谦逊的；卑微的；不起眼的 vt. 使感到卑微；低声下⽓
exampleTranslation: 他是一个很谦逊的人，从不炫耀。

example: I intend to spend the night at my grandmother's house.
meaning: vi. vt. 计划，打算，想要 vt. 意指，意思是
exampleTranslation: 我打算在外婆家过夜。

example: Her intention was to finish the project before the deadline.
meaning: n. 意图，打算
exampleTranslation: 她的意图是在截止日期之前完成项目。

example: She has an intense fear of flying.
meaning: adj. 强烈的；紧张激烈的；热切的
exampleTranslation: 她对飞行有极度的恐惧。

example: The intensity of the sun can cause a burn.
meaning: n. 强烈，剧烈；(光、声等的) 强度
exampleTranslation: 太阳的强烈可以导致晒伤。

example: He was undergoing intensive training for the Olympic Games.
meaning: adj. 密集的，强化的；(农业) 集约的
exampleTranslation: 他正在进行为奥运会的密集训练。

example: It's important for children to interact with each other.
meaning: vi. 互动，交流；相互作⽤
exampleTranslation: 儿童之间的互动是非常重要的。

example: Social intercourse is an indispensable part of life.
meaning: n. 性交；交流，交往，交际
exampleTranslation: 社交是生活不可或缺的一部分。

example: He has a keen interest in photography.
meaning: n. 兴趣；趣味；爱好；利息；利益 vt. 使感兴趣，使关注
exampleTranslation: 他对摄影有着极大的兴趣。

example: We decorated the interior of our house.
meaning: n. 内部；内地，内陆；内政 adj. 内部的
exampleTranslation: 我们装修了我们房子的内部。

example: The internal structure of the building is very complex.
meaning: adj. 国内的；内部的；体内的
exampleTranslation: 这个建筑的内部结构很复杂。

example: This is a matter of international concern.
meaning: adj. 国际的 n. 国际体育⽐赛
exampleTranslation: 这是一个引起国际关注的问题

example: Can you interpret his behavior?
meaning: vt. 解释，说明；把…理解为 vi. vt. ⼝译
exampleTranslation: 你能解释他的行为吗？

example: I always lose my keys in the house.
meaning: vt. 丢失；丧失；被夺去；使不理解 vt. vi. 输掉 (⽐赛等)；(使) 失去
exampleTranslation: 我总是在家里找不到钥匙。

example: I feel a profound sense of loss.
meaning: n. 丧失，损失；亏损；逝世；失利
exampleTranslation: 我感到深深的失落。

example: The plane is flying very low.
meaning: adj. 低的；低声的；低等的 adv. 低；低于通常⽔平；低声地 n. 低点，低⽔平；低⾕
exampleTranslation: 飞机飞得很低。

example: They decided to lower the price of the product.
meaning: adj. 下⾯的，下⽅的；在底部的 vt. 把…放低，使…降下 vt. vi. 减少，缩⼩，降低 vi. (天空或云) 变昏暗
exampleTranslation: 他们决定降低该产品的价格。

example: The pain is caused by a pinched nerve in my back.
meaning: n. 神经；紧张，焦虑；勇⽓；厚颜
exampleTranslation: 我的背部有个神经被压迫所致的疼痛。

example: She's always nervous before an exam.
meaning: adj. 紧张的；易紧张的；神经系统的
exampleTranslation: 她在考试前总是很紧张。

example: Nevertheless, he decided to go to work.
meaning: adv. 然⽽，尽管如此
exampleTranslation: 他觉得身体不适，然而，他还是决定去工作。

example: He was a pioneer in the field of biotechnology.
meaning: n. 先驱，先锋；开拓者，拓荒者 vt. 开创，倡导
exampleTranslation: 他是生物科技领域的先驱。

example: The plumbers replaced the rusted pipes in my house.
meaning: n. 管⼦，管道；烟⽃；管乐器 vt. ⽤管道输送 vt. vi. ⽤管乐器演奏；尖声地说
exampleTranslation: 水管工人替换了我家里生锈的管子。

example: The pirate seized control of the ship.
meaning: n. 海盗；盗版者；⾮法⼴播者 vt. 盗版，侵犯版权
exampleTranslation: 海盗夺取了船的控制权。

example: He reached into his pocket and pulled out a pistol.
meaning: n. ⼿枪
exampleTranslation: 他将手伸进口袋，掏出了一把手枪。

example: Watch out for the pit in the ground.
meaning: n. 深坑；煤矿井；果核；乐池 vt. 使有凹陷
exampleTranslation: 地面上有个坑，注意点。

example: He can pitch a baseball.
meaning: n. 球场；⾳⾼；沥⻘；宣传论点 vt. ⽤⼒扔；搭 (帐篷)；定⾳⾼ vi. vt. 投球；推销 vi. 颠簸，上下飘荡
exampleTranslation: 他可以投掷棒球。

example: The bubonic plague was a disaster in medieval Europe.
meaning: n. ⿏疫；瘟疫；灾害，祸患 vt. 困扰，折磨；纠缠，缠扰
exampleTranslation: 鼠疫在中世纪的欧洲是一场灾难。

example: The lion is the king of the plain.
meaning: adj. 清楚的；朴素的；坦率的 adj. 平凡的；纯⾊的 n. 平原 adv. 完全地，简直
exampleTranslation: 狮子是平原的王者。

example: The Earth is a planet in the solar system.
meaning: n. ⾏星；地球
exampleTranslation: 地球是太阳系中的一个行星。

example: There are many kinds of plants in the rainforest.
meaning: n. 植物；发电⼚，⼯⼚ vt. 栽种，种植
exampleTranslation: 雨林中有很多种类的植物。

example: Bananas are grown on large plantations.
meaning: n. (热带) 种植园；林场，⼈造林
exampleTranslation: 香蕉是在大型种植园上种植的。

example: Lay the paper on the table.
meaning: vt. 放置；铺放；涂，敷；摆放餐具 vt. vi. 下 (蛋)，产 (卵) adj. 外⾏的，⾮专业的；在俗的
exampleTranslation: 把纸放在桌子上。

example: Peel back the outer layer of the onion.
meaning: n. 层；层次，等级 vt. 分层放置
exampleTranslation: 剥去洋葱的外皮

example: For a layman, technical jargon can be difficult to understand.
meaning: n. 外⾏，⻔外汉；⾮神职⼈员
exampleTranslation: 对外行人来说，技术术语可能难以理解。

example: We will have to change the entire layout of the apartment.
meaning: n. 布局，设计
exampleTranslation: 我们将需要改变整个公寓的布局。

example: I've been training for my first marathon for months now.
meaning: n. ⻢拉松赛跑；⻢拉松式的活动 adj. ⻢拉松式的，耗时且累⼈的
exampleTranslation: 我已经为我的首次马拉松赛事训练了几个月。

example: The Statue of David was sculpted from a single block of marble.
meaning: n. ⼤理⽯；弹珠；弹⼦游戏
exampleTranslation: 大卫雕像是用一整块大理石雕刻而成的。

example: March is the third month of the year.
meaning: vi. vt. ⻬步⾛ vi. 前进；游⾏⽰威 vt. 使同⾏，强迫 (某⼈) ⼀起⾛ n. ⽰威游⾏；⾏军；推进；进⾏曲
exampleTranslation: 三月是一年中的第三个月。

example: Many animals are struggling to survive in the rapidly changing marine environment.
meaning: adj. 海洋的，海产的；海运的 n. 海军陆战队⼠兵
exampleTranslation: 许多动物在迅速变化的海洋环境中挣扎求生。

example: They've been happily married for 25 years.
meaning: adj. 已婚的；婚姻的；献⾝于…的
exampleTranslation: 他们已经幸福地结婚了25年。

example: You need to mark the correct answer.
meaning: vt. 标记；标明；纪念；标志着 vt. vi. 留下痕迹，弄脏；评分 n. 污渍；斑点；记号；分数；标志
exampleTranslation: 你需要标记正确的答案。

example: The cave was filled with marvellous stalactites.

example: I'm writing a thesis on the works of Shakespeare.
meaning: n. 论⽂，学位论⽂；命题，论点

example: The children's laughter was a delight to hear.

example: He was elected as mayor of the city.

example: This device has an electrical fault.

example: The electrician is debugging the power system.

example: My office is on the tenth floor, so I take the elevator to work every day.
meaning: n. 电梯；⾕仓；升降机

example: Many people emigrate to the United States in search of a better life.

example: The sun emits light and heat.

example: His conclusions were based on empirical data collected from various sources.

example: The entrance fee for the museum is ten dollars.
meaning: n. 费⽤

example: His body was feeble from hunger.
meaning: adj. 虚弱⽆⼒的；⽆效的，牵强的

example: His sudden death caused great grief to his poor mother.
