example: She was still grieving for her husband.
meaning: vi. vt. (因某⼈去世⽽) 悲伤，悲痛 vt. 使难过，使悲伤
exampleTranslation: 她仍然在为丈夫的离世而悲痛。

example: He grinned at me mischievously.
meaning: vi. vt. 露⻮⽽笑，咧嘴⼤笑 n. 露⻮的笑，咧嘴的笑
exampleTranslation: 他狡黠地向我露齿而笑。

example: You need to grind the coffee beans into a powder before brewing.
meaning: vt. 磨碎，碾碎；绞碎；把…磨锋利 vi. vt. 摩擦 (发出刺⽿声) n. 苦差事，令⼈疲惫的⼯作
exampleTranslation: 你要把咖啡豆磨成粉才能冲泡。

example: Our company has an office in Shanghai.
meaning: n. 办公室；要职；办事处；诊室
exampleTranslation: 我们公司在上海设有办公室。

example: The police officer arrested the criminal.
meaning: n. 军官；官员，⾼级职员；警官
exampleTranslation: 这个警察逮捕了罪犯。

example: The official language of China is Mandarin.
meaning: n. 官员，⾼级职员 adj. 公务的；官⽅的；官⽅公布的
exampleTranslation: 中国的官方语言是普通话。

example: I beg to differ with your opinion.
meaning: vi. vt. 恳求，哀求；乞讨，⾏乞
exampleTranslation: 我不同意你的观点。

example: He sat behind me in class.
meaning: prep. 在 (向)…后；⽐不上；⽀持 adv. 在后⾯；留在原处；拖⽋，拖延
exampleTranslation: 他坐在我后面。

example: Maybe there's a being out there made of energy.
meaning: n. 存在；⽣物 (尤指⼈)；⾝⼼
exampleTranslation: 也许有一个由能量构成的存在。

example: We all like ice cream.
meaning: det. pron. 所有，全部，⼀切，整个 adv. 完全；⾮常；太
exampleTranslation: 我们都喜欢冰淇淋。

example: The newspaper alleged the mayor's corrupt practices.
meaning: vt. 断⾔，声称，指控
exampleTranslation: 报纸声称市长有腐败行为。

example: Taking a hot bath can alleviate muscle soreness.
meaning: vt. 减轻，缓解 (痛苦等)
exampleTranslation: 泡个热水澡可以缓解肌肉酸痛。

example: Our company has formed an alliance with a leading software corporation.
meaning: n. 联合，结盟；结盟团体，联盟
exampleTranslation: 我们的公司已经和一个领先的软件公司结成了联盟。

example: The company gives each employee a travel allowance to cover their transportation costs.
meaning: n. 津贴，补助；零花钱；限额
exampleTranslation: 公司给每个员工发放旅行津贴，用以支付他们的交通费用。

example: Brass is an alloy of copper and zinc.
meaning: n. 合⾦ vt. 把…铸成合⾦
exampleTranslation: 黄铜是铜和锌的合金

example: We consider them as our strongest ally in the region.
meaning: n. 同盟国；⽀持者，盟友 vt. vi. 与…结盟，与…联合
exampleTranslation: 我们认为他们是我们在该地区最坚强的盟友。

example: He is living alone in the big city.
meaning: adj. adv. 独⾃，单独；孤独地；只
exampleTranslation: 他独自一人生活在大城市里。

example: He walks along the beach every morning.
meaning: prep. 沿着，顺着；在沿…的某处 adv. 向前；与…⼀起
exampleTranslation: 他每天早上都在海滩上散步。

example: They were walking alongside the road.
meaning: prep. 在…旁边；与…⼀起，与…同时 adv. 在旁边
exampleTranslation: 他们走在路的旁边。

example: She's teaching her son the alphabet.
meaning: n. 字⺟表
exampleTranslation: 她正在教她的儿子字母表。

example: The politician was quick to denounce the corruption within his party.
meaning: vt. 谴责，指责；告发
exampleTranslation: 政客很快公开谴责了他的党内的腐败行为。

example: The forest is too dense.
meaning: adj. 密集的；浓的；笨的；密度⼤的
exampleTranslation: 这个森林太茂密了

example: This material has a high density.
meaning: n. 密度
exampleTranslation: 这种材料密度很大。

example: He is a good fellow.
meaning: adj. 同伴的，同类的 n. ⼩伙⼦；同事，伙伴；研究员
exampleTranslation: 他是个好人。

example: He was awarded a fellowship for his research in molecular biology.
meaning: n. 友谊，交情；团体，协会 n. 研究⽣奖学⾦；(⼤学的) 研究员
exampleTranslation: 他因其在分子生物学研究中的工作而获得了奖学金。

example: She is the only female in her office.
meaning: adj. ⼥性的；雌的，⺟的 n. ⼥性；雌性动植物
exampleTranslation: 她是办公室里唯一的女性。

example: She has a very feminine voice.
meaning: adj. ⼥性的，⼥性化的；阴性的
exampleTranslation: 她的声音非常女性化。

example: The house has a wooden fence around it.
meaning: n. 栅栏，篱笆，围栏；销赃犯 vt. (⽤栅栏、篱笆) 围住，隔开 vi. 参加击剑运动；搪塞，回避
exampleTranslation: 这个房子周围有一堵木制的篱笆。

example: The ferry departs from the pier on the hour.
meaning: n. 渡船，渡轮 vt. vi. 渡运，运送，摆渡
exampleTranslation: 渡轮每时每刻都从码头出发。

example: Could you fetch me a glass of water?
meaning: vt. 去拿，去取，去接；售得
exampleTranslation: 能给我拿杯水来吗？

example: He was laid up with a fever.
meaning: n. 发烧；热病；激动不安；狂热
exampleTranslation: 他因为发热病而卧床

example: He had to heave the bag onto his shoulder.
meaning: vt. vi. (⽤⼒) 举起，拖，拉，抛 vi. 起伏；恶⼼，想吐 vt. 深叹，⻓舒(⼀⼝⽓) n. 举，拖，拉，抛；起伏
exampleTranslation: 他不得不把包扔到肩上

example: They believe that they will go to heaven after they die.
meaning: n. 天堂，极乐之地；天空
exampleTranslation: 他们相信他们会在死后去天堂。

example: He lifted the heavy box with all his strength.
meaning: adj. 重的；程度⼤的；厚的；费⼒的
exampleTranslation: 他全力举起了那只重箱子。

example: There's an indoor swimming pool in the hotel.
meaning: adj. 室内的，⼾内的
exampleTranslation: 酒店内有一个室内游泳池。

example: The medication can induce sleep.
meaning: vt. 引诱，劝说；引起，导致；催产
exampleTranslation: 这种药物可以诱导睡眠。

example: She often indulges in a good book on weekends.
meaning: vt. vi. (使⾃⼰) 沉迷 (于) vt. 满⾜ (欲望等)；纵容，迁就
exampleTranslation: 她经常在周末沉溺于一本好书之中。

example: Your kindness made a big difference to me in my time of need.
meaning: n. 仁慈，善良；友好的举动
exampleTranslation: 刚好我那时候需要帮助，你的善良对我影响很大。

example: The King has ultimate authority in his kingdom.
meaning: n. 国王；…之王
exampleTranslation: 国王在他的王国里有着最高的权威。

example: The kingdom was in a state of turmoil because of the king's sudden death.
meaning: n. 王国；(动物、植物、矿物) 界
exampleTranslation: 王国因国王的突然去世而陷入混乱。

example: I bought a first-aid kit for our home.
meaning: n. 成套⼯具；配套元件；全套装备
exampleTranslation: 对应的中文意思为：我为我们家买了一个急救包。

example: Please wipe your feet on the mat before entering the house.
meaning: n. ⼩地毯；厚软垫；衬垫；团，簇
exampleTranslation: 请在进房子前在垫子上擦干净你的脚。

example: The match between the two teams was intense.
meaning: n. ⽕柴；⽐赛；相配的⼈或物 vt. vi. 般配，和…相配；相⼀致 vt. 配对；与…相匹敌
exampleTranslation: 两队之间的比赛非常激烈。

example: May I go to the park?
meaning: modal. 可能，也许；可以 n. ⼭楂花
exampleTranslation: 我可以去公园吗？

example: The Mayor will open the new library next week.
meaning: n. 市⻓，镇⻓
exampleTranslation: 市长将在下周开放新的图书馆。

example: The bird built a nest in the tree.
meaning: n. ⻦巢；巢⽳；家；⼀套物件 vi. 筑巢，巢居
exampleTranslation: 那只鸟在树上筑了一个巢。

example: He caught a butterfly with a net.
meaning: n. ⽹；因特⽹；⽹眼织物；球⻔⽹ adj. 净赚的；净重的；最后的 vt. 净赚；成功获取；⽤⽹捕捉
exampleTranslation: 他用网捉了一只蝴蝶。

example: Our company is working relentlessly to expand its business network.
meaning: n. ⽹络；关系⽹；⼴播⽹，电视⽹ vt. (使)(计算机) 联⽹ vi. 建⽴⼯作关系，交际
exampleTranslation: 我们的公司正在不懈努力来扩大其商业网络。

example: The country remained neutral during the war.
meaning: adj. 中⽴的；中性的；素净的 n. (汽⻋排档) 空档；中⽴者
exampleTranslation: 这个国家在战争期间保持中立。

example: I bought a new car.
meaning: adj. 新的；新来的；新开始的
exampleTranslation: 我买了一辆新车。

example: The news report seems to omit some important details.
meaning: vt. 省略，遗漏；未 (做)
exampleTranslation: 这篇新闻报道似乎遗漏了一些重要的细节。

example: The window is made of opaque glass.
meaning: adj. 不透明的；(⽂字或演讲) 难懂的
exampleTranslation: 这个窗户是由不透明的玻璃制成的。

example: They conducted an optical experiment in the laboratory.
meaning: adj. 视⼒的，光的，光学的
exampleTranslation: 他们在实验室进行了一项光学实验。

example: I need to plaster the cut on my arm.
meaning: n. 灰泥；⽯膏；膏药，护创㬵布 vt. 给…涂抹；把头发梳平；贴满
exampleTranslation: 我需要在我胳膊上的切口处贴上创可贴。

example: Be sure to recycle your plastic bottles.
meaning: n. 塑料，塑㬵；信⽤卡 adj. 塑料的；可塑的；不⾃然的
exampleTranslation: 一定要回收你的塑料瓶。

example: The plate slipped from his hand and smashed into pieces on the floor.
meaning: n. 盘；⼀盘；⾦属牌；⻋牌；板块 vt. 电镀
exampleTranslation: 他手中的盘子滑落打碎在地板上。

example: The Tibetan Plateau in China is the highest plateau in the world.
meaning: n. ⾼原；平稳时期，停滞时期 vi. 达到稳定时期
exampleTranslation: 中国的青藏高原是世界上最高的高原。

example: There's a new social media platform that specializes in sharing food reviews.
meaning: n. 平台；站台，⽉台；讲台，舞台 n. 纲领，政纲
exampleTranslation: 有一个新的社交媒体平台，专门分享食品评价。

example: The children play in the park every afternoon.
meaning: vi. vt. 玩耍；参加；演奏；播放 vt. 捉弄，戏弄；扮演；发挥作⽤ vi. 佯装，假装 n. 玩耍；戏剧，剧本；活动，影响
exampleTranslation: 孩子们每天下午在公园玩耍。

example: We need to refine our strategy to succeed.
meaning: vt. 提炼，精炼；改善，改良
exampleTranslation: 我们需要提炼我们的策略以取得成功。

example: Please refrain from smoking in the public areas.
meaning: vi. 克制，忍住，避免 n. 陈词滥调；副歌，叠句
exampleTranslation: 请避免在公共区域抽烟。

example: The cave provided a refuge from the storm.
meaning: n. 庇护，避难；避难所，收容所
exampleTranslation: 这个洞穴是风暴的避难所。

example: Thousands of refugees fled from the war-torn country.
meaning: n. 难⺠，避难者
exampleTranslation: 成千上万的难民从饱受战火摧残的国家中逃出。

example: I would like to request a refund for this item.
meaning: n. 退款，归还⾦额 vt. 退 (款)
exampleTranslation: 我想要为这个物品申请退款。

example: He gave a flat refusal to my proposal.
meaning: n. 拒绝，回绝，不接受
exampleTranslation: 他断然拒绝了我的提议。

example: I refuse to engage in a pointless argument.
meaning: vi. vt. 拒绝 vt. 推却，不接受；拒绝给予，不准 n. 废物，垃圾
exampleTranslation: 我拒绝进行毫无意义的争论。

example: They sat in a circle and discussed the plan.
meaning: n. 圆，圆形；圈，环；圈⼦，阶层 vi. vt. 盘旋，环⾏，绕…转圈 vt. 围绕…画圈
exampleTranslation: 他们围成一圈，讨论计划。

example: The electrician discovered a fault in the circuit.
meaning: n. 环⾏ (路线)；电路；巡回活动
exampleTranslation: 电工发现电路里有故障。

example: They sat around a circular table.
meaning: adj. 圆形的；循环的；循环论证的 n. ⼴告印刷品
exampleTranslation: 他们围坐在一张圆桌旁。

example: These coins no longer circulate in the marketplace.
meaning: vi. vt. 循环，流通；流传，散布 vt. 传递，传阅 vi. (在聚会上) 往来应酬
exampleTranslation: 这些硬币在市场上已经不再流通。

example: Every citizen should have the right to freedom of speech.
meaning: n. 公⺠；居⺠，市⺠
exampleTranslation: 每个公民都应有言论自由的权利。

example: The country is on the brink of a civil war.
meaning: adj. 公⺠的，国内的；⺠⽤的 adj. ⺠法的；⽂明的
exampleTranslation: 这个国家正处于内战的边缘。

example: The war caused immense suffering to the civilian population.
meaning: n. 平⺠，百姓 adj. ⺠⽤的，平⺠的，⾮军⽤的
exampleTranslation: 这场战争给平民造成了巨大的痛苦。

example: We need to civilize our children with good manners.
meaning: vt. 教化，使开化
exampleTranslation: 我们需要使我们的孩子具备良好的礼仪以使其文明。

example: The ancient Roman Empire is often regarded as a pinnacle of civilization.
meaning: n. ⽂明；⽂明国家；⽂明社会
exampleTranslation: 古罗马帝国经常被视为文明的巅峰。

example: A goat is eating grass in the field.
exampleTranslation: 山羊在田野里吃草。

example: He's not interested in gold.
exampleTranslation: 他对金子并不感兴趣。

example: The golden sun was sinking in the west.
meaning: adj. ⾦的；⾦⾊的；绝好的
exampleTranslation: 金黄色的太阳西沉。

example: She made a grab for the fruit.
meaning: vt. vi. 抓住，夺取；抓住 (机会) vi. (试图) 抓住，夺取 vt. (尤指匆忙地) 取，吃，喝；抢占
exampleTranslation: 她抓起了水果。

example: As a dancer, she moved with grace and precision.
meaning: n. (动作) 优雅；⽂雅；⻛度；恩典 n. 宽限期；阁下 vt. 为…增⾊；使⽣辉，承蒙光临
exampleTranslation: 作为一名舞者，她的动作充满优雅和精确。

example: The swan moved in a graceful manner across the lake.
meaning: adj. 优美的，优雅的
exampleTranslation: 天鹅在湖面上优雅地游动。

example: He is a gracious host.
meaning: adj. 和蔼慈祥的；尊贵的；舒适的 int. (表惊讶、不满) 天哪
exampleTranslation: 他是一个有礼的主人。

example: I had a chat with my boss today about my future in the company.
meaning: vi. 闲聊，聊天 n. 闲聊，聊天
exampleTranslation: 我今天跟我的老板聊了聊我在公司的未来。

example: This bike is fixed with a rusty chain.
meaning: n. 链条；⼀连串；连锁店 vt. ⽤链⼦捆住，拴住
exampleTranslation: 这辆自行车用锈迹斑斑的链条固定着。

example: Please take a seat on the chair.
meaning: n. 椅，椅⼦；主席；系主任 vt. 主持，担任 (会议等的) 主席
exampleTranslation: 请在椅子上坐下。

example: He was elected chairman of the committee.
meaning: n. (委员会) 主席；(会议) 主持⼈
exampleTranslation: 他被选为委员会主席。

example: He was sitting in his chamber and reading a book.
meaning: n. 房间；会议厅；议院 n. 腔，室
exampleTranslation: 他正在他的房间里坐着读书。

example: Let's toast to your success with a glass of champagne.
meaning: n. ⾹槟
exampleTranslation: 让我们举杯祝贺你的成功

example: John was the champion of the boxing match.
meaning: n. 冠军；拥护者，捍卫者 vt. 拥护，捍卫
exampleTranslation: 约翰是拳击比赛的冠军。

example: There is complete chaos whenever the school bell rings for lunch.
meaning: n. 混乱，⽆秩序状态
exampleTranslation: 每当学校的午餐铃响起时，都会陷入一片混乱。

example: Please read Chapter 3 before the next class.
meaning: n. (书的) 章，篇；阶段，时期
exampleTranslation: 请在下节课前阅读第三章。

example: The billionaire made a substantial charity to the hospital.
meaning: n. 慈善机构；慈善；救济；仁爱
exampleTranslation: 亿万富翁向医院进行了大额慈善捐赠。

example: The professor explained the new concept by drawing a chart.
meaning: n. 图表；(唱⽚销量) 排⾏榜；海图 vt. 记录，跟踪 (进展)；制定计划
exampleTranslation: 教授通过画图表来讲解新的概念。

example: The company will charter six buses for the picnic.
meaning: n. 章程，宪章；特许状；包租 vt. 包租 (⻜机、船只等) adj. (⻜机、船只等) 包租的
exampleTranslation: 公司将为野餐租赁六辆巴士。

example: He was standing on the deck of his boat.
meaning: n. 甲板；(⻋、船的) 层；⼀副 (牌) n. ⽊质平台；(录⾳机的) ⾛带装置 vt. 装饰，装点
exampleTranslation: 使用在船艇的语境

example: The government made a declaration of war.
meaning: n. 宣布，宣⾔，声明；申报 (单)
exampleTranslation: 政府发表了宣战声明。

example: The president will declare a state of emergency.
meaning: vt. 宣布，宣称；申报
exampleTranslation: 总统将宣布进入紧急状态。

example: She is best known for her good deeds.
meaning: n. ⾏为；契约
exampleTranslation: 她因其善行而闻名。

example: If a borrower defaults on their mortgage, the bank can seize the property.
meaning: n. 默认，系统设定值；违约 vi. 违约，不履⾏；默认，预设
exampleTranslation: 如果借款人违约不支付抵押款，银行可以没收该物业。

example: Our team will never accept defeat.
meaning: vt. 击败，战胜；挫败，使落空 n. 战败，失利；击败，战胜
exampleTranslation: 我们的队伍永不接受失败。

example: He decided to defect to the enemy.
meaning: n. 缺点，缺陷，瑕疵 vi. 背叛，变节，倒⼽
exampleTranslation: 他决定背叛转投敌对方。

example: Due to the deficiency of rainfall this year, we'll have to be conservative with our water usage.
meaning: n. 缺乏，不⾜；缺陷
exampleTranslation: 由于今年降雨量的缺乏，我们必须节约用水。

example: The company has been running a deficit for the past three years.
meaning: n. 逆差，亏损，⾚字；缺乏，不⾜
exampleTranslation: 过去三年里，这家公司一直处于亏损状态。

example: His friends were a degenerate and corrupt group.
meaning: vi. 恶化，衰退，堕落 adj. 堕落的，腐化的 n. 堕落的⼈，腐化的⼈
exampleTranslation: 他的朋友们是一群堕落腐败的人。

example: Either choice will lead to success.
meaning: det. pron. 两者中的任何⼀个 (或每⼀个) adv. (⽤于否定句中) 也 conj. 要么…要么
exampleTranslation: 两个选项都会带来成功

example: Press the button to eject the disc from your computer.
meaning: vt. 把…逐出，驱逐 vt. vi. 弹出，喷出，射出
exampleTranslation: 按下按钮，从你的电脑中弹出光盘。

example: Several hours elapsed before the news was widely disseminated.
meaning: vi. (时间) 流逝
exampleTranslation: 在新闻被广泛传播之前，好几个小时已经过去了。

example: The band of my pants is elastic, it can fit me well even if I gain some weight.
meaning: n. 弹性材料，松紧带 adj. 有弹性的；灵活的，能变通的
exampleTranslation: 我裤子的腰带是弹性的，即使我增加了一些体重，它也能很好地适应我。

example: The doctor asked me to bend my elbow.
meaning: n. 肘；(⾐服的) 肘部 vt. ⽤肘推
exampleTranslation: 医生让我弯曲我的手肘。

example: It is not feasible to put most of the plans in operation.
meaning: adj. 可⾏的，⾏得通的
exampleTranslation: 实施大部分计划是不可能的。

example: We held a grand feast for our guests.
meaning: n. 盛宴；宗教节⽇；特别的享受 vi. 尽情享⽤ (美味佳肴)
exampleTranslation: 我们为我们的客人准备了一场盛大的宴会。

example: The bird has beautiful, colorful feathers.
exampleTranslation: 这只鸟有漂亮的，多彩的羽毛。

example: The ice skater seemed to glide effortlessly across the rink.
meaning: vi. 滑⾏，滑动；滑翔 n. 滑⾏，掠过，滑翔
exampleTranslation: 那位冰上滑行者看起来在溜冰场中毫不费力地滑行。

example: The room was dark and gloomy.
meaning: adj. 昏暗的；沮丧的；前景黯淡的
exampleTranslation: 房间阴暗而沉闷。

example: He won the match and basked in the glory.
meaning: n. 荣誉，光荣；壮丽，辉煌
exampleTranslation: 他赢得了比赛并沐浴在荣耀之中

example: The soldiers were received with glorious acclaim upon their return.
meaning: adj. 辉煌的；壮丽的；美好的
exampleTranslation: 士兵们返回时受到了盛大的欢迎。

example: Please pass me the glue.
meaning: n. 㬵，㬵⽔ vt. 㬵合，黏合
exampleTranslation: 请把胶水递给我。

example: The headline news shocked the world.
meaning: n. (报纸的) ⼤字标题；重要新闻 vt. 以…为标题，以…为主要故事 vt. vi. (演出等中的) 主演，主唱
exampleTranslation: 这个头条新闻震惊了全世界。

example: The company's headquarters is located in New York.
meaning: n. 总部，总公司，指挥部
exampleTranslation: 公司的总部位于纽约。

example: I have a hearing test next week.
meaning: n. 听⼒，听觉；听证会，审理
exampleTranslation: 我下周有个听力测试。

example: My heart beats for you.
meaning: n. ⼼脏；内⼼；重点；中央；⼼形
exampleTranslation: 我心为你跳动。

example: We turned on the air conditioning because of the intense heat.
meaning: n. 热；热度；炎热天⽓；供暖 vt. vi. 加热，(使) 变暖
exampleTranslation: 因为热得难受，我们开了空调。

example: He is a member of the local golf club.
meaning: n. 成员，会员，…的⼀分⼦
exampleTranslation: 他是本地高尔夫俱乐部的成员。

example: Your gym membership expires in one week.
meaning: n. 会员⾝份；全体会员
exampleTranslation: 你的健身房会员资格将在一周内到期。

example: The rapid spread of the virus is a menace to public health.
meaning: n. 危险的事物 (⼈)；威胁；捣蛋⻤ vt. 危及，威胁到
exampleTranslation: 病毒的快速传播对公共健康构成威胁。

example: I need to mend my broken bicycle before I can ride it again.
meaning: vt. 修理，修补；解决 (争端) vi. vt. 愈合，康复，治愈
exampleTranslation: 我需要修理我的破自行车，然后我才能再次骑它。

example: Many people were persecuted for their religious beliefs in the past.
meaning: vt. 迫害，残害，压迫；骚扰，打扰
exampleTranslation: 很多人在过去因为宗教信仰而遭到迫害。

example: Despite the difficulties, she decided to persevere with her job.
meaning: vi. 坚持不懈，锲⽽不舍
exampleTranslation: 尽管有困难，她决定坚持她的工作。

example: We must persist in our efforts to reduce pollution.
meaning: vi. vt. 顽强坚持，执着 vi. 持续，延续
exampleTranslation: 我们必须坚持我们减少污染的努力。

example: Try to persuade him to come along with us.
meaning: vt. 劝说，说服；使信服，使相信
exampleTranslation: 试图说服他和我们一起来。

example: Her parents needed a lot of persuasion before they agreed to let her go to Europe alone.
meaning: n. 说服，劝服；信仰，信念
exampleTranslation: 她的父母需要很多的说服才同意让她一个人去欧派。

example: We need to call an exterminator to deal with the pest infestation in our basement.
meaning: n. 害⾍，有害动物；讨厌⻤
exampleTranslation: 我们需要找杀虫工处理我们地下室的害虫问题。

example: I need to fill up my car with petrol.
meaning: n. 汽油
exampleTranslation: 我需要给我的车加满汽油。

example: Petroleum products are essential for the operation of industries.
meaning: n. ⽯油
exampleTranslation: 石油产品是工业运作的必需品。

example: I think it's rather petty of you to complain about such a trivial matter.
meaning: adj. 琐碎的，不重要的；⼩⽓的
exampleTranslation: 我认为你们对如此琐碎的事情发牢骚实在是太小气了。

example: Can you answer the phone, please?
meaning: n. 电话，⼿机 vi. vt. 打电话
exampleTranslation: 请你能接电话吗？

example: He has a pile of homework to do.
meaning: n. 摞，堆；⼤量，许多 vt. 堆放，摞起；放置，装⼊ vi. (许多⼈) 蜂拥，涌⼊
exampleTranslation: 他有一堆作业要做。

example: The pilgrim traveled a long distance to visit the holy shrine.
meaning: n. 朝圣者；清教徒前辈移⺠
exampleTranslation: 朝圣者长途跋涉去访问圣地。

example: He takes a sleeping pill every night to help him sleep.
meaning: n. 药丸，药⽚ vi. (⽑织⾐服) 起球，结绒
exampleTranslation: 他每晚都吃一片安眠药以帮助他睡觉。

example: The old building was held up by huge stone pillars.
exampleTranslation: 那座老建筑被巨大的石柱支撑着。

example: He's a pilot for a major airline.
meaning: n. ⻜⾏员；领航员；试播节⽬ vt. 驾驶，为…引航；试⾏ adj. 试验性的，试点的
exampleTranslation: 他是一家大型航空公司的飞行员。

example: They had a quarrel about money.
meaning: n. 争吵，吵架；不同意的原因 vi. 争吵，吵架
exampleTranslation: 他们因为钱财问题而发生争吵。

example: Could you give me a quart of milk, please?
meaning: n. 夸脱 (英美容量或液量单位)
exampleTranslation: 请你给我一夸脱牛奶好吗？

example: The apple was cut into quarters.
meaning: n. 四分之⼀；⼀刻钟；季度；群体
exampleTranslation: 苹果被切成了四分之一。

example: Be careful not to slip on the icy sidewalk.
meaning: vi. 滑倒；滑落；溜⾛；变差；陷⼊ vt. 悄悄塞；摆脱，松开 vi. vt. (迅速且容易地) 穿或脱 n. 差错；纸条；滑倒；衬裙
exampleTranslation: 小心不要在结冰的人行道上滑倒。

example: The ground is slippery due to the rain, so we must watch our step.
meaning: adj. 滑溜溜的；狡猾的；模棱两可的
exampleTranslation: 由于雨水，地面很滑，所以我们必须小心走路。

example: The company's slogan is Powering the Future.
meaning: n. ⼝号，标语
exampleTranslation: 公司的标语是赋能未来。

example: The hill had a steep slope, which made it challenging to climb.
meaning: n. 斜坡，斜⾯；滑雪斜坡；坡度 vi. 倾斜，有坡度；悄悄⾛，溜⾛
exampleTranslation: 这座山的坡度很大，爬起来很有挑战性。

example: Insert the card into the slot.
meaning: n. 狭槽，投币⼝；时段，位置 vt. vi. 投放，(被) 塞进
exampleTranslation: 翻译为将卡插入插槽中。

example: He was born and raised in the slums of New York.
meaning: n. 贫⺠窟，贫⺠区 vi. 体验贫苦⽣活
exampleTranslation: 他出生并成长在纽约的贫民窟。

example: After the new competition entered the market, their sales went into a slump.
meaning: vi. 暴跌；猛地坐下 n. 暴跌；萧条期
exampleTranslation: 在新竞争者进入市场后，他们的销售量出现了滑坡。

example: The ball could smash the window.
meaning: vt. vi. 打碎，粉碎；(使) 猛撞；撞开 vt. 捣毁，打败 n. 破碎 (声)；扣球；⾛红的歌曲等
exampleTranslation: 这个球可能会砸碎窗户。

example: The city was enveloped in smog.
meaning: n. 雾霾，烟雾
exampleTranslation: 城市被烟雾包围。

example: The marble is smooth and cool to the touch.
meaning: adj. 光滑的；顺利的；平稳的 vt. 使平整，使光滑
exampleTranslation: 大理石触感光滑且凉爽。

example: He was caught trying to smuggle drugs into the country.
meaning: vt. ⾛私，偷运，偷偷携带
exampleTranslation: 他被抓住试图向国内走私毒品。

example: The grizzly bear is a powerful predator in the forests of North America.
meaning: vt. 承受，忍受；承担 (责任)；⽀撑 vt. 带有；⽣孩⼦；结果实 n. 熊
exampleTranslation: 北美森林里的灰熊是一种强大的捕食者。

example: He has a long, white beard.
meaning: n. 胡须，络腮胡⼦，(动物的) 须
exampleTranslation: 他的胡须又长又白。

example: Tonal differences have a significant bearing on the way the language is spoken.
meaning: n. 影响，关系；举⽌；⽅向；轴承
exampleTranslation: 这句话展示了“bearing”在语境中的用法。

example: He likes to rap about life in the city.
meaning: n. 说唱；急敲；坏名声 vi. vt. 敲击，击打
exampleTranslation: 他喜欢用说唱表达城市生活。

example: The suspect was arrested for the alleged rape.
meaning: vt. 强奸，强暴 n. 强奸罪
exampleTranslation: 涉嫌强奸的嫌疑人被逮捕了。

example: This new software provides a rapid solution for data loss.
meaning: adj. 快速的，迅速的
exampleTranslation: 这个新软件为数据丢失提供了快速的解决方案。

example: He developed a rash after eating seafood.
meaning: adj. 轻率的，鲁莽的 n. 疹⼦，⽪疹；⼤量，许多
exampleTranslation: 他吃了海鲜后长了皮疹。

example: The sushi is made from raw fish.
meaning: adj. ⽣的；未加⼯的；原始的
exampleTranslation: 寿司是用生鱼做的。

example: The morning ray broke through the window.
meaning: n. 光线，射线；⼀丝，少量；鳐
exampleTranslation: 早晨的阳光透过窗户照射进来。

example: The book is intended for the average reader.
meaning: n. 读者；读本，简易读物；阅读器
exampleTranslation: 这本书是为普通读者写的

example: She enjoys reading before bedtime.
meaning: n. 阅读；读物；(仪表的) 读数
exampleTranslation: 她喜欢在睡前阅读。

example: The teacher readily agreed to help us with our project.
meaning: adv. 轻⽽易举地；乐意地，欣然地
exampleTranslation: 老师很愿意帮助我们的项目。

example: The new technology opens up a whole new realm of possibilities.
meaning: n. 领域，范围；王国
exampleTranslation: 这项新技术开启了一整个全新的可能性领域。

example: Farmers are busy reaping the wheat in the fields.
meaning: vt. 获得，收获；收割 (庄稼)
exampleTranslation: 农民们正在田里忙着收割麦子。

example: The car was hit in the rear.
meaning: n. 后部 adj. 后⾯的，后部的 vt. 抚养，养育；饲养 vi. (尤指⻢) ⽤后腿直⽴；巍然耸⽴
exampleTranslation: 这辆车在后面被撞到了。

example: You need to bend the wire into a loop.
meaning: vi. vt. 弯腰，低头；(使) (四肢) 弯曲 vt. 使…弯曲，把…弄弯 n. 转弯处；减压病
exampleTranslation: 你需要把线弯成一个环。

example: There is a vast network of pipes beneath the city.
meaning: prep. 在…之下；配不上 (某⼈) adv. 在下⾯，往下
exampleTranslation: 城市下面有一个巨大的管道网络。

example: She sat down beside me.
meaning: prep. 在…旁边；和…相⽐
exampleTranslation: 她坐在我旁边。

example: Besides English, what other languages do you speak?
meaning: prep. 除…之外，此外 adv. ⽽且，再说；以及，也
exampleTranslation: 除了英语，你还会说哪些语言？

example: The microphone amplified his voice.
meaning: vt. 放⼤ (声⾳等) vi. vt. 详述，进⼀步阐述
exampleTranslation: 麦克风放大了他的声音。

example: The teacher used an excellent analogue to explain the complex concept, which made it easier for the students to understand.
meaning: adj. (技术) 模拟的；指针式的 n. 类似物，相似物
exampleTranslation: 这句话展示了“analogue”在语境中的用法。

example: The teacher drew an analogy between the heart and a pump.
meaning: n. 类⽐，相似处
exampleTranslation: 老师将心脏与泵进行了类比。

example: I will analyze the data collected from the survey.
meaning: vt. 分析，剖析，解析
exampleTranslation: 我将分析从调查中收集的数据。

example: The professor is giving a detailed analysis of the novel.
meaning: n. 分析；化验；精神分析
exampleTranslation: 教授正在给小说做详尽的分析。

example: His analytical mind was quite remarkable.
meaning: adj. 分析性的；(⽤科学⽅法) 分析的
exampleTranslation: 他的分析思维非常出色。

example: Inertia kept her sitting on the sofa, though she knew she should go out.
meaning: n. 惯性；缺乏活⼒，惰性
exampleTranslation: 惰性使她坐在沙发上，虽然她知道她应该出去。

example: The mother was cradling an infant in her arms.
meaning: n. 婴⼉；幼⼉学校的学⽣ adj. 供婴幼⼉⽤的；初期的，初创的
exampleTranslation: 母亲在怀中抱着一个婴儿。

example: The flu has infected many people this winter.
meaning: vt. 传染，使感染；(情绪等) 感染
exampleTranslation: 这个冬天很多人被流感感染了。

example: This infectious disease is spreading rapidly across the country.
meaning: adj. 传染的；有感染⼒的
exampleTranslation: "这种传染病正在全国迅速蔓延。"

example: The universe is considered infinite.
meaning: adj. ⽆限的，⽆边的，极⼤的
exampleTranslation: 宇宙被认为是无限的。

example: The government introduced policies to combat inflation.
meaning: n. 通货膨胀 (率)；充⽓，膨胀
exampleTranslation: 政府引入了抗击通货膨胀的政策。

example: War can inflict horrific physical and psychological damage.
meaning: vt. 使遭受，施加，造成 (伤害等)
exampleTranslation: 战争可能造成骇人的身心伤害。

example: He suffered a knee injury during the game.
meaning: n. 膝盖，膝关节；(裤⼦的) 膝部 vt. ⽤膝盖顶
exampleTranslation: 他在比赛中膝盖受伤了。

example: The man is expected to kneel when he proposes to his girlfriend.
meaning: vi. 跪下，跪着
exampleTranslation: 男人求婚时通常会跪下。

example: Turn the knob to open the door.
meaning: n. 旋钮；球形把⼿；疙瘩；⼩块
exampleTranslation: 旋转把手打开门。

example: He tied the knot tightly to make sure it wouldn't come undone.
meaning: n. 结；发髻；节疤；痉挛 vt. 把…打成结(或扎牢) vi. 缠结 vi. vt. (因害怕等⽽) 痉挛，使痉挛
exampleTranslation: 他紧紧地打了个结，以确保它不会松开。

example: My knowledge of the subject is limited.
meaning: n. 知识，学问；知悉，知情
exampleTranslation: 我对这个主题的了解有限。

example: The leaves are falling from the trees.
meaning: n. 树叶，叶⼦；(尤指书的) ⻚ vt. 匆匆翻阅，浏览
exampleTranslation: 树叶正在从树上落下。

example: They were handing out leaflets in the street.
meaning: n. 传单，⼩册⼦ vi. vt. 散发传单 (或⼩册⼦)
exampleTranslation: 他们在街上分发小册子。

example: The football league starts in September.
meaning: n. 联赛；联盟，同盟；级别；⾥格
exampleTranslation: 足球联赛九月份开始。

example: The pipe has a leak.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 渗漏；泄露 (秘密等)，⾛漏 vi. (⽓体或液体) 漏出 n. 漏洞，裂缝；泄露
exampleTranslation: 这个管子有漏洞

example: He had to lean the ladder against the wall to reach the top.
meaning: vi. 倾斜⾝体；倚靠；依靠 vt. 使斜靠 adj. 精瘦的；贫乏的；精⼲的
exampleTranslation: 他必须要把梯子靠在墙上才能够到顶部。

example: The deer took a huge leap over the fence.
meaning: vi. vt. 跳，跳跃 vi. 突然做某事；激增，猛涨 n. 跳，跳跃；激增，猛涨
exampleTranslation: 那只鹿跳过了篱笆，跳得非常高。

example: I signed a two-year lease on an apartment.
meaning: n. 租约，租契 vt. 租借，租⽤，出租
exampleTranslation: 我跟房东签订了一份两年的租约。

example: The jacket is made of genuine leather.
exampleTranslation: 这件夹克是真皮制成的。

example: As a mechanic, he's an expert in engine repair.
meaning: n. 技⼯；⼒学；机械学；机制
exampleTranslation: 作为一个修理工，他是发动机修理方面的专家。

example: She has a mechanical job on the assembly line.
meaning: adj. 机械的；机械般的；机械学的
exampleTranslation: 她在流水线上做一份机械工作。

example: The clock has a wooden mechanism.
meaning: n. 机械装置；⽅法，途径；机制
exampleTranslation: 这个钟表的机制是木制的。

example: My friends gave me the nickname 'Sparky' because of my lively personality.
meaning: n. 绰号，外号 vt. 给…取绰号
exampleTranslation: 因为我活泼的性格，我朋友给我取了个“火花”的昵称。

example: I was awakened by a nightmare.
meaning: n. 噩梦；令⼈恐怖的处境
exampleTranslation: 我被噩梦惊醒了。

example: His involvement with the project is purely nominal.
meaning: adj. 名义上的；象征性的，很少的
exampleTranslation: 他对这个项目的参与纯粹是名义上的。

example: The president will nominate a new ambassador to the United Nations.
meaning: vt. 提名；任命，指定
exampleTranslation: 总统将会任命新的联合国大使。

example: Music brings me great pleasure.
meaning: n. 愉快，满⾜；令⼈快乐的事
exampleTranslation: 音乐给我带来了极大的快乐。

example: I pledge to work harder in the future.
meaning: n. 誓⾔，保证，诺⾔；抵押品 vt. (使) 保证，(使) 发誓；抵押
exampleTranslation: 我承诺将来会更努力工作。

example: Water is plentiful in this region.
meaning: adj. 丰富的，充⾜的
exampleTranslation: 在这个地区水源丰富。

example: He felt in his pocket for his keys.
meaning: n. ⼝袋；财⼒；⼩块地区 vt. 把…放进⾐袋
exampleTranslation: 他在口袋里摸索他的钥匙。

example: The poison was kept in a locked cabinet.
meaning: n. 毒药，毒物；极有害的思想 vt. 毒害；下毒；使恶化
exampleTranslation: 毒药被放在上锁的柜子里。

example: The berries of this plant are highly poisonous.
meaning: adj. 有毒的；恶毒的
exampleTranslation: 这种植物的浆果非常有毒。

example: They regard him as the best player in the team.
meaning: vt. 认为，看待；注视，凝视 n. 关注，关⼼；尊重，敬佩；致意
exampleTranslation: 他们认为他是队里最好的球员。

example: The principal talked to the students regarding the school rules.
meaning: prep. 关于，⾄于
exampleTranslation: 校长和学生们谈论了关于校规的问题。

example: Regardless of the weather, the game will go on.
meaning: adv. 不管；不管怎样，⽆论如何
exampleTranslation: 无论天气如何，比赛都将进行下去。

example: The current political regime is very strict and rigid.
meaning: n. 政权，政体；组织⽅法；养⽣法
exampleTranslation: 当前的政治制度非常严格和坚硬。

example: Please register your name at the front desk.
meaning: vt. vi. 注册，登记；流露出；注意到 vt. vi. 显⽰ (读数)，记录 vt. (正式地) 发表意⻅；挂号邮寄 n. 登记表；⾳区；现⾦收纳机
exampleTranslation: 请在前台登记你的姓名。

example: The reign of King George V lasted for 26 years.
meaning: n. 君主统治时期；任期，当政期 vi. 统治，当政；成为最佳；盛⾏
exampleTranslation: 乔治五世国王的统治时期持续了26年。

example: The jockey pulled the reins to slow down his horse.
meaning: n. 缰绳；控制，主宰；保护带 vt. 控制
exampleTranslation: 骑师拉紧缰绳，让马慢下来。

example: We need to reinforce the river banks to prevent flooding.
meaning: vt. 加强，增强；加固；增援
exampleTranslation: 我们需要加强河堤以防洪。

example: The flight simulator is used to simulate real flight conditions for pilot training.
meaning: vt. 假装；(⽤计算机等) 模拟；冒充
exampleTranslation: 飞行模拟器被用来模拟真实的飞行条件，用于飞行员训练。

example: They received a simultaneous phone call from their daughter.
meaning: adj. 同步的，同时存在的
exampleTranslation: 他们同时接到了女儿的电话。

example: In many religions, it is considered a sin to steal.
meaning: n. 罪，罪孽；过错，恶⾏ vi. 犯戒律，犯过失
exampleTranslation: 在许多宗教中，偷窃被视为一种罪恶。

example: Your sincere apology is much appreciated.
meaning: adj. 由衷的，衷⼼的；真诚的
exampleTranslation: 我们很感激你真诚的道歉

example: I am a single man living in New York.
meaning: adj. 单个的；单⾝的；单⼈的 n. 单⼈房间；单程票；单曲 vt. 单独挑出
exampleTranslation: 我是一个在纽约独自生活的单身男人。

example: A singular noun refers to one person or thing.
meaning: adj. 单数的；⾮凡的；奇特的 n. 单数形式
exampleTranslation: 单数名词指的是一人或一物。

example: Don't load the boat too much, or it will sink.
meaning: vi. 下沉；(⼈) 倒下；降低 vt. 使下沉；挖，掘；埋⼊；使受挫 n. 洗碗槽；洗脸池 adj. 贫⺠窟的
exampleTranslation: 荷载过重就会使船沉下去

example: He took a quick sip of his coffee before resuming his work.
meaning: vi. vt. ⼩⼝地喝，抿 n. (饮料) ⼀⼩⼝
exampleTranslation: 他在继续工作前快速翻了一口咖啡。

example: Upon seeing the accident, he immediately dialed the police and soon the siren of a police car could be heard from afar.
meaning: n. 汽笛，警报器；塞壬 (⼥妖)
exampleTranslation: 他一看见事故就立即拨打了警察，不一会儿，就可以从远处听到警车的警笛声。

example: He held the tiny bird gently in his thumb and forefinger.
meaning: n. 拇指；(⼿套的) 拇指部分 vi. 快速翻阅 vi. vt. 翘起拇指请求搭乘；⽤拇指摸
exampleTranslation: 他用拇指和食指小心翼翼地握着那只小鸟。

example: The thunder was so loud that it shook the house.
meaning: n. 雷，雷声；轰隆声 vi. 打雷；轰隆隆地响；轰隆隆地动 vi. vt. 怒喝，⼤声斥责
exampleTranslation: 雷声如此震耳欲聋，以至于房子都在震动。

example: The tick of the clock was the only sound in the room.
meaning: vi. (钟表) 发出嘀嗒声 vt. 打钩，打对号 n. 嘀嗒声；对号；壁虱；⼀会⼉
exampleTranslation: 房间里唯一的声音是钟的滴答声。

example: I bought a ticket for the concert.
meaning: n. 票，券；彩票；罚款单；标签 vt. 售票；开交通违章罚单
exampleTranslation: 我买了一张音乐会的票。

example: His wealth was obtained through years of hard work.
meaning: n. 财富；⼤量
exampleTranslation: 他的财富是多年努力工作得来的。

example: He was born into a wealthy family.
meaning: adj. 富有的，富裕的
exampleTranslation: 他出生在一个富有的家庭。

example: He was accused of carrying a concealed weapon.
meaning: n. 武器，兵器；⼯具，⼿段
exampleTranslation: 他被指控藏有武器。

example: She learned how to weave a basket in her craft class.
meaning: vt. vi. 织，编；迂回⾏进，穿⾏ vt. 编造 (故事或设计)
exampleTranslation: 她在手工课上学会了如何编制篮子。

example: The web has transformed the way we work and communicate.
meaning: n. 蜘蛛⽹；⽹状物；万维⽹；蹼
exampleTranslation: 网络改变了我们工作和交流的方式。

example: He used a wedge to stop the door from closing.
meaning: n. 楔⼦，楔形物 vt. 将…挤⼊；把…楔牢
exampleTranslation: 他用一个楔子阻止门关上。

example: They hacked their way through the dense jungle.
meaning: n. 热带丛林；弱⾁强⻝的环境
exampleTranslation: 他们砍开茂密的丛林。

example: Turn right at the next junction.
meaning: n. 汇合点，交叉路⼝
exampleTranslation: 在下一个路口向右转。

example: As a junior employee, he still has a lot to learn.
meaning: adj. 级别 (或职位) 低的；⻘少年的 n. 职位较低者；⻘少年；⼤三学⽣
exampleTranslation: 作为一名初级员工，他还有很多需要学习。

example: The circus held a special show for its juvenile audience.
meaning: adj. 少年的；幼稚的；(动物) 幼⼩的 n. 少年；幼仔，雏⻦
exampleTranslation: 马戏团为少儿观众举办了一场特别的展示。

example: We decided to clean out our attic and throw away all the junk.
meaning: n. 废品，垃圾；垃圾⻝品；舢板 vt. 丢弃，抛弃，废弃
exampleTranslation: 我们决定清理阁楼，丢掉所有的废旧物品。

example: The truck drivers are unloading the goods from the truck.
meaning: vt. vi. 卸 (货)；倾诉，吐露，发泄 vt. 退出 (弹壳等)；推卸 (责任)
exampleTranslation: 卡车司机正在从卡车上卸货。

example: The upper floors of the building are for offices.
meaning: adj. 上⾯的；(靠) 上部的；上游的
exampleTranslation: 这个楼的上层是办公区。

example: He sat upright in his chair.
meaning: adj. 直⽴的；⽴式的；正直的 adv. 竖⽴地，直⽴地
exampleTranslation: 他坐在椅子上笔直。

example: The children are sleeping upstairs.
meaning: adv. 往楼上，在楼上 adj. 楼上的 n. ⼆楼及以上各层
exampleTranslation: 孩子们正在楼上睡觉。

example: The balloon is moving upward.
meaning: adj. 向上的；上升的，升⾼的 adv. 向上；上升地；(某数字) …以上
exampleTranslation: 气球正在向上移动。

example: Let's go skate at the park.
meaning: n. 溜冰鞋，旱冰鞋 vi. vt. 溜冰，滑冰 vi. 滑滑板
exampleTranslation: 我们去公园滑板吧。

example: She is going to ski down the hill.
meaning: n. 滑雪板，滑⽔板 adj. 滑雪的，滑⽔的 vi. 滑雪，滑⽔
exampleTranslation: 她打算滑下这座山。

example: She has excellent cooking skills.
meaning: n. 技能，技术
exampleTranslation: 她拥有出色的烹饪技巧。

example: He is very skilled in painting.
meaning: adj. 有技术的；需要特殊技能的
exampleTranslation: 他在绘画方面非常熟练。

example: John is a skillful painter, his artworks are loved by many people.
meaning: adj. 技术好的，熟练的；处理巧妙的
exampleTranslation: 约翰是一个技艺高超的画家，他的作品被许多人所喜爱。

example: The stone skims across the surface of the lake.
meaning: vt. 撇去 (液体上漂浮物)；惯偷⼩钱 vi. vt. 略读，浏览；掠过，滑过；盗取
exampleTranslation: 石头在湖面上滑过。

example: His skin is very smooth and soft.
meaning: n. ⽪肤；⽑⽪；果⽪，果壳 vt. 剥⽪，扒⽪；擦破⽪肤
exampleTranslation: 他的皮肤非常光滑柔软。

example: She often skips around in the garden.
meaning: vt. 不做 (应做的事)；悄悄溜⾛ vi. vt. 跳过，略过；跳绳 vi. 蹦跳地⾛ n. 蹦跳；废料桶
exampleTranslation: 她经常在花园里跳来跳去。

example: The archaeologists found a skull in the ruins.
meaning: n. 颅⻣，头⻣；脑袋，头脑
exampleTranslation: 考古学家在废墟中发现了一颗颅骨。

example: The skyscraper towers above all the surrounding buildings.
meaning: n. 摩天⼤楼
exampleTranslation: 这座摩天大楼高耸于所有周围的建筑物之上。

example: The door slammed shut behind him.
meaning: vi. vt. (使…) 砰地关上 vt. ⽤⼒⼀放，使劲⼀推；猛烈抨击 n. 猛关 (或推、摔、撞等) 的声⾳
exampleTranslation: 他过后门砰的关上了。

example: He slapped the water with his oar.
meaning: vt. (⽤⼿掌) 打，掴；啪地放下 vi. 啪地击打 (或撞上) n. (⽤⼿掌) 打，掴；拍打声 adv. 猛然，径直；恰好，正好
exampleTranslation: 他用桨猛击着水面。

example: The slaughter of innocent people must be condemned.
meaning: vt. 屠杀，杀戮；(体育⽐赛) 使惨败 n. (对动物的) 屠宰；(对⼈的) 屠杀
exampleTranslation: 无辜的人们被屠杀是必须要谴责的。

example: He rolled up his sleeves and started to work.
meaning: n. 袖⼦
exampleTranslation: 他卷起袖子开始工作。

example: She is a slender woman with delicate features.
meaning: adj. 苗条的；细⻓的；微薄的
exampleTranslation: 她是一个纤细的女人，有着精致的面孔。

example: She cut a slice of bread for breakfast.
meaning: n. 薄⽚；部分 vt. 把…切成 (薄) ⽚；⼤幅削减 vi. vt. 切，割，划
exampleTranslation: 她切了一片面包当早餐。

example: Watch your step or you might slide on the ice.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 滑⾏；悄悄移动 vi. 逐渐降低，贬值；逐渐衰退 (到) n. 衰落；滑⾏；滑梯；幻灯⽚
exampleTranslation: 小心你的脚步，否则你可能会在冰上滑倒。

example: There's a slight chance of rain tonight.
meaning: adj. 轻微的，微⼩的；纤细的 n. 轻视，冷落 vt. 轻视，冷落
exampleTranslation: 今晚有轻微的下雨概率。

example: Everyone was slim and good-looking.
meaning: adj. 苗条的；单薄的；微⼩的 vi. 变苗条，减肥
exampleTranslation: 每个人都看起来苗条又好看。

example: The country has a hot, humid climate.
meaning: n. ⽓候；⽓候带；局势，⻛⽓
exampleTranslation: 这个国家气候炎热湿润。

example: The climax of the movie left the audience in awe.
meaning: n. ⾼潮，极点，顶点 vi. vt. 达到顶点 (或⾼潮)
exampleTranslation: 电影的高潮部分让观众惊叹不已。

example: He decided to climb the Mount Everest.
meaning: vt. vi. 爬，攀登 vi. 爬升，上升；增⻓ n. 攀登；增值
exampleTranslation: 他决定攀登珠穆朗玛峰。

example: I used a clip to hold the papers together.
meaning: n. 夹⼦，回形针；⽚段；⼦弹夹 vt. vi. 夹住，别住 vt. 修剪；从…剪下；(意外地) 斜撞
exampleTranslation: 我用夹子把纸张固定在一起。

example: She drew her cloak around her to keep out the cold.
meaning: n. ⽃篷，披⻛；遮盖物，掩盖物 vt. 遮盖，掩盖
exampleTranslation: 她把披风围在身上以抵御寒冷。

example: Please turn the knob clockwise to increase the volume.
meaning: adv. adj. 按顺时针⽅向
exampleTranslation: 请顺时针转动旋钮以增加音量。

example: Sheep were the first animals to be cloned in a lab.
meaning: n. 克隆动植物；酷似的⼈或物 vt. 克隆，以⽆性繁殖技术复制
exampleTranslation: 羊是第一種在實驗室裡被克隆的動物。

example: The balloon began to descend as the air inside it cooled.
meaning: vi. vt. 下来，下降，向下 vi. (⿊夜等) 降临；是某⼈的后裔
exampleTranslation: 中文翻译：气球开始下降，因为里面的气体冷却了。

example: She is a descendant of a famous poet.
meaning: n. 后代，后裔；衍⽣物
exampleTranslation: 她是一位著名诗人的后代。

example: The descent of the mountain is dangerous.
meaning: n. 下降，降落；⾎统；堕落；斜坡
exampleTranslation: 山路陡峭，下山很危险。

example: The Sahara is the largest desert in the world.
meaning: n. 沙漠，荒漠 vt. 抛弃；背离 vi. vt. 擅离 (部队)
exampleTranslation: 撒哈拉是世界上最大的沙漠。

example: The school was endowed by a rich benefactor.
meaning: vt. 向 (院校、医院等) 捐款；赋予
exampleTranslation: 那所学校是由一个富有的捐赠者赞助的。

example: Despite the pain, he endured and finished the race.
meaning: vt. 忍耐，忍受 vi. 持续，延续，持久
exampleTranslation: 尽管痛苦，他忍耐下来并完成了比赛。

example: He shows great endurance in the face of hardships.
meaning: n. 耐⼒，忍耐⼒
exampleTranslation: 他面对困境展现出极大的忍耐力。

example: This graph shows the sales trend over the past year.
meaning: n. 图表，图解，曲线图
exampleTranslation: 这个图表展示了过去一年的销售趋势。

example: The report provided a graphic illustration of the problem.
meaning: adj. 绘画的，图像的；(描述) 形象的 n. 图形，图表
exampleTranslation: 该报告形象地说明了问题。

example: I'm so grateful for your help.
meaning: adj. 感激的，表⽰感谢的
exampleTranslation: 我非常感激你的帮助。

example: I want to express my deep gratitude for your help.
meaning: n. 感激之情，感谢
exampleTranslation: 我想表达我对你帮助的深深感激。

example: He visited his mother's grave.
meaning: n. 坟墓，墓⽳；死亡，去世 adj. 严重的，严峻的；严肃的
exampleTranslation: 他拜访了他母亲的坟墓

example: The force of gravity pulls objects towards the Earth.
meaning: n. 重⼒，地⼼引⼒；(事态的) 严重性
exampleTranslation: 重力的力量将物体拉向地球。

example: The sheep are grazing on the hillside.
meaning: vt. vi. (⽜、⽺等) 吃⻘草 vt. 放牧；擦伤 (⽪肤)；轻擦，蹭 n. (表⽪) 擦伤
exampleTranslation: 羊正在山坡上吃草。

example: This bearing requires grease to reduce friction.
meaning: n. 动物油脂；润滑油；(⽪肤) 油脂 vt. 在…上涂油
exampleTranslation: 这个轴承需要涂一些油脂以减少摩擦。

example: Many birds inhabit the wetlands in spring.
meaning: vt. 居住于，栖居在
exampleTranslation: 许多鸟类春天栖息在湿地。

example: The town is popular with both the inhabitants and the tourists.
meaning: n. 居⺠，栖居的动物
exampleTranslation: 这个小城镇深受本地居民和游客的喜爱。

example: She inhaled the fresh morning air deeply.
meaning: vt. vi. 吸⽓，吸⼊
exampleTranslation: 她深深地吸入早晨新鲜的空气。

example: Happiness is not inherent, it requires certain conditions to be fulfilled.
meaning: adj. 内在的，固有的，与⽣俱来的
exampleTranslation: 总的来说，无论是愉快还是忧虑，并非天生就有的，而是需要实现一定的条件。

example: My brother and I are set to inherit our parent's house.
meaning: vt. vi. 继承 vt. 经遗传获得；接⼿
exampleTranslation: 我和我哥哥将要继承我们父母的房子。

example: Lack of sunlight can inhibit plant growth.
meaning: vt. 抑制，阻碍；使拘束
exampleTranslation: 缺乏阳光可以阻止植物的生长。

example: He won a gold medal in the long jump.
meaning: n. 勋章，奖牌
exampleTranslation: 他在跳远项目中赢得了金牌。

example: She is studying for a medical degree.
meaning: adj. 医学的，医疗的，医术的 n. 体格检查，体检
exampleTranslation: 她正在攻读医学学位。

example: He is studying medicine at Harvard University.
meaning: n. 药；医学
exampleTranslation: 他正在哈佛大学学习医学。

example: The castle is a typical medieval fortress.
meaning: adj. 中世纪的
exampleTranslation: 这座城堡是典型的中世纪要塞。

example: I'm scheduled to meet with my manager tomorrow.
meaning: vt. vi. 遇⻅；开会；(与…) 会⾯；结识 vt. 迎接；遭遇，经历；满⾜
exampleTranslation: 我预定了明天和我的经理见面。

example: She whistled a happy melody as she walked along the road.
meaning: n. 旋律，曲调，歌曲
exampleTranslation: 她一边走路一边吹着快乐的调子。

example: The ice cream will melt if you don't put it in the freezer.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 融化，熔化；使⼼软
exampleTranslation: 如果你不把冰淇淋放冰箱里，它会融化。

example: The farmer must plough his field before he can sow his seeds.
meaning: n. 犁 vt. vi. 犁 (地)，耕 (地)
exampleTranslation: 农民在播种之前必须先耕田。

example: I accidentally pulled the plug out of the socket.
meaning: n. 插头；塞⼦；⽕花塞 vt. 堵塞；补⾜；推⼴；插插头
exampleTranslation: 我不小心把插头从插座上拔了下来。

example: He suddenly jumped up and plunged into the pool.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 突然前冲 (或下落) vi. 暴跌；陡峭地向下倾斜 n. 暴跌；突然跌落；卷⼊；跳⽔
exampleTranslation: 他突然跳起来，跳进了游泳池。

example: Cats are the plural form of cat.
meaning: adj. 复数的，复数形式的 n. 复数，复数形式
exampleTranslation: 猫是“cat”的复数形式。

example: Two plus two equals four.
meaning: prep. (数量) 加；和，外加 n. 优势，⻓处；加号 adj. 零上的；优点的；(数字后) 多的 conj. 此外，况且
exampleTranslation: 二加二等于四。

example: Could you please send me the file?
meaning: n. ⽂件夹；⽂件；档案 vt. 把…归档；发送 (报道)；锉光滑 vi. vt. 提起 (诉讼)，提交 (申请) vi. 排成纵队⾏⾛
exampleTranslation: 你能把文件发给我吗？

example: Please fill in this form with your details.
meaning: vt. vi. (使) 充满，装满 vt. 填补；使充满；担任；(使) 吃饱 n. 填满…的量；吃饱喝⾜的量
exampleTranslation: 请在此表格上填写你的详细信息。

example: Let's watch a film tonight.
meaning: n. 电影；电影业；纪实镜头；㬵⽚ n. 薄层，薄膜 vi. vt. 拍摄，录制，把…拍成电影
exampleTranslation: 我们今晚看电影吧。

example: Please replace the water filter every three months.
meaning: n. 过滤器；滤镜，滤声器 vt. 过滤 vi. (⼈) 缓⾏；(信息) ⾛漏；渗⼊
exampleTranslation: 请每三个月更换一次水过滤器。

example: It's time to relax after a long day at work.
meaning: vi. 放松，休息 vt. vi. (使) 冷静，放⼼；(使) 放松 vt. 放宽 (限制等)；放松精神
exampleTranslation: 工作一天后，该是放松放松的时候了。

example: She will relay the message to the boss.
meaning: vt. 传递，转发；转播 n. 接⼒赛；接班⼈；中继设备

example: The zoo decided to release the bear into the wild.
meaning: vt. 释放；松开；发泄；解雇；发布 n. 释放；公开，发⾏；排放；解脱
exampleTranslation: 动词，译为：动物园决定把熊释放到野外。

example: The medicine gave me instant relief from my headache.
meaning: n. 宽慰；减轻，缓和；救济 (⾦)

example: Drinking water can help relieve hunger.
meaning: vt. 减轻，缓和；给…换班；解⼿
exampleTranslation: 喝水可以帮助减轻饥饿。

example: I always relish a challenge.
meaning: vt. 享受，从…获得乐趣 n. 享受；调味酱，佐料
exampleTranslation: 我总是喜欢挑战。

example: He was reluctant to leave the party.
meaning: adj. 勉强的，不情愿的
exampleTranslation: 他不愿离开这个派对

example: The archaeologists discovered a treasure buried underground.
meaning: n. ⾦银财宝；珍品；⼼肝宝⻉ vt. 珍视，珍惜
exampleTranslation: 考古学家们发现了一个埋藏在地下的宝藏。

example: The child trembled in the cold wind.
meaning: vi. 颤抖，战栗；轻晃，震颤；恐惧 n. 颤抖，战栗
exampleTranslation: 孩子在寒风中颤抖。

example: This business opportunity has tremendous potential.
meaning: adj. 巨⼤的，⼤量的；极好的

example: Soldiers dug a trench and took up positions there.
meaning: n. 沟渠；战壕；海沟
exampleTranslation: 士兵们挖了一条壕沟并在那里布置阵地

example: The computer is available for public usage.
meaning: n. (词语的) ⽤法；使⽤ (量)

example: This book is very useful for learning English.
meaning: adj. 有⽤的，有益的；出⾊的

example: He made the utmost efforts to try to save the company.
meaning: adj. 极度的，最⼤的 n. 极限，最⼤限度
exampleTranslation: 他尽了最大的努力试图拯救公司。Hemadetheutmosteffortstotrytosavethecompany.

example: He is a bold man who is unafraid of change.
meaning: adj. ⼤胆的；醒⽬的；(字体) ⿊体的 n. 粗体字，⿊体字
exampleTranslation: 他是一个不怕改变的勇敢人。

example: As soon as the teacher walked in, he bolted out of the room.
meaning: n. (⻔窗) 插销；螺栓；⼀道 (闪电) vt. vi. 闩上 (⻔、窗) vt. ⽤螺栓固定；狼吞虎咽 vi. (⻢等) 脱缰；(⼈) 跑开
exampleTranslation: 一看到老师走进来，他就冲出了房间。

example: The bomb exploded with a loud noise.
meaning: n. 炸弹；核武器；彻底的失败 vt. 轰炸，对…投炸弹 vt. vi. (考试) 考砸 vi. (戏剧、电影等) 演砸，不卖座
exampleTranslation: 炸弹炸开了，发出巨大的响声。

example: The company issued bonds to raise funds for its expansion.
meaning: n. 纽带；债券；保释⾦；枷锁；键 vt. vi. (使) 黏合，连结；增强信任
exampleTranslation: 该公司发行债券以筹集其扩张的资金。

example: My dog loves to gnaw on a bone.
meaning: n. ⻣头；⻣质 vt. 挑刺，剔⻣
exampleTranslation: 我的狗喜欢啃骨头。

example: I am sick and I need to see a doctor.
meaning: adj. ⽣病的；想呕吐的；对…厌倦的
exampleTranslation: 我生病了，我需要看医生。

example: He sat on the side of the bed.
meaning: n. ⼀边；侧⾯；边缘；⼀⽅；⽅⾯ vi. ⽀持，站在…⼀边
exampleTranslation: 他坐在床边。

example: The car moved sideways along the narrow street.
meaning: adv. 往 (或从、向) ⼀侧；侧着 adj. 侧着的
exampleTranslation: 这辆车在狭窄的街道上向侧面移动。

example: The town was under siege for six weeks.
meaning: n. 围困，封锁，包围
exampleTranslation: 那个小镇被围困了六个星期。

example: He sighed with relief when he saw that his car was still there.
meaning: vi. 叹⽓，叹息；(⻛) 悲鸣 vt. 叹息着说 n. 叹⽓，叹息
exampleTranslation: 他发现车还在，于是叹了口气。

example: I didn't see anyone in sight.
meaning: n. 视⼒；看⻅；视野；景象；名胜 vt. 看⻅，发现
exampleTranslation: 我在视线之内没有看到任何人。Ididn'tseeanyoneinsight.

example: We went sightseeing in Rome for the day.
meaning: n. 游览，观光
exampleTranslation: 我们花了一天时间在罗马观光。

example: The room was filled with silence after the shocking news.
meaning: n. 寂静，⽆声；沉默；缄⼝不谈 vt. 使安静；压制 (反对意⻅) int. 安静，静下来
exampleTranslation: 这个房间在听到这个震惊的消息后陷入了一片寂静。

example: The room fell silent after the shocking news.
meaning: adj. 沉默的；寂静的；只字不提的
exampleTranslation: 这个房间在震惊的消息后变得一片寂静。

example: Silicon is used in the production of computer chips.
meaning: n. 硅
exampleTranslation: 硅被用于电脑芯片的生产。

example: It was a silly mistake, but everyone laughed.
meaning: adj. 愚蠢的，傻的 n. 傻⽠，笨蛋
exampleTranslation: 这是个傻错误，但大家都笑了。

example: Silver is a precious metal.
meaning: n. 银；银器；银⾊；银币；银牌 adj. 银⾊的 vt. 给…镀银；使具有银⾊光泽
exampleTranslation: 银是一种贵重金属。

example: He pulled at a loose thread on his shirt.
meaning: n. 线；线索，思路 vt. 穿 (针)；串在⼀起；⽤…线缝 vi. vt. (使) 穿过，通过，穿⾏
exampleTranslation: 他拽了下衬衫上的一根松线。

example: He stepped over the threshold into the house.
meaning: n. ⻔槛；起始点，临界点

example: The king sat on his throne.
meaning: n. (君王的) 宝座；王位，王权
exampleTranslation: 国王坐在他的王座上。

example: He decided to throw the ball to his dog.
meaning: vt. vi. 投，抛，扔 vt. 丢，扔；猛推；猛动；使陷⼊ n. 抛，扔，投，掷；投掷距离
exampleTranslation: 他决定把球扔给他的狗。

example: He thrust his hands into his pockets.
meaning: vt. vi. 猛推，挤；刺，戳 n. 猛推，刺，戳；驱动⼒；要点
exampleTranslation: 他把手塞进口袋里。

example: Watch how the story unfolds.
meaning: vt. vi. (使) 展开，打开；(使) 逐渐展现

example: Unfortunately, the weather was not good for a picnic.
meaning: adv. 不幸的是，遗憾的是

example: The rules apply uniformly to all members.

exampleTranslation: 这些规则对所有成员都一视同仁。

example: Our company is divided into several different units.
meaning: n. 单位；病区；(家具) 组件；单元

example: We must unite to fight against the injustice.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 团结，(使) 联合

example: The crisis created a strong sense of unity.
meaning: n. 团结⼀致，统⼀；统⼀体；协调

example: That dress in violet fits you perfectly.
meaning: n. 紫罗兰；紫罗兰⾊ adj. 紫罗兰⾊的
exampleTranslation: 那件紫罗兰色的裙子非常适合你。

example: She is still a virgin at the age of 35.
meaning: n. 处⼥，处男；圣⺟玛利亚 adj. 未开发的，原始状态的；童贞的
exampleTranslation: 她35岁仍是处女。

example: The flu is caused by a virus.
meaning: n. 病毒；病毒性疾病；计算机病毒
exampleTranslation: 流感是由病毒引起的。

example: He is a vocal critic of the government.
meaning: adj. 嗓⾳的，发声的；直⾔不讳的 n. (乐曲中的) 歌唱部分
exampleTranslation: 他是政府的公开批评者。

example: Teaching is not merely a job, but also a vocation.
meaning: n. ⼯作，职业；使命感，神召
exampleTranslation: 教学不仅仅是一份工作，更是一种天职。

example: She has a beautiful singing voice.
meaning: n. 嗓⾳，说话声；发⾔权；⼼声 vt. 表达，吐露
exampleTranslation: 她的歌声非常美丽。

example: The volcano erupted three days ago.
exampleTranslation: 火山在三天前爆发了。

example: They embarked on a long voyage across the Pacific.
meaning: n. 航⾏，航海，航天 vi. 航⾏，航海
exampleTranslation: 他们开始了横跨太平洋的长途航行。

example: This jacket is waterproof, it keeps the rain out.
meaning: adj. 防⽔的，不透⽔的
exampleTranslation: 这件夹克是防水的，它可以阻挡雨水。

example: The wave crashed against the shore.
meaning: n. 海浪；⻛潮；…潮；挥⼿；波 vi. vt. 挥⼿；挥⼿⽰意 vt. 挥舞，挥动 vi. 飘扬，摇晃；呈波形
exampleTranslation: 海浪冲撞着海岸。

example: She decided to schedule a waxing appointment.
meaning: n. 蜡，蜂蜡，⽯蜡；⽿垢 vt. 给…打蜡；⽤蜡除⽑ vi. 说话变得…起来；(⽉亮) 渐圆
exampleTranslation: 她决定预约一个脱蜡的时间。

example: Although she is young, she has achieved a lot in her career.
meaning: conj. 虽然，尽管；但是，然⽽
exampleTranslation: 虽然她年纪很轻，但是在职业上却取得了很多成就

example: The altitude of Mount Everest is over 8800 meters.
meaning: n. 海拔⾼度；⾼处，⾼地
exampleTranslation: 珠穆朗玛峰的海拔超过8800米。

example: There were seven people at the meeting altogether.
meaning: adv. 完全地；总共；总之
exampleTranslation: 会议上总共有七个人。

example: He is the newly appointed US ambassador to China.
meaning: n. ⼤使
exampleTranslation: 他是新任命的美国驻中国大使。

example: She found herself amid a crowd of people.
meaning: prep. 在…过程中；在…中
exampleTranslation: 她发现自己身处人群之中。

example: He lay down on his belly to crawl under the house.
meaning: n. 肚⼦，腹部；⿎起部分

example: He is a beloved figure in the community.
meaning: adj. 钟爱的，挚爱的，被深爱的 n. ⼼爱的⼈，爱⼈
exampleTranslation: 他是社区里深受大家爱戴的人物。

example: The temperature is below zero.
meaning: prep. 在…下⾯；低于，⼩于 adv. 在…下⾯；低于；零度以下

example: He tugged at his belt.
meaning: n. 腰带，⽪带；传送带；地带 vt. 抽打，狠打
exampleTranslation: 他拉了拉腰带。

example: She sat on the bench and read a book.

example: Everyone started to clap when the performer finished singing.
meaning: vi. vt. ⿎掌；拍⼿ vt. (友好地) 轻拍某⼈；急速放置 n. ⿎掌，掌声；砰然巨响

example: Could you clarify your earlier statement?
meaning: vt. 阐明，阐释

example: The teacher explained the concept with great clarity.
meaning: n. (表达) 清楚；(思路，图像) 清晰

example: Their opinions clashed on just about everything.
meaning: n. 冲突；差别，分歧；争执 vi. 打⽃，冲突；抵触；(时间)冲突 vi. vt. 撞击出巨⼤的响声
exampleTranslation: 他们在几乎所有的事情上都有不同的观点。

example: Please clasp your seat belt.
meaning: vt. 握紧，抓紧；抱紧，紧拥 n. 扣⼦，扣环；紧握，紧抱
exampleTranslation: 请系好你的安全带。

example: I have two classes this afternoon.
meaning: n. 班；课；阶级；种类；优雅 vt. 把…看作 (或分类)
exampleTranslation: 我今天下午有两节课。

example: This is a classic example of poor communication.
meaning: adj. 典型的；经典的；⼀流的 n. 经典作品，名著；典范

example: She prefers classical music to popular music.
meaning: adj. 经典的，古典的；典型的

example: The books in the library are arranged according to the classification system.
meaning: n. 分类，分级，类别

example: We classify books by subject in our library.
meaning: vt. (将…) 分类；界定，划分

example: The contract contains a clause which states that disputes will be settled by arbitration.
meaning: n. 从句；(法律⽂书的) 条款
exampleTranslation: 中文翻译：这份合同包含一个条款，这个条款规定纠纷将通过仲裁解决。

example: The train will depart in ten minutes.
meaning: vi. vt. 离开，启程；离职 vi. 背离，违背

example: The plane is scheduled for an early morning departure.
meaning: n. 离开，出发；出发班次；违背

example: The painting depicts a beautiful sunset by the sea.
meaning: vt. 描绘；描述，刻画

example: The depth of the pool is 2 meters.
meaning: n. 深 (度)；深厚；渊博；最深处
exampleTranslation: 池子的深度是2米。

example: John has been appointed as the deputy manager of the company.
meaning: n. 副⼿，代理⼈；治安官助理
exampleTranslation: 约翰被任命为公司的副经理。

example: We can enclose the garden with a wooden fence.
meaning: vt. 围住；随信附上
exampleTranslation: 我们可以用木篱笆把花园围起来。

example: The sheep were kept in an enclosure.
meaning: n. 围场，圈占地；(信中的) 附件
exampleTranslation: 羊被关在了围栏里。

example: The view from the top of the mountain is absolutely gorgeous.
meaning: adj. 极其漂亮的；令⼈⼗分愉快的
exampleTranslation: 从山顶看下去的风景美极了。

example: Don't spread gossip about your colleagues.
meaning: n. 流⾔蜚语；闲聊；爱说闲话的⼈ vi. 闲聊，说⻓道短
exampleTranslation: 不要传播关于同事的闲话。

example: She wore a beautiful gown to the party.
meaning: n. ⼥礼服；礼袍；罩⾐
exampleTranslation: 她穿了一件美丽的长袍去参加派对。

example: I'm in the third grade at school.
meaning: n. 年级；成绩；等级 vt. 按…分级；给…评分
exampleTranslation: 我在学校上三年级。

example: This type of rice has a very long grain.
meaning: n. ⾕物，⾕粒；颗粒；少量；纹理
exampleTranslation: 这种大米的粒长。

example: This product contains ten grams of protein per serving.
meaning: n. 克 (重量单位)
exampleTranslation: 这个商品每份含有十克的蛋白质。

example: The garden is hedged in by shrubs.
meaning: n. 树篱；防⽌损失的⼿段 vi. 避免正⾯回答，拐弯抹⻆ vt. ⽤树篱围住；包围，限制 vi. vt. 防备，防范 (尤指⾦钱损失)
exampleTranslation: 这座花园用绿篱做了隔离。Thegardenishedgedinbyshrubs.

example: I have a blister on my heel.
meaning: n. 脚后跟；鞋跟；⼥⾼跟鞋 vi. 倾斜，倾侧
exampleTranslation: 我脚后跟长了个水泡。

example: The height of the mountain is 5000 feet.
exampleTranslation: 这座山的高度是5000英尺。

example: The sound of thunder heightens the suspense.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 加强，(使) 增加
exampleTranslation: 闪电的声音加剧了悬念。

example: He is the legitimate heir to the throne.
meaning: n. 继承⼈；接班⼈，继承者
exampleTranslation: 他是合法的王位继承者。

example: There's a helicopter hovering over the building.
meaning: n. 直升机
exampleTranslation: 直升机正在大楼上空盘旋。

example: The criminal was sentenced to hell for eternity.
meaning: n. 地狱；悲惨的境况 int. 该死，⻅⻤
exampleTranslation: 这个罪犯被判处永世地狱的刑罚。

example: Always wear a helmet when you ride a bicycle.
meaning: n. 头盔，防护帽
exampleTranslation: 骑自行车时总是要佩戴头盔。

example: John is always very helpful.
meaning: adj. 有帮助的；乐于助⼈的
exampleTranslation: 约翰总是很乐于助人。

example: Australia lies in the Southern Hemisphere.
meaning: n. (地球的) 半球；(脑的) 半球
exampleTranslation: 澳大利亚位于南半球。

example: We were hungry, hence we decided to eat.
meaning: adv. 因此，由此；以后
exampleTranslation: 我们饿了，所以我们决定吃东西。

example: Henceforth, you will be known as Sir Edward.
meaning: adv. 从今以后，从现在起
exampleTranslation: 今后，你将被称为爱德华爵士。

example: He is seen as the herald of a new age in fashion.
meaning: vt. 是…的前兆；宣布 (好或重要) n. 预兆；信使，传令官
exampleTranslation: 他被视为时装新时代的预兆。

example: She picked a few herbs to make some tea.
meaning: n. ⾹草，药草
exampleTranslation: 她采了些草药来泡茶。

example: The shepherd is herding his sheep into the barn.
meaning: n. 兽群，牧群；⼀般⺠众 vi. vt. (把…) 赶到⼀起，聚到⼀起 vt. 放牧
exampleTranslation: 牧羊人正在把他的羊群赶进谷仓。

example: Our cultural heritage must be preserved for future generations.
meaning: n. (国家或社会的) 遗产，传统
exampleTranslation: 我们必须为后代保留我们的文化遗产。

example: The sail of the boat fluttered in the wind.
meaning: vi. vt. (乘船) 航⾏；驾驶 (船只) vi. 起航；(轻快地) 移动 n. 帆；乘船航⾏
exampleTranslation: 船的帆在风中飘扬。

example: The sailor navigated the boat through the stormy sea.
meaning: n. ⽔⼿，船员，海员
exampleTranslation: 水手在暴风雨的海洋中驾驶着船。

example: Saint Francis of Assisi is known for his love of animals and nature.
meaning: n. 圣徒，圣⼈；圣⼈般的⼈
exampleTranslation: 圣弗朗西斯修士以他对动物和大自然的热爱而闻名。

example: I hope you do it for my sake.
meaning: n. ⽬的，利益；缘故；⽇本清酒
exampleTranslation: 我希望你为了我而做这件事。

example: I ordered a Caesar salad with my steak.
meaning: n. 沙拉
exampleTranslation: 我在我的牛排旁点了一个凯撒沙拉。

example: Her salary increased after the promotion.
meaning: n. 薪⽔，⼯资
exampleTranslation: 她升职后工资增加了。

example: The soldier gave a salute to his commanding officer.
meaning: vt. vi. 敬礼 vt. 向…致敬 n. 致敬；鸣礼炮
exampleTranslation: 士兵向他的指挥官致敬。

example: Many people see religion as a means of salvation.
meaning: n. 救赎；救助途径
exampleTranslation: 许多人将宗教视为救赎的手段。

example: His Spanish accent is very charming.
meaning: n. 腔调，⼝⾳；重⾳；变⾳符号 vt. 突出，强调

example: I had a minor accident with the car this morning.
meaning: n. (交通) 事故；意外，偶然

example: I cannot accord with your plan.
meaning: n. 协议，条约；⼀致，符合 vt. 给予，赠予 vi. (与…) ⼀致，符合
exampleTranslation: 我无法同意你的计划。

example: In accordance with company policy, employees must wear business casual attire.
meaning: n. ⼀致，符合，按照，依据
exampleTranslation: 依照公司政策，员工必须穿商务休闲装。

example: Accordingly, his advice is highly valued.
meaning: adv. 相应地，照着；因此，所以
exampleTranslation: 他在其领域内是专家。因此，他的建议很有价值。

example: I have a terrible ache in my back.
meaning: vi. 疼痛；渴望 n. 疼痛
exampleTranslation: 我背部疼痛得厉害。

example: The orange is a bit too acid for my taste.
meaning: n. 酸；迷幻药 adj. 酸性的；酸味的；尖酸刻薄的
exampleTranslation: 这个橙子对我来说稍微有点酸。

example: John is going bald in his mid-twenties.
meaning: adj. 秃顶的；磨平的；直截了当的
exampleTranslation: 约翰在他二十多岁的时候就开始变秃了。

example: She goes to ballet classes every week.
meaning: n. 芭蕾舞；芭蕾舞剧；芭蕾舞团
exampleTranslation: 每周她都会去上芭蕾舞课。

example: The band played some really good music at the concert.
meaning: n. 乐队；⼀伙⼈；带，细绳；范围 vt. 给…加彩条等 vi. 联⼿，团结
exampleTranslation: 乐团在音乐会上演奏了一些非常好听的音乐。

example: The nurse wrapped the wound with a bandage.
meaning: n. 绷带 vt. ⽤绷带包扎
exampleTranslation: 护士用绷带包扎了伤口。

example: We heard a bang and then saw smoke.
meaning: vi. vt. 重打，猛击；(使) 砰的⼀声关上 vt. 砰地⼀扔；撞伤 n. 突然的巨⼤响声；猛击；刘海 adv. 恰好，正好
exampleTranslation: 我们听到了“砰”的一声，然后看到烟雾。

example: After his company went bankrupt, he couldn't repay the loans.
meaning: adj. 破产的，倒闭的；彻底缺乏的 n. 破产者，破产企业 vt. 使某⼈破产
exampleTranslation: 在他的公司破产后，他无法偿还贷款。

example: The company logo is displayed on the banner across the top of the website.
meaning: n. 横幅，标语；旗帜，⼝号 adj. 特别成功的
exampleTranslation: 公司的标志被显示在网站顶部的横幅上。

example: We held a joyous banquet to celebrate our wedding anniversary.
meaning: n. 宴会，宴席
exampleTranslation: 我们举行了一个欢乐的宴会来庆祝我们的婚礼周年纪念。

example: We are planning to have a barbecue this weekend.
meaning: n. 烧烤；烤⾁架 vt. (⽤烤架) 烧烤
exampleTranslation: 我们计划这个周末举办一次烧烤活动。

example: The dog began to bark at the stranger.
meaning: vi. (⽝) 吠 vt. 怒⽓冲冲地说，咆哮 n. ⽝吠声；树⽪；很⼤的响声
exampleTranslation: 那只狗开始对陌生人吠叫。

example: The farmer keeps his cows in the barn.
meaning: n. ⾕仓，畜棚
exampleTranslation: 农民将他的牛关在谷仓里。

example: He filled the barrel with water.
meaning: n. 桶；枪管 vi. ⾼速⾏驶，⻜驰
exampleTranslation: 他将桶装满了水

example: The soil is too barren to cultivate.
meaning: adj. 贫瘠的，荒芜的；不孕不育的
exampleTranslation: 这片土壤太过贫瘠，无法耕种。

example: Please do not cross the barrier.
meaning: n. 障碍，壁垒；障碍物；屏障
exampleTranslation: 请不要越过屏障。

example: The camel is an animal that can go for long periods without drinking water.
meaning: n. 骆驼；驼⽑，驼绒
exampleTranslation: 骆驼是一种可以长时间不饮水的动物。

example: We set up a camp in the woods for the night.
meaning: n. 度假营；营地；营房；阵营 vi. 扎营，露营
exampleTranslation: 我们在森林里扎了一个营地过夜。

example: The university has a large and beautiful campus.
meaning: n. (⼤学) 校园
exampleTranslation: 这所大学有一个既大又美的校园。

example: I can swim very well.
meaning: modal. 能，会；懂得；可以 n. ⾦属罐；⼀罐的量 vt. 把 (⻝品) 装罐保存
exampleTranslation: 我游泳游得很好。

example: I had to cancel my appointment because of the urgent meeting.
meaning: vt. 取消，废除；盖销，注销
exampleTranslation: 因为紧急会议，我不得不取消我的约会。

example: He is diagnosed with lung cancer.
meaning: n. 癌症；社会恶习
exampleTranslation: 他被诊断出患有肺癌。

example: She wore a red silk cape to the masquerade.
meaning: n. 披肩，披⻛；海⻆，岬
exampleTranslation: 她穿了一件红色的丝绸披风去参加化妆舞会。

example: He was made captain of the ship.
meaning: n. 船⻓，机⻓；上尉，上校；队⻓
exampleTranslation: 他成为了这艘船的船长。

example: Diamonds and graphite are both forms of carbon.
meaning: n. 碳；复写纸
exampleTranslation: 钻石和石墨都是碳的形式。

example: Respecting others is a cardinal rule in society.
meaning: adj. 基本的，最重要的 n. 红⾐主教；基数
exampleTranslation: 尊重他人是社会中的基本规则。

example: The ship was loaded with cargo.
meaning: n. (轮船、⻜机所装载的) 货物
exampleTranslation: 船装载了货物。

example: The royal family arrived in a grand carriage.
meaning: n. ⻢⻋；⽕⻋⻋厢；运费；仪态
exampleTranslation: 王室家族乘坐豪华马车抵达。

example: He works for a major airline carrier in the U.
meaning: n. 运输公司；病原携带者；搬运⼈ n. 军输⻋，航空⺟舰；通信公司
exampleTranslation: 他在美国一家大型航空公司工作。

example: Please carry your own luggage.
meaning: vt. 拿，搬；携带；输送；记住 vt. 承担；具有；销售；怀胎 vi. (声⾳) 传到很远，传播很远
exampleTranslation: 请自行携带您的行李。

example: I bought a bag of carrots at the supermarket.
meaning: n. 胡萝⼘；好处，回报
exampleTranslation: 我在超市买了一袋胡萝卜。

example: He learned to carve wooden sculptures when he was young.
meaning: vt. vi. 雕刻；把 (熟⾁) 切成块 vt. 刻；成功获得；修 (路)
exampleTranslation: 他小时候学会了雕刻木雕。

example: She's known as an eccentric dresser because she combines totally different styles.
meaning: adj. 古怪的，怪异的 n. ⾏为古怪的⼈
exampleTranslation: 她被认为是个古怪的穿衣者，因为她混合了完全不同的风格。

example: I heard an echo in the cave.
meaning: n. 回声，回⾳；⼗分相似的东西 vi. (声⾳) 回响，发出回声 vi. vt. (场所) 充满回声 vt. 附和 (想法等)；重复 (别⼈的话)
exampleTranslation: 我在洞穴里听到了回声。

example: The study of ecology has increased our understanding of the natural world.
meaning: n. ⽣态 (学)
exampleTranslation: 生态学的研究增进了我们对自然世界的理解。

example: He sat on the edge of the bed, contemplating his future.
meaning: n. 边，边缘；⼑刃；优势；尖锐 vi. vt. (使) 慢慢移动 vt. 给…加边 vi. 略微增加 (或减少)
exampleTranslation: 他坐在床边，思考着他的未来。

example: There was a faint smell of gas in the room.
meaning: adj. (光、声等) 微弱的；渺茫的 vi. 晕倒，昏厥 n. 昏厥
exampleTranslation: 房间里有一丝微弱的煤气味。

example: Faith is to believe what you do not see.
meaning: n. 信⼼，相信；宗教信仰；诚意
exampleTranslation: 信仰就是相信你看不见的事物。

example: He has been very faithful to his wife.
meaning: adj. 忠诚的；忠贞的；如实的
exampleTranslation: 他对妻子一直很忠诚。

example: The nurse had a gentle touch.
meaning: adj. 温柔的；和煦的；轻柔的；平缓的
exampleTranslation: 护士动作很轻。

example: She put the baby to bed gently.
meaning: adv. 温柔地，温和地；⼩⼼点
exampleTranslation: 她温柔地把宝宝放进床。

example: These are genuine leather shoes.
meaning: adj. 真正的；真诚的，可信赖的
exampleTranslation: 这些是真皮鞋。

example: Geography is a required course in many schools.
meaning: n. 地理学；地貌，地势；布局
exampleTranslation: 许多学校都要求上地理课。

example: He's studying geology at university, hoping to become a geologist.
meaning: n. 地质学；地质状况
exampleTranslation: 他在大学里学习地质学，希望成为一名地质学家。

example: He mastered the complex problem of geometry.
meaning: n. ⼏何学；⼏何形状，⼏何结构
exampleTranslation: 他掌握了几何学中的复杂问题。

example: Microscopic germs are often the cause of disease.
meaning: n. 细菌，病菌；起源，萌芽；胚胎
exampleTranslation: 微观的细菌往往是疾病的原因。

example: She made a rude gesture at the driver behind her.
meaning: n. ⼿势，姿势；姿态，表⽰ vi. vt. 打⼿势，⽤⼿势表⽰
exampleTranslation: 她对后面的司机做了一个粗鲁的手势。

example: I saw a ghost in the old house.
meaning: n. ⻤，⻤魂；⼀丝，⼀点；回忆 vt. vi. 代⼈写作
exampleTranslation: 我在那座老房子中见到了一个鬼。

example: Your Majesty, I'm at your service.
meaning: n. 雄伟壮观，庄严；(尊称) 陛下
exampleTranslation: 陛下，我随时听候您的差遣。

example: He is a male employee in our company.
meaning: adj. 男性的，雄的，公的 n. 男性，雄性动植物
exampleTranslation: 他是我们公司的一名男员工。

example: He made his passage through the crowded market.
meaning: n. 章节，段落；通道；通过；流逝
exampleTranslation: 他通过拥挤的市场。

example: She renewed her passport before her trip to Japan.
meaning: n. 护照；⼿段，途径
exampleTranslation: 她在去日本之前续了她的护照。

example: Please paste the stamp on the letter.
meaning: vt. 粘贴，黏合 vt. vi. 粘贴 (⽂本、图⽚等) n. 酱；⾯糊；糨糊
exampleTranslation: 请在这封信上粘贴邮票。

example: Reading is a pastime I really enjoy.
meaning: n. 消遣，娱乐
exampleTranslation: 阅读是我非常享受的消遣方式。

example: He gave the dog a pat on the head.
meaning: vt. 轻拍 n. 轻拍；(⻩油等的) ⼩块 adj. (回答等) 过于简单的
exampleTranslation: 表示亲近

example: The path to success is not always easy.
meaning: n. ⼩路，⼩径；路线；途径
exampleTranslation: 成功之路并不总是轻松的

example: It was a pathetic attempt to win her back.
meaning: adj. 可怜的，可悲的；差劲的
exampleTranslation: 那是他为赢回她做的可怜努力。

example: You need patience to learn a new language.
meaning: n. 耐⼼；毅⼒，耐性

example: It's patriotic to serve in the army.
meaning: adj. 爱国的
exampleTranslation: 在军队服役是爱国的行为。

example: The police regularly patrol the streets of the city to maintain law and order.
meaning: vt. vi. 巡逻，巡查 vt. (尤指威胁性地) 逛荡，闲逛 n. 巡逻，巡查；巡逻队，巡逻⻋队
exampleTranslation: 警察经常在城市的街道上巡逻，以维护法律和秩序。

example: The art exhibit was funded by a wealthy patron.
meaning: n. 资助⼈，赞助⼈；顾客，常客
exampleTranslation: 这次艺术展览由一位富有的赞助人资助。

example: Please pause the movie, I need to go to the bathroom.
meaning: vi. 暂停，停顿 vt. (使) 暂停播放 n. 停顿，暂停
exampleTranslation: 请暂停电影，我需要去洗手间。

example: The road to the farmhouse is paved with gravel.
meaning: vt. 铺，筑 (路或地⾯)

example: They dance together every Friday night.
meaning: n. 舞蹈；舞会 vi. 跳舞 vt. 跳…舞
exampleTranslation: 他们每周五晚上一起跳舞。

example: He made a dash for the door when he saw the doctor coming.
meaning: vi. ⻜奔，猛冲 vt. vi. 猛摔，猛撞 n. ⻜奔，猛冲；少量；破折号
exampleTranslation: 他看到医生来了就冲向门口。

example: The sky began to lighten with the dawn.
meaning: n. 黎明，拂晓；开端，起始阶段 vi. 破晓，天亮；开始；变得明朗
exampleTranslation: 天空随着黎明开始变亮。

example: She reads the daily newspaper at breakfast.
meaning: adj. 每天的，⽇常的 adv. 每⼀天 n. ⽇报
exampleTranslation: 她早餐时读日报。

example: The daylight was beginning to fade when we left the party.
meaning: n. ⽇光，⽇间，⽩天
exampleTranslation: 当我们离开聚会的时候，天光正在消失。

example: The soldiers were ready for the battle.
meaning: n. 战役，战⽃；较量，⽃争；抗争 vi. vt. 奋战，与…搏⽃
exampleTranslation: 士兵们准备好了战斗。

example: I need to change the battery in my watch.
meaning: n. 电池；⼀系列，⼀批；排炮
exampleTranslation: 我需要更换手表的电池。

example: The beautiful bay was blue and tranquil.
meaning: n. 湾，海湾；隔间；⽉桂；栗⾊⻢ vi. 发出⻓嗥；强烈要求 adj. (尤指⻢) 棕红⾊的，栗⾊的
exampleTranslation: 那個美麗的海灣蔚藍又平靜。

example: Chalk doesn't adhere well to a wet surface.
meaning: vi. 黏附，附着；遵循 (规章等)
exampleTranslation: 在湿润的表面，粉笔不易粘附

example: Our hotel room was adjacent to the ice machine.
meaning: adj. 邻近的，毗连的
exampleTranslation: 我们的酒店房间紧邻冰块机。

example: Many adolescents feel a sense of invulnerability.
meaning: n. ⻘少年 adj. ⻘少年的；(成年⼈) 幼稚的
exampleTranslation: 许多青少年都有一种无所不能的感觉。

example: They adore their little daughter.
meaning: vt. 爱慕，疼爱 (某⼈)；喜爱 (某物)
exampleTranslation: 他们非常疼爱自己的小女儿。

example: Her holiday to Africa turned into an adventure.
meaning: n. 冒险，奇遇；冒险精神
exampleTranslation: 她去非洲的假期变成了一场冒险。

example: The project was delayed due to adverse weather conditions.
meaning: adj. 不利的，有害的
exampleTranslation: 项目由于恶劣的天气条件而延误。

example: They decided to advertise in the newspaper for a sales manager.
meaning: vi. vt. 为…做⼴告；(在报纸等上) 征聘 vt. 宣扬，宣传
exampleTranslation: 他们决定在报纸上做广告招聘销售经理

example: I need to repaint the ceiling.
meaning: n. 天花板；上限；升限
exampleTranslation: 我需要重新粉刷天花板。

example: A single human body has millions of cells.
meaning: n. 细胞；单间牢房；⼿机；电池
exampleTranslation: 一个人体有数以百万计的细胞。

example: We will use cement to build the wall.
meaning: n. ⽔泥；混凝⼟；㬵接剂 vt. 巩固，加强
exampleTranslation: 我们将用水泥来建造那堵墙。

example: The government carries out a census every ten years to gather information about the population.
meaning: n. 官⽅统计，⼈⼝普查
exampleTranslation: 政府每10年进行一次人口普查以收集关于人口的信息。

example: He saved every cent he earned.
meaning: n. 分 (货币单位)
exampleTranslation: 他把赚到的每一分钱都存了起来。

example: The city center is full of people.
meaning: n. 中⼼；(市镇的) 中⼼；活动中⼼ vt. 将…放在中央
exampleTranslation: 城市中心人满为患

example: The park is central to the city.
meaning: adj. 中⼼的；核⼼的；中央的
exampleTranslation: 那个公园位于城市的中心。

example: The 21st century is characterized by rapid technological advances.
meaning: n. 世纪；⼀百年
exampleTranslation: 二十一世纪以其迅速的科技进步而闻名。

example: The temperature is ten degrees centigrade.
meaning: adj. 摄⽒度的 n. 摄⽒温度
exampleTranslation: 气温是十摄氏度。

example: The length of this pen is 15 centimetres long.
meaning: n. 厘⽶
exampleTranslation: 这支笔长15厘米。

example: I eat cereal for breakfast every day.
meaning: n. ⻨⽚；⾕类植物；⾕物
exampleTranslation: 我每天早上吃麦片。

example: He is in serious debt and needs to find a way out.
meaning: n. 债务；负债 (状态)；⼈情债
exampleTranslation: 他欠了很多债，需要找到解决的方法。

example: The dentist said that I have tooth decay.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 腐烂，朽烂 vi. (建筑等) 变破败；衰败，衰落 n. 腐烂，朽烂；衰败，衰落
exampleTranslation: 牙医说我有口腔蛀牙。

example: His generosity was just a cloak for his deceit.
meaning: n. 欺骗，欺诈
exampleTranslation: 他的慷慨只是掩盖他的欺骗。

example: Do not deceive yourself into thinking that you can avoid the consequences of your actions.
meaning: vt. vi. 欺骗，蒙骗，误导
exampleTranslation: 不要欺骗自己认为你可以避免自己行为的后果。

example: Let's find you a decent place to live.
meaning: adj. 像样的，得体的；正派的
exampleTranslation: 我们找一间适当的住处吧。

example: In the decimal system, 10 is represented as '10'.
meaning: adj. ⼗进制的，⼩数的 n. ⼩数
exampleTranslation: 在十进制系统中，10被写作'10'。

example: His ego prevented him from acknowledging his mistakes.
meaning: n. ⾃尊，⾃我意识；(⼼理学) ⾃我
exampleTranslation: 他的自我让他无法承认自己的错误。

example: I don't have enough change for the bus fare.
meaning: n. ⻋费，票价；乘客；饭菜 vi. 进展，进⾏
exampleTranslation: 我没有足够的零钱支付公车票价。

example: He gave a touching farewell speech at the graduation ceremony.
meaning: n. 告别 int. (道别⽤语) 再⻅，再会
exampleTranslation: 他在毕业典礼上发表了感人的告别演讲。

example: We need to run farther to reach our goal.
meaning: adv. (时间、空间上) 更远 adj. (时间、空间上) 更远的
exampleTranslation: 我们需要跑得更远才能达到我们的目标

example: The new train is very fast.
meaning: adj. 快的，迅速的；系牢的 adv. 快速地；牢固地，完全地 vi. 禁⻝，斋戒 n. 禁⻝期，斋戒期
exampleTranslation: 这列新火车非常快。

example: Please fasten your seatbelts, the flight is about to take off.
meaning: vt. vi. 扣紧，系牢；(使) 盖好；抓牢 vt. 使牢固，使固定
exampleTranslation: 请系好您的安全带，飞机即将起飞。

example: It was his fate to die that day.
meaning: n. 命运；宿命
exampleTranslation: 那天，他命中注定要死。

example: John survived a fatal car accident.
meaning: adj. 致命的；灾难性的，毁灭性的
exampleTranslation: 约翰在一场致命的车祸中生还。

example: I was overcome by fatigue after the long journey.
meaning: n. 疲惫，疲倦；(⼠兵的) 作训服
exampleTranslation: 经过长途旅行后，我感到非常疲劳。

example: Don't blame me, it's not my fault.
meaning: n. 过错，责任；缺点，弱点；故障 vt. 发现错误，找出缺点
exampleTranslation: 别怪我，不是我的过失。

example: The accident was caused by faulty brakes.
meaning: adj. 出故障的，有缺陷的；错误的
exampleTranslation: 事故是由于刹车故障引起的。

example: Could you send the document via fax?
meaning: n. 传真机，传真系统；传真件 vt. ⽤传真机发送
exampleTranslation: 你能通过传真发送这份文件吗？

example: She tried to stifle a giggle.
meaning: vt. vi. 咯咯笑，傻笑 n. 咯咯笑，傻笑；趣事
exampleTranslation: 她尽力抑制住轻笑。

example: The sunlight produced a harsh glare.
meaning: vi. 瞪，怒视；发出强烈刺眼的光 n. 瞪，怒视；强烈刺眼的光
exampleTranslation: 阳光产生了刺眼的光芒。

example: He took a quick glance at his watch.
meaning: vi. ⼀瞥，扫视；浏览，粗略地看 n. ⼀瞥，扫视
exampleTranslation: 他快速地看了一眼他的手表。

example: I caught a glimpse of him from the car window.
meaning: n. ⼀瞥；短暂的感受，初步的认识 vt. 瞥⻅；开始理解，开始领悟
exampleTranslation: 我从车窗瞥见了他。

example: The dress is covered in glitter.
meaning: vi. 闪亮，闪耀；(眼睛) 闪现 n. 灿烂的光辉；吸引⼒；⼩发光物
exampleTranslation: 这件衣服上面覆盖着亮片。

example: The street lamps cast a golden glow on the snow.
meaning: vi. 发出微光；喜形于⾊；⽪肤发红 n. 微弱稳定的光；容光焕发；喜悦
exampleTranslation: 街头灯将雪地照成了金黄色。

example: This year's harvest was a bounty due to favorable weather conditions.
meaning: n. 收获，收割；收成，收获量 vi. vt. 收获，收割 vt. 采集，搜集
exampleTranslation: 今年的收成丰好，主要是因为天气条件优越。

example: He made haste to finish the job before the deadline.
meaning: n. 匆忙，仓促
exampleTranslation: 他急忙地赶在期限前完成了工作。

example: Don't be too hasty in your decision.
meaning: adj. 仓促的，草率的，冲动的
exampleTranslation: 不要做出过于草率的决定。

example: The eggs will hatch in a few days.
meaning: vi. 孵出；(蛋) 孵化 vt. 使…孵出；策划，密谋 n. 舱⼝；⻜机舱⻔；开⼝，⻔
exampleTranslation: 这些蛋将在几天后孵化

example: His eyes were filled with hatred.
meaning: n. 仇恨，憎恶，敌意
exampleTranslation: 他的眼中充满了憎恨。

example: They hauled the boat out of the water.
meaning: vt. (⽤⼒) 拖，拉；传讯 n. ⼤批赃物；旅程；⼀⽹⻥
exampleTranslation: 他们将船从水中拉出。

example: I saw a hawk soar high in the sky.
meaning: n. 鹰，隼；鹰派⼈⼠，主战派⼈⼠ vt. 叫卖，兜售
exampleTranslation: 我看见一只猎鹰在天空中高高飞翔。

example: The farmer stored the hay in the barn for the winter.
meaning: n. 草料；少量的钱
exampleTranslation: 农民把干草储存在谷仓里过冬。

example: Every time you drive under the influence of alcohol, you're posing a hazard to yourself and others.
meaning: n. 危险，隐患，危害 vt. ⼤胆提出或猜测；使…冒⻛险
exampleTranslation: 每次你酒后驾驶，你都给自己和他人造成了风险。

example: He opened the door quietly.
meaning: pron. 他，它 (指雄性动物) n. 男性，雄性
exampleTranslation: 他轻轻地打开了门。

example: I jog every morning to stay fit.
meaning: vi. 慢跑 vt. 轻撞，轻碰 n. 慢跑
exampleTranslation: 我每天早上慢跑以保持身体健康。

example: The joint between the pipe and the wall is leaking water.
meaning: adj. 联合的，共同的 n. 关节；接合处；⼤块⾁
exampleTranslation: 管子和墙之间的接头在漏水。

example: She has a jolly personality.
meaning: adj. 愉快的，快乐的 adv. ⾮常，很 n. 旅游，游玩
exampleTranslation: 她有一个快乐的性格。

example: The kids are playing in the garden.
meaning: n. ⼩孩，年轻⼈ vi. vt. 戏弄，开玩笑 vt. 欺骗，哄骗
exampleTranslation: 孩子们正在花园里玩。

example: The businessman was kidnapped for ransom.
meaning: vt. 劫持，绑架
exampleTranslation: 这位商人被绑架以赎金为交换。

example: Excessive drinking can cause kidney damage.
meaning: n. 肾脏；腰⼦
exampleTranslation: 过量饮酒可导致肾脏受损。

example: The lion killed its prey.
meaning: vt. vi. 杀死，弄死，导致死亡 vt. 使痛苦，使受折磨；毁坏，扼杀 n. 杀死，捕杀 (尤指动物)；猎物
exampleTranslation: 翻译为狮子杀死了它的猎物。

example: She arrived late for the meeting.
meaning: adj. 迟到的；接近末期的；已故的 adv. 迟，晚；接近末期，在晚年
exampleTranslation: 她开会迟到了。

example: I haven't been feeling well lately.
meaning: adv. 最近，不久前
exampleTranslation: 我近期感觉不太好。

example: I will go to the supermarket later.
meaning: adv. 后来，以后；再⻅ adj. 后来的，以后的；接近末期的
exampleTranslation: 我稍后会去超市。

example: He has a latent talent for acting that he hasn't fully explored yet.
meaning: adj. 潜在的，潜藏的
exampleTranslation: 他有一种待发掘的演技。

example: The city is located at a high latitude.
meaning: n. 纬度；纬度地区；余地，⾃由
exampleTranslation: 这个城市位于较高的纬度。

example: Her infectious laughter filled the room.
meaning: n. 笑，笑声
exampleTranslation: 她的笑声感染了整个房间。

example: We're going to launch a new website next week.
meaning: vt. 发起，发动；发射；启动 vt. vi. 推出，发布 (新产品) n. 发射；投放市场
exampleTranslation: 我们下周要启动一个新的网站。

example: I need to do the laundry.
meaning: n. (要洗或洗好的) ⾐物；洗⾐房
exampleTranslation: 我要去洗衣店送些衣服去洗。

example: His reckless driving resulted in a serious accident.
meaning: adj. 鲁莽的，不顾后果的
exampleTranslation: 他的鲁莽驾驶导致了一次严重的事故。

example: I reckon we'll be on time if traffic is light.
meaning: vt. vi. 想，认为 vt. 看作，看待；估算，估计
exampleTranslation: 我认为如果交通畅通的话，我们会准时到达。

example: We need to reclaim these lost territories.
meaning: vt. 取回，收回；开拓，开垦
exampleTranslation: 我们需要收回这些失去的领土。

example: The shiny telescope on the balcony called to all those who love the stars.
meaning: n. 望远镜 vt. 缩短 (⻓度或时间)
exampleTranslation: 阳台上的闪亮望远镜对所有热爱星星的人发出邀请

example: He sent a telegraph to notify his family of his safe arrival.
meaning: n. 电报，电报机 vi. vt. (给…) 发电报 vt. 流露，暴露
exampleTranslation: 他发了一个电报通知家人他已经安全到达。

example: Can you tell me the way to the station?
meaning: vt. 告诉；显⽰；表达；吩咐；分辨 vi. vt. 知道，看出 vi. 泄露 (秘密)，告发
exampleTranslation: 你能告诉我去车站的路吗？

example: Don't tease your little sister.
meaning: vi. vt. 戏弄，取笑；挑逗 vt. 逗弄 (动物)；倒梳 (头发) n. 戏弄，取笑；爱戏弄⼈的⼈
exampleTranslation: 不要戏弄你的小妹妹。

example: This is the most tedious job I've ever had.
meaning: adj. 冗⻓的，乏味的
exampleTranslation: 这是我做过的最无聊的工作。

example: Click the button if you want to undo the changes.
meaning: vt. 打开，解开；撤销，消除；毁掉
exampleTranslation: 如果你想要撤销之前的改动，点击这个按钮。

example: Undoubtedly, this is the best movie I have ever seen.
meaning: adv. 毫⽆疑问地，确实地
exampleTranslation: 毫无疑问，这是我看过的最好的电影。

example: I love Sundays. They're so peaceful.
meaning: adj. 平静的；和平的；爱好和平的
exampleTranslation: 我爱星期天。它们如此宁静。

example: The sun was setting behind the peak of the mountain.
meaning: n. 顶峰，巅峰；⼭顶；尖头；帽檐 vi. 到达最⾼值 adj. ⾼峰时期的
exampleTranslation: 太阳正在山峰的后面落下。

example: She wore a necklace with a single pearl.
meaning: n. 珍珠；珠状物
exampleTranslation: 她戴了一串只有一颗珍珠的项链。

example: The piano player pressed down on the pedal.
meaning: n. 踏板 vi. vt. 骑 (⾃⾏⻋)；踩 (踏板)
exampleTranslation: 钢琴家踩下脚踏板。

example: As a pedestrian, it's important to follow traffic rules.
meaning: n. ⾏⼈，步⾏者 adj. ⾏⼈的，步⾏的；乏味⽆趣的
exampleTranslation: 作为一个行人，遵守交通规则非常重要。

example: The test was really hard.
meaning: adj. 坚硬的；艰难的；费⼒的 adv. 努⼒地，艰难地；猛⼒地
exampleTranslation: 这次测试真的很难。

example: The mud had hardened in the sun.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 变硬；(使) 更坚定 vt. (使) 变得冷酷⽆情
exampleTranslation: 泥巴在阳光下变硬了。

example: We hardly ever go to the cinema.
meaning: adv. ⼏乎没有；⼏乎不；刚刚
exampleTranslation: 我们几乎从不去电影院

example: Many students are facing financial hardships due to the rise in tuition fees.
meaning: n. 艰苦，贫困
exampleTranslation: 许多学生因为学费上涨而面临财务困难。

example: You're going to need some additional hardware to run those video games.
meaning: n. (电脑) 硬件；五⾦制品；重武器
exampleTranslation: 你需要一些额外的硬件来运行那些视频游戏。

example: He was hailed as a national hero for his actions.
meaning: n. 英雄；男主⼈公；偶像
exampleTranslation: 他因为自己的行为而被誉为国家英雄。

example: He made a heroic effort to save his friend's life.
meaning: adj. 英雄的，英勇的；(关于) 英雄的
exampleTranslation: 他英勇地冒着生命危险来拯救他的朋友。

example: Joan of Arc is considered a national heroine in France.
meaning: n. ⼥英雄；⼥主⻆；⼥偶像
exampleTranslation: 部分译为：法国视贞德为国家英雄。

example: He was getting impatient waiting for the bus.
meaning: adj. 不耐烦的；迫不及待的；难忍的
exampleTranslation: 他等公交车等得有些不耐烦了。

example: Eating a balanced diet is absolutely imperative for good health.
meaning: adj. 紧急的，⾄关重要的；祈使的 n. 重要紧急的事；祈使语⽓
exampleTranslation: 为了保持良好的健康，饮食均衡是绝对必要的。

example: The royal palace has an imperial grandeur.
meaning: adj. 帝国的，皇帝的；英制的
exampleTranslation: 皇宫具有帝王级的壮丽。

example: His speech gave new impetus to the campaign.
meaning: n. 动⼒，促进，刺激
exampleTranslation: 他的演讲为这场活动注入了新的动力。

example: The car is in the right lane.
meaning: n. ⼩路；⼩巷；⻋道；航线；跑道
exampleTranslation: 车子在右边的车道上

example: He switched on his lantern to see in the dark.
meaning: n. 灯笼，提灯
exampleTranslation: 他打开他的灯笼以便在黑暗中看清楚。

example: He has a cat on his lap.
meaning: n. (坐着时的) ⼤腿部；(跑道) ⼀圈 vi. (⽔) 轻拍，轻打 vt. 舔⻝；领先⼀圈 (或数圈)
exampleTranslation: 他腿上有一只猫。

example: He pointed a laser pointer at the screen to highlight the key points.
meaning: n. 激光；激光器
exampleTranslation: 他用激光指示器指向屏幕勾画出关键点。

example: Her eyes are framed by long, dark lashes.
meaning: vt. vi. 猛击，狠打；迅速摆动 vt. 鞭打，抽打；捆绑，绑紧 n. 睫⽑；鞭打，抽打
exampleTranslation: **名词**：她的眼睛被长长的深色睫毛所衬托。

example: Mankind must put an end to war before war puts an end to mankind.
meaning: n. ⼈类
exampleTranslation: 人类必须终止战争，否则战争将终止人类。

example: Manual labor is more physically demanding.
meaning: adj. ⼈⼒的，体⼒的；⼿动操作的 n. 使⽤⼿册，说明书
exampleTranslation: 体力劳动更为费力。

example: The company plans to manufacture a new model of car next year.
meaning: vt. ⼤量制造；编造；⽣成 (物质) n. ⼤量制造；商品
exampleTranslation: 这家公司计划明年生产新的汽车模型。

example: John gave his manuscript to the editor.
meaning: n. ⼿稿，原稿，底稿；⼿抄本
exampleTranslation: 约翰把他的手稿交给了编辑

example: The main obstacle to progress is the lack of a stable and reliable electricity supply.
meaning: n. 阻碍；障碍物
exampleTranslation: 主要的障碍是没有稳定可靠的电力供应。

example: This is a special occasion for all of us.
meaning: n. 某次；特殊场合；时机
exampleTranslation: 这是我们所有人的特殊时刻。

example: I only make occasional visits to the city.
meaning: adj. 偶尔的，有时发⽣的
exampleTranslation: 我偶尔会去城市里。

example: He had an odd way of doing things.
meaning: adj. 奇怪的；奇数的；偶尔发⽣的 adj. 不成对的；可得到的；⼤约
exampleTranslation: 他做事的方式有点奇怪。

example: The odds of winning the lottery are very slim.
meaning: n. ⼏率，可能性；困难，不利条件
exampleTranslation: 中文翻译：中彩票的概率非常小。

example: This perfume has a sweet odor.
meaning: n. (常指难闻的) ⽓味
exampleTranslation: 这款香水有一种甜甜的气味。

example: After breaking the glass cup, she was scolded by her mother.
meaning: vt. vi. 训斥，责骂
exampleTranslation: 打破玻璃杯后，她受到妈妈的指责。Afterbreakingtheglasscup,shewasscoldedbyhermother.

example: As a scout, he was responsible for finding safe paths through the wilderness.
meaning: n. 童⼦军；侦察员，侦察机；星探 vt. vi. 侦察，搜寻 (某处)；物⾊
exampleTranslation: 他作为一个侦查员，负责找寻穿越荒野的安全路径。

example: Jets were ordered to scramble.
meaning: vi. 攀爬；争抢，争夺 vt. 仓促完成；扰乱；炒 (蛋) vt. vi. (使) 紧急起⻜ n. 争抢，争夺
exampleTranslation: 战斗机被命令紧急起飞。

example: Do not throw away that scrap of paper.
meaning: n. 碎⽚；⼀丁点；剩饭；废品 vt. 废弃，取消，抛弃 vi. 打架
exampleTranslation: 不要扔掉那张碎纸片。

example: Be careful not to scrape your knee on the pavement.
meaning: vt. 刮掉 vt. vi. (使) 摩擦；艰难取得 n. 刮，刮擦声；擦伤，擦痕
exampleTranslation: 注意别让你的膝盖擦在路面上。

example: Don't scratch your insect bites, or they will get worse.
meaning: vt. vi. 挠，搔；抓破，抓伤；取消 vt. (意外地) 擦破；刮出痕迹 vi. 刮出刺⽿声 n. 划痕，划伤；刮擦的声⾳；挠痒
exampleTranslation: 不要抓你的蚊虫叮咬处，否则会更糟糕。

example: I heard a loud scream.
meaning: vi. vt. 尖叫；⾼声喊 vi. 发出⼤⽽尖的声⾳ n. 尖叫，呼啸声；可笑的⼈ (或物)
exampleTranslation: 我听到了一个大尖叫声。

example: Could you please clean the fingerprints off the screen?
meaning: n. 屏幕；银幕；电影；隔板，屏⻛ vt. 放映；掩藏；筛查；审查
exampleTranslation: 你能清理一下屏幕上的指纹吗？

example: Tighten the screw with a small tool.
meaning: n. 螺丝，螺丝钉；螺旋桨；狱警 vt. ⽤螺丝固定；旋紧，拧紧；诈骗 vi. 拧上去
exampleTranslation: 用小工具拧紧螺丝。

example: He is working on the script for the next season of the series.
meaning: n. 剧本，讲稿；笔迹；答卷；脚本 vt. 为电影等写剧本；事先准备
exampleTranslation: 他正在为下一季的系列剧本工作。

example: His financial transactions are under scrutiny.
meaning: n. 彻底审查，仔细检查
exampleTranslation: 他的财务交易正在受到仔细审查。

example: The sculpture in the park is an eye-catcher.
meaning: n. 雕刻作品，雕像；雕刻艺术
exampleTranslation: 公园里的雕塑引人注目。

example: The seal lay on the ice, basking in the sun.
meaning: n. 海豹；章，印记；密封垫；封蜡 vt. 封上 (信封)；密封；确定；封锁
exampleTranslation: 那只海豹躺在冰上，沐浴在阳光中。

example: The jacket was ripped at the seam.
meaning: n. 线缝，接缝；矿层，煤层；缝隙
exampleTranslation: 夹克在缝合处被撕裂了

example: Wait a second, I'm almost ready.
meaning: det. ord. 第⼆ (的)；居第⼆位的；另外的 adv. 以第⼆名；第⼆，其次 n. 秒；⽚刻，瞬间 vt. 赞成 (建议等)
exampleTranslation: 等一下，我马上就好。

example: Secondary sources are less reliable than primary sources.
meaning: adj. 中学的；次要的；继发的
exampleTranslation: 次级来源比主要来源不可靠。

example: The secretary is preparing the notes for the next meeting.
meaning: n. 秘书；书记员；部⻓，⼤⾂
exampleTranslation: 秘书正在为下次会议准备笔记。

example: This is the historical section of the library.
meaning: n. 部分，区域；部件；节段；阶层 vt. 切开；做切⽚；关进精神病院
exampleTranslation: 这是图书馆的历史部分。

example: The technology sector is experiencing a boom.
meaning: n. 部⻔，⾏业；军事管制区；扇形
exampleTranslation: 科技部门正在经历繁荣时期。

example: When preparing a report, data can be organized by different market segments.
meaning: n. 部分；(节⽬等的) 节，段；瓣 vt. 分割，划分
exampleTranslation: 当准备报告时，数据可以按照不同的市场细分进行整理。

example: The system tends to segregate the rich from the poor.
meaning: vt. 实⾏ (种族等) 隔离；(使) 分离
exampleTranslation: 这个系统倾向于将富人和穷人隔离开来。

example: The police had to seize the suspect.
meaning: vt. 抓住；攻占，控制；逮捕；没收
exampleTranslation: 警察不得不逮捕这个嫌犯。

example: The bride walked down the aisle with her face veiled.
meaning: n. ⾯纱，⾯罩；掩饰，借⼝ vt. 戴⾯纱，戴⾯罩；掩饰
exampleTranslation: 新娘蒙着面纱走下通道。

example: She traced the blue veins on his hand.
meaning: n. 静脉；叶脉；矿层；⻛格，⽅式
exampleTranslation: 她沿着他手上的青筋摩挲。

example: The velocity of the car was 60 miles per hour northwards.
meaning: n. 速度，速率
exampleTranslation: 汽车的速度是每小时60英里，向北。

example: She wore a dress made of red velvet.
meaning: n. 天鹅绒，丝绒
exampleTranslation: 她穿着一件由红色丝绒制成的连衣裙。

example: He drew a vertical line on the paper.
meaning: adj. 垂直的；纵向的 n. 垂直线，垂直⾯
exampleTranslation: 他在纸上画了一条垂直线。

example: The house is on the verge of the forest.

example: Emily is a versatile athlete, proficient in numerous sports.

meaning: n. 展览馆，画廊；⾛廊，⻓廊

example: The Milky Way is one of countless galaxies in the universe.

meaning: n. 处罚，罚⾦；判罚；罚球；害处

example: The Iberian Peninsula is located on the southwest corner of Europe.

example: How much is this candy?
meaning: n. 便⼠；分

example: People need food and water to survive.
exampleTranslation: 人们需要食物和水来生存。

example: I bought a new perfume with a sweeter note.
meaning: n. ⾹⽔；芳⾹，⾹味 vt. 使⾹⽓弥漫；抹⾹⽔

example: This is his permanent address.
meaning: adj. 永久的，永恒的

example: The water will eventually permeate through the concrete.
meaning: vt. vi. 渗透，弥漫；(感情等) 充斥

example: May I have your permission to leave early?

example: The quantity of food in the refrigerator is enough for a week.
meaning: n. 数量，数⽬；⼤量，⼤批

example: They are racing for the first place.
