example: Racial discrimination is a severe problem in some countries.

example: I set the plates on the rack to dry.

example: Her father was certain that the business was a racket.

example: I listen to the news on the radio every morning.

example: The nuclear accident caused a lot of radioactive pollution.
meaning: adj. 放射性的，有辐射的

example: The radius of a circle is half of its diameter.

example: Joan flew into a rage when she discovered the broken vase.
meaning: n. 暴怒，狂怒；流⾏⼀时的事物 vi. vt. 发怒，怒斥 vi. 猛烈地进⾏；迅速蔓延
exampleTranslation: 琼发现花瓶破碎时勃然大怒。

example: The police made a raid on the drug dealer's house.
meaning: n. 突然袭击；突击检查；抢劫 vt. 突击搜捕；突袭，偷袭；打劫

example: The first semester ends in December.

example: Silicon is a key element used in semiconductors.

example: We are holding a seminar on the latest advancements in biotechnology this afternoon.

example: The Senate will vote on the bill next week.

example: The president called a meeting with the senators.

example: His sentence makes no sense.
meaning: n. 句⼦；判决，宣判 vt. 判决，宣判

example: The general sentiment among the employees was of dissatisfaction.
meaning: n. 情绪，观点；伤感，柔情

example: Let's begin our study session.
meaning: n. ⼀场，⼀节；会议，开庭；学年

example: She learned to sew from her grandmother.
meaning: vi. vt. 缝制，缝合，缝补

example: The sun shines brightly in the sky.

example: The shipment of goods will arrive tomorrow.
meaning: n. 运输，运送；(⼀批) 运输的货物
exampleTranslation: 货物将在明天到达。

example: She shivered in the cold wind.
meaning: vi. 哆嗦，发抖 n. 寒战，颤抖

example: The news gave her a shock.

example: He learned how to shoot when he joined the army.
meaning: vi. vt. 射击，发射；打猎；⻜驰；拍摄 vt. 射杀，射伤；突然把…投向 n. 新芽；拍摄；狩猎 int. 呸；说吧，请讲
exampleTranslation: 他在参军后学会了如何射击。

example: He took a shot at the goal.
meaning: n. 射击；投篮；尝试；镜头；注射 n. 射⼿；炮弹；照⽚；少量烈酒 adj. 杂⾊的；耗尽的，破旧的
exampleTranslation: 他向球门射击。

example: Due to the ongoing war, there's a shortage of basic necessities in the country.
meaning: n. 不⾜，缺少，短缺

example: He is aware of his shortcomings as a teacher.
meaning: n. 缺点，短处

example: She is fluent in shorthand and typing.
meaning: n. 速记法；简略的表达⽅式
exampleTranslation: 她在速记和打字方面很熟练。

example: He shoved her out of the way.
meaning: vi. vt. 猛推，乱挤，推撞 vt. 乱放，随⼿扔 n. 猛推

example: I will go to the temple to pray for good luck.
meaning: n. 庙宇，寺院；太阳⽳

example: The tempo of the music was fast and upbeat.
meaning: n. (乐曲的) 节奏；(发展的) 速度

example: The tenant is responsible for all repairs to the property.
meaning: n. 房客，租⼾ vt. 租⽤

example: He gave her a tender kiss.

example: The verb in that sentence is in the past tense.

exampleTranslation: 那个句子里的动词是过去时态。

example: The political tension in the country is growing.
meaning: n. 紧张；对⽴；张⼒

example: We had lunch and then we went to the park.
meaning: adv. 那时，到那时；然后；那么 adj. 当时的，时任的

meaning: adv. 之后，此后

example: We must increase our sales thereby increasing our profits.
meaning: adv. 因此，由此，从⽽

example: Therefore, you missed the bus.
meaning: adv. 所以，因此，因⽽

example: He wore a white shirt and a black vest.
meaning: n. 背⼼；(特殊⽤途的) ⻢甲 vt. 授予，赋予
exampleTranslation: 他穿了一件白色的衬衫和一件黑色的背心。

example: After twenty years in the police force, he was a veteran officer.
meaning: n. 有经验的⼈，⽼⼿；退伍军⼈

example: The president has the power to veto any bill passed by Congress.
meaning: vt. (正式) 否决；不同意 n. 否决权

example: I walk to work every day.
meaning: vi. vt. ⾏⾛，步⾏；徒步旅⾏，散步 vt. 陪伴…⾛；遛 (动物) vi. 不翼⽽⻜，被盗⾛ n. 步⾏，散步；步⾏的路径；步态

example: He was put in a psych ward for treatment.

example: She has a large wardrobe full of beautiful dresses.

example: The warehouse stores all kinds of consumer goods.
meaning: n. 仓库，货栈

example: The country has experienced a long history of guerrilla warfare.
meaning: n. 战争；冲突

example: The warmth of the sun made her feel sleepy.

example: The weather forecast warned of severe storms.
meaning: vt. vi. 提醒，警告

example: The police have a warrant for his arrest.

example: The eagle is in aerial flight.
meaning: adj. 从⻜机上的；空中的 n. (电视等的) 天线

example: He voted against the proposal.
meaning: prep. 反对，违反；对…不利；倚，撞 prep. 和…⽐赛；以防；衬托；和…相⽐

example: People often gain wisdom with age.
meaning: n. 年龄 (段)；时期；⽼年；⻓时间 vi. vt. (使) 变⽼，(使) 显⽼

example: As a coach, he led the team to many victories.

example: The two smaller parties joined in a coalition against the leading party.

example: This fabric has a coarse texture, which is not very comfortable to touch.
meaning: adj. 粗糙的；⼤颗粒的；粗鲁的

example: Cognitive psychology studies how people perceive, think, remember, and learn.
meaning: adj. 认知的，感知的，认识的

example: The doctor will inject the vaccine into your arm.
meaning: vt. 给…注射；给…添加；给…注⼊
exampleTranslation: 医生会在你的手臂上注射疫苗。

example: He fell down from the stairs and injured his leg.
meaning: vt. 使受伤，弄伤；损害 (名誉等)

example: He sustained an injury during the game.
meaning: n. (⾝体的) 伤害；(对感情等) 损害

example: She dipped her pen in the ink.
meaning: n. 墨⽔，油墨，墨汁 vt. 给…上油墨；签订 (合同等)

example: We drove inland to visit some wineries.
meaning: adv. 向 (或在) 内陆，向 (或在) 内地 adj. 内地的，内陆的

example: He gave me a blank look when I mentioned his name.
meaning: adj. 空⽩的；没表情的；(墙等) 空的 n. 空⽩处；(记忆的) 空⽩；空弹 vi. 突然忘掉，突然思路模糊

example: She snuggled under the warm blanket, feeling cozy.

example: She switched on the light.

example: The lightning lit up the sky.
meaning: n. 闪电 adj. 闪电似的，极快的

example: Please bake the bread at 400 degrees for 20 minutes.
meaning: vt. vi. 烘，烤，焙；(将某物) 烤硬 vi. (变得) 灼热，炎热

example: He used big worms as bait to catch fish.

example: He is a bachelor who enjoys his single life.
meaning: n. 单⾝汉，未婚男⼦；学⼠

example: He took a step backward.
meaning: adv. 向后，往回；倒退地 adj. 向后的，倒退的；落后的

example: Some bacteria are beneficial to human health.
meaning: n. 细菌
exampleTranslation: 有些细菌对人类健康有益处。

example: The bad weather delayed our flight.
meaning: adj. 坏的；差的；不擅⻓的；严重的

example: He behaved badly at the party.
meaning: adv. 不好地；严重地；⾮常；负⾯地

example: He wore a badge to show that he was the security guard.
meaning: n. 徽章；(制服上的) 标记；象征
exampleTranslation: 他戴着一个徽章，用以标志他是保安。

example: I am fond of playing badminton.
meaning: n. ⽻⽑球运动
exampleTranslation: 我喜欢打羽毛球。

example: He was struggling with his heavy baggage up the stairs.
meaning: n. ⾏李；(思想) 负担，包袱

example: We're going aboard the ship.
meaning: prep. adv. 在船 (⻜机，⽕⻋) 上，上船 等

example: The helicopter hovered above the building.
meaning: adv. prep. 在…上⽅；⾼于 adv. 上⽂ adj. 上述的

example: He made an abrupt turn and walked out of the room.
meaning: adj. 突然的，意外的；唐突的

example: It's absolutely absurd to suggest that I was responsible for the accident.
meaning: adj. 荒唐的，荒谬的

example: There is abundant evidence to support the theory.
meaning: adj. ⼤量的，丰富的，充⾜的
exampleTranslation: 有大量的证据支持这个理论。

example: She was subject to physical abuse and violence.
meaning: n. 滥⽤；虐待；辱骂 vt. 滥⽤；虐待；辱骂
exampleTranslation: 她遭受了身体的虐待和暴力

example: Can I catch a cab at this hour?
meaning: n. 出租⻋；(卡⻋、⽕⻋的) 驾驶室
exampleTranslation: 这个时间我能打到出租车吗？

example: She put the dishes back in the cabinet.
meaning: n. 储藏柜，陈列柜；内阁
exampleTranslation: 她把盘子放回了橱柜里。

example: The TV is connected by a cable to the antenna.
meaning: n. 缆绳，钢索；电缆；有线电视 vt. vi. (给…) 发电报
exampleTranslation: 电视通过电线与天线相连。

example: I need to check my calendar for tomorrow's schedule.
meaning: n. ⽇历；⽇程表；历法
exampleTranslation: 我需要查看我的日历来确认明天的安排。

example: Let's calculate the total calories of this dinner.
meaning: n. 卡，卡路⾥ (热量单位)
exampleTranslation: 让我们计算一下这顿晚餐的总卡路里。Let'scalculatethetotalcaloriesofthisdinner.

example: The hurricane caused significant damage to the area.
meaning: n. 损害，损坏，伤害；损害赔偿⾦ vt. 损害，伤害
exampleTranslation: 飓风给这个区域造成了严重的损害。

example: Damn, I forgot my keys at home.
meaning: int. 该死，可恶 adj. 该死的，可恶的；完全的 vt. 该死，可恶；罚…⼊地狱；谴责 adv. 该死，可恶；⾮常
exampleTranslation: 该死，我把钥匙忘在家里了。

example: The clothes are still damp.
meaning: adj. 潮湿的，湿⽓重的 n. 潮湿，湿⽓ vt. 使潮湿；抑制(感情等)
exampleTranslation: 衣服还是湿的。

example: She's always eager to help others.
meaning: adj. 热切的，渴望的
exampleTranslation: 她总是热衷于帮助别人。

example: He whispered something in her ear.
meaning: n. ⽿朵；辨⾳⼒；穗
exampleTranslation: 他在她耳边低语了些什么。

example: He is earnest about wanting to help others.
meaning: adj. 诚挚的，认真的
exampleTranslation: 他真心想帮助别人。

example: We live on the Earth.
meaning: n. 地球；陆地；⼟，泥⼟
exampleTranslation: 我们生活在地球上。

example: She felt completely at ease during the interview.
meaning: n. 容易，轻易；舒适，安逸 vi. vt. (使) 宽慰，缓解；(使) 缓缓移动 vt. 使…容易些
exampleTranslation: 她在面试期间感觉非常自在。

example: The sun rises in the east.
meaning: n. 东；东⽅国家 adj. 东部的，向东的 adv. 向东，朝东
exampleTranslation: 太阳从东方升起。

example: He wrote a fable about a bird and a cat.
meaning: n. 寓⾔；谎⾔，⽆稽之谈
exampleTranslation: 他写了一个关于鸟和猫的寓言。

example: The new software will facilitate the management of sales information.
meaning: vt. 促进，使便利
exampleTranslation: 新的软件将会使销售信息的管理变得更加容易。

example: The community center provides many recreational facilities.
meaning: n. 设备，设施；特⾊功能；天资
exampleTranslation: 社区中心提供了许多娱乐设施。

example: The faculty of this university is highly educated.
meaning: n. 全体教员；院系；机能；能⼒
exampleTranslation: 这所大学的教员都非常有教育背景。

example: He hangs out with a gang of friends at the park every evening.
meaning: n. ⼀帮 (罪犯，混混等)；⼀伙朋友
exampleTranslation: 每天晚上，他都和一群朋友在公园玩耍。

example: He was sentenced to two years in jail for theft.
meaning: n. 监狱，看守所 vt. 使⼊狱，监禁
exampleTranslation: 他因盗窃被判入狱两年。

example: Can you help me clean the garage?
meaning: n. ⻋库；汽⻋修理⼚ vt. 把…送⼊⻋库 (或修⻋⼚)
exampleTranslation: 你能帮我清理一下车库吗？

example: Separate your garbage into recyclable and non-recyclable bins.
meaning: n. 垃圾；垃圾箱；废话
exampleTranslation: 把垃圾分成可回收和不可回收的放入垃圾桶。

example: The recipe calls for the oven to be preheated to a medium gas mark.
meaning: n. ⽓体；煤⽓；汽油；毒⽓，⽡斯 vt. 使吸⼊毒⽓
exampleTranslation: 这个食谱要求将烤箱预热到中等的气体标记。

example: She gasped when she saw the horrific scene.
meaning: vi. vt. 倒吸⽓；喘不过⽓，⽓喘吁吁 vi. 渴望 (酒或⾹烟) n. 倒吸⽓，倒抽⽓
exampleTranslation: 她看到那恐怖的场景时喘了口气

example: Let's gather at the park at 6 pm.
meaning: vi. vt. 聚集，召集；认为，推测 vt. 搜集，采集；收拢；收割；攒 vi. 逐渐增加，积聚
exampleTranslation: 我们6点在公园集合。

example: I tried to gauge his reaction to the news.
meaning: n. 测量仪器；宽度；⼝径；标准 vt. 判断 (尤指感受)；测量；估算
exampleTranslation: 我试图判断他对这个消息的反应。

example: He came out as gay at the age of 14.
meaning: adj. 同性恋的；欢乐的 n. (男) 同性恋者
exampleTranslation: 他在14岁的时候出柜。

example: He gazed out the window at the snow-covered scenery.
meaning: vi. 注视，凝视 n. 注视，凝视
exampleTranslation: 他透过窗户凝视着被雪覆盖的景色。

example: The gears in the watch keep it running accurately.
meaning: n. 挡位；⻮轮；设备，装置；⾐服 vi. vt. (使) 适合；为…做好准备
exampleTranslation: 手表里的齿轮保证了它运行的准确性。

example: The form asks for your name, age, and gender.
meaning: n. 性别；男性，⼥性；(语法中的) 性
exampleTranslation: 表格要求填写你的名字，年龄和性别。

example: Dark clouds brought heavy hail in the afternoon.
meaning: vt. 赞扬；招⼿ (停⻋)；朝…呼喊 vi. 下冰雹；来⾃，出⽣于 n. 冰雹；雹⼦般的⼀阵
exampleTranslation: 乌云在下午带来了猛烈的冰雹。

example: The students gathered in the hall for the lecture.
meaning: n. ⻔厅；⾛廊；礼堂；学⽣宿舍
exampleTranslation: 学生们在大厅聚集以便听讲座

example: The soldiers were ordered to halt at the edge of the woods.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 停⽌ n. 停⽌，暂停
exampleTranslation: 士兵们被命令在树林边缘停步。

example: He has a scar on his hand.
meaning: n. ⼿；帮忙；影响；指针 vt. 递，给
exampleTranslation: 表示人体部位

example: Your employee handbook outlines the company's policies.
meaning: n. ⼿册，说明书
exampleTranslation: 你的员工手册概述了公司的政策。

example: He picked up a handful of sand.
meaning: n. ⼀把 (的量)；少数；难管的⼈
exampleTranslation: 他捧起了一把沙。

example: I can't handle all this work myself.
meaning: vt. 处理，应付；触，拿；驾驭 n. 把⼿；柄，把
exampleTranslation: 我不能独自处理这所有的工作

example: It's handy to have a dictionary at your desk when you're studying.
meaning: adj. 有⽤的，⽅便的；⼿边的；⼿巧的
exampleTranslation: 学习的时候，在你的书桌上有一本词典是很方便的。

example: Hang your coat on the rack.
meaning: vt. vi. 悬挂，吊；(使) 低垂；(被) 绞死 vi. 垂下，垂落；悬浮 (在空中) vt. 挂…装饰；贴 (壁纸)
exampleTranslation: 把你的外套挂在衣架上。

example: We had ham and eggs for breakfast.
meaning: n. ⽕腿；蹩脚演员
exampleTranslation: 我们早餐吃的是火腿和鸡蛋。

example: He used a hammer to knock the nail into the wall.
meaning: n. 锤⼦；(拍卖⽤) ⽊槌；击铁 vi. vt. (⽤锤⼦) 敲，捶打；反复敲打 vt. 猛踢，猛击；轻易打败
exampleTranslation: 他用锤子将钉子敲进了墙。

example: For injury, apply an ice pack to reduce swelling.
meaning: n. 冰，冰块；溜冰场；⼀份冰淇淋 vt. 在 (糕饼上) 加糖霜
exampleTranslation: 对于伤害，应用冰包以减少肿胀。

example: English is full of interesting idioms that reflect its history and culture.
meaning: n. 习语，成语
exampleTranslation: 英语中充满了有趣的习语，反映了其历史和文化。

example: The factory had been lying idle for years.
meaning: adj. 不⼯作的；漫⽆⽬的的；懒散的 vi. 闲荡，⽆所事事 vi. (发动机) 挂空挡
exampleTranslation: 这个工厂已经闲置了好多年了。

example: If it rains, we will stay at home.
meaning: conj. 如果，假如；当；是否；即使
exampleTranslation: 如果下雨，我们会待在家里。

example: Be careful with that match or you'll ignite the whole stack of papers.
meaning: vt. vi. 点燃，(使) 燃烧 vt. 激起，引发
exampleTranslation: 小心那支火柴，否则你会把整堆纸都点燃。

example: Parking in front of the entrance is illegal.
meaning: adj. ⾮法的，违反规则的 n. ⾮法移⺠
exampleTranslation: 在入口前停车是违法的。

example: My grandfather was largely illiterate until late in life.
meaning: adj. ⽂盲的；外⾏的 n. ⽂盲
exampleTranslation: 我爷爷在晚年之前基本是不识字的。

example: The moon illuminated the path through the woods.
meaning: vt. 照亮，照明，照射；阐释，说明
exampleTranslation: 月亮照亮了穿过树林的道路。

example: The jam is made of fresh fruits.
meaning: n. 果酱；拥挤；卡住 vt. vi. (使) 卡住；塞进；即兴演奏 vt. (⽆线电) ⼲扰；⽤⼒推挤；挤满
exampleTranslation: 这种果酱是用新鲜的水果制作的。

example: He was punched in the jaw.
meaning: n. 颌；下巴；⼝部，嘴 vi. 喋喋不休
exampleTranslation: 他被打中了下颚

example: She was jealous of Mary's success.
meaning: adj. 嫉妒的，吃醋的；⼩⼼守护的
exampleTranslation: 她对玛丽的成功感到嫉妒。

example: The jet made a perfect landing.
meaning: n. 喷⽓式⻜机；喷射流；⿊⽟ vi. 乘坐⻜机旅⾏ vi. vt. 喷射，喷出
exampleTranslation: 喷气机成功着陆。

example: She wore a jewel necklace that sparkled in the sun.
meaning: n. 宝⽯；珠宝，⾸饰；珍贵的东西
exampleTranslation: 她戴着一串在阳光下闪烁的宝石项链。

example: She was adorned with exquisite jewellery.
meaning: n. 珠宝，⾸饰
exampleTranslation: 她佩戴着美丽的珠宝。

example: She was embarrassed when she saw him naked.
meaning: adj. 裸体的；⽆遮盖的；毫不掩饰的
exampleTranslation: 她看到他裸体时感到尴尬。

example: We need a nail to fix the picture on the wall.
meaning: n. 钉，钉⼦；指甲，趾甲 vt. 钉牢；抓住并证明有罪；揭发
exampleTranslation: 我们需要一颗钉子把画固定在墙上。

example: She has a naive belief in the power of love.
meaning: adj. 幼稚的；天真的，率直的
exampleTranslation: 她对爱情的力量有着天真的信念。

example: There are two reasons for this problem, namely, the economic downturn and unemployment.
meaning: adv. 即，也就是
exampleTranslation: 这个问题有两个原因，即经济衰退和失业。

example: I think I'll take a nap.
meaning: n. ⼩睡，打盹；绒⽑ vi. ⼩睡，打盹
exampleTranslation: 我想我要小睡一会儿。

example: The teacher had to speak to him because he was being naughty.
meaning: adj. 顽⽪的，淘⽓的；(书等) 下流的
exampleTranslation: 教师不得不跟他谈话，因为他不听话。

example: He has always been keen on basketball.
meaning: adj. 渴望的；热情的；(对…) 着迷的 adj. 机智的；强烈的；灵敏的 vi. (为死者) 恸哭
exampleTranslation: 他一直对篮球非常热衷。

example: I spilled coffee on my keyboard, and now it doesn't work well.
meaning: n. 键盘；琴键；键盘乐器
exampleTranslation: 我把咖啡洒在键盘上，现在它不能正常工作了。

example: The fishermen were saved after labouring for hours in the stormy sea.
meaning: n. 劳动；劳动⼒；分娩；英国⼯党 vi. 努⼒做；⼲苦⼒活
exampleTranslation: 渔民们在暴风雨的海中艰难地挣扎了几个小时后被救出。

example: She wore a dress with a lace collar.
meaning: n. 蕾丝，花边；鞋带，系带 vi. vt. (把…) ⽤带⼦系牢 vt. 给…掺 (酒或药等)；在…⾥夹杂
exampleTranslation: 她穿着一件带有蕾丝领的裙子。

example: He lacks confidence in his abilities.
meaning: n. 缺乏，不⾜ vt. 缺少，⽋缺
exampleTranslation: 他对自己的能力缺乏自信。

example: The young lad helped carry the bags.
meaning: n. ⼩伙⼦，少年；哥们⼉；⻢夫
exampleTranslation: 那个年轻小伙帮忙提了袋子。

example: The shepherd is taking care of the lamb.
exampleTranslation: 牧羊人正在照顾羊羔。

example: The dog is lame in one leg after the accident.
meaning: adj. 瘸的；⽆说服⼒的；差劲的 vt. 使 (⼈或动物) 跛，使残废
exampleTranslation: 那只狗在事故后一条腿走路瘸了。

example: This machine is designed to automate the bottling process.
meaning: n. 机器；核⼼集团；机器般的⼈ vt. vi. (⽤机器) 制造，加⼯成型
exampleTranslation: 这台机器的设计目的是把装瓶过程自动化

example: The heavy duty machinery was used in the construction of the new road.
meaning: n. (统称) 机器；(国家) 机构，机制
exampleTranslation: 重型机械被用于新路的建设中。

example: He was so mad that he couldn't see straight.
meaning: adj. 疯的；愤怒的；痴迷的；激动的
exampleTranslation: 他气得直眼红。

example: Would you like a cup of tea, madam?
exampleTranslation: 女士，你想来杯茶吗？

example: She performed a magic trick.
meaning: n. 魔法，法术；魔术；魔⼒，魅⼒ adj. 有魔⼒的；神奇的；好极了 vt. ⽤魔法变出或使消失
exampleTranslation: 她表演了一个魔术。

example: The magistrate sentenced him to ten days in jail.
meaning: n. 地⽅执法官
exampleTranslation: 那位地方法官判他坐牢十天。

example: Magnets have north and south poles.
meaning: n. 磁铁，磁体；有吸引⼒的⼈或物
exampleTranslation: 磁铁有南极和北极。

example: He has this magnetic personality that everyone is drawn to.
meaning: adj. 磁铁的，磁性的；有吸引⼒的
exampleTranslation: 他有一种吸引人的性格，每个人都被他吸引。

example: She is a sweet maiden of sixteen.
meaning: n. 少⼥，姑娘 adj. 初次的，⾸次的
exampleTranslation: 她是个甜美的16岁少女。

example: He is the main character of the story.
meaning: adj. 主要的，最重要的 n. 主管道，⼲线电缆
exampleTranslation: 他是这个故事的主要角色。

example: We're flying back to the mainland tomorrow.
meaning: n. ⼤陆 adj. ⼤陆的
exampleTranslation: 我们明天将飞回大陆。

example: He paddled the boat with a single oar.
meaning: n. 船桨，桨
exampleTranslation: 他用一只船桨划船。

example: He took an oath of allegiance to the country.
meaning: n. 宣誓，誓⾔；咒骂，诅咒的话
exampleTranslation: 他发誓要效忠于这个国家。

example: Dogs are known for their obedience.
meaning: n. 服从，驯服
exampleTranslation: 狗狗以服从主人著称。

example: The dog is very obedient and always follows his owner's commands.
meaning: adj. 服从的，顺从的，温驯的
exampleTranslation: 这只狗非常听话，总是遵循主人的指令。

example: You must obey your parents.
meaning: vt. vi. 服从，听从，遵守
exampleTranslation: 你必须听从你的父母。

example: Obesity is a major health problem in many countries.
meaning: n. 肥胖 (症)
exampleTranslation: 这句话展示了“obesity”在语境中的用法。

example: I have a pack of gum in my pocket.
meaning: vi. vt. 收拾 (⾏李)；塞进，挤满 vt. 打包，包装；保存，保藏；压实 n. (商品的) 纸包；背包；⼀群
exampleTranslation: 我口袋里有一包口香糖。

example: The mailman delivered a package to my house.
meaning: n. 邮包；包，盒；⼀揽⼦交易 vt. 将…包装好；使改头换⾯
exampleTranslation: 邮递员把一个包裹送到了我的家。

example: We entered into a pact of non-aggression with our neighboring countries.
meaning: n. 条约，协定，协议
exampleTranslation: 我们与邻国签订了一份互不侵犯的协定。

example: I need a new mouse pad for my computer.
meaning: n. 软垫；便笺本；⽖垫；发射台 vi. 蹑⼿蹑脚地⾛ vt. (⽤软材料) 填充，覆盖
exampleTranslation: 我需要一个新的电脑鼠标垫。

example: He used a paddle to row the boat out of the cave.
meaning: n. 船桨；(机具的) 桨状部分 vi. vt. ⽤桨划船 vi. 涉⽔，蹚⽔
exampleTranslation: 他用桨把船从洞穴中划出来。

example: She tried to hide her pain, but her tears betrayed her.
meaning: n. 疼痛，痛苦；讨厌的⼈ (或事) vt. 使痛苦，使疼痛
exampleTranslation: 她试图隐藏她的痛苦，但她的眼泪背叛了她。

example: It is painful to touch.
meaning: adj. 疼痛的；痛苦的
exampleTranslation: 我触摸起来很疼。

example: I need to buy some paint to redecorate my room.
meaning: n. 油漆；绘画颜料 vt. vi. 在…上刷油漆；(⽤颜料) 画
exampleTranslation: 我需要买些颜料来重新装饰我的房间。

example: The painter is almost finished with his masterpiece.
meaning: n. 画家，绘画者；油漆⼯
exampleTranslation: 这位画家的杰作快完成了。

example: She bought a new pair of glasses.
meaning: n. ⼀双，⼀对，⼀副 vt. 使成对，配对
exampleTranslation: 她买了一副新眼镜。

example: Her face turned pale with fear.
meaning: adj. (肤⾊) 苍⽩的；浅的；黯淡的 vi. 变得苍⽩；黯然失⾊
exampleTranslation: 她因恐惧而脸色苍白。

example: He held the tiny bird gently in his palm.
meaning: n. ⼿掌，⼿⼼；棕榈树 vt. 把…藏在⼿中 (尤指玩戏法)
exampleTranslation: 他轻轻地在手掌中握着这只小鸟。

example: He picked up a tourist pamphlet from the hotel lobby.
exampleTranslation: 他在酒店的大堂里拿了一份旅游宣传册。

example: The rumor about the layoffs caused a panic among the staff.
meaning: n. 恐慌，惊慌失措；恐慌局⾯ vi. vt. (使) 惊慌失措
exampleTranslation: 裁员的谣言在员工中引起了恐慌。

example: He was panting by the time he reached the top of the hill.
meaning: vi. vt. ⽓喘吁吁，喘息
exampleTranslation: 他爬到山顶的时候已经气喘吁吁了。

example: Could you pass me the paper, please?
meaning: n. 纸；报纸；⽂件；试卷；论⽂
exampleTranslation: 你能递给我纸张吗？

example: I bought the paperback edition of the book because it was cheaper than the hardcover.
meaning: n. 平装书
exampleTranslation: 我买了这本书的平装版，因为它比精装版便宜。

example: He jumped out of the plane and deployed the parachute.
meaning: n. 降落伞 vi. 跳伞 vt. 伞投，空投
exampleTranslation: 他跳出飞机,打开了降落伞。

example: The town held a parade to celebrate the national holiday.
meaning: n. (庆祝) 游⾏；检阅，阅兵；⼀系列 vi. 游⾏；招摇过市 vt. 展览，展⽰ vi. vt. (使) 列队⾏进，接受检阅
exampleTranslation: 镇上举行了游行以庆祝国家假日。

example: He described the island as a paradise for birdwatchers.
meaning: n. 天堂，乐⼟；伊甸园
exampleTranslation: 他形容这个岛是观鸟者的天堂。

example: This is the famous paradox of freedom: real freedom is only possible where there is real restraint.
meaning: n. ⽭盾的⼈ (或事物)；悖论
exampleTranslation: 这就是著名的自由悖论：只有在真正的约束存在的地方，才能有真正的自由。

example: The parameters of the experiment were strictly controlled.
meaning: n. 参数，界限，范围
exampleTranslation: 实验的参数被严格控制。

example: Mosquitoes are often parasites, drawing blood from humans.
meaning: n. 寄⽣⾍，寄⽣动植物
exampleTranslation: 蚊子常常是寄生虫，从人类身上吸取血液。

example: I received a parcel from my friend overseas.
meaning: n. 包裹，邮包；⼀块地
exampleTranslation: 我收到了一份来自海外朋友的包裹。

example: I beg your pardon, I didn't catch what you said.
meaning: int. 请再说⼀遍；抱歉 n. 赦免；原谅 vt. 赦免；原谅
exampleTranslation: 对不起，我没听清你说的话。

example: Parliament is debating the new tax proposal.
meaning: n. 议会，国会
exampleTranslation: 议会正在辩论新的税收提议。

example: She put all her clothes in a large sack.
meaning: n. ⿇袋；⼀满袋；开除；劫掠；床 vt. 解雇；劫掠
exampleTranslation: 她把所有的衣服都放入一个大袋子。

example: The church is a sacred place where people can connect with God.
meaning: adj. 上帝的，神圣的；受尊重的
exampleTranslation: 教堂是个神圣的地方，人们在这里可以与神沟通。

example: To achieve her goal, she made a great sacrifice and gave up her comfortable life.
meaning: n. 牺牲，献出；献祭，祭品 vt. 牺牲，献出 vt. vi. 献祭
exampleTranslation: 为了实现她的目标，她做出了巨大的牺牲，放弃了她舒适的生活。

example: He put the saddle on the horse.
meaning: n. ⻢鞍；⻋座；脊⾁ vt. vi. 给…配鞍；使肩负重担
exampleTranslation: 他为马儿装上了鞍。

example: Can I have a sample of your product?
meaning: n. 样本，样品；(化验的) 取样 vt. 品尝；抽样检验；选录
exampleTranslation: 我可以试一下你们的产品样品吗？

example: The government has sanctioned the use of the premises as a school.
meaning: n. 制裁；许可，批准；处罚 vt. 许可，准许；惩罚，实施制裁
exampleTranslation: 政府已批准该地点用作学校。

example: Can I have a chicken sandwich, please?
meaning: n. 三明治 vt. 在…中夹⼊
exampleTranslation: 我能点一个鸡肉三明治吗？

example: The moon is the Earth's only natural satellite.
meaning: n. ⼈造卫星；卫星；卫星国
exampleTranslation: 月亮是地球唯一的自然卫星。

example: She made an ugly face at me when I mentioned her mistake.
meaning: adj. 丑陋的，难看的；令⼈不快的
exampleTranslation: 当我提到她的错误时，她皱起了脸。

example: Ultraviolet rays from the sun can cause skin cancer.
meaning: adj. 紫外线的，利⽤紫外线的
exampleTranslation: 来自太阳的紫外线能引起皮肤癌。

example: She opened her umbrella to ward off the rain.
meaning: n. 伞；综合体；保护伞
exampleTranslation: 她打开了雨伞以挡住雨水。

example: The jury was unanimous in their verdict.
meaning: adj. ⼀致通过的；意⻅⼀致的
exampleTranslation: 陪审团对他们的裁决一致同意。

example: The detective was able to uncover the truth behind the crime.
meaning: vt. 揭露，发现；揭开…的盖⼦
exampleTranslation: 侦探能够揭示出犯罪背后的真相

example: The hotel has one vacant room tonight.
meaning: adj. 空的；(职位) 空缺的；茫然的
exampleTranslation: 这家酒店今晚有一间空房。

example: I'll be on vacation next week.
meaning: n. 假期；度假 vi. 度假
exampleTranslation: 我下周会放假。

example: The experiment must be conducted in a vacuum to avoid any interference.
meaning: n. 真空；空虚，空⽩；真空吸尘器 vt. vi. ⽤真空吸尘器打扫
exampleTranslation: 这个实验必须在真空中进行以避免任何干扰。

example: The valve on my bike tire is broken.
meaning: n. 阀⻔，⽓⻔；瓣膜；(乐器) 阀键
exampleTranslation: 我的自行车轮胎的阀门坏了。

example: They loaded up the wagon and headed west.
meaning: n. 四轮运货⻢⻋；(⽕⻋)货⻋⻋厢
exampleTranslation: 他们装满马车，然后朝西出发。

example: She has a slim waist.
meaning: n. 腰，腰部；(⾐服的) 腰部
exampleTranslation: 她有一条苗条的腰。

example: I usually wake up at 6 a.
meaning: vi. vt. 醒，唤醒 vt. 唤起 (记忆) n. 守灵；(船的) 航迹
exampleTranslation: 我通常在上午6点醒来。

example: The noise can waken the baby.
meaning: vi. vt. 醒来，唤醒
exampleTranslation: 这个噪音可能会吵醒婴儿。

example: The doctor decided to take an X-ray to check for broken bones.
meaning: n. X 射线；X 光照⽚；X 光检查 vt. 对…进⾏ X 光检查
exampleTranslation: 医生决定拍摄X光片以检查是否有骨折。

example: He's gone down the yard.
meaning: n. 码；院⼦，庭院；场地
exampleTranslation: 他去了后院。

example: She yawned and stretched after waking from a long nap.
meaning: vi. 打哈⽋；(开⼝、洞⽳等) 豁开 n. 哈⽋；乏味的事情，⽆趣的想法
exampleTranslation: 她从长时间的小睡中醒来后打了个哈欠并伸了个懒腰。

example: I make it a point to visit my grandparents yearly.
meaning: adj. ⼀年⼀度的；年度的 adv. 年度地
exampleTranslation: 我每年都要特意去看望我的祖父母。

example: The coach yelled at his team to play harder.
meaning: vi. vt. ⼤喊，吼叫 n. ⼤喊，吼叫
exampleTranslation: 教练大声呵斥他的队伍要更努力地去比赛。

example: I've done most of the work, but not all of it yet.
meaning: adv. 还没；⻢上；还；迄今为⽌ conj. 但是，然⽽
exampleTranslation: 我已完成大部分工程，但还没有全部做完。

example: The final score was three to zero.
meaning: num. 零；毫⽆，最低程度 vt. 将 (测量仪器等) 调到零
exampleTranslation: 最后的比分是三比零。

example: She zipped up her dress and left the room.
meaning: n. 拉链，拉锁；速度，能量；零 vt. 拉上拉链 vi. vt. (使沿某⽅向) 快速移动
exampleTranslation: 她拉上了连衣裙的拉链，然后离开了房间。

example: The agency for child protection is very active in our city.
meaning: n. 代理机构；(政府的) 专⻔机构
exampleTranslation: 我们城市的儿童保护机构非常活跃。

example: The meeting's agenda was packed with important issues.
meaning: n. 议事⽇程；待办事项；隐秘意图
exampleTranslation: 会议议程上列满了重要的议题。

example: The wounded soldier was in agony.
meaning: n. 极度痛苦，剧痛
exampleTranslation: 那个受伤的士兵处于极大痛苦中。

example: After playing outside all day, the children were filthy and needed a bath.
meaning: n. 洗澡；浴缸；浴室 vt. 给…洗澡
exampleTranslation: 孩子们在外面玩了一整天，他们很脏，需要洗澡。

example: I prefer to bathe in the evening.
meaning: vi. vt. 洗澡，给…洗澡 vt. 清洗 (伤⼝等)；使沐浴在光中 vi. (到海、河、湖等中) 游泳消遣
exampleTranslation: 我更喜欢在晚上洗澡。

example: The factory produced a new batch of toys.
meaning: n. ⼀批，⼀组；⼀批⽣产量
exampleTranslation: 工厂生产了一批新的玩具。

example: It's important to acquaint yourself with the local laws and regulations.
meaning: vt. 使熟悉，使了解
exampleTranslation: 你需要熟悉当地的法律法规。

example: She is an acquaintance of mine from work.
meaning: n. 认识的⼈，泛泛之交；交情；了解
exampleTranslation: 她是我工作中的一个熟人

example: They walked across the street.
meaning: adv. prep. 穿过，从⼀边到另⼀边；在 对⾯ prep. 遍及
exampleTranslation: 他们穿过了大街

example: I get satisfaction from helping others.
meaning: n. 满⾜，满意；妥善处理，补偿
exampleTranslation: 我从帮助别人中获得了满足

example: The performance of the team was satisfactory, but there is still room for improvement.
meaning: adj. 令⼈满意的，够好的
exampleTranslation: 团队的表现令人满意，但还有提升空间。

example: You need to saturate the sponge with water before use.
meaning: vt. 浸透，渗透；使饱和，使充斥
exampleTranslation: 使用海绵之前需要先将其浸透。

example: Could you pass the sauce, please?
meaning: n. 调味汁，酱汁
exampleTranslation: 你能把酱汁递给我吗？

example: She served the tea in a cup and saucer.
meaning: n. 茶碟，茶托
exampleTranslation: 她将茶水倒在杯子里，杯子下面放着一个碟子。

example: I bought some sausage at the butcher's.
meaning: n. ⾹肠，腊肠
exampleTranslation: 我在肉贩那里买了点香肠。

example: I saw a beautiful sunset yesterday.
meaning: n. 锯⼦ vi. vt. 锯
exampleTranslation: 昨天我看见了美丽的日落。

example: She scanned the room for familiar faces.
meaning: vt. 扫描；细看，审视 vt. vi. 粗略地读，浏览，翻阅 n. (医疗) 扫描检查；浏览
exampleTranslation: 她扫视了一眼房间，寻找熟悉的面孔。

example: The recent political scandal has rocked the nation.
meaning: n. 丑闻，丑⾏；流⾔蜚语
exampleTranslation: 最近的政治丑闻震动了全国。

example: I had a deep scar on my knee from when I fell as a child.
meaning: n. 伤疤；(精神) 创伤 vt. 在…上留下疤痕；留下精神创伤
exampleTranslation: 我的膝盖有一个很深的疤痕，这是我小时候摔跤留下的。

example: Water is scarce in this arid region.
meaning: adj. 缺乏的，不⾜的，稀少的 adv. 才，勉强
exampleTranslation: 在这个干旱的地区水十分稀缺。

example: We had scarcely arrived when the bell rang.
meaning: adv. ⼏乎不；刚…就…；⼀定不
exampleTranslation: 我们刚到达，铃就响了。

example: Don't scare the children with your ghost stories.
meaning: vt. 惊吓，使恐惧 vi. 受惊吓，害怕 n. 恐慌；惊吓
exampleTranslation: 不要用你的鬼故事**吓**孩子们。

example: I bought a beautiful scarf today.
meaning: n. 围⼱，头⼱，披⼱ vi. vt. 狼吞虎咽
exampleTranslation: 我今天买了一条好看的围巾。

example: Scatter the seeds in the garden.
meaning: vt. 撒，撒播 vi. vt. (使) 散开，(使) 散布在各处
exampleTranslation: 把种子撒在花园里。

example: The air is filled with the sweet scent of spring.
meaning: n. ⾹味；⽓味；⾹⽔；预感 vt. 闻到；预感到；使具有⾹味
exampleTranslation: 空气中充满了甜美的春天气息。

example: He is a distinguished scholar in the field of linguistics.
meaning: n. 学者；奖学⾦获得者
exampleTranslation: 他是语言学领域的杰出学者。

example: She was awarded a scholarship for her outstanding academic performance.
meaning: n. 奖学⾦；学问，学术研究
exampleTranslation: 她因优秀的学业表现而获得奖学金。

example: Mary's children go to the school down the street.
meaning: n. 学校；学院；系；学派；⻥群 vt. 教育，培养
exampleTranslation: 玛丽的孩子们在街头上的那所学校上课。

example: The doctor prescribed me a tablet for my headache.
meaning: n. 平板电脑；药⽚；丸；牌，匾
exampleTranslation: 医生开了片药给我治疼头。

example: He decided to tackle the problem head on.
meaning: vt. 处理 (难题)；与某⼈交涉；抓获 vt. vi. 抢球，抢断；擒抱摔倒 n. 抢断球；阻截队员；体育器材
exampleTranslation: 他决定正面对付这个问题。

example: This shirt still has the price tag on it.
meaning: n. 标签；外号，绰号；附加语 vt. 给…加上标签；把…称作
exampleTranslation: 这件衬衣上还有价签。

example: The tailor is making a suit for him.
meaning: n. 裁缝 vt. 定做
exampleTranslation: 这位裁缝正在为他制作一套西装。

example: She told an exciting tale about her journey through Africa.
meaning: n. 故事，传说
exampleTranslation: 她讲述了她在非洲旅行的一段扣人心弦的故事。

example: His dog is quite tame.
meaning: adj. 驯化的；乏味的；(⼈) 温顺的 vt. 驯服，使驯化；控制，驾驭
exampleTranslation: 他的狗非常温顺

example: After spending the day at the beach, she had a beautiful tan.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 晒⿊ n. (晒出来的) 棕褐⾊ adj. 棕褐⾊的
exampleTranslation: 她在海滩上度过了一天，晒得皮肤黝黑。

example: Careful with that fishing line, it could quickly become a tangle.
meaning: vt. vi. (使) 缠结在⼀起，(使) 乱成⼀团 n. 缠结的⼀团；混乱，纷乱
exampleTranslation: 小心那条鱼线，它很快就会纠缠成一团。

example: The soldier is driving a tank.
meaning: n. 箱，罐；坦克 vi. 彻底失败，破产，倒闭 vt. vi. 故意输掉 (⽐赛)
exampleTranslation: 士兵正在驾驶坦克。

example: The tanker sailed from the Middle East with a full load of oil.
meaning: n. 油轮，油罐⻋
exampleTranslation: 这艘油轮满载着石油从中东出发。

example: She tapped on the window to get his attention.
meaning: n. ⽔⻰头；轻敲，轻拍；电话窃听 vt. vi. 轻敲，轻拍；轻叩；利⽤，发掘 vt. (在电话上) 安装窃听器；委任
exampleTranslation: 她敲了敲窗户以引起他的注意。

example: Could you pass me the tape?
meaning: n. 磁带，录像带；㬵带；窄布条 vt. 录⾳，录像；⽤㬵带粘
exampleTranslation: 你能把胶带递给我吗？我需要修理这个盒子。

example: The government will reduce the tariff on imported cars.
meaning: n. 关税
exampleTranslation: 政府将降低对进口汽车的关税。

example: My income tax is too high this year.
meaning: n. 税，税款 vt. 对…征税；给…施压
exampleTranslation: 我今年的所得税太高了。

example: I am an undergraduate student studying business administration at New York University.
meaning: n. 在校本科⽣，⼤学⽣
exampleTranslation: 我是纽约大学商务管理专业的大学本科生。

example: We traveled to our destination by the underground.
meaning: adv. 在地⾯下；秘密地，隐蔽地 adj. 地⾯下的；秘密的，地下的 n. 地铁；反政府地下组织
exampleTranslation: 我们乘坐地铁去的目的地。

example: His criticisms just serve to undermine my confidence.
meaning: vt. 逐渐削弱，损害
exampleTranslation: 他的批评只会削弱我的信心。

example: He found the book lying underneath the bed.
meaning: prep. adv. 在…下⾯；在内⼼深处 n. 底层，底部
exampleTranslation: 他在床下找到了那本书。

example: He loaded the boxes into the van.
exampleTranslation: 他把箱子装进了面包车。

example: The warm sun causes the rainfall to turn into vapour.
meaning: n. 蒸⽓，⽔汽
exampleTranslation: 热阳使雨水转化为蒸汽。

example: I am a vegetarian, I don't eat meat.
meaning: n. 素⻝者 adj. ⽆⾁的，素的
exampleTranslation: 我是素食主义者,我不吃肉。

example: The lush vegetation provides a habitat for many different species of animals.
meaning: n. 植被，植物，草⽊
exampleTranslation: 这片茂密的植被为许多不同的动物种类提供了栖息地。

example: He dropped me off in his vehicle at the airport.
meaning: n. ⻋辆，交通⼯具；⼯具，⼿段
exampleTranslation: 他开车把我送到机场。

example: I don't have enough cash on me to pay for the dinner.
meaning: n. 现⾦；⾦钱 vt. 兑现⽀票
exampleTranslation: 我身上没有足够的现金来付餐费。

example: The cashier is tallying the day's receipts.
meaning: n. 出纳员，收银员 vt. 开除，⾰除 (军职)
exampleTranslation: 收银员正在清点当日的收款。

example: The library has a vast catalogue of books.
meaning: n. ⽬录，⽬录册；(坏事) ⼀连串 vt. 将…列⼊⽬录；列举，历数
exampleTranslation: 这个图书馆有一个庞大的图书目录。

example: Thousands have been left homeless by the earthquake catastrophe.
meaning: n. 重⼤灾难，横祸
exampleTranslation: 地震灾祸使成千上万的人无家可归。

example: His grandfather has been dead for ten years.
meaning: adj. 死的；已废弃的；不运⾏的 adv. 完全地；⾮常
exampleTranslation: 他的爷爷已经去世十年了。

example: The deadline for the submission of our project is tomorrow.
meaning: n. 最后期限，截⽌时间
exampleTranslation: 我们的项目提交截止日期是明天。

example: The poisonous snake is considered deadly.
meaning: adj. 致命的；彻底的，⼗⾜的 adv. 彻底地，极其
exampleTranslation: 这种毒蛇被认为是致命的。

example: She is deaf, so you will need to use sign language to communicate with her.
meaning: adj. ⽿聋的；不愿听的，不去注意的
exampleTranslation: 她是聋人，所以你需要用手语和她交流。

example: Professor Smith was promoted to the dean of the engineering department.
meaning: n. 院⻓，系主任；教⻓；泰⽃
exampleTranslation: 史密斯教授被提升为工程系的院长。

example: The berries on that bush are not edible.
meaning: adj. 可⻝⽤的，能吃的 n. ⻝品
exampleTranslation: 那个灌木上的浆果不能吃。

example: The teacher asked me to edit my essay for errors.
meaning: vt. vi. 编辑，校订 (⽂章等) vt. 编纂，编集；剪辑 (视频) n. 编辑，校订，剪辑
exampleTranslation: 老师要求我修改论文的错误。

example: This is the latest edition of the textbook.
meaning: n. 版本；版次；(节⽬) ⼀期
exampleTranslation: 这是教科书的最新版本。

example: The editor corrected all the spelling mistakes in my article.
meaning: n. 主编，编辑；校订者；剪辑师
exampleTranslation: 编辑修改了我文章中的所有拼写错误。

example: As a journalist, I often have to write editorial pieces for the newspaper.
meaning: n. (报纸的) 社论 adj. 编辑的，主编的，编者的
exampleTranslation: 作为记者，我经常需要为报纸写社论。

example: He was sent to jail for selling fake passports.
meaning: adj. 假装的；假的，伪造的 n. 假货，赝品；冒充者 vt. 伪造，冒充 vt. vi. 假装，装出
exampleTranslation: 他因贩卖假护照被送进了监狱。

example: The rumor turned out to be false.
meaning: adj. 错误的；虚假的，伪造的
exampleTranslation: 传言结果证明是假的。

example: He rose to fame through hard work and determination.
meaning: n. 名声，名⽓，声望
exampleTranslation: 他通过努力和决心走向了名声。

example: This place looks familiar to me.
meaning: adj. 熟悉的；对…熟知的；随便的
exampleTranslation: 这个地方让我感觉很熟悉。

example: John has a big family with two parents, three siblings, and lots of aunts, uncles and cousins.
meaning: n. 家庭，家族；(动植物) 科 adj. 家庭的，适合全家的
exampleTranslation: 约翰有一个大家庭，包括他的父母、三个兄弟姐妹，以及许多阿姨、叔叔和堂表兄弟姐妹。

example: The drought resulted in a terrible famine.
meaning: n. 饥荒
exampleTranslation: 干旱导致了严重的饥荒。

example: It's a fantastic opportunity to explore the ancient city.
meaning: adj. 极好的；极⼤的；奇异的，荒诞的
exampleTranslation: 这是探索古城的绝佳机会。

example: She often escapes from reality into a world of fantasy.
meaning: n. 幻想，想象；幻想作品
exampleTranslation: 她常常逃离现实，进入幻想的世界。

example: He reassured her that he would be home soon.
meaning: vt. 使安⼼，使消除疑虑
exampleTranslation: 他让她放心，他很快就会回家。

example: He was a rebel at heart and didn't follow the rules.
meaning: n. 叛军；叛逆者 vi. 反抗，反对
exampleTranslation: 他心里是个叛逆者，不遵守规则。

example: The peasants rose in rebellion against the king.
meaning: n. 叛乱；公开反抗；叛逆
exampleTranslation: 农民们起义反抗国王。

example: As the tide finished its climb, it began to recede from the shore.
meaning: vi. 渐渐远离；减弱；(发际线) 后移
exampleTranslation: 潮水爬升完毕后，开始从海岸线后退。

example: Please keep your receipt for your records.
meaning: n. 收据；收到；收⼊
exampleTranslation: 请保留您的收据作为记录。

example: We held a warm reception for our foreign friends.
meaning: n. 接待处；欢迎，接受；接收效果 n. 欢迎会，招待会
exampleTranslation: 我们热情地招待了我们的外国朋友。

example: The global recession has pushed many countries into debt.
meaning: n. 经济衰退，经济不景⽓
exampleTranslation: 全球衰退使许多国家负债累累。

example: Follow this recipe to become a gourmet chef.
meaning: n. ⻝谱，烹饪法；原因，秘诀
exampleTranslation: 遵循食谱，成为一个美食厨师。

example: She's the recipient of numerous academic awards.
meaning: n. 接受者，领受⼈
exampleTranslation: 她是众多学术奖项的获得者。

example: Our love is reciprocal, she loves me as much as I love her.
meaning: adj. 互惠的，相互的
exampleTranslation: 我们的爱是相互的，她爱我如同我爱她一样。

example: He can recite the entire poem from memory.
meaning: vt. vi. 朗诵，背诵 vt. (⼝头) 列举，逐⼀详述
exampleTranslation: 他能够凭记忆背诵整首诗。

example: As he realized the depth of his mistake, he began to sob.
meaning: vi. 抽噎，啜泣 vt. 呜咽着说，哭诉 n. 啜泣 (声)
exampleTranslation: 当他意识到错误的严重性，他开始抽泣

example: After drinking, you should not drive until you are sober.
meaning: adj. 未醉的，清醒的；冷静的；素净的 vt. vi. (使) 冷静，(使) 严肃
exampleTranslation: 喝酒后，你应该一直等到清醒才开车。

example: The new accounting software has made our job much easier.
meaning: n. 软件
exampleTranslation: 新的会计软件使我们的工作变得轻松许多。

example: Without healthy soil, plants cannot grow properly.
meaning: n. ⼟壤，⼟地；国⼟，领⼟ vt. 弄脏，玷污
exampleTranslation: 没有健康的土壤，植物无法正常生长。

example: Solar panels convert the sunlight into electricity.
meaning: adj. 太阳的；太阳能的
exampleTranslation: 太阳能板将阳光转化为电力。

example: She was the sole beneficiary of her father's will.
meaning: adj. 唯⼀的，仅有的；独占的 n. 脚掌；鞋底，袜底；⽐⽬⻥
exampleTranslation: 她是她父亲遗嘱的唯一受益人。

example: The president's solemn promise to the people was not broken.
meaning: adj. 严肃的；郑重的；庄严的
exampleTranslation: 这句话展示了“solemn”在语境中的用法。

example: The pond is covered in solid ice.
meaning: adj. 固体的；坚固的，坚实的；连续的 n. 固体；⽴体图形
exampleTranslation: 池塘覆盖了一层厚实的冰。

example: The workers were in solidarity with each other against the factory owners.
meaning: n. 团结⼀致，相互⽀持
exampleTranslation: 工人们在对抗工厂主的问题上保持团结一致。

example: As a adore, Jan will be going to the party solo.
meaning: n. 独唱，独奏，独舞；单⼈活动 adj. 独⾃的，单独的；独唱的，独奏的 adv. 独⾃地，单独地；独唱地，独奏地 vi. 独唱，独奏；单独进⾏
exampleTranslation: 作为一个独行侠，詹将会独自去参加派对。

example: The instructions were somewhat confusing.
meaning: adv. 有点⼉，有些，有⼏分
exampleTranslation: 这些说明有点令人困惑。

example: The company has a strict hierarchy with clearly defined roles.
meaning: n. 等级制度；掌权集团；等级体系
exampleTranslation: 公司有着严格的领导层次，角色分配清晰。

example: The terrorists attempted to hijack a plane.
meaning: vt. 劫持 (⻜机、⻋辆等)；控制，操纵 n. (⻜机、⻋辆等的) 劫持事件
exampleTranslation: 恐怖分子试图劫持一架飞机。

example: I often hike in the mountains on the weekends.
meaning: n. 远⾜，徒步旅⾏；(价格等) 猛增 vi. vt. 去…远⾜，徒步旅⾏ vt. ⼤幅提⾼ (价格等)
exampleTranslation: 我经常在周末时去山上远足

example: This book provides a historical perspective on the economic growth of the country.
meaning: adj. 历史的，历史上的；基于史实的
exampleTranslation: 这本书从历史的角度提供了关于国家经济增长的观点。

example: The historian spent decades studying the ancient civilization.
meaning: n. 历史学家
exampleTranslation: 这位历史学家花了数十年的时间研究这个古代文明。

example: The door squeaked on its rusty hinges.
meaning: n. 铰链，合⻚ vt. 给 (⻔、盖等) 装铰链
exampleTranslation: 门在锈迹斑斑的铰链上吱吱作响。

example: She injured her hip during the game.
meaning: n. 髋，臀部；野蔷薇果 adj. 新潮的，赶时髦的
exampleTranslation: 她在比赛中伤到了髋部。

example: We intend to hire two new teachers for the upcoming school year.
meaning: vt. 租⽤，租借；临时雇⽤ vt. vi. 聘⽤，录⽤ n. 租⽤，租借；新员⼯
exampleTranslation: 我们打算在下一学年雇佣两位新的老师。

example: Please insert your card into the machine.
meaning: vt. 插⼊，嵌⼊；(在⽂本中) 插⼊ n. (杂志等的) ⼴告插⻚；插⼊物
exampleTranslation: 请将你的卡插入机器。

example: Please stay inside when the weather is stormy.
meaning: adv. prep. 在…⾥，向…内 prep. 少于 (某时间) n. ⾥⾯，内部，内侧 adj. 内部的，⾥⾯的；内幕的
exampleTranslation: 当天气狂风骤雨时，请待在室内。

example: Her insight into their problems was impressive.
meaning: n. 深刻⻅解，洞悉；洞察⼒
exampleTranslation: 她对他们问题的洞察令人印象深刻。

example: I insist on paying for the meal.
meaning: vt. vi. 坚持，坚决要求；坚称
exampleTranslation: 我坚持要买单。

example: She bent down to inspect the damage to her car.
meaning: vt. 检查，审视；视察，检阅
exampleTranslation: 她弯腰去查看她的汽车损伤的情况

example: Reading about his achievements has given me the inspiration to carry on.
meaning: n. 灵感；灵感来源；⿎舞⼈⼼的⼈
exampleTranslation: 读到他的成就给了我继续下去的灵感。

example: Your story really inspires me.
meaning: vt. 激励，⿎舞；赋予灵感；激起
exampleTranslation: 你的故事真的很激励我。

example: The cat licked its paw.
meaning: vt. 舔；轻松战胜，轻易对付 vt. vi. (⽕焰) 轻轻触及 (某物) n. 舔；⼀点⼉ (涂料)
exampleTranslation: 那只猫舔它的爪子。

example: Could you please close the lid of the jar?
meaning: n. 盖，盖⼦
exampleTranslation: 翻译为你能把瓶盖盖上吗？

example: Do not lie to your friends.
meaning: vi. 躺；平放；位于；在于；说谎 n. 谎⾔，假话
exampleTranslation: 不要对朋友撒谎。

example: Life is a journey filled with unexpected miracles.
exampleTranslation: 生活是一个充满意想不到奇迹的旅程。

example: He's dedicated his lifetime to the study of this subject.
meaning: n. ⼀⽣，存在期，使⽤期
exampleTranslation: 他把一生都献给了对这个主题的研究。

example: Could you give me a lift to the airport?
meaning: vt. vi. (被) 提起；⾼兴起来；(使) 增⻓ vt. 移开；空运；解除 (限制)；偷盗 vi. 消散，消失 n. 电梯；搭便⻋；提，抬，举
exampleTranslation: 你能送我去机场吗？

example: Our store has a new shipment of merchandise.
meaning: n. 商品，货品 vt. 推销，(运⽤⼴告等进⾏) 销售
exampleTranslation: 我们的商店有新的货品到货了。

example: He was a prosperous merchant in the industry.
meaning: n. 商⼈，批发商 adj. 海上货运的，商船的
exampleTranslation: 他在行业里是个富裕的商人

example: Mercury is the smallest planet in the solar system.
meaning: n. 汞，⽔银
exampleTranslation: 水星是太阳系中最小的一颗行星

example: He begged for mercy but his pleas were ignored.
meaning: n. 仁慈，宽恕；幸运，恩惠
exampleTranslation: 他求饶，但他的恳求被忽视了。

example: Two companies will merge into one.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 合并 vi. 渐渐消失于…，逐渐融⼊…
exampleTranslation: 两个公司将合并为一个。

example: His novel is of great merit.
meaning: n. 优秀品质，价值；优点，⻓处 vt. 值得，应受到
exampleTranslation: 他的小说非常有价值。

example: We wish you a merry Christmas.
meaning: adj. 欢乐的，愉快的
exampleTranslation: 我们祝你圣诞快乐。

example: Iron is a type of metal.
meaning: n. ⾦属
exampleTranslation: 铁是一种金属。

example: The water meter is in the basement.
meaning: n. ⽶；计量器，计量表；格律 vt. ⽤仪表测量
exampleTranslation: 水表就在地下室。

example: Our key success metric was revenue.
meaning: adj. ⽶制的，公制的 n. 度量⼯具，衡量指标
exampleTranslation: 我们的关键成功指标是收入。

example: New York is a hustling metropolitan city attracting millions of tourists each year.
meaning: adj. ⼤城市的，⼤都会的
exampleTranslation: 纽约是一个繁忙的大都会城市，每年吸引数百万游客。

example: None of us is perfect.
meaning: pron. 全⽆，⼀个都没有 adv. 绝不，不怎么
exampleTranslation: 我们都不是完美的。

example: His excuse sounded like complete nonsense.
meaning: n. 胡说；愚蠢的举动；⽆意义的话
exampleTranslation: 他的借口听起来完全是胡说。

example: The medication needs to be taken orally twice a day.
meaning: adj. ⼝头的；⼝腔的，⼝的 n. ⼝试
exampleTranslation: 这种药需要每天口服两次。

example: The Earth orbits the Sun once each year.
meaning: n. (天体等的) 运⾏轨道；影响范围 vt. vi. 环绕…的轨道运⾏
exampleTranslation: 地球每年绕太阳运转一圈。

example: The general gave an order to advance.
meaning: n. 顺序；条理；秩序；命令；订单 vt. 命令；订购；安排，整理 vt. vi. 点餐
exampleTranslation: 将军下达了前进的命令。

example: The books on the shelf are arranged in an orderly fashion.
meaning: adj. 整洁的，有条理的；有秩序的 n. (医院) 勤杂⼯，护理员；勤务兵
exampleTranslation: 书架上的书整齐有序地排列着。

example: This is just an ordinary day for us.
meaning: adj. 普通的，平常的，平凡的；平庸的
exampleTranslation: 对我们来说，这只是平凡的一天。

example: He oriented himself by the stars.
meaning: vt. 使朝向，针对；确定⽅位；使适应 n. 东⽅ (指东亚地区)
exampleTranslation: 他用星星来定位自己的位置。

example: This book provides a comprehensive understanding of oriental philosophy.
meaning: adj. 东⽅的，东亚的
exampleTranslation: 这本书提供了对东方哲学的全面理解。

example: The orientation of the building allows plenty of sunshine.
meaning: n. ⽅向，定位；取向；迎新，培训
exampleTranslation: 这座建筑的朝向使得可以接收到充足的阳光。

example: The balloon popped with a loud bang.
meaning: n. 流⾏⾳乐；砰的⼀声；汽⽔；爸 vi. vt. (使) 发砰砰声；(使) 爆裂 vi. (突然地) 去；突然出现；(⽿) 胀 adj. 流⾏的，通俗的
exampleTranslation: 气球突然爆裂发出一声巨响

example: The Pope is the Bishop of Rome and the leader of the worldwide Catholic Church.
meaning: n. 教皇
exampleTranslation: 教皇是罗马的主教，是全球天主教会的领导者。

example: This is a very popular tourist destination.
meaning: adj. 流⾏的，受欢迎的；⼤众 (化) 的
exampleTranslation: 这是一个非常受欢迎的旅游目的地。

example: She collects antique porcelain cups.
meaning: n. 瓷，瓷器
exampleTranslation: 她收藏了许多古董瓷器杯子。

example: The portable radio is small and light enough to carry.
meaning: adj. 轻便的，⼿提式的 n. 便携设备，(尤指) ⼿提电脑
exampleTranslation: 这个便携式收音机小巧轻便，携带起来非常方便。

example: The hotel porter carried our bags to our room.
meaning: n. ⾏李员，搬运⼯；⻔房；乘务员
exampleTranslation: 酒店行李员把我们的行李送到了我们的房间。

example: The artist painted a beautiful portrait of my grandmother.
meaning: n. 肖像，半⾝画像；详细的描述 adj. (⽂件⻚⾯) 竖式的
exampleTranslation: 那位艺术家为我奶奶画了一幅美丽的肖像画。

example: The author portrays the character as a brave and honorable warrior.
meaning: vt. 将…表现成；描绘，描写；扮演
exampleTranslation: 作者把这个角色描绘成一个勇敢而光荣的战士。

example: I received a post from my friend.
meaning: n. 邮政；邮件；职位；哨所 n. 帖⼦，博⽂；柱，杆，桩 vt. 邮寄；派驻；张贴，公布 vt. vi. (在⽹站上) 发布
exampleTranslation: 我收到了我的朋友的邮件。

example: Remember to include the cost of postage in your budget.
meaning: n. 邮费，邮资
exampleTranslation: 记得在你的预算中包括邮费。

example: She bought a poster of her favorite band.
meaning: n. 海报，⼤幅⼴告
exampleTranslation: 海报的含义

example: The postman delivers mail to our house every morning.
meaning: n. 邮递员，邮差
exampleTranslation: 邮递员每天早晨都会把邮件送到我们家。

example: Due to the heavy rain, the match was postponed.
meaning: vt. 推迟，延缓
exampleTranslation: 由于大雨，比赛被推迟了。

example: It's important to have good posture when sitting at a desk all day.
meaning: n. 姿态，姿势；态度，⽴场 vi. 装腔作势
exampleTranslation: 坐在办公桌前一整天时，拥有良好的坐姿非常重要。

example: Only a few remnants of the original forest survive.
meaning: n. 残余部分
exampleTranslation: 原始森林只剩下少许残余。

example: The Italian Renaissance is often labelled as the beginning of the modern epoch.
meaning: n. ⽂艺复兴 (时期)；重新流⾏
exampleTranslation: 意大利的文艺复兴常常被标签为"现代"纪元的开始。

example: Please renew your library books before they are due.
meaning: vt. 延⻓，使续期；重新开始；更换
exampleTranslation: 请在到期之前续借你的图书馆书籍。

example: I need to pay my rent at the beginning of each month.
meaning: vt. vi. 租⽤，租借 vt. 出租 n. 租⾦，租⽤费
exampleTranslation: 我需要在每个月初交房租。

example: I plan to repair my broken bicycle this weekend.
meaning: vt. 修理，修补；补救，弥补 n. 修理，修补
exampleTranslation: 我打算这个周末修理我的破自行车。

example: I must repay the money I borrowed from you.
meaning: vt. 偿还，偿付；报答，回报
exampleTranslation: 我必须偿还我从你那里借的钱。

example: Could you please repeat what you just said?
meaning: vt. 重复，重写；转告；跟读 vt. vi. 重做，重复；再次发⽣ n. 重播的节⽬；重演的事件
exampleTranslation: 你能重复一下你刚才说的话吗？

example: The teacher repeatedly asked for silence.
meaning: adv. 重复地，再三地
exampleTranslation: 老师反复要求大家安静。

example: The strong smell might repel insects.
meaning: vt. 驱逐，赶⾛；使厌恶，使反感 vi. vt. (磁极等) 排斥，相斥
exampleTranslation: 强烈的气味可能会驱赶昆虫。

example: The band has a wide repertoire of songs.
meaning: n. 全部节⽬，曲⽬；全部技能
exampleTranslation: 这个乐队的歌曲曲库非常广泛。

example: Repetition is the mother of learning.
meaning: n. 重复；重复的事物
exampleTranslation: 这句谚语的意思是重复是学习之母。

example: He was beginning to tire of the constant interruptions.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 疲劳，疲倦 n. 轮胎
exampleTranslation: 他开始对连续不断的打断感到厌烦。

example: His constant complaints are tiresome.
meaning: adj. 令⼈厌倦的，讨厌的
exampleTranslation: 他不断的抱怨真是令人烦透了。

example: Scientists use microscopes to study tissue samples.
meaning: n. 纸⼱；(动植物的) 组织；薄纸
exampleTranslation: 科学家们使用显微镜来研究组织样本。

example: The knife has a very sharp blade.
exampleTranslation: 这把刀的刀片非常锋利。

example: Don't blame me for your mistakes.
meaning: vt. 责怪，把…归咎于 n. (坏事或错事的) 责任，责备
exampleTranslation: 不要把你的错误怪罪于我

example: There was a loud blast as the rocket launched into space.
meaning: n. 爆炸，⽓浪；强劲的⽓流；响声 vi. vt. 炸毁，爆破；发出刺⽿的⾼⾳ vt. 严厉批评；猛击；向…喷射
exampleTranslation: 火箭发射进入太空时发出了一声巨大的爆炸声。

example: The forest was set ablaze by the storm last night.
meaning: n. ⽕灾，烈⽕；光辉，闪耀；迸发 vi. 熊熊燃烧；闪耀；怒视
exampleTranslation: 昨晚的风暴引发了森林大火。

example: The kids were hopping with excitement.
meaning: vi. 跳跃；快速前往；换来换去 vt. 登上 (⻜机、汽⻋、⽕⻋等) n. 跳跃；短途旅⾏；啤酒花；舞会
exampleTranslation: 孩子们兴奋地跳动着。

example: Hang your coat on the hook.
meaning: n. 钩，挂钩，⻥钩；勾拳；诱饵 vi. vt. (使) 钩住，挂住 vt. 钓 (⻥)；吸引
exampleTranslation: 把你的外套挂到钩子上。

example: The deer has grown a new pair of horns.
meaning: n. (动物的) ⻆；(乐器) 号；喇叭
exampleTranslation: 那只鹿已经长出了新的一对角。

example: I had a horrible dream last night.
meaning: adj. 糟透的；可怕的；不友好的
exampleTranslation: 我昨晚做了一个太可怕的梦。

example: The horror film gave me a good scare.
meaning: n. 震惊，恐惧；恐怖故事 (或电影等)
exampleTranslation: 那部恐怖片给我留下了深刻的印象。

example: The engine produces more horsepower than before.
meaning: n. ⻢⼒ (引擎的功率单位)
exampleTranslation: 这台发动机比以前产生更大的马力。

example: He used a hose to water the garden.
meaning: n. 软管，㬵管；(旧时) 男式紧⾝裤 vt. ⽤软管洒⽔、清洗等
exampleTranslation: 他用软管浇园子

example: The manager instructed his employees to finish the report by Friday.
meaning: vt. 指⽰，吩咐；教授，传授
exampleTranslation: 经理指示他的员工在星期五之前完成报告。

example: Please follow the instruction manual carefully.
meaning: n. 指⽰，指令；⽤法说明；指导
exampleTranslation: 请仔细遵循操作手册的**指示**。

example: He is learning to play a musical instrument.
meaning: n. 仪器；乐器；仪表；⼿段；⼯具
exampleTranslation: 他正在学习弹奏一种乐器。

example: His instrumental role in the project was widely recognized.
meaning: adj. 起重要作⽤的；⽤乐器演奏的
exampleTranslation: 他在这个项目中起到了关键作用，这一点得到了广泛的认可。

example: We need to insulate the wires before we can finish the installation.
meaning: vt. 使隔热，使绝缘，使隔⾳
exampleTranslation: 在我们完成安装之前，需要先给电线做绝缘处理。

example: He hurled an insult at me.
meaning: vt. 辱骂，侮辱 n. 辱骂，侮辱
exampleTranslation: 他向我投掷侮辱

example: Pure water is a colorless and tasteless liquid.
meaning: n. 液体，液态物 adj. 液体的；流动性好的 (资产)
exampleTranslation: 纯水是一种无色无味的液体。

example: He bought a bottle of expensive liquor to celebrate his promotion.
meaning: n. 酒精类饮料，尤指烈性酒

example: The cat gave birth to a litter of kittens.
meaning: n. 垃圾；⼀窝 (幼崽)；杂物；猫砂 vt. 使乱七⼋糟；使遍布 vi. vt. 乱扔
exampleTranslation: 这只猫生了一窝小猫。

example: It's a miracle that nobody was seriously injured in the crash.
meaning: n. 奇迹；神迹；精品，极佳的例⼦
exampleTranslation: 在那场事故中竟然没有人受重伤，真是个奇迹。

example: He looked at his reflection in the mirror.
meaning: n. 镜⼦；写照 vt. 反映，与…相似；映照，反射
exampleTranslation: 他在镜子里看自己的倒影。

example: The children are always getting up to mischief when they're bored.
meaning: n. 恶作剧；使坏的念头；损害
exampleTranslation: 孩子们每当无聊的时候总爱胡闹。

example: The misfortune of some is the joy of others.
meaning: n. 不幸，厄运；不幸的事故
exampleTranslation: 一些人的不幸是其他人的快乐。

example: Miss Smith is my English teacher.
meaning: vt. vi. 未击中，未得到，未达到 vt. 未觉察；不懂；错过；思念 n. ⼩姐，⼥⼠；错过
exampleTranslation: 史密斯小姐是我英文老师。

example: The enemy launched a missile attack at dawn.
meaning: n. 导弹，⻜弹；(作为武器) 投掷物

example: The child has been missing for a week.
meaning: adj. (东西) 找不到的；(⼈) 失踪的
exampleTranslation: 这句话的含义是这个孩子已经失踪一个星期了。

example: My mission is to help you understand English better.
meaning: n. 任务，使命；职责；宗旨；传教
exampleTranslation: 我的任务是帮助你更好的理解英语

example: He spent 20 years as a Christian missionary in Africa.
meaning: n. 传教⼠
exampleTranslation: 他在非洲担任基督教传教士的职务已经20年了。

example: We need to increase our investment in nuclear energy.
meaning: adj. 原⼦核的，核能的；核武器的
exampleTranslation: 我们需要增加对核能的投资。

example: The nucleus contains the genetic material of the cell.
meaning: n. (原⼦) 核；细胞核；(组织) 核⼼
exampleTranslation: 细胞核包含了细胞的遗传物质。

example: He took extra precautions to preclude the possibility of an error.
meaning: vt. 阻⽌，妨碍，排除
exampleTranslation: 他采取了额外的预防措施以防止出错的可能性。

example: English has become the predominant language in many countries.
meaning: adj. 占主导地位的，最主要的
exampleTranslation: 英语已在许多国家成为主要的语言。

example: She is pregnant with her first child.
meaning: adj. 怀孕的；耐⼈寻味的
exampleTranslation: 她怀了第一个孩子。

example: After a long day of work, I needed to rest.
meaning: n. 其余的⼈，剩余部分；休息时间 vi. vt. 休息，放松；(被) ⽀撑，托 vi. 被搁置，中⽌；安息，⻓眠
exampleTranslation: 经过一整天的工作后，我需要休息。

example: He seemed to be restless, always looking for something new.
meaning: adj. 坐⽴不安的；没有真正休息的
exampleTranslation: 他似乎总是不安分，总在寻找新鲜事物。

example: She likes to spray some perfume in her room.
meaning: vt. vi. 喷，喷洒；向…扫射，往…上撒 n. 喷雾；喷雾器；浪花，⻜沫
exampleTranslation: 她喜欢在房间里喷一些香水。Shelikestospraysomeperfumeinherroom.

example: The spring in the mattress is broken.
meaning: n. 春天；弹簧，发条；泉 vi. 跳，蹦
exampleTranslation: 床垫里的弹簧坏了。

example: She likes to sprinkle sugar on her cereal.
meaning: vt. 洒，撒；使零星分布，点缀 n. 少量，⼀点；⼩⾬
exampleTranslation: 她喜欢在麦片上撒糖。

example: There is a beautiful fountain in the center of the square.
meaning: n. 正⽅形；⼴场；平⽅ adj. 正⽅形的；⽅的；平⽅；两清的 vt. 使成正⽅形；使成平⽅ adv. 正对着地，径直地
exampleTranslation: 广场中心有个漂亮的喷泉。

example: She squeezed the orange to get the juice.
meaning: vt. vi. 挤压，捏；(使) 挤⼊，塞⼊ vt. 榨出；勒索；严格限制 n. 捏；挤出的液体；挤，塞；拮据
exampleTranslation: 她挤橙子取汁。

example: He was stabbed to death in a bar fight.
meaning: vt. (⽤⼑等锐器) 刺，捅 vt. vi. (⽤⼿指或尖物) 戳，刺 n. 刺，捅；突然⼀阵剧痛；企图
exampleTranslation: 他在酒吧斗殴中被刺死了。

example: The library has a large stack of books.
meaning: n. (整⻬的) ⼀堆；⼤量；⼤烟囱 vt. vi. (使) 放成整⻬的⼀叠 vt. 使成叠地放在
exampleTranslation: 图书馆有一大堆书。

example: The tired runner began to stagger near the finish line.
meaning: vi. vt. 蹒跚，摇摇晃晃地⾛动 vt. 使震惊；使错开；交错布置
exampleTranslation: 疲惫的跑者在终点附近开始踉跄。

example: Trade between the two countries has increased over the years.
meaning: n. 贸易；⾏业；营业额；⼿艺 vi. vt. 做买卖；(在证券交易所) 交易 vi. 营业，营运 vt. 交换，以物易物
exampleTranslation: 这两个国家之间的贸易在过去的几年中一直在增加。

example: Apple's logo is a recognized trademark worldwide.
meaning: n. 商标；标志，特征
exampleTranslation: 苹果的logo是一个全球知名的商标。

example: There's always a lot of traffic in the city centre.
meaning: n. 交通；流量；⾮法交易 vi. ⾮法交易
exampleTranslation: 市中心总是交通繁忙。

example: She wrapped the scarf around her neck.
meaning: prep. adv. 周围，环绕；附近，到处 adv. ⼤约
exampleTranslation: 她把围巾围在了脖子周围。

example: Could you arrange a meeting for us?
meaning: vt. vi. 安排，筹备 vt. 整理，排列，布置；编曲，改编
exampleTranslation: 你能为我们安排一个会议吗？

example: The police had a warrant to arrest him.
meaning: vt. 逮捕；阻⽌；吸引…的注意⼒ n. 逮捕；(⾝体部分) 突然停⽌⼯作
exampleTranslation: 警察有逮捕他的令状。

example: They will arrive in New York at noon.
meaning: vi. 到达，寄到；发⽣；出⽣

example: His late arrival at the meeting was unexpected.
meaning: n. 到达，到来；到达者
exampleTranslation: 他在会议中的迟到出乎意料。

example: He is an arrogant boss who never listens to his employees' suggestions.
meaning: adj. 傲慢的，⾃⼤的
exampleTranslation: 他是一个目中无人的老板，从不听取员工的建议。

example: The arrow hit the bull's eye.
meaning: n. 箭，⽮；箭头，箭号
exampleTranslation: 箭击中了靶心。

example: His conscience was pricked by the suffering he saw.
meaning: n. 良⼼，良知；内疚

example: He is a conscientious worker and always completes his tasks on time.
meaning: adj. 认真的，勤勤恳恳的
exampleTranslation: 他是个尽责的员工,总是准时完成任务。

example: We've had five consecutive days of rain.
meaning: adj. 连续的，不间断的
exampleTranslation: 我们已经连续下了五天的雨。

example: There seems to be a general consensus that the law should be changed.
meaning: n. ⼀致看法，共识
exampleTranslation: 似乎大家普遍达成共识，认为应该改变这项法律。

example: She gave her consent to the proposal.
meaning: n. 许可，准许，同意 vi. 许可，准许，同意
exampleTranslation: 她同意了这个提议。

example: The two companies consolidated to form a single entity.
meaning: vt. vi. (使) 加强，(使) 巩固；(使) 合并
exampleTranslation: 两个公司合并成为一个单一实体。

example: His bright red hair made him conspicuous in the crowd.
meaning: adj. 易⻅的，明显的，惹⼈注意的
exampleTranslation: 他鲜艳的红发在人群中非常引人注目。

example: Before making a decision, I need to consult with my family.
meaning: vt. vi. 向…咨询，求教；与…商量 vt. 查阅，参考
exampleTranslation: 让我决定之前，我需要和我的家人商量。

example: She works as a consultant for a major IT company.
meaning: n. 顾问；⾼级顾问医师，会诊医师
exampleTranslation: 她在一家大型IT公司担任顾问职务。

example: Can you wipe the table down once you're finished eating?
meaning: vt. 擦，拭；抹去，消除 n. 擦，拭；(湿) 纸⼱
exampleTranslation: 你吃完饭可以擦一下桌子吗？

example: The electrician is laying wire underground.
meaning: n. ⾦属丝；电线；铁丝⽹；电报 vt. 为…接电线；安窃听器；发电报
exampleTranslation: 电工正在地下铺设电线。

example: She made a wise investment and doubled her money.
meaning: adj. 睿智的，明智的 suff. 以…⽅式，朝…⽅向；在…⽅⾯
exampleTranslation: 她的投资明智，使得资金翻了一番。

example: He admired the wisdom of keeping silent in such a situation.
meaning: n. 智慧；明智；学识，学问
exampleTranslation: 他欣赏在这种情况下保持沉默的智慧。

example: He decided to withhold the information until the right moment.
meaning: vt. 拒绝给予，扣留，隐瞒
exampleTranslation: 保留情况

example: The keys are within the drawer.
meaning: prep. 在…之内；在…内部，在…⾥ adv. 在⾥⾯，在内部
exampleTranslation: 钥匙在抽屉里。

example: The city walls were built to withstand an attack.
meaning: vt. 经受住，承受，顶住
exampleTranslation: 城市的围墙是为抵挡攻击而建的。

example: The tree branch could snap if you climb on it.
meaning: vt. vi. (使) 断裂；(使啪地) 移动；拍照 vi. 咬；突然失去⾃制⼒ n. 啪嗒声，咔嚓声；照⽚；摁扣 adj. 匆忙的，仓促的，迅速的
exampleTranslation: 如果你爬上这个树枝，它可能会断。

example: He managed to snatch the gun from her hand.
meaning: vt. vi. ⼀把抓起，迅速抓住 vt. 强抢，夺⾛；抓紧时间做某事 n. ⽚段，只⾔⽚语；抓，抢
exampleTranslation: 他设法从她手中夺走了枪。

example: He managed to sneak into the movie theater without being seen.
meaning: vi. 偷偷地⾛，潜⾏，溜⾛；告状 vt. 偷偷地做，偷拿；偷⾛，顺⾛ n. 告状的⼩孩 adj. 突然的，出其不意的
exampleTranslation: 他成功地潜行进电影院而未被看见。

example: I need to sneeze, but it got away.
meaning: vi. 打喷嚏 n. 喷嚏 (声)
exampleTranslation: 我需要打喷嚏，但它没有出来。

example: She sniffed the flowers with delight.
meaning: vt. vi. 嗅，闻 vi. 抽鼻⼦ n. 吸⽓ (声)，抽鼻⼦ (声)
exampleTranslation: 她喜悦地闻了闻花香

example: His snobbish attitude turns many people off.
meaning: adj. 势利的
exampleTranslation: 他势利的态度让很多人讨厌。

example: He is a detective in the police department.
meaning: n. 侦探
exampleTranslation: 他是警察局的一名侦探。

example: The smoke detector is designed to warn of fire hazards.
meaning: n. 探测器，侦察器
exampleTranslation: 烟雾探测器被设计用来预警火灾隐患。

example: The plane had to deviate from its course to avoid the storm.
meaning: vi. 背离，偏离
exampleTranslation: 为避免暴风雨，飞机不得不偏离其航线。

example: I met the devil in my dreams last night.
meaning: n. 魔⻤，恶魔；淘⽓⻤；家伙
exampleTranslation: 我昨晚在梦中遇到了魔鬼。

example: She decided to devote her life to helping the poor.
meaning: vt. 奉献，献⾝；把…⽤于
exampleTranslation: 她决定将自己的生命献给帮助穷人。

example: We need to fix the leaky faucet.
meaning: vt. 修理，解决；使固定；确定 n. (简单暂时的) 解决办法；困境
