example: The light fixture in the living room needs to be replaced.
meaning: n. 固定设施；体育活动；固定事物
exampleTranslation: 客厅的灯具需要更换。

example: The candle on the table gave out a bright flame.
meaning: n. ⽕焰；强烈的感情；橘红⾊ vi. 燃烧 vi. vt. (因强烈情绪⽽) 脸红
exampleTranslation: 桌子上的蜡烛发出明亮的火焰。

example: The letter had a red seal on the flap.
meaning: vt. vi. 拍打 (翅膀)；摆动，挥动 vi. 忧虑，激动 n. ⽚状垂悬物；拍打 (声)；忧虑
exampleTranslation: 信封的口子上封着红色的印章。

example: The fire flared up as the wind grew stronger.
meaning: vi. (短暂) 烧旺，燃烧；突发，加剧 vt. vi. 张⼤，张开 (鼻孔)；发怒地说 n. 闪光信号灯；旺⽕；喇叭裤 (复)
exampleTranslation: 风一强，火就烈了。

example: A flash of lightning illuminated the sky.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 闪光；⽤光发出信号；闪现 vt. (快速地) 出⽰；快速发送 (信息) vi. ⻜速运动；猛然想起；突然显露 n. 闪光；闪光灯；闪现；情感突发
exampleTranslation: 一道闪电照亮了天空。

example: The land in this area is really flat.
meaning: adj. 平的；枯燥的；单调的；断然的 n. 公寓；平⾯部分；瘪轮胎 adv. 平直地，平躺地；直截了当地
exampleTranslation: 这个地区的土地真的很平坦。

example: She knew how to flatter her boss by skillfully complimenting his management style.
meaning: vt. 奉承，讨好；使…显得更好
exampleTranslation: 她知道如何通过巧妙地赞扬老板的管理风格来奉承他。

example: The soup has a rich chicken flavour.
meaning: n. 味道，⻛味；特⾊；调味品 vt. 给…调味
exampleTranslation: 这个汤有浓郁的鸡肉味。

example: When the earthquake happened, everyone started to flee for safety.
meaning: vi. vt. 逃离，逃避
exampleTranslation: 地震发生时，每个人都开始逃离以求安全。

example: Be careful not to cut into the flesh when peeling the apple.
meaning: n. ⾁；(⼈体的) ⽪肤；果⾁；⾁体 vt. 使具体，使充实
exampleTranslation: 削苹果时要小心不要削到果肉

example: The flight from New York to London takes approximately 7 hours.
meaning: n. 航班；⻜⾏；⼀段 (楼梯)；逃跑
exampleTranslation: 从纽约到伦敦的飞行大约需要7个小时。

example: Do you have any brothers or sisters?
meaning: det. pron. ⼀些，⼀点，任何⼀个 adv. ⼀点也 (不)
exampleTranslation: 你有兄弟姐妹吗？

example: Does anybody have an eraser?
meaning: pron. 任何⼈
exampleTranslation: 有人有橡皮吗？

example: Anyhow, I will finish the project on time.
meaning: adv. ⽆论如何，反正；尽管如此 adv. 对了；⾄少
exampleTranslation: 无论如何，我都会准时完成这个项目。

example: Is there anything I can help with?
meaning: pron. 任何事物，随便什么东西
exampleTranslation: 我能帮忙做些什么吗？』

example: She knew it was wrong, but she did it anyway.
meaning: adv. 反正，⽽且；⽆论如何，尽管如此
exampleTranslation: 她知道那是错误的，但她还是那样做了。

example: You can go anywhere you like.
meaning: adv. 在 (或去) 任何地⽅ pron. 任何地⽅
exampleTranslation: 你可以去你喜欢的任何地方。

example: Real estate is usually a stable asset.
meaning: n. 资产，财产；有⽤的物 (或⼈)
exampleTranslation: 房地产通常是稳定的资产。

example: The teacher assigns homework to the students every day.
meaning: vt. 分配，分派；指派；为…设定
exampleTranslation: 老师每天都会为学生分配作业。

example: The teacher gave us an assignment on world history.
meaning: n. 作业，任务；(任务等的) 分配
exampleTranslation: 老师给我们留了一份世界历史的作业。

example: Please include a bibliography at the end of your paper.
meaning: n. 参考书⽬，⽂献⽬录
exampleTranslation: 请在论文的末尾附上参考书目。

example: Bind the twine around the package tightly.
meaning: vt. 捆绑；包扎；联合；约束；装订 vi. vt. (使) 凝结，(使) 黏合 n. 窘境，困境
exampleTranslation: 将麻线紧紧地绑在包裹上。

example: This book is the latest biography of Abraham Lincoln.
meaning: n. ⼈物传记，传记⽂学
exampleTranslation: 这本书是关于亚伯拉罕·林肯最新的传记。

example: My favorite subject at school is biology.
meaning: n. ⽣物学；⽣理
exampleTranslation: 我在学校里最喜欢的科目是生物学。

example: I need a bit of sugar for my coffee.
meaning: n. 稍微；稍顷；⼩量；部分；⽐特
exampleTranslation: 我的咖啡需要一点糖.

example: A mosquito bite made her arm itch.
meaning: vi. vt. 咬；叮，蜇 vi. 上钩，咬钩；产⽣严重影响 n. 咬；(⻝物) ⼀⼝；(被叮后的) 包
exampleTranslation: 蚊子叮咬让她的手臂发痒。

example: The quinine has a bitter taste.
meaning: adj. 苦的；使⼈悲痛的；严寒的 adj. 激烈⽽不愉快的；愤愤不平的 n. 苦啤酒；苦酒原汁
exampleTranslation: 奎宁的味道很苦。

example: The bizarre weather has left many people confused.
meaning: adj. 奇异的，古怪的
exampleTranslation: 这种奇怪的天气让许多人感到困惑。

example: She made a coherent argument for the welfare reform.
meaning: adj. 连贯的；⾔谈条理清楚的
exampleTranslation: 她为福利改革提出了连贯的论据。

example: He found an old coin under the sofa.
meaning: n. 硬币 vt. 创造 (新词)
exampleTranslation: 他在沙发下发现了一枚旧硬币。

example: Could you grab me a can of coke from the fridge?
meaning: n. 可卡因；焦炭；可⼝可乐
exampleTranslation: 能从冰箱里给我拿罐可乐吗？

example: We may collaborate on many projects in the future.
meaning: vi. 合作，协作；勾结，叛国
exampleTranslation: 这句话展示了“collaborate”在语境中的用法。

example: He turned up the collar of his coat because of the wind.
meaning: n. ⾐领，领⼦；(动物的) 项圈 vt. 抓住，逮住
exampleTranslation: 他因为刮风把大衣领子翻了起来。

example: Colonel Johnson commanded the troops in the battle.
meaning: n. 上校
exampleTranslation: 约翰逊上校在这场战斗中指挥了兵力。

example: The colonial period was a time of great change in America.
meaning: adj. 殖⺠地的；殖⺠地时期的 n. 殖⺠地居⺠
exampleTranslation: 殖民时期是美国发生重大变化的时期。

example: He migrated to a British colony in Africa.
meaning: n. 殖⺠地；群体，群落
exampleTranslation: 他移居到了非洲的一个英国殖民地。

example: The combination of sweet and sour flavors is really refreshing in this dish.
meaning: n. 结合体；结合；号码组合
exampleTranslation: 这道菜中甜与酸的组合真的使人耳目一新。

example: She shows great enthusiasm for her work.
meaning: n. 热爱，热情；热衷的活动
exampleTranslation: 她对工作充满了热情。

example: She was very enthusiastic about the project.
meaning: adj. 热情的，热衷的，热⼼的
exampleTranslation: 她对这个项目充满热情。

example: We spent the entire day on the beach.
meaning: adj. 全部的，整个的
exampleTranslation: 我们在海滩上度过了整整一天。

example: His long service entitles him to a longer holiday.
meaning: vt. 给予…权利 (或资格)；给…题名
exampleTranslation: 他的长期服务让他有资格享受更长的假期。

example: The corporation is legally an independent entity.
meaning: n. 实体
exampleTranslation: 那个企业在法律上是个独立的实体。

example: He is a very successful entrepreneur with a flair for marketing.
meaning: n. 企业家
exampleTranslation: 他是一位对营销有天赋的非常成功的创业家。

example: The main entrance to the building is around the corner.
meaning: n. ⼊⼝；登场；进⼊权；准许加⼊ vt. 使狂喜，使⼊迷
exampleTranslation: 大楼的主入口在拐角处。

example: He made a grand entry at the party.
meaning: n. 进⼊；加⼊；参赛作品；条⽬
exampleTranslation: 他在派对上显眼地登场。

example: Blue whale is the largest animal on the planet.
meaning: n. 鲸 vi. 捕鲸 vi. vt. ⼤⼒击打
exampleTranslation: 蓝鲸是地球上最大的动物。

example: You can do whatever you want.
meaning: det. pron. 任何；⽆论什么；⽆所谓 ；随便 adv. (⽤于否定句后表强调)
exampleTranslation: 你可以做任何你想做的事。

example: You can go whenever you like.
meaning: conj. ⽆论何时，每当 adv. (⽤于强调) 什么时候
exampleTranslation: 你想走的时候就可以走。

example: He enjoys reading, whereas his brother prefers sports.
meaning: conj. 然⽽，但是；鉴于
exampleTranslation: 他喜欢阅读，而他的兄弟偏爱体育运动。

example: This is the method whereby we can control the whole system.
meaning: adv. 凭此，借以
exampleTranslation: 这就是我们可以控制整个系统的方法。

example: You can use the app wherever you are.
meaning: conj. adv. ⽆论哪⾥；在任何情况下 adv. 究竟在哪⾥
exampleTranslation: 无论你在哪里，你都可以使用这个应用。

example: You can take whichever book you like.
meaning: det. pron. ⽆论哪个
exampleTranslation: 你可以拿你喜欢的任何一本书。

example: While I was reading, my brother was watching TV.
meaning: conj. 在…期间，当…时；然⽽；尽管 n. ⼀段时间
exampleTranslation: 我在阅读的时候，我的兄弟在看电视。

example: He cracked his whip and the horse started to move.
meaning: vt. 鞭打；突然地除去，抽出；搅打 vi. vt. (使朝某⼀⽅向) 猛然移动 n. 鞭⼦；纪律委员，党鞭
exampleTranslation: 他抽了一鞭，马开始跑起来。

example: The referee blew his whistle to start the game.
meaning: n. 哨⼦；⼝哨声，汽笛声；汽笛 vt. vi. 吹⼝哨 vi. 吹哨⼦；鸣叫；嗖嗖地移动
exampleTranslation: 裁判吹哨开始了比赛。

example: Whoever arrives first will get a prize.
meaning: pron. ⽆论是谁；…的⼈；究竟是谁
exampleTranslation: 谁先到达，谁就能得到奖励。

example: Cherry blossoms bloom in the spring.
meaning: vi. 开花，绽放；精神焕发，繁荣 n. 花，花朵；⻘春焕发
exampleTranslation: 樱花在春天开放。

example: The trees are in full blossom.
meaning: n. (树或灌⽊的) 花，花簇 vi. 开花；变得健康 (快乐等)，兴旺
exampleTranslation: 树木正盛开花朵。

example: The wind blows the leaves off the trees.
meaning: vt. vi. 吹 (⽓)；刮 (⻛)；吹动；吹奏 vt. 擤；送⻜吻；炸开；挥霍；吹出 n. 猛击；打击；吹
exampleTranslation: 风吹落树叶。

example: The architect drew up a blueprint for the new house.
meaning: n. 蓝图；⾏动⽅案；(基因的) 模型
exampleTranslation: 建筑师为新房子准备了设计蓝图。

example: He made his first blunder in politics by underestimating his opponent.
meaning: n. 愚蠢的错误，疏忽，失误 vi. 犯愚蠢的错误，失误
exampleTranslation: 他对政敌的低估是他在政治上所犯的第一个大错误。

example: The knife is so blunt that it can't cut through the meat.
meaning: adj. 钝的，不锋利的；直⾔不讳的 vt. 使 (感觉等) 减弱；使变钝
exampleTranslation: 这把刀太钝了，割不动肉。

example: The fog will blur the sight of the road.
meaning: n. 模糊不清的事物；模糊的记忆 vt. vi. (使) 视线模糊；使 (想法等) 模糊
exampleTranslation: 雾气会使道路看起来模糊不清。

example: His remark made me blush.
meaning: vi. (因尴尬或害羞) 脸红；感到羞愧 n. ⾯部泛起的红晕；腮红
exampleTranslation: 他的话让我脸红。

example: The teacher gave praise to the student for his hard work.
meaning: n. 称赞，赞美；(对上帝的) 称颂 vt. 称赞，赞美；称颂，感谢 (上帝)
exampleTranslation: 老师称赞了这个学生的勤奋努力。

example: I pray for your well-being every night before I sleep.
meaning: vi. vt. 祈望，祈求；祈祷，祷告 adv. (⽤于提问或要求) 请问，请
exampleTranslation: 我每晚睡前都会为你的安康祈祷

example: Every night before bed, he said a prayer for his loved ones.
meaning: n. 祷词；祈祷；祈祷会；企盼的事
exampleTranslation: 每晚临睡前，他都为他的亲人祈祷。

example: There is a striking resemblance between the two paintings.
meaning: n. 相似，类似
exampleTranslation: 这两幅画之间有极其显著的相似之处。

example: The twins closely resemble each other.
meaning: vt. 看起来像，与…相似
exampleTranslation: 这对双胞胎长得很像。

example: The city's water supply comes from a reservoir in the mountains.
meaning: n. ⽔库；⼤量储备；储液器
exampleTranslation: 城市的水源来自山上的一个水库。

example: My friend bought a new residence in the city.
meaning: n. 住处，住宅；居住；居住权
exampleTranslation: 我的朋友在城里买了一栋新的住宅。

example: He is a resident of Canada, but he was born in India.
meaning: n. 居⺠，住⼾；住院实习医⽣ adj. (在某地) 居住的
exampleTranslation: 他是加拿大的居民，但他出生在印度。

example: Due to personal reasons, I have decided to resign from my position.
meaning: vi. vt. 辞职 vt. 使顺从
exampleTranslation: 由于个人原因，我决定放弃我的职位。

example: He was resolute in his decision to quit smoking.
meaning: adj. 坚决的，坚定的，果断的
exampleTranslation: 他坚决决定戒烟。

example: As a New Year resolution, I promised to quit smoking.
meaning: n. 决议；决⼼；解决；分辨率
exampleTranslation: 作为新年决心，我承诺要戒烟。

example: The government is determined to resolve the crisis.
meaning: vt. 解决 vt. vi. 决⼼，决定 n. 决⼼，坚定的信念
exampleTranslation: 政府决心解决这个危机。

example: He collected the blood specimen for testing.
meaning: n. 标本，样本；具有…特性的⼈
exampleTranslation: 他收集了血液样本用于检测。

example: The fireworks made a stunning spectacle.
meaning: n. 眼镜；壮观的景象；奇特的现象
exampleTranslation: 烟火表演相当震撼。

example: There was a large crowd of spectators at the football match.
meaning: n. 观众
exampleTranslation: 这场足球比赛引来了许多观众

example: The spectrum of light from a star is analyzed by the spectrograph.
meaning: n. 光谱；系列，范围；波谱
exampleTranslation: 光谱仪分析来自星星的光谱。

example: Earth is not a perfect sphere.
meaning: n. 球 (体)，球形；范围，领域
exampleTranslation: 地球并不是一个完美的球体。

example: Be careful not to spill the water.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 溢出或洒出 vi. 蜂拥⽽出，涌出 n. 洒出 (量)，泼出 (量)；跌落
exampleTranslation: 小心别把水洒出来。

example: The dancer spun around the stage.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 快速旋转；(使) 急转⾝；纺 vt. 吐丝，作茧；有倾向性地陈述 n. ⾼速旋转；兜⻛；旋转 (球)
exampleTranslation: 舞者在舞台上旋转。

example: The human spine is composed of 33 individual bones called vertebrae.
meaning: n. 脊椎；刺，棘；书脊；⻣⽓
exampleTranslation: 人类的脊柱由33个叫做脊椎的个体骨骼组成。

example: Our plane spiraled down through the clouds to the runway.
meaning: n. 螺旋式；逐渐加速上升 (或下降) adj. 螺旋形的，螺旋式的 vi. 螺旋式上升 (或下降)；急剧增⻓
exampleTranslation: 我们的飞机通过云层螺旋降低到跑道。

example: Her spirit was strong, but her body was frail.
meaning: n. 精神；情绪；勇⽓，意志；灵魂 n. 本质；烈酒；(某种类型的) ⼈ vt. 偷偷带⾛
exampleTranslation: 她精神饱满，但体格羸弱

example: His spiritual journey towards self-discovery began when he first read the works of ancient philosophers.
meaning: adj. 精神的，⼼灵的；宗教的 n. 灵歌 (宗教歌曲)
exampleTranslation: 他的精神之旅自从他第一次阅读古代哲学家的作品时就开始了。

example: He spat out the seeds.
meaning: vt. 吐，唾；怒斥 vi. 吐⼝⽔；劈啪作响；下⼩⾬ n. 唾液，⼝⽔；烤⾁扦
exampleTranslation: 动词

example: He quit his job out of spite.
meaning: n. 怨恨，恶意 vt. 故意伤害，激怒
exampleTranslation: 他因为恨意而辞掉了他的工作。

example: Don't splash water on the floor.
meaning: vi. 泼洒，哗啦地溅；溅着⽔花⾏⾛ vt. 把 (⽔、泥等) 泼在…上 n. 溅泼声；引⼈注⽬的效果
exampleTranslation: 别把水洒在地板上。

example: The performance was absolutely splendid.
meaning: adj. 极好的，绝妙的；壮丽的 int. (表⽰赞同) 好极了
exampleTranslation: 翻译为：那场表演绝对精彩。

example: The company decided to split into three smaller companies.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 分裂；(使) 分开；(使) 撕裂 vt. 分担，分摊；划破，割破 vi. (和某⼈) 断绝关系；(迅速) 离开 n. 分歧；划分，份额；裂缝；劈叉
exampleTranslation: 公司决定分裂成三家小公司。

example: The audience burst into spontaneous applause.
meaning: adj. (⾏为) ⾃发的；率性的；⾃然的
exampleTranslation: 观众爆发出自发的掌声。

example: There is a coffee spot on my shirt.
meaning: n. 地点；斑点；污渍；粉刺；排位 vt. 发现，看⻅ adj. 现货交易的，⽴即⽀付的
exampleTranslation: 我衬衫上有个咖啡斑。

example: Every spouse should respect each other's work.
meaning: n. 配偶
exampleTranslation: 每一位配偶都应尊重对方的工作。

example: Can you tell me the time?
meaning: n. 时间；时刻；时段；时期；次 vt. 为…安排时间；计时
exampleTranslation: 你可以告诉我现在几点了吗？

example: His arrival was most timely.
meaning: adj. 及时的，适时的
exampleTranslation: 他的到来真是恰逢其时。

example: Peter is a timid child, he's afraid of strangers.
meaning: adj. 胆怯的，羞怯的
exampleTranslation: 彼得是个胆小的孩子，他害怕陌生人。

example: Tin is a chemical element with the symbol Sn.
meaning: n. 锡；罐头；⾦属⻝品盒；烤盘
exampleTranslation: 锡是一种化学元素,符号为Sn.

example: He gave me a tiny smile.
meaning: adj. 极⼩的，微量的
exampleTranslation: 他给我微微一笑。

example: The tower blocks have an impressive view of the city.
meaning: n. 塔，塔楼；信号发射塔 vi. 远⾼于，⾼耸于；胜过
exampleTranslation: 那些高楼公寓可以看到城市的壮丽景色。

example: Some mushrooms are considered toxic and can cause death if ingested.
meaning: adj. 有毒的；恶劣的，极其有害的
exampleTranslation: 一些蘑菇被认为是有毒的，如果误食可能会导致死亡。

example: She is a wicked woman who has no ethics.
meaning: adj. 邪恶的；调⽪的；有害的；极好 adv. 极其，⾮常 n. 恶⼈，邪恶的⼈
exampleTranslation: 她是一个没有道德的恶女人。

example: The width of the table is two meters.
meaning: n. 宽度，⼴度
exampleTranslation: 这张桌子的宽度是两米。

example: The horses are wild and have never been ridden.
meaning: adj. 野⽣的；荒凉的；⽆法⽆天的 n. 野⽣状态
exampleTranslation: 这句话展示了“wild”在语境中的用法。

example: The wind blew my hat off.
meaning: n. ⻛；胃⽓，肠⽓；管乐器 vi. vt. 蜿蜒，迂回；给 (钟表) 上发条 vt. 缠绕，绕成团
exampleTranslation: 风把我的帽子吹掉了。

example: She gave me a quick wink to show she was joking.
meaning: vi. 眨⼀只眼，使眼⾊；闪烁，明灭 n. 眨⼀只眼，眨眼⽰意，眼⾊
exampleTranslation: 她向我快速地眨了眨眼睛，表示她正在开玩笑。

example: She broke her arm during the fall.
meaning: n. ⼿臂；袖⼦；扶⼿；臂状物 vi. vt. 武装，装备，备战
exampleTranslation: 她在摔倒时摔断了手臂。

example: The army is mobilizing for war.
meaning: n. 军队，陆军；⼀⼤群
exampleTranslation: 军队正在为战争动员。

example: I want to congratulate you on your promotion.
meaning: vt. 祝贺；为⾃⼰感到⾼兴或⾃豪
exampleTranslation: 我要祝贺你晋升了。

example: A letter of congratulation arrived this morning.
meaning: n. 祝贺，贺辞；恭喜
exampleTranslation: 一封祝贺信今天早上送到了。

example: Subordinating conjunctions are used to join a subordinate dependent clause to a main clause, like in the sentence, Since I love cheese, I will have another slice.
meaning: n. 结合，同时发⽣；连词
exampleTranslation: 由于我喜欢奶酪，我还要再来一片。

example: We need to conquer our fear to move forward.
meaning: vt. 占领，征服；克服
exampleTranslation: 我们需要战胜我们的恐惧才能向前进步。

example: The territory was brought under his conquest.
meaning: n. 征服，占领；爱情的俘虏
exampleTranslation: 这片领土被他所征服。

example: The earthquake was a disaster, causing loss of life and property.
meaning: n. 灾难；不幸；失败的⼈ (或事物)
exampleTranslation: 这次地震是一场灾难，导致了人员伤亡和财产损失。

example: The party was a disastrous failure.
meaning: adj. 灾难性的，以失败告终的
exampleTranslation: 这个派对是彻头彻尾的失败。

example: We should discard outdated notions.
meaning: vt. 抛弃，丢弃 n. 被抛弃的⼈或物
exampleTranslation: 我们应该抛弃过时的观念。

example: It's difficult to discern the truth when both parties are biased.
meaning: vt. 觉察出，了解；(依稀) 分辨出
exampleTranslation: 当双方都有偏见时，很难辨别真相。

example: The doctor gave him a discharge.
meaning: vt. 准许离开，解雇；履⾏；开⽕ vi. vt. 排出，放出；放 (电) n. 排出 (物)；获准离开；履⾏
exampleTranslation: 医生让他出院了。

example: The Victorian era marked a period of prosperity and cultural changes.
meaning: n. 时代，年代，时期
exampleTranslation: 维多利亚时代标志着一个繁荣和文化变革的时期。

example: We must take steps to eradicate poverty from our society.
meaning: vt. 消灭，灭绝，根除
exampleTranslation: 我们必须采取步骤从我们的社会中根除贫困。

example: We need to erect a monument in memory of the heroes.
meaning: adj. 竖起的，直⽴的 vt. 建造；使…竖起；创⽴
exampleTranslation: 我们需要为英雄们立一座纪念碑。

example: Soil erosion is a serious problem in the mountain areas.
meaning: n. 侵蚀，⻛化；逐渐削弱
exampleTranslation: 土壤侵蚀在山区是一个严重的问题。

example: Your approach to solving this problem is erroneous.
meaning: adj. 错误的，出错的
exampleTranslation: 你解决这个问题的方法是错误的。

example: The computer is showing an error message that I don't understand.
meaning: n. 错误，差错
exampleTranslation: 电脑显示出我不明白的错误信息。

example: The volcano could erupt at any time.
meaning: vi. vt. (⽕⼭) 爆发；突然发出 (叫喊) vi. 突然发⽣，爆发；(斑疹) 冒出
exampleTranslation: 火山随时都可能爆发。

example: He agreed to escort her to the ball.
meaning: vt. 护卫，护送 n. 护卫者；社交伴侣
exampleTranslation: 他答应陪她去参加舞会。

example: The soap will foam up when you add water.
meaning: n. 泡沫橡㬵；泡沫；泡沫剂 vi. (液体) 起泡沫
exampleTranslation: 加水时，肥皂会起泡沫。

example: We should focus on the task at hand.
meaning: vi. vt. 集中 (注意⼒等) 于；调节焦距 vt. 聚焦于 n. 焦点，中⼼；焦距，调焦
exampleTranslation: 我们应该专注于手头的任务。

example: The morning fog obscured their view of the lake.
meaning: n. 雾，雾⽓；迷惑，迷惘 vi. vt. (使) 起雾 vt. 使迷惘，使迷惑
exampleTranslation: 早晨的雾使他们无法看清湖面。

example: Teachers should nourish a love of learning in their students.
meaning: vt. 给…提供营养；培养，助⻓
exampleTranslation: 老师们应该在学生中培养对学习的热爱。

example: She was engrossed in her new novel.
meaning: n. ⻓篇⼩说 adj. 新颖的，新奇的
exampleTranslation: 她全神贯注在新小说里。

example: The novelty of the toy attracted the attention of the children.
meaning: n. 新奇；新奇的事物 adj. 新颖独特的
exampleTranslation: 这个新潮的玩具吸引了孩子们的注意。

example: Nowadays, people rely heavily on the internet for information.
meaning: adv. 如今，现今
exampleTranslation: 现在，人们十分依赖网络获取信息

example: We're in the middle of nowhere.
meaning: adv. ⽆处，哪⾥都不
exampleTranslation: 我们在荒郊野外。

example: I finally found the perfect apartment after months of searching.
meaning: n. 公寓；套房
exampleTranslation: 我在几个月的寻找后终于找到了一间理想的公寓。

example: If I said anything to upset you, I apologize.
meaning: vi. 道歉，认错
exampleTranslation: 如果我说了什么让你不高兴的，我道歉。

example: I owe you an apology for my behavior last night.
meaning: n. 道歉，认错
exampleTranslation: 对于我昨晚的行为，我应该向你道歉。

example: This winter is particularly bleak.
meaning: adj. 没有希望的；阴冷的；荒凉的
exampleTranslation: 这个冬天特别荒凉。

example: The soldier bled to death on the battlefield.
meaning: vi. 流⾎，出⾎；(颜⾊) 渗开 vt. 给 (某⼈) 放⾎
exampleTranslation: 士兵在战场上失血过多而死

example: Please blend the ingredients together before baking.
meaning: vt. 使混合，掺和；调制，配制 vi. 融合 vi. vt. (使) 协调，融合 n. 混合物；融合
exampleTranslation: 请在烘焙前将所有材料混合在一起。

example: May God bless you and your family.
meaning: vt. 求上帝降福，祝福；称颂上帝 int. 哎呀，太好啦，太谢谢了
exampleTranslation: 愿上帝祝福你和你的家人。

example: He tried to comfort her when she lost her job.
meaning: n. 舒服；安慰；令⼈感到安慰的⼈ n. 舒适的设施 (或条件) vt. 安慰
exampleTranslation: 当她失业时，他试图安慰她。

example: Please come to my office after lunch.
meaning: vi. 来；到达；⾏进；发⽣；达到 vt. vi. 成为，变成；处于 (某位置) prep. 当…到来时
exampleTranslation: 午饭后请到我的办公室来。

example: Friends is hailed as one of the best television comedies of all time.
meaning: n. 喜剧，喜剧⽚；滑稽之处
exampleTranslation: 老友记被誉为有史以来最好的电视喜剧之一。

example: That comet can only be seen once every seventy-six years.
meaning: n. 彗星
exampleTranslation: 那颗彗星每七十六年才能被看见一次。

example: This comic book is very popular among children.
meaning: adj. 滑稽的，好笑的；喜剧的 n. 喜剧演员；连环漫画
exampleTranslation: 这本漫画书在儿童中非常受欢迎。

example: We gather here to commemorate the founding of our school.
meaning: vt. (⽤…) 纪念，作为…的纪念
exampleTranslation: 我们在这里聚集，以纪念我们学校的创建。

example: We are ready to commence the project.
meaning: vi. vt. 开始，着⼿
exampleTranslation: 我们已准备好开始进行这个项目。

example: It's commonplace for teenagers to be rebellious.
meaning: adj. 平常普通的，不⾜为奇的 n. 寻常事物；⽼⽣常谈
exampleTranslation: 青少年有叛逆期是很常见的。

example: Australia is a member of the Commonwealth.
meaning: n. 英联邦；⾃治政体；联合体
exampleTranslation: 澳大利亚是英联邦成员国。

example: She commutes to work by train every day.
meaning: vi. 上下班往返，通勤 vt. 减刑 n. 每天上下班路程
exampleTranslation: 她每天坐火车通勤上班。

example: The doctor needs to diagnose the patient's condition before prescribing any medication.
meaning: vt. vi. 诊断 (病症)
exampleTranslation: 医生在开药前需要先诊断病人的状况。

example: The teacher showed us a diagram of the human heart.
meaning: n. 图表，⽰意图
exampleTranslation: 老师向我们展示了一张人体心脏的示意图。

example: Please dial the number correctly.
meaning: vt. vi. 拨号 n. 表盘，刻度盘，仪表盘
exampleTranslation: 请正确拨打号码。

example: She speaks in a southern American dialect.
exampleTranslation: 她说的是南美方言。

example: The diameter of the circle is 10 cm.
meaning: n. 直径；放⼤倍数
exampleTranslation: 这个圆的直径是10厘米。

example: I will not let anyone dictate my life for me.
meaning: vt. vi. ⼝述；命令，规定；⽀配，决定 n. 命令，规定
exampleTranslation: 我不会让任何人为我规定我的生活。

example: The teacher gave a dictation to the students.
meaning: n. ⼝述，⼝授；听写 (测试)
exampleTranslation: 老师给了学生们一个听写。

example: A balanced diet is important for maintaining good health.
meaning: n. ⽇常饮⻝；(减肥等的) 特别饮⻝ vi. 节⻝ adj. 低糖的，低脂肪的
exampleTranslation: 均衡饮食对于保持良好的健康状况很重要。

example: We need to differentiate our product from those of our competitors.
meaning: vi. vt. 区分，辨别 vt. 构成…间的差别
exampleTranslation: 我们需要使我们的产品与竞争对手的产品有所不同。

example: Archaeologists are digging in the desert for traces of ancient civilizations.
meaning: vi. vt. 掘 (地)，凿 (洞)；搜寻 (物品) vt. 赞成，看中，喜欢 n. (⽤⼿指或肘部) 轻碰；挖苦
exampleTranslation: 考古学家在沙漠中挖掘，寻找古文明的遗迹。

example: The food was hard to digest.
meaning: vt. vi. (使) 消化 vt. 理解，领会 n. 摘要，⽂摘
exampleTranslation: 这种食物难以消化。

example: Digital marketing has revolutionized the business world.
meaning: adj. 数字的，数码的；以数字显⽰的
exampleTranslation: 数字营销已经彻底改变了商业世界。

example: Everyone deserves to be treated with dignity.
meaning: n. 尊严，尊敬；⾃尊；庄重，体⾯
exampleTranslation: 每个人都应得到尊严的对待。

example: We envisage the project will be completed by June.
meaning: vt. 设想，展望
exampleTranslation: 我们预期项目将在6月完成。

example: I couldn't help but feel a twinge of envy when I saw their beautiful new house.
meaning: vt. 羡慕，忌妒 n. 羡慕，忌妒；令⼈羡慕的对象
exampleTranslation: 看到他们美丽的新房子，我情不自禁地感到一丝羡慕。

example: These two boxes are equal in size.
meaning: adj. 相等的；平等的；能胜任的 vlink. 与…相等，等于 vt. ⽐得上；导致，结果为 n. 同等的⼈，相等物
exampleTranslation: 这句话展示了“equal”在语境中的用法。

example: In a just society, there is equality before the law for every citizen.
meaning: n. 平等
exampleTranslation: 在一个公正的社会中，每个公民在法律面前都是平等的。

example: These two fabrics are rough equivalents.
meaning: adj. 等同的，等值的，相当的 n. 等价物，等效物，对应词
exampleTranslation: 这两种布料大致是相同的。

example: The solution of the equation is x = 2.
meaning: n. 等式，⽅程式；等同 n. (必须考虑多种因素的) 复杂局⾯
exampleTranslation: 这个等式的解是x=2

example: The sun is directly overhead at the equator.
meaning: n. ⾚道
exampleTranslation: 这句话展示了“equator”在语境中的用法。

example: The diver attached a float to the line.
meaning: vi. 漂浮；飘浮；轻盈⾛动 vt. 使浮动；提出 (想法或计划) vt. vi. (使货币汇率) ⾃由浮动 n. 彩⻋；⻥漂；浮板；备⽤零钱
exampleTranslation: 潜水员把浮标绑在了线上。

example: A flock of birds flew overhead.
meaning: n. (动物) 群；⼀⼤群(⼈) vi. 蜂拥，群集，涌向
exampleTranslation: 一群鸟飞过头顶。

example: Heavy rain caused a flood in the village.
meaning: n. 洪⽔，⽔灾；⼤批，⼤量 vi. vt. (被) 淹没；泛滥；涌上⼼头 vi. ⼤量涌向，蜂拥前往 vt. (使) 充斥，充满
exampleTranslation: 大雨导致村里发生洪水。

example: The river flows into the sea.
meaning: n. 流，流动；不断供应；连贯 vi. 流，流动；流畅进⾏
exampleTranslation: 河流流入海洋。

example: Many people get a flu shot before winter.
meaning: n. 流⾏性感冒，流感
exampleTranslation: 很多人在冬天之前打流感疫苗。

example: Prices fluctuate during the holiday season.
meaning: vi. 波动，上下浮动
exampleTranslation: 假期期间价格会波动。

example: She is fluent in five languages.
meaning: adj. 流利的，流畅的；(动作) 娴熟的
exampleTranslation: 她可以流利地说五种语言。

example: His movements were smooth and fluid.
meaning: n. 液体，流体 adj. 流畅优美的；不稳定的；流动的
exampleTranslation: 他的动作流畅而自然。

example: Her cheeks were flush with embarrassment.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 脸红；冲洗 (⻢桶) vt. 冲⾛ n. 脸红；⼀阵突如其来的强烈情感
exampleTranslation: 她因为尴尬而脸红

example: Birds fly south before winter.
meaning: vi. ⻜；航⾏，⻜⾏；疾驰；⻜逝 vt. vi. 驾驶 (⻜机等)；(旗) 飘扬 vt. 空运；乘⻜⾏器⻜越 n. 蝇，苍蝇
exampleTranslation: 鸟儿在冬天前向南飞。

example: The singer held the microphone tightly during her performance.
meaning: n. 话筒，⻨克⻛
exampleTranslation: 歌手在演出时紧紧握住了麦克风。

example: The student examined the bacteria under the microscope.
meaning: n. 显微镜
exampleTranslation: 这个学生在显微镜下检查细菌。

example: We found ourselves in the midst of a crowd.
meaning: n. 当中，中间
exampleTranslation: 我们发现自己置身于人群之中。

example: Many birds migrate south for the winter.
meaning: vi. 迁徙，移居；转移
exampleTranslation: 许多鸟类冬天会向南迁移。

example: The climate here is very mild.
meaning: adj. 温和的；(疾病等) 轻微的；淡的
exampleTranslation: 这里的气候很温和。

example: He became a millionaire through the stock market.
meaning: n. 百万富翁
exampleTranslation: 他通过炒股成为了百万富翁。

example: The old mill has been converted into apartments.
meaning: n. 磨坊；⼯⼚；磨粉机 vt. 碾碎，磨成粉
exampleTranslation: 旧的工厂被改造成了公寓。

example: She made a notable contribution to the scientific community.
meaning: adj. 显著的，显要的，值得注意的 n. 名⼈，重要⼈物
exampleTranslation: 她对科学界做出了显著的贡献。

example: There is nothing in the box.
meaning: pron. 没有什么，没有东西
exampleTranslation: 箱子里什么都没有。

example: I didn't notice the sign at the entrance.
meaning: vi. vt. 注意到，意识到 n. 注意，理会；布告；预告；辞呈
exampleTranslation: 我没有注意到入口处的标示。

example: Please notify me when the new book arrives.
meaning: vt. 通知，告知
exampleTranslation: 请在新书到了的时候通知我。

example: The thief was notorious in the neighborhood.
meaning: adj. 臭名昭著的，声名狼藉的
exampleTranslation: 翻译:这个小偷在邻居中恶名昭彰。

example: Notwithstanding the rain, we still decided to hold the picnic.
meaning: prep. adv. conj. 尽管，虽然
exampleTranslation: 尽管下着雨，我们仍然决定去野餐。

example: She wore a diamond ornament around her neck.
meaning: n. 装饰品；⾸饰，饰物；点缀 vt. 装饰，点缀
exampleTranslation: 她脖子上戴着一个钻石装饰品。

example: His views on teaching are surprisingly orthodox.
meaning: adj. 正统的；东正教的；正统教派的
exampleTranslation: 他对教学的看法出奇地传统。

example: She's boiling the vegetables in a large pot.
meaning: n. 锅；罐；壶；凑集的资⾦；⼤⿇ vt. 把…栽⼊盆中；击 (球) ⼊袋
exampleTranslation: 她正在大锅里煮蔬菜。

example: I bought a pound of apples this morning.
meaning: n. 英镑；磅 (重量单位) vi. vt. 反复击打，连续砰砰地猛击 vi. (⼼脏) 狂跳，怦怦地跳 vt. 捣碎，击碎
exampleTranslation: 今天早上我买了一磅苹果。

example: You need to add some baking powder to the recipe.
meaning: n. 粉末；⽕药 vt. 抹粉，涂粉
exampleTranslation: 你需要在食谱中加入一些发酵粉。

example: The union represents the interests of all workers.
meaning: vt. 代表；体现；表⽰；描绘 vlink. 相当于，意味着
exampleTranslation: 工会代表所有工人的利益。

example: He's the representative of our company.
meaning: n. 代表；(美国) 众议院议员 adj. 典型的，有代表性的；代议制的
exampleTranslation: 他是我们公司的代表。

example: The government was known for its brutal repression of any sort of rebellion.
meaning: n. 压制，镇压；抑制，克制
exampleTranslation: 政府以对任何形式的叛乱进行无情镇压而闻名。

example: He reproached me for not thinking of the consequences.
meaning: n. 责备，批评；丢脸 vt. 责备；为…感到内疚
exampleTranslation: 他因我没想到后果而责备我

example: Animals reproduce and bring forth new life.
meaning: vt. 复制，翻印；使再现，再制造 vi. vt. 繁殖，⽣殖
exampleTranslation: 动物们繁殖并带来新生命

example: The United States is a republic.
meaning: n. 共和国，共和政体
exampleTranslation: 美国是一个共和国。

example: He is a staunch republican, always advocating for the power to lie in the hands of the people.
meaning: n. 共和主义者；共和党⼈ adj. 共和国的，共和政体的
exampleTranslation: 涵义1

example: After running a marathon, my legs were very sore.
meaning: adj. 疼痛的，酸痛的；恼⽕的 n. 痛处，伤处，疮
exampleTranslation: 跑完马拉松后，我的腿非常痛。

example: He expressed deep sorrow over his mother's death.
meaning: n. 悲伤，伤⼼；令⼈悲伤的事 vi. 感到悲伤
exampleTranslation: 他对母亲的去世表达了深深的悲痛。

example: He is a so-called expert, but his advice was not helpful at all.
meaning: adj. 所谓的；号称…的
exampleTranslation: 他是个所谓的专家，但他的建议一点也不有用。

example: There was a spark in his eyes.
meaning: n. ⽕花；⼀丁点；活⼒；诱因 vt. 引发，触发 vi. 产⽣电⽕花
exampleTranslation: 他眼中闪烁着光芒。

example: Her eyes sparkled with excitement while receiving the gift.
meaning: vi. 闪闪发光，闪耀 n. 光亮，闪光；闪光点，亮点
exampleTranslation: 当她收到礼物时，她的眼睛闪耀着兴奋的光芒。

example: I need some space to breathe.
meaning: n. 空间；太空；空⽩处，空⾏ vt. 以⼀定间隔排列
exampleTranslation: 我需要一些空间来呼吸。

example: The unmanned spacecraft will land on the moon tomorrow.
meaning: n. 宇宙⻜船，航天器
exampleTranslation: 无人驾驶的太空船将于明天登陆月球。

example: The living room in their new house is very spacious.
meaning: adj. ⼴阔的，宽敞的
exampleTranslation: 他们新房子的客厅非常宽敞。

example: He learned to tie his shoes all by himself.
meaning: vt. 系，捆；系牢；打结；使关联 vi. 打结系牢，系上 vi. vt. 打成平局，得分相同 n. 领带；联系；绳⼦；束缚；平局
exampleTranslation: 他自己学会了系鞋带。

example: The tide is coming in.
meaning: n. 潮汐；潮流，趋势；难控的浪潮
exampleTranslation: 潮水正在上涨。

example: Please tidy your room before you go out.
meaning: adj. 整洁的；爱整洁的；⾼额的 vi. vt. 使整洁，使有条理
exampleTranslation: 请在出门前整理你的房间。

example: The lid is very tight and I cannot open this jar.
meaning: adj. 紧的；紧⾝的；严格的；拮据的 adv. 紧紧地，牢固地
exampleTranslation: 盖子太紧了，我打不开这个罐子。

example: He tilted his chair backwards.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 倾斜；使倾向于，偏向 n. 倾斜，倾侧
exampleTranslation: 他将椅子向后倾斜。

example: I usually work out on weekdays.
meaning: n. ⼯作⽇ adv. 在⼯作⽇
exampleTranslation: 我通常在工作日做运动。

example: I have weekly meetings with my supervisor.
meaning: adj. ⼀周⼀次的，每周的 adv. ⼀周⼀次地，每周 n. 周报，周刊
exampleTranslation: 我每周都会和我的主管开会。

example: The garden was overgrown with weeds.
meaning: n. 杂草；⽔草；⼤⿇ vt. vi. 除杂草
exampleTranslation: 花园里长满了杂草。

example: Unable to hold back her tears anymore, she began to weep.
meaning: vi. vt. 哭泣，流泪 vi. (伤⼝) 流⾎，渗出液体 n. 哭泣，流泪
exampleTranslation: 无法再抑制自己的泪水，她开始哭泣。

example: She is a well-known authority on birds.
meaning: adj. 著名的；为⼈所熟知的
exampleTranslation: 她是公认的鸟类专家。

example: The grass is still wet with dew.
meaning: adj. 湿的；有⾬的；(油漆等) 未⼲的 vt. 使潮湿，把…弄湿
exampleTranslation: 草地上仍挂着露水。

example: My ancestors came from Ireland.
meaning: n. 祖先；(动物) 原种；原型
exampleTranslation: 我的祖先来自爱尔兰。

example: These are the remains of an ancient civilization that existed thousands of years ago.
meaning: adj. 古代的；古⽼的
exampleTranslation: 这些是存在于几千年前的古老文明的遗址。

example: Tom and Jerry are good friends.
meaning: conj. 和，与，⼜；加上；然后；那么
exampleTranslation: 汤姆和杰瑞是好朋友

example: Do you want to hear an anecdote about my trip to Paris?
meaning: n. 轶事，趣闻
exampleTranslation: 你想听听我去巴黎的旅行轶事吗？

example: The child believes she has a guardian angel watching over her.
meaning: n. 天使；善良或美丽的⼈；⼤好⼈
exampleTranslation: 那个孩子相信她有一位守护天使在守护着她。

example: The angle between these two lines is 90 degrees.
meaning: n. ⻆；⻆度；⽴场，观点 vt. 斜移，斜置；以(某⻆度)报道
exampleTranslation: 这两条线之间的角度是90度。

example: He couldn't hide his anger.
meaning: n. 愤怒，怒⽕ vt. 使⽣⽓，激怒
exampleTranslation: 他无法掩饰自己的愤怒。

example: He was very angry at the news.
meaning: adj. ⽣⽓的；⿊压压的；红肿发炎的
exampleTranslation: 他对这个消息非常生气。

example: He sprained his ankle when he fell off the ladder.
meaning: n. 脚踝，脚脖⼦
exampleTranslation: 他从梯子上摔下来，扭伤了脚踝。

example: Today is our 10th wedding anniversary.
meaning: n. 周年纪念 (⽇)
exampleTranslation: 今天是我们的十周年结婚纪念日。

example: The host announced the arrival of the special guest.
meaning: vt. 宣布，通知；郑重地说；通报
exampleTranslation: 主持人宣布贵宾的到来。

example: The antenna on the roof receives signals for the television.
meaning: n. 触⻆，触须；天线
exampleTranslation: 房顶上的天线接收电视信号。

example: She bought an antique chair at the market.
meaning: n. 古董，古玩 adj. 古董的，古玩的
exampleTranslation: 她在市场买了一把古董椅。

example: I bet you won't believe what happened today.
meaning: vi. vt. ⽤…打赌，下赌注 vt. 敢说，可以肯定 n. 打赌，赌注；估计，猜想
exampleTranslation: 我敢肯定你不会相信今天发生的事情。

example: His nervous glances at the door betrayed his fear.
meaning: vt. 背叛，出卖；流露 (情感)
exampleTranslation: 他紧张地看向门口，暴露了他的害怕。

example: He is a better person now.
meaning: adj. 更好的；更合适的；好转的 adv. 更好地；较⼤程度地 n. 更好的事物，较好者 vt. 胜过，超过
exampleTranslation: 他现在变成一个更好的人了。

example: She sat between her parents.
meaning: prep. 在…之间；往返于 adv. 在中间
exampleTranslation: 她坐在她的父母之间。

example: Beware of icy roads after sunset.
meaning: vi. vt. 当⼼，注意，提防
exampleTranslation: 日落后要小心结冰的道路。

example: The sudden question seemed to bewilder the man.
meaning: vt. 使困惑，使糊涂
exampleTranslation: 这个突然的问题似乎使这个男人感到困惑。

example: I can see a church beyond the houses.
meaning: prep. 在更远处；超出；晚于；⽆法… adv. 在或往更远处
exampleTranslation: 我可以看到房子后面的一个教堂。

example: She cut the cloth into pieces.
meaning: n. 布，布料；牧师
exampleTranslation: 她把布料剪成了一片片。

example: She clothed her doll in a beautiful dress.
meaning: vt. 给…穿⾐；为…提供⾐服
exampleTranslation: 她给她的洋娃娃穿上了一件漂亮的裙子。

example: She has no money to buy new clothes.
meaning: n. ⾐服，服装
exampleTranslation: 她没有钱买新衣服。

example: He packed some clothing for his trip.
meaning: n. ⾐服，服装
exampleTranslation: 他为旅行打包了一些衣物。

example: There's not a cloud in the sky.
meaning: n. 云；云状物 vt. 使难以理解，使模糊 vi. (天空) 布满云
exampleTranslation: 天上没有一片云。

example: It's a cloudy day, the sun can't be seen at all.
meaning: adj. 多云的；浑浊的；模糊的
exampleTranslation: "今天是阴天，一点儿都看不见阳光。"

example: The detective found a crucial clue at the crime scene.
meaning: n. 线索，迹象；提⽰ vt. 给…提供线索
exampleTranslation: 侦探在犯罪现场找到了一个关键的线索。

example: He is clumsy with his hands.
meaning: adj. 笨拙的；不得体的；笨重的
exampleTranslation: 他手脚笨拙。

example: I saw a cluster of stars in the night sky.
meaning: n. 群，组，串，簇，堆 vi. 群集，聚集
exampleTranslation: 我在夜空中看到了一簇星星。

example: She clutched her bag tightly as she walked in the dark.
meaning: vt. vi. 抓紧；突然抓住 n. 离合器；⼀群，⼀窝；势⼒范围
exampleTranslation: 她在黑暗中行走时，紧紧地握住了她的包

example: The house has been desolate for years.

example: She is studying engineering at university.

example: Finish your breakfast before you go.
meaning: vt. vi. 完成；(使) 结束 vt. ⽤尽；使筋疲⼒尽 vi. 获…成绩 n. 结尾，结局；抛光

example: The fire warmed the room.
meaning: n. ⽕；⽕灾；炉⽕；取暖器；射击 vi. vt. 射击，开⽕；射出 (⼦弹) vt. 解雇，开除；激励，使充满热情

example: The fireman bravely fought the blaze to rescue the trapped people.

example: The room has a cozy fireplace.

example: He keeps his thoughts in his inner world.

example: The stars in the sky are innumerable.

example: Industrial waste is a major source of soil pollution.

example: Tomatoes grow well in a greenhouse.

example: We have to beat the deadline.

example: She was blind from birth.

meaning: n. ⼤块；⼤楼；街区；⼀批；阻碍 vt. 堵塞；挡住；妨碍；拦截 (球等)

example: They share the same blood.

example: The bridge is an example of a stone arch.

example: This car has a compact design, making it perfect for city driving.
meaning: adj. 紧凑的，紧密的；⼩型的 n. 协定，契约；⼩汽⻋；粉饼盒 vt. 把…紧压在⼀起

example: Can you compute the total cost of our dinner?

example: She tried to conceal her feelings.
meaning: vt. 掩盖，隐藏

example: After a lengthy debate, he finally conceded that her point was valid.

example: I am going to a rock concert tonight.

example: He is diligent in his studies.

example: The dimensions of the room are 20 feet by 15 feet.
meaning: n. 尺⼨，维度；⽅⾯；规模，程度

example: I always dine at this restaurant on weekends.

example: The dinosaur exhibit at the museum is very impressive.
meaning: n. 恐⻰；落伍的⼈，⽼古董

example: Carbon dioxide is a greenhouse gas that contributes to global warming.

example: Dip the brush into the paint.

example: The wind is blowing in a northwestern direction.

example: The director of the movie received a lot of accolades for his work.
meaning: n. 导演；主任，主管；经理，董事

example: You can find the restaurant's phone number in the directory.

example: The language course aims to equip students with the skills they need for business communication.
meaning: vt. 装备，配备；使有能⼒

example: He bought some camping equipment.

example: His stomach began to groan from hunger.
meaning: vi. vt. 呻吟，哼哼 vi. (因重压⽽) 嘎吱作响；抱怨 n. 呻吟声，哼哼声，嘎吱声

example: I need to pop into the grocer to get some milk and bread.
meaning: n. ⻝品杂货商；⻝物杂货店

example: He had to grope for the light switch in the dark.

example: Reading is my favourite hobby.
meaning: n. 爱好

example: The cave was dark and hollow.

example: You should be honest about your feelings.

example: I need to install a new application on my phone.

example: He bought the car on installment.
meaning: n. ⼀期 (分期付款)；⼀期 (故事)
exampleTranslation: 他分期付款买的汽车。

example: For instance, we can use solar power instead of coal.
meaning: n. 例⼦，事例 vt. 举…为例
exampleTranslation: 比如，我们可以用太阳能代替煤炭。

example: I got an instant message from my friend.
meaning: adj. ⽴即的；即⻝的，速溶的 n. 刹那，顷刻
exampleTranslation: 我收到了来自朋友的即时信息。

example: The response to my email was almost instantaneous:.
meaning: adj. 瞬间的，即刻的
exampleTranslation: 我对我的电子邮件的回复几乎是瞬间的。

example: He broke his limb in the accident.
meaning: n. 肢，臂，腿；⼤树枝
exampleTranslation: 他在事故中折断了四肢。

example: Because of his broken leg, he had to limp to the car.
meaning: adj. 疲软的，⽆⼒的 vi. ⼀瘸⼀拐地⾛；艰难地进展 n. ⼀瘸⼀拐，跛⾏
exampleTranslation: 他因为腿受伤，只得跛行到车旁。

example: The city is linear, stretching along the coast.
meaning: adj. 直线的；线性的
exampleTranslation: 这个城市延伸在海岸线上，呈线性排布

example: She bought new bed linen yesterday.
meaning: n. 亚⿇布；亚⿇制品
exampleTranslation: 昨天她买了新的床上用品。

example: The trash bag liner needs to be replaced.
meaning: n. 邮轮，客轮；衬⾥，内衬
exampleTranslation: 垃圾袋的衬垫需要更换。

example: The smell of her perfume lingered in the room.
meaning: vi. 继续存留；逗留，流连；奄奄⼀息
exampleTranslation: 她的香水味在房间里逗留。

example: This book is mine, not yours.
meaning: pron. 我的 n. 矿，矿井；地雷，⽔雷 vt. vi. 开采，采矿 vt. 布雷
exampleTranslation: 这本书是我的，不是你的。

example: This region is rich in minerals like iron and coal.
meaning: n. 矿物，矿物质，矿产
exampleTranslation: 这个地区富含像铁和煤这样的矿物质。

example: She likes to mingle with people from different cultures.
meaning: vt. vi. (使) 混合，(使) 相混 vi. (社交场合) 应酬，交际
exampleTranslation: 她喜欢和来自不同文化的人交往。

example: This is a miniature replica of the Eiffel Tower.
meaning: adj. 很⼩的，微型的 n. 微型画，⼩画像；缩微模型
exampleTranslation: 这是一个埃菲尔铁塔的迷你复制品。

example: We should minimize the environmental impact of our actions.
meaning: vt. 使减⾄最低程度；对…轻描淡写
exampleTranslation: 我们应该将我们行为对环境的影响降到最小。

example: The minimum age for the job is 18.
meaning: adj. 最⼩的，最低限度的 n. 最⼩值，最低限度 adv. ⾄少，最低
exampleTranslation: 应聘这份工作的最低年龄是18岁。

example: He was appointed the Minister of Finance.
meaning: n. 部⻓，⼤⾂；牧师；公使 vi. 服侍，帮助
exampleTranslation: 他被任命为财政部长。

example: The Ministry of Health has issued a new advisory on healthy eating.
meaning: n. (政府的) 部；(全体) 牧师
exampleTranslation: 卫生部发布了关于健康饮食的新建议。

example: The damage to the car was minor and it was still drivable.
meaning: adj. 较⼩的，次要的，轻微的；⼩调的 n. 未成年⼈；辅修课程 vi. 辅修
exampleTranslation: 车辆的损坏较小，仍然可以驾驶。

example: Women are no longer a minority in the profession.
meaning: n. 少数；少数⺠族，少数群体
exampleTranslation: 在这个行业中，女性已经不再是少数了。

example: I have fifteen dollars minus the five I owe you.
meaning: prep. 减去；缺少 adj. ⼩于零的，负的；负⾯的 n. 减号，负号；缺点
exampleTranslation: 我有15美元，减去欠你的5美元。

example: Could you wait for a minute?
meaning: n. 分钟；⽚刻；时刻；会议记录 adj. 极⼩的；细致⼊微的 vt. 将…记⼊会议记录
exampleTranslation: 你能等一分钟吗？

example: Ash from the burning wood swirled around us.
meaning: n. 灰，灰烬；废墟；⻣灰
exampleTranslation: 燃烧的木头产生的灰烬在我们周围打转。

example: I'm deeply ashamed of my behavior last night.
meaning: adj. 羞愧的；因尴尬⽽不愿…的
exampleTranslation: 我对昨晚自己的行为深感羞愧。

example: The sailors finally arrived ashore after a long sea journey.
meaning: adv. 在岸上，向岸上
exampleTranslation: 在漫长的海上旅行后，船员们最终抵达了陆地。

example: The design has many outstanding aspects.
meaning: n. ⽅⾯；外观；(建筑等的) 朝向
exampleTranslation: 设计有许多出色的方面。

example: The carpenter purchased some lumber to construct a new cabinet.
meaning: n. ⽊材；废旧⼤件杂物 vi. 缓慢笨拙地移动 vt. 迫使担负 (⼯作，责任等)
exampleTranslation: 木匠购买了一些木材以建造新的橱柜。

example: He has a lump on his head.
meaning: n. 块；⽅糖；肿块；傻⼤个 vt. 把…归并⼀起 (或合起来考虑)
exampleTranslation: 他头上长了一个包。

example: The cycles of the moon greatly affect the lunar calendar.
meaning: adj. ⽉球的，⽉亮的，阴历的
exampleTranslation: 月亮的周期对阴历有着重要影响。

example: The doctor told me to take a deep breath so he could check my lungs.
meaning: n. 肺
exampleTranslation: 医生让我深呼吸，这样他就可以检查我的肺。

example: Their house is a modern build filled with luxury goods.
meaning: n. 奢侈；奢侈品；难得的享受
exampleTranslation: 他们的房子是现代建筑，充满了奢侈品

example: The shelf is supported by two brackets.
meaning: n. 括号；等级 (段)；(墙上的) 托架 vt. 把…视为同类，把…相提并论
exampleTranslation: 这个架子由两个支架支撑。

example: Please press the brake gently to avoid a sudden stop.
meaning: n. 刹⻋，⻋闸；阻碍，阻碍物 vi. vt. 刹⻋
exampleTranslation: 请轻轻踩下刹车以避免突然停车。

example: The doorknob is made of brass.
meaning: n. ⻩铜；铜管乐器；要员
exampleTranslation: 门把手是由黄铜制成的。

example: She is brave enough to face the truth.
meaning: adj. 勇敢的 vt. 勇敢⾯对，冒⻛险，经受困难
exampleTranslation: 她有足够的勇气去面对真相。

example: This discovery will have cosmic significance in the field of science.
meaning: adj. 宇宙的；巨⼤且重要的
exampleTranslation: 这个发现对科学领域将有宇宙级的重要性。

example: The cost of a new car is beyond my budget.
meaning: n. 费⽤；成本；代价，损失 vt. 需付费，价钱为；使损失
exampleTranslation: 购买一辆新车的费用超出了我的预算。

example: He wore a vampire costume to the Halloween party.
meaning: n. 演出服装；服装，装束；游泳⾐
exampleTranslation: 他穿了一套吸血鬼的服装去参加万圣节派对。

example: The cabin has a cozy little living room with a fireplace.
meaning: adj. 温暖舒适的；亲密的；密切的
exampleTranslation: 小木屋里有一个带壁炉的舒适小客厅。

example: I fell asleep on the couch while watching TV.
meaning: n. ⻓沙发；诊察台 vt. (以某种语⾔⻛格) 措辞
exampleTranslation: 我在看电视时在沙发上睡着了。

example: Please count how many people are in the room.
meaning: vi. (按顺序) 数数；重要，要紧 vt. vi. 计算…的总数；正式认可；算作 vt. 把…算⼊ n. 总数；数数；罪状；论点；伯爵
exampleTranslation: 请数一下房间里有多少人。

example: She ordered a cup of coffee from the counter.
meaning: n. 柜台；料理台；计算器 vt. vi. 反驳，驳斥 vt. 抵制，抵消 adv. 逆向地，反对地
exampleTranslation: 她在柜台点了杯咖啡。

example: The prime minister will meet his American counterpart to discuss the trade agreement.
meaning: n. 职务相当的⼈，作⽤相当的事物
exampleTranslation: 首相将会见他的美国对应人物，以讨论贸易协定。

example: Their wine trade extends to more than 100 countries.
meaning: n. 国家；乡村；区域；全国⼈⺠ adj. 乡下的，农村的；乡村⾳乐的
exampleTranslation: 他们的葡萄酒贸易扩展到100多个国家。

example: She loves to take long walks in the countryside.
meaning: n. 乡村，农村
exampleTranslation: 她喜欢在乡间漫长的散步。

example: He moved to another county for his job.
meaning: n. 郡，县
exampleTranslation: 他因为工作搬到了另一个县。

example: There was a sense of excitement in the air.
meaning: n. 兴奋，激动；令⼈兴奋的事物
exampleTranslation: 空气中充满了兴奋感。

example: The children exclaim with joy at the surprise.
meaning: vi. vt. 呼喊，惊叫
exampleTranslation: 孩子们看到惊喜时高兴地喊了起来。

example: We went on an excursion to the beach.
meaning: n. (集体) 短途旅游；涉⾜，涉猎
exampleTranslation: 我们去海边短途旅行。

example: He made no excuse for being late.
meaning: n. 借⼝，理由；假条 vt. 原谅；为…辩解；准许…离开
exampleTranslation: 名词用法

example: Some items are exempt from sales tax.
meaning: adj. 被免除 (义务、付款) 的 vt. 豁免，免除 (义务、付款)
exampleTranslation: 某些物品不收销售税。

example: Regular exercise can prevent heart disease.
meaning: n. 锻炼；练习；习题；运⽤；操练 n. (为达到特定结果的) 活动 vt. ⾏使，运⽤ vi. vt. 锻炼，训练
exampleTranslation: 常规的运动可以预防心脏病。

example: He was among the foremost of the artists in his day.
meaning: adj. 最重要的，最好的 adv. 最重要地，⾸要地
exampleTranslation: 他是当代的首屈一指的艺术家之一。

example: I find it hard to forgive his rudeness.
meaning: vt. vi. 原谅，宽恕 vt. 对不起，请原谅；免除 (债务)
exampleTranslation: 中文：我发现很难原谅他的粗鲁。

example: He went forth into the town to buy some groceries.
meaning: adv. (从某时) 往前，(从某处) 向外
exampleTranslation: 他走出去进城买一些食品杂货。

example: The forthcoming conference will gather top scientists from around the world.
meaning: adj. 即将到来的；现成的
exampleTranslation: 即将到来的会议将聚集全球顶尖科学家。

example: I will be going on vacation for a fortnight.
meaning: n. 两周，⼗四天
exampleTranslation: 我将要去度假两周。

example: The Joneses are known for their hospitality.
meaning: n. 热情好客；招待茶点，款待
exampleTranslation: 琼斯一家为他们的热情好客而闻名。

example: Jack is the host of the annual charity event.
meaning: n. 主⼈；主办者；主持⼈；许多 vt. 主办 (活动)；主持 (节⽬)；做东
exampleTranslation: 杰克是年度慈善活动的主持人。

example: The kidnappers held the businessman as a hostage.
meaning: n. ⼈质
exampleTranslation: 犯罪分子将这位商人作为人质。

example: She works as a hostess in a famous restaurant.
meaning: n. ⼥主⼈；⼥招待；⼥主持⼈
exampleTranslation: 她在一家著名的餐厅里做接待员。

example: He gave me a hostile look.
meaning: adj. 敌意的；反对的；(条件) 不利的
exampleTranslation: 他对我投来敌意的目光

example: The hound has a keen sense of smell.
meaning: n. 猎⽝ vt. 紧追，追踪，纠缠
exampleTranslation: 这只猎犬的嗅觉非常敏锐。

example: The hummingbird can hover in mid-air.
meaning: vi. 盘旋，悬停；徘徊，摇摆不定
exampleTranslation: 蜂鸟可以在半空中悬停。

example: The wind howled through the broken window.
meaning: vi. 嗥叫，⻓嚎；⼤声叫喊；呼啸 vi. vt. 怒吼，怒声要求 n. 嗥叫，⻓嚎；喊叫声
exampleTranslation: 破窗户中风声呼啸

example: The ship was safely docked in the port.
meaning: n. 码头；港区；⽉台；被告席 vi. vt. (使船) 进港；(航天器) 对接 vt. 扣除 (⼯资等)
exampleTranslation: 船安全地停泊在港口。

example: The professor was fired for not adhering to the university's doctrine.
meaning: n. 信条，主义，教义
exampleTranslation: 由于不遵守大学的教条，教授被解雇了。

example: They donate money to charity every month.
meaning: vt. 捐赠；献 (⾎，器官等)
exampleTranslation: 他们每个月都向慈善机构捐钱。

example: The doctor prescribed a dose of antibiotics to fight the infection.
meaning: n. 剂量；⼀点 vt. 给…服药
exampleTranslation: 医生为治疗感染开了抗生素的剂量。

example: Cover the chicken with a light dusting of salt, then dot with butter.
meaning: n. 点，⼩圆点 vt. 在…加点；遍布
exampleTranslation: 中文:在鸡上轻轻撒上一点儿盐，然后点缀一些黄油。

example: They shared an intimate conversation after dinner.
meaning: adj. 亲密的；隐私的；幽静舒适的 vt. 透露，(间接) 表⽰，暗⽰ n. 知⼰，密友，⾄交
exampleTranslation: 晚饭后他们进行了一次亲密的交谈。

example: He tried to intimidate his opponents with aggressive behavior.
meaning: vt. 恐吓，威胁
exampleTranslation: 他试图通过侵略性行为来恐吓对手。

example: The detective had to unravel the intricate plot of the mystery novel.
meaning: adj. 错综复杂的
exampleTranslation: 侦探必须解开这部悬疑小说复杂的情节。

example: Her mysterious past intrigued him; he wanted to know more about her.
meaning: vt. 激起…的兴趣，引起…的好奇 vi. 密谋，施诡计 n. 密谋，阴谋；引⼈⼊胜的特质
exampleTranslation: 她的神秘过去激起了他的好奇心；他想多了解她。

example: He has an intrinsic sense of fairness.
meaning: adj. 本质的，内在的，固有的
exampleTranslation: 他有很强的公正感。

example: I had an intuition that something was wrong.
meaning: n. 直觉
exampleTranslation: 我有种直觉，觉得有事情不对劲。

example: The enemy troops invade the territory.
meaning: vi. vt. 武装⼊侵，侵略 vt. ⼤量涌⼊；侵扰，⼲预
exampleTranslation: 敌军侵略了这片领土。

example: The country braced itself for an impending invasion.
meaning: n. ⼊侵，侵略；涌⼊；侵犯
exampleTranslation: 这个国家正在为即将到来的侵略做准备。

example: The tickets we bought online turned out to be invalid when we arrived at the concert.
meaning: adj. ⽆法律效⼒的；站不住脚的 n. 病弱者，伤残者
exampleTranslation: 我们在网上买的票到了音乐会现场却发现无效。

example: Her advice has been invaluable to me.
meaning: adj. ⾮常宝贵的，极为有⽤的
exampleTranslation: 她的建议对我来说无比宝贵。

example: Her proficiency in French is impressive.
meaning: n. 熟练，精通
exampleTranslation: 她的法语精通令人印象深刻。

example: He has a unique profile, easily recognizable in a crowd.
meaning: n. 概述，简介；侧⾯轮廓；形象 vt. 扼要介绍，概述，写简介
exampleTranslation: 他的侧面轮廓很独特，在人群中容易辨认。

example: He attempted to rip the paper off the package, but it was too well taped.
meaning: vt. vi. 撕破，裂开 vt. 扯掉，扯下；(从⽹上) 撷取⾳频等 n. 撕开的⼤⼝⼦；离岸流
exampleTranslation: 他试图撕开包裹上的纸，但纸被胶带粘得太牢。

example: The apples on the tree are ripe now.
meaning: adj. (⽔果等) 成熟的；时机成熟的
exampleTranslation: 树上的苹果都熟了。

example: The graduation ceremony is an important ritual in many schools.
meaning: n. 仪式；惯例，⽼规矩 adj. 仪式的；例⾏公事的，⽼套的
exampleTranslation: 在很多学校，毕业典礼都是一项重要的仪式。

example: The lion let out a loud roar.
meaning: vi. 吼叫，轰鸣；放声⼤笑 vi. vt. 咆哮，⼤声喊叫 n. 咆哮，吼叫；呼啸声，隆隆声
exampleTranslation: 狮子发出了巨大的吼声。

example: I love the smell of roast coffee in the morning.
meaning: vt. vi. 烘，烤 (⾁等)；焙，炒 (坚果) vt. (对某⼈) ⾮常⽣⽓，严厉批评 n. 烤⾁；⼾外烧烤野餐会 adj. 烤的，焙的
exampleTranslation: 我喜欢早晨的烤咖啡味道。

example: The bank was robbed by two men with masks.
meaning: vt. 抢劫，掠夺
exampleTranslation: 那个银行被两个戴着面具的男子抢劫了。

example: He has a robust constitution and never seems to get sick.
meaning: adj. 强健的；结实的；坚定的
exampleTranslation: 他体格强壮，似乎从不生病。

example: He collected some rocks at the beach.
meaning: n. 岩⽯；⽯⼦；摇滚乐；靠⼭ vi. vt. (使) 轻轻摇晃；(使) 剧烈摇摆 vt. 使震惊，使害怕 vi. 随摇滚乐跳舞；很好
exampleTranslation: 他在海滩上收集了些岩石。

example: He cut the rod into pieces.
meaning: n. 杆，竿，棒；藤杖
exampleTranslation: 他把棒状物切成了好几段。

example: He made a motion to adjourn the meeting.
meaning: n. 运动，移动；动作；提议 vi. vt. (以头或⼿) 做动作，⽰意
exampleTranslation: 在议会或正式场合，motion指的是“提议”

example: Teachers need to find ways to motivate their students.
meaning: vt. 成为…的动机；激发，激励
exampleTranslation: 老师需要找到激励他们学生的方法。

example: His motive for committing the crime was money.
meaning: n. (⾏动的) 动机，缘由 adj. 引起运动的，提供动⼒的
exampleTranslation: 他犯罪的动机是钱。

example: He has a small motor boat.
meaning: n. 发动机，⻢达；汽⻋ adj. 机动的；汽⻋的；肌⾁运动的
exampleTranslation: 他有一艘小型的机动艇。

example: Mount Himalaya is the highest peak in the world.
meaning: vt. 安排，组织开展；登上；安置 vi. 逐步增加 vt. vi. 骑上，乘上 n. ⼭峰；坐骑；托架
exampleTranslation: 喜马拉雅山是世界上最高的山峰。

example: The whole city mourned the death of their beloved mayor.
meaning: vt. vi. 哀悼；对…感到遗憾
exampleTranslation: 整个城市都在哀悼他们深受喜爱的市长的去世。

example: The cat moved slowly towards the mouse.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 移动；搬家，搬迁；改变 vi. 前进，进展；采取⾏动，做 (事) vt. 使感动 n. ⾏动；移动；搬家；改变
exampleTranslation: 这只猫慢慢地向老鼠移动。

example: The cold weather makes my joints go stiff.
meaning: adj. 硬的；僵硬的；稠的；激烈的 adv. ⾮常，极其 n. 死⼫ vt. 不付钱给，不给…⼩费
exampleTranslation: 寒冷的天气使我的关节变得僵硬。

example: The lake was still in the early morning.
meaning: adv. 还是，仍然；但，不过；还有 adj. 静⽌的，寂静的；⽆⻛的 vi. vt. (使) 静⽌ n. 定格画⾯，剧照
exampleTranslation: 清晨的湖面很平静。

example: He was stung by a bee while picking apples.
meaning: vt. vi. 蜇，叮；(使) 感觉刺痛 vt. 激怒，使不安；敲诈，欺诈 n. 螫针，刺；刺伤，蜇伤；痛苦
exampleTranslation: 他采苹果时被蜜蜂蛰了。

example: She quickly took up a needle and began to stitch.
meaning: n. 缝合伤⼝的缝线；(缝纫的) 针脚 vt. 缝，缝补；缝合 (伤⼝)
exampleTranslation: 她迅速拿起针线开始缝补。

example: They read a lot of romances.
meaning: n. 浪漫，爱情 vt. 和 (某⼈) 谈情说爱
exampleTranslation: 他们阅读了很多爱情小说。

example: He had a romantic relationship with her.
meaning: adj. 浪漫的；有情调的；不切实际的 n. 浪漫的⼈；浪漫主义作家
exampleTranslation: 他和她有一段浪漫的关系。

example: The ball will bounce if you drop it.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 弹起，弹跳；拒付 (⽀票) vi. (在…上) 跳动，蹦；颠簸⾏进 vt. 把⼩孩放在膝上颠着玩；解雇 n. 弹跳，跳动；弹性；活⼒；蓬松
exampleTranslation: 如果你把球掉下来，它会弹起来。

example: We are bound by law to protect the innocent.
meaning: adj. 肯定会的；受约束的；前往…的 vi. 跳跃着跑 vt. 形成…的边界 n. 界限，限度；蹦跳，跳跃
exampleTranslation: 我们受法律约束，要保护无辜者

example: Do not cross the boundary line without my permission.
meaning: n. 分界线，边界
exampleTranslation: 没有我的允许，不准越过边界线。

example: The hunter set a trap to catch the wild animals.
meaning: n. 陷阱，圈套；困境，牢笼；嘴 vt. 使陷⼊困境；卡住；使陷⼊圈套 vt. 留存，储存(⽓、⽔等)
exampleTranslation: 猎人设下陷阱捕捉野生动物。

example: Please take out the trash.
meaning: n. 垃圾，废物；劣质品；窝囊废 vt. 损坏，毁坏；抨击；把…抛弃
exampleTranslation: 请把垃圾带出去。

example: She bought a wooden bench for the garden.
meaning: adj. ⽊制的
exampleTranslation: 她买了一把木质的长椅放在花园里。

example: I am going to work.
meaning: vi. ⼯作，⼲活；争取；运转；奏效 vt. 使⼯作；管理，经营；操作 n. ⼯作，职业；⼯作成果；作品
exampleTranslation: 我要上班去了。

example: The worker is repairing the road.
meaning: n. ⼯作者；⼯⼈，雇员
exampleTranslation: 工人正在修理道路。

example: John attended a writing workshop to improve his skills.
meaning: n. ⻋间，作坊；研讨会，研习班
exampleTranslation: 约翰参加了一个写作研讨会以提高他的技能

example: As a teacher, I believe that education is crucial.
meaning: prep. 像，如同；作为，当作 adv. 如同；和…⼀样 conj. 当…时；照…⽅式；因为；尽管
exampleTranslation: 作为一名教师，我相信教育的重要性。

example: The hikers took three hours to ascend the mountain.
meaning: vi. vt. 上升，攀登 vi. 晋升
exampleTranslation: 登山者花了三个小时爬上了山。

example: It's difficult to ascertain the truth.
meaning: vt. 弄清，查明
exampleTranslation: 很难确定真相。

example: We ascribe her success to hard work and a little luck.
meaning: vt. 将…归因于；认为是…的特点
exampleTranslation: 我们将她的成功归因于辛苦工作和一点运气。

example: The room felt cool after the rain.
meaning: adj. 凉的；冷静的；冷漠的；酷的 vt. vi. (使) 变凉，冷却 vi. 冷静下来
exampleTranslation: 雨后房间感觉很凉爽。

example: We should all cooperate to solve this problem.
meaning: vi. 合作，协作；协助，配合
exampleTranslation: 我们应该共同合作解决这个问题。

example: Their team won the game because of their cooperative play.
meaning: adj. 合作的；配合的；共同拥有的 n. 合作企业，合作机构
exampleTranslation: 翻译：他们的团队因为协作配合的游戏而赢得了比赛。

example: I have been chosen to coordinate the project.
meaning: vt. 使…协调 vi. vt. (使⾐服等) 搭配 n. 坐标，坐标值 adj. (在句中) 并列的
exampleTranslation: 我被选定来协调项目。

example: She's learned to cope with the stress of her job.
meaning: vi. (成功地) 应付，处理
exampleTranslation: 她学会了应对工作压力。

example: I need a copy of your passport.
meaning: n. 复印件，副本；⼀份；稿件 vt. 复制；抄写；模仿 vi. 作弊，抄袭
exampleTranslation: 我需要你护照的复印件。

example: We should respect copyright and avoid infringement.
meaning: n. 版权，著作权 adj. 受版权保护的
exampleTranslation: 我们应尊重版权，避免侵权行为。

example: Copper is an essential mineral found in plant life and in the human body.
meaning: n. 铜；铜币，铜板；警察
exampleTranslation: 铜是一种存在于植物和人体中的必需矿物质。

example: The lamp was not working because the cord was damaged.
meaning: n. 粗线，细绳；电源线；灯芯绒裤
exampleTranslation: 台灯不亮因为电线坏了。

example: Their relationship was cordial but not close.
meaning: adj. 热情友好的，和蔼可亲的 n. 烈性甜酒
exampleTranslation: 他们关系和善，但并不亲密。

example: Trust is the core of their partnership.
meaning: n. 果核；中⼼部分；核⼼ adj. 核⼼的，最重要的 vt. 去核
exampleTranslation: 信任是他们合作关系的核心。

example: Could you please add some corn to the salad?
exampleTranslation: "你能为沙拉加些玉米吗？"

example: Could you please correct my mistakes in the report?
meaning: adj. 准确⽆误的；合适的，恰当的 vt. 校正，矫正；批改
exampleTranslation: 请你帮我改正报告中的错误好吗？

example: The research showed that poverty correlates with shorter lifespan.
meaning: vt. vi. (使) 相互关联 n. 相关的事物，互为关联的事物
exampleTranslation: 这份研究显示贫穷与较短的寿命有关系。

example: Her version of the events does not correspond with the witnesses' accounts.
meaning: vi. 相符，⼀致；类似，相当；通信
exampleTranslation: 她对事件的描述与证人的陈述不符。

example: We kept up a constant correspondence throughout the years.
meaning: n. 往来书信；通信；关系，联系
exampleTranslation: 这些年来我们一直保持着经常的联系。

example: The problem was first discovered by our correspondent in the technical department.
meaning: n. 记者，通讯员；通信者
exampleTranslation: 我们技术部的代表首次发现了这个问题。

example: Acid rain can corrode building materials over time.
meaning: vt. vi. (使) 腐蚀 vi. vt. 削弱，损害，破坏
exampleTranslation: 酸雨会随着时间的推移侵蚀建筑材料。

example: The corrupt official was arrested for bribery.
meaning: adj. 腐败的；不道德的；受损的 vt. 使腐化；败坏，破坏 vt. vi. 损坏(计算机⽂件)
exampleTranslation: 腐败的官员因贿赂被捕。

example: He takes a deep breath before he dives into the water.
meaning: vi. 跳⽔；潜⽔；俯冲；暴跌 n. 跳⽔；潜⽔；俯冲
exampleTranslation: 他深吸一口气然后跳进水里。

example: She has the most divine smile.
meaning: adj. 天赐的，神的；绝妙的，极棒的 vt. 猜测，揣度 vt. vi. (⽤探测棒) 探测
exampleTranslation: 她的笑容最是天使。

example: The couple finally settled their divorce amicably.
meaning: n. 离婚；脱离，分离 vt. vi. 与 (某⼈) 离婚 vt. 使分离，使脱离
exampleTranslation: 这对夫妻最终友好地解决了他们的离婚问题。

example: He felt dizzy and had to sit down.
meaning: adj. 眩晕的；快得令⼈眩晕的；笨的
exampleTranslation: 他感到头晕，不得不坐下。

example: His speech evoked a strong response from the audience.
meaning: vt. 引起，唤起 (回忆或感情等)
exampleTranslation: 他的演讲引起了观众的热烈反应。

example: He made an exact copy of the document.
meaning: adj. 精确的；严谨的；精密的 vt. 勒索，索取；迫使，强加…于
exampleTranslation: 他做了一份文件的精确复印。

example: Our expenses exceeded our income last year.
meaning: vt. 超出 (数量等)；超越 (规定等)
exampleTranslation: 我们去年的支出超过了收入。

example: He has an exceedingly good memory.
meaning: adv. 极其，⾮常
exampleTranslation: 他的记忆力非常好。

example: She excels everyone else in sports.
meaning: vi. 突出，擅⻓，胜过 (他⼈) vt. 胜过平时
exampleTranslation: 她在体育方面超过其他人。

example: Everyone went to the party except me.
meaning: prep. 除…之外 conj. 只是，但是 vt. 不包括，把…排除在外
exampleTranslation: 除了我，大家都去了派对。

example: The system will throw an exception if there is a problem with the input data.
meaning: n. 例外；规则的例外，例外的事物
exampleTranslation: 如果输入数据有问题，系统将抛出一个异常。

example: Her exceptional talent for drawing was visible at a young age.
meaning: adj. 杰出的，⾮凡的；罕⻅的，异常的
exampleTranslation: 她从小就展现出杰出的绘画才华。

example: An excess of enthusiasm can be as dangerous as a lack of it.
meaning: n. 过多，过量；超过的部分 adj. 过多的，过量的
exampleTranslation: 过于热情有时会跟缺乏热情一样危险。

example: She is always chewing gum.
meaning: n. ⼝⾹糖；⽛龈，⽛床；树㬵，树脂
exampleTranslation: 她总是在嚼口香糖。

example: He pointed the gun at the thief.
meaning: n. 枪，炮；喷枪；发令枪声
exampleTranslation: 他把枪对准了小偷。

example: She will be acting head of the department in the interim.
meaning: adj. 暂时的，过渡的；期中的 n. 期间
exampleTranslation: 形容词

example: He has an intermediate knowledge of Spanish.
meaning: adj. 中级的；居中的，中间的 n. 中级⽔平者
exampleTranslation: 他的西班牙语水平为中等。

example: I've been having intermittent problems with my computer.
meaning: adj. 间歇的，断断续续的
exampleTranslation: 我的电脑一直有断断续续的问题。

example: Please don't interrupt me while I am speaking.
meaning: vi. vt. 打断，打扰 vt. 使中断，使暂停；遮挡，阻断
exampleTranslation: 我在说话时请不要打断我。

example: There is a large department store at the intersection.
meaning: n. 交点，道路交叉⼝；交叉
exampleTranslation: 在交叉路口有一家大型百货公司

example: I suggest taking a short interval between the two meetings to refresh our minds.
meaning: n. 间隔；中场休息
exampleTranslation: 我建议在两场会议之间休息一下来使我们的思绪更加清晰。

example: I have an interview for a job at a big company tomorrow.
meaning: n. ⾯试；采访；⾯谈 vt. 对 (某⼈) 进⾏⾯试；采访；⾯谈 vi. 接受⾯试
exampleTranslation: 我明天有一个在大公司的工作面试。

example: He is a loyal supporter of the team, and never misses a single game.
meaning: adj. 忠诚的，忠⼼的
exampleTranslation: 他是队伍的忠实支持者，一场比赛都不错过。

example: He showed his loyalty to his family by supporting them in difficult times.
meaning: n. 忠诚，忠⼼；忠于…的强烈情感
exampleTranslation: 忠诚于家庭的例子

example: You should regularly lubricate the gears of your bike to keep it running smoothly.
meaning: vt. 给…上润滑油，上油
exampleTranslation: 你应该定期给自行车齿轮上油，以保持其顺畅运行。

example: He has no luck with his job.
meaning: n. 好运，运⽓
exampleTranslation: 他在工作上运气不好。

example: I'm extremely lucky to have such wonderful parents.
meaning: adj. 幸运的；吉利的
exampleTranslation: 我非常幸运有这么出色的父母。

example: The soil in the garden is still moist from the morning's rain.
meaning: adj. 湿润的，潮湿的
exampleTranslation: 园子里的土壤因为早晨的雨水还是湿的。

example: This cream will help retain the moisture in your skin.
meaning: n. 潮⽓，湿⽓，⽔分
exampleTranslation: 这种护肤霜将有助于保持你肌肤的水分。

example: Every molecule of water is made up of two hydrogen atoms and one oxygen atom.
meaning: n. 分⼦
exampleTranslation: 每一个水分子由两个氢原子和一个氧原子组成。

example: The campaign has been gaining momentum in recent weeks.
meaning: n. 势头，冲劲；冲⼒；动量
exampleTranslation: 近几周来，这场运动的势头越来越猛。

example: Queen Elizabeth II is the monarch of the United Kingdom.
meaning: n. 君主，国王，⼥王
exampleTranslation: 伊丽莎白二世女王是英国的君主。

example: The government has introduced new monetary policies to control inflation.
meaning: adj. 货币的，⾦融的
exampleTranslation: 政府已经引入了新的货币政策来控制通胀。

example: My job is to monitor the air quality in the city.
meaning: vt. 监视；监听 n. 显⽰器；监控器；班⻓；监督员
exampleTranslation: 我工作的内容就是监测城市的空气质量

example: He is a monster of selfishness.
meaning: n. 怪物；庞然⼤物；恶棍；⼩坏蛋 adj. 巨⼤的，庞⼤的
exampleTranslation: 他是个自私鬼。

example: The monument was erected in memory of the soldiers who died in the war.
meaning: n. 纪念碑，纪念馆；名胜；典范
exampleTranslation: 这个纪念碑是为了纪念在战争中牺牲的士兵而建立的。

example: His eyes were full of pride when he accepted the award.
meaning: n. ⾃豪；⾃尊⼼；傲慢；狮群 vt. 为…⽽骄傲
exampleTranslation: 他接受奖项时眼神满是自豪。

example: The priest delivered a moving sermon.
meaning: n. 牧师，神⽗；神职⼈员
exampleTranslation: 牧师发表了一篇感人的讲道。

example: He won the first prize in the singing competition.
meaning: n. 奖，奖品；难能可贵的事物 adj. 应得奖的；极好的 vt. 重视，珍视；撬开
exampleTranslation: 他在歌唱比赛中赢得了一等奖。

example: The probability of it raining tomorrow is high.
meaning: n. 可能性，概率；有可能发⽣的事
exampleTranslation: 明天下雨的概率很高。

example: It's probable that they will arrive by train.
meaning: adj. 可能的，也许的，⼤概的
exampleTranslation: 他们很可能会坐火车来。

example: He had to stoop down to fit through the door.
meaning: vi. 俯⾝，弯腰；(站⽴时) ⼸背 n. 驼背；⻔廊
exampleTranslation: 他必须弯下腰才能通过门口。

example: The storm is about to hit our city.
meaning: n. 暴⻛⾬；(群情迸发的) 浪潮 vi. vt. 突袭，攻占 vi. ⽓呼呼地疾⾛ vt. 怒吼，⼤发雷霆
exampleTranslation: 暴风雨即将袭击我们的城市

example: I found a shell on the strand.
meaning: n. 股，缕；部分；海滨，海岸 vt. 使滞留，使⽆法脱⾝；使搁浅
exampleTranslation: 我在海滩上找到了一个贝壳。

example: His behavior seems a bit strange today.
meaning: adj. 奇怪的；陌⽣的；不舒服的
exampleTranslation: 他今天的行为有些奇怪。

example: A stranger asked me for directions.
meaning: n. 陌⽣⼈；外地⼈，新来的⼈
exampleTranslation: 一个陌生人向我问路。

example: My watch strap is broken.
meaning: n. 带⼦ vt. ⽤带⼦系 (或绑)；⽤绷带包扎
exampleTranslation: 我的手表带断了。

example: I bought a straw hat from a farmer.
meaning: n. ⻨秆，稻草；吸管
exampleTranslation: 我向一位农民买了一顶稻草帽。

example: Trout thrive in this clear mountain stream.
meaning: n. ⼩溪；⽔流，⽓流；⼀连串 vi. vt. (⽔、⽓等) 流动 vi. (⼈或物) 涌向；飘扬，漂流 vt. 流媒体播放
exampleTranslation: 鳟鱼在这清澈的山间小溪里生活得很好

example: The company's management structure was streamlined under the new CEO.
meaning: vt. 精简；使…成流线型
exampleTranslation: 新任CEO对公司的管理结构进行了精简。

example: Our new product is still in trial phase.
meaning: n. 审判；试验，试⽤；预赛；考验 vt. vi. 试验，试⽤
exampleTranslation: 我们的新产品仍在试验阶段。

example: The flag of the Bahamas has a black triangle on the left.
meaning: n. 三⻆形；三⻆铁；三⻆关系
exampleTranslation: 巴哈马的国旗左边有一个黑色的三角形。

example: He belonged to an Amazonian tribe.
meaning: n. 部落；⼀伙⼈；(动植物的) 族
exampleTranslation: 他属于一个亚马逊的部落。

example: The concert was a tribute to the late pop star.
meaning: n. 致敬；是…的充分体现；贡品
exampleTranslation: 这个音乐会是对已故流行歌星的致敬。

example: He played a trick on his friend.
meaning: n. 诡计，花招；戏法；诀窍 vt. 欺骗，欺诈 adj. 意在欺骗的；虚弱的，有⽑病的
exampleTranslation: 他对他的朋友开了个玩笑。

example: His contribution to the project was a mere trifle.
meaning: n. ⼩事；稍微，⼀点；乳脂蛋糕 vi. 怠慢，⼩看
exampleTranslation: 他对项目的贡献只是微不足道的小事。

example: Could you trim the bushes in the garden?
meaning: vt. 修剪；削减；装饰，点缀 n. 修剪；(⾐服等的) 饰物 adj. (⼈) 苗条的，修⻓的；整⻬的
exampleTranslation: 你能修剪一下花园里的灌木吗？

example: We are going on a trip to Hawaii next summer.
meaning: n. 旅⾏ vi. 绊，绊倒 vt. 绊倒 (某⼈)；触发 (开关)
exampleTranslation: 我们明年夏天要去夏威夷旅行。

example: This hotel room has a triple bed (three single beds).
meaning: adj. 三个的，三部分的；三倍的 vi. vt. (使) 变成三倍
exampleTranslation: 三张单人床

example: The film was a worldwide hit.
meaning: adj. 遍及全世界的，世界各地的 adv. 遍及全世界，在世界各地
exampleTranslation: 这部电影在全世界都非常受欢迎

example: The apple was infested with worms.
meaning: n. 蠕⾍；寄⽣⾍；蠕⾍病毒；懦夫 vt. 蠕动，曲折⾏进；给…驱肠⾍
exampleTranslation: 苹果被虫子侵蚀了。

example: I always worry about leaving the stove on when I leave the house.
meaning: vi. 担⼼，担忧 vt. 使担⼼，使发愁 n. 担⼼；令⼈担忧的事
exampleTranslation: 我总是担心离开房子时炉子还开着。

example: His condition is getting worse.
meaning: adj. 更坏的，更糟的，更严重的 adv. 更坏地，更糟地，更严重地
exampleTranslation: 他的病况越来越糟糕。

example: The nurse cleaned the wound carefully.
meaning: n. 伤⼝；情感创伤 vt. 使 (⾝体) 受伤；伤害…的情感
exampleTranslation: 护士仔细清理了伤口。

example: Please wrap this gift for me.
meaning: vt. 包，裹；⽤…缠绕 (或围紧) n. 披肩，围⼱；包装材料；杀⻘
exampleTranslation: 请为我包装这个礼物。

example: The storm wrecked the ship and all on board are missing.
meaning: n. (船、⻋等的) 残骸；(⻋辆) 碰撞 vt. 破坏，毁坏；使失事
exampleTranslation: 风暴破坏了船只，所有在船上的人都失踪了。

example: The bird has a bright red breast.
meaning: n. 乳房；胸部；胸脯⾁ vt. 以胸部推…，挺胸顶着…
exampleTranslation: 这只鸟有鲜红的胸部。

example: Take a deep breath before you speak.
meaning: n. 呼吸，⽓息
exampleTranslation: 说话前深吸一口气。

example: Don't forget to breathe when you're working out.
meaning: vi. vt. 呼吸 vt. 呼出；低声说 vi. (让酒) 通⽓飘⾹；透⽓
exampleTranslation: 当你锻炼身体的时候，不要忘记呼吸

example: The trees were swaying gently in the breeze.
meaning: n. 微⻛；轻⽽易举的事 vi. 轻盈⽽⾃信地⾛
exampleTranslation: 树木在轻风中轻轻摇曳。

example: The businessman offered a bribe to the official to win the contract.
meaning: vt. 贿赂，收买 n. 贿赂，贿赂品

example: They're building a new bridge over the river.
meaning: n. 桥，桥梁；纽带；桥牌；鼻梁 vt. 架桥，横跨；弥合 (差距)

example: The sun is very bright today.
meaning: adj. 明亮的；鲜艳夺⽬的；聪明的 adv. 光亮地，明亮地

example: The stars are brilliant in the clear night sky.
meaning: adj. 聪颖的；杰出的；明亮的；极好的
exampleTranslation: 清晰的夜空中，星星显得愈发璀璨。

example: Can you bring me the book?
meaning: vt. 带来；引起；使处于某种状况

example: We make a good couple.
meaning: n. 两个，⼏个；(⼀对) 夫妻，情侣 vt. 结合，将…与…联系起来
exampleTranslation: 我们是一对好情侣。

example: I have a coupon that entitles me to 1 dollar off.
meaning: n. 优惠券，赠券
exampleTranslation: 我有一张优惠券，可以享受一美元的优惠。

example: It takes courage to stand up for what you believe in.
meaning: n. 勇⽓，胆量，勇敢
exampleTranslation: 坚持自己的信仰需要勇气。

example: I'm taking an English course at the community college.
meaning: n. 课程；跑道；航线；菜；进程 vi. 快速流动
exampleTranslation: 我在社区学院学习英语课程。

example: My grandfather has a dairy farm; he owns a lot of cows.
meaning: n. ⺟⽜，奶⽜；⼤型雌兽 vt. 恐吓，威胁
exampleTranslation: 我的爷爷有一个乳品农场,他有很多牛。

example: Mike is a coward, he can't stand up for himself.
meaning: n. 胆⼩⻤，懦夫

example: I'm going downtown to do some shopping.
meaning: adv. 在市中⼼，往市中⼼ adj. 在市中⼼的，往市中⼼的 n. 市中⼼，城镇中⼼
exampleTranslation: 我要去市中心购物。

example: She walked down the stairs slowly.
meaning: adv. prep. 向下；下降；沿着；贯穿…时期 adj. 情绪低落的 vt. 使掉落，使倒地 n. (⻦的) 绒⽻

example: The bird was soaring downward.
meaning: adj. 下降的，向下的 adv. 向下

example: You shouldn't drag the furniture across the room - it'll scratch the floor.
meaning: vt. 拖，拉；⽣拉硬拽；⽤⿏标拖动 vi. vt. 缓慢⽽费⼒地移动 vi. (时间或活动) 过得很慢 n. 累赘；讨厌的⼈或事；空⽓阻⼒
exampleTranslation: 你不应该把家具拖过房间，这样会刮花地板。

example: The dragon breathed fire at the knight.
exampleTranslation: 那个龙对着骑士喷火。

example: The drain is blocked with leaves.
meaning: vt. vi. 排空，(使) 放⼲；(使) 流⾛ vt. 喝光；使 (精⼒、钱) 耗尽 n. 下⽔道；排⽔孔；消耗，耗竭
exampleTranslation: 排水沟被树叶堵住了。

example: We need to make drastic changes to our manufacturing processes.
meaning: adj. 严厉的，极端的；(变化) 急剧的
exampleTranslation: 我们需要对我们的制造流程进行重大改变。

example: She likes to draw in her free time.
meaning: vt. vi. 画，描绘；拔出，抽出 vt. 拖动；拉帘；吸引；得出；⽀取 vi. 移动，⾏进 n. 抽奖，抽签；平局，和局
exampleTranslation: 她喜欢在空闲时间里画画。

example: The main drawback of the plan is its cost.
meaning: n. 缺点，不利条件
exampleTranslation: 计划的主要缺点是其成本。

example: He searched for his glasses in the drawer.
meaning: n. 抽屉
exampleTranslation: 作为家具部分的意义

example: She is very good at drawing.
meaning: n. 图画，素描画；绘画
exampleTranslation: 她很擅长画画。

example: The artist will exhibit his latest works at the gallery.
meaning: vt. vi. 展览，展出；表现出，显⽰出 n. 展品；展览会；证物，证据
exampleTranslation: 艺术家将在画廊展出他的最新作品。

example: The art gallery is holding an exhibition of Picasso's early works.
meaning: n. 展览 (会)；表现，显露
exampleTranslation: 那座艺术馆正在举行毕加索早期作品的展览。

example: The prisoner chose exile over death.
meaning: n. 流放，流亡；被流放者 vt. 流放，放逐
exampleTranslation: 囚犯选择流亡而不是死亡。

example: The exit is at the end of the hallway.
meaning: n. 出⼝，通道；离去，退场 vi. vt. 离去，退场；退出 (计算机程序)
exampleTranslation: 出口在走廊的尽头。

example: The conference provided a forum for discussing environmental issues.
meaning: n. 论坛，讨论会
exampleTranslation: 这次会议提供了讨论环境问题的场所

example: Please move forward in the line.
meaning: adv. 向前；进展；向将来；提前 adj. 向前的，前进的；未来的 vt. 发送，寄；转寄 n. 前锋
exampleTranslation: 请在队伍中向前移动。

example: We need to foster a sense of responsibility in our children.
meaning: vt. 培养，促进 vt. vi. 收养 adj. 收养的
exampleTranslation: 我们需要在孩子们中培养责任感。

example: The smell in the room was foul.
meaning: adj. 难闻的，恶⼼的；很令⼈不快的 vt. (体育运动) 犯规 n. (体育运动) 犯规
exampleTranslation: 屋子里一股腐臭的气味。

example: The house has a strong foundation.
meaning: n. 地基；基础；基⾦会；创办 n. 粉底
exampleTranslation: 建筑的

example: The fountain in the park is now in full operation.
meaning: n. 喷泉，喷⽔池；喷射；源泉
exampleTranslation: 此句子代表“fountain”的字面意思“喷泉”

example: Three quarters of the class passed the test.
meaning: n. 少量，⼀点⼉；(数学上的) 分数
exampleTranslation: 译：四分之三的学生通过了考试。

example: He suffered a fracture in his right arm during the accident.
meaning: n. 裂缝，裂痕，(尤指) ⻣折 vi. vt. (使) 断裂；(使)(组织等) 分裂
exampleTranslation: 他在事故中右臂骨折.

example: This antique vase is very fragile, so handle it with care.
meaning: adj. 易碎的；脆弱的；精致的；虚弱的
exampleTranslation: 这个古董花瓶非常脆弱，所以要小心把握。

example: He picked up a fragment of broken glass.
meaning: n. 碎⽚，⽚段，⼩部分 vt. vi. (使) 成碎⽚，(使) 分裂
exampleTranslation: 他捡起一块破碎的玻璃片

example: This soup is very fragrant.
meaning: adj. 芳⾹的，有⾹味的
exampleTranslation: 这个汤非常香。

example: As a mortal, we all have limited time on earth.
meaning: adj. 终有⼀死的；致命的；极度的 n. ⼈，凡⼈，普通⼈
exampleTranslation: 作为凡人，我们在地球上的时间都是有限的。

example: She took out a mortgage on her house to start her own business.
meaning: n. 房屋抵押贷款，按揭 vt. 抵押 (房屋、⼟地) 借款
exampleTranslation: 她抵押自己的房子以开办自己的生意。

example: You should keep your body healthy by eating well and exercising regularly.
meaning: n. ⾝体；躯⼲；⼫体；团体；⼤量
exampleTranslation: 你应该通过饮食健康和定期锻炼来保持身体健康。

example: I put on my boots before going out in the snow.
meaning: n. 靴⼦；后备箱；猛踢 vt. 猛踢；给 (违停⻋辆) 上夹锁 vi. vt. 启动 (计算机)
exampleTranslation: "我在出门走雪前穿上了我的靴子。"

example: I've booked a booth at the trade fair to display our new products.
meaning: n. ⼩隔间；摊位；⽕⻋座，卡座
exampleTranslation: 我已经在交易会上预定了一个摊位来展示我们的新产品。

example: I have a meeting with my boss tomorrow.
meaning: n. ⽼板，上司；领导，头⼉ vt. 对…颐指⽓使，对…指⼿画脚 adj. ⼀流的，卓越的
exampleTranslation: 我明天有个与老板的会议。

example: He studied botany at the university.
meaning: n. 植物学
exampleTranslation: 他在大学学习植物学。

example: The boy fell to the bottom of the stairs.
meaning: n. 底部，底⾯；尽头；末位；臀部 adj. 底部的，尽头的
exampleTranslation: 男孩摔倒在楼梯底部。

example: She is a student at the School of Art.
meaning: n. 艺术；艺术品；⽂科；技艺；美术
exampleTranslation: 她是艺术学院的学生。

example: Arteries carry blood from the heart to all parts of the body.
meaning: n. 动脉；主⼲路，⼲线
exampleTranslation: 动脉将血从心脏输送到身体的每一个部位。

example: I read an interesting article about global warming in the newspaper.
meaning: n. ⽂章；条款；东西，物品；冠词
exampleTranslation: 我在报纸上阅读了一篇关于全球变暖的有趣文章。

example: He was very articulate about his feelings on the subject.
meaning: vt. 清楚地表达 vi. vt. ⼝⻮清楚；⽤关节连接 adj. 善于表达的；吐字清晰的
exampleTranslation: 他在这个问题上表达得很清楚。

example: The artificial intelligence could beat the world champion in chess.
meaning: adj. ⼈造的；⼈为的；不真诚的
exampleTranslation: 这个人工智能能打败国际象棋的世界冠军。

example: Michael Jackson was a world-renowned artist.
meaning: n. 艺术家；艺⼈
exampleTranslation: 迈克尔·杰克逊是一位享誉世界的艺术家。

example: The painting shows artistic talent.
meaning: adj. 艺术的；有艺术天赋的；精美的
exampleTranslation: 这幅画显示出艺术天赋。

example: The news disrupted their plans for evening.
meaning: vt. 使中断，扰乱
exampleTranslation: 这消息打乱了他们的晚间计划。

example: The fog will dissipate by noon.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 消散，消失，驱散 vt. 挥霍，浪费 (时间、⾦钱等)
exampleTranslation: 雾将在中午散去。

example: The distance between New York and Los Angeles is about 2,450 miles.
meaning: n. 距离，间距；差异；疏远 vt. 与…疏远，拉开距离
exampleTranslation: 新约克和洛杉矶之间的距离大约是2,450英里。

example: The village is distant from the city.
meaning: adj. 遥远的；远亲的；疏远的
exampleTranslation: 这个村庄离城市很远。

example: This oil refining company is distilling crude oil to make gasoline.
meaning: vt. 蒸馏；提炼 (信息)
exampleTranslation: 这家炼油公司正在精炼原油以制造汽油。

example: The news of the accident caused great distress to her family.
meaning: n. 悲伤，忧虑；贫困；遇险 vt. 使忧虑，使悲伤，使苦恼
exampleTranslation: 这个意外的消息给她的家庭带来了极大的痛苦。

example: This district is known for its rich historical background.
meaning: n. 地区，区域；⾏政区，管辖区
exampleTranslation: 这个地区以其丰富的历史背景而闻名。

example: Do not disturb me when I am sleeping.
meaning: vt. 打扰，⼲扰；使烦恼；弄乱
exampleTranslation: 当我睡觉时请不要打扰我。

example: I apologize for any disturbance I may have caused.
meaning: n. ⼲扰；骚乱；失调，紊乱
exampleTranslation: 对于我可能引起的任何打扰，我深感抱歉。

example: We spent Christmas eve at my grandparents' house.
meaning: n. 前⼣，前⼀段时间；傍晚

example: Even small changes can make a difference.
meaning: adv. 甚⾄，连，即使；甚⾄更 adj. 平坦的；均匀的；偶数的 vt. vi. 使平均
exampleTranslation: 即使很小的改变也能产生影响。

example: This is a groundbreaking event in the history of science.
meaning: n. 事件；公开活动；体育项⽬
exampleTranslation: 这在科学史上是具有划时代意义的事件

example: He eventually found his keys in the kitchen.
meaning: adv. 终于，最终
exampleTranslation: 他最终在厨房找到了他的钥匙。

example: Have you ever seen a ghost?
meaning: adv. 在任何时候；曾经；始终

example: I bought a gift for you.
meaning: prep. 对；为了；关于；代表；因为 prep. ⽀持；就…⽽⾔；往，向 conj. 因为
exampleTranslation: 我为你买了一份礼物。

example: I forbid you to go out at night.
meaning: vt. 禁⽌，不准；妨碍，阻碍

example: He wiped the sweat off his forehead.
meaning: n. 前额，额头

example: Many students are choosing to study in a foreign country.
meaning: adj. 外国的；涉外的；陌⽣的

example: As a foreigner, it took me some time to get used to the local customs.
meaning: n. 外国⼈
exampleTranslation: 作为一个外国人，我花了一些时间来适应当地的风俗习惯。

example: Please look at the blackboard.
meaning: vi. 看，瞧；寻找，寻求 n. 看；神情；外观，相貌；式样

example: The final exams are looming over the students.
meaning: vi. 隐约显现，赫然出现；逐渐逼近 n. 织布机

example: She made a loop with the rope.
meaning: n. 环形，圆圈；循环㬵⽚ (或磁带) vt. 使成环，使绕成圈 vi. 成环形移动
exampleTranslation: 她用绳子打了个环。

example: My jeans feel a bit loose.
meaning: adj. 松动的；零散的；不受约束的 adj. 宽松的；不结实的；不严密的 vt. 释放，发泄；松开；射出 (箭等)

example: Can you loosen this knot for me?
meaning: vt. vi. (使) 变松，松开 vt. 松开 (⼿等)；放宽 (限制或控制)
