example: She was presented to the Queen and the Lord Mayor.
meaning: n. (英国) 贵族；勋爵；阁下；上帝
exampleTranslation: 她被介绍给了女王和市长。

example: He drives a lorry for a living.
meaning: n. 卡⻋，货⻋
exampleTranslation: 他以开大货车为生。

example: He often moans about his job.
meaning: vi. vt. 呻吟；抱怨 vi. 呼啸，发出萧萧声 n. 呻吟声；抱怨；呼啸声
exampleTranslation: 他经常抱怨自己的工作。

example: A mob of protesters were causing chaos in the city.
meaning: n. 暴⺠；⼀伙⼈；⿊帮；⼀群动物 vt. (动物) 围攻；把…团团围住
exampleTranslation: 一群抗议者在城市中制造混乱。

example: This mobile clinic provides healthcare services to remote communities.
meaning: adj. 可移动的；⾏动⽅便的；流动的 n. ⼿机；⻛铃，悬挂饰物
exampleTranslation: 这个流动诊所为偏远地区提供医疗服务。

example: The government was mobilizing to get homeless people off the street.
meaning: vt. vi. 动员，⿎动 vt. 调动，调⽤
exampleTranslation: 政府正在行动将无家可归的人从街头转移走。

example: This new computer model is made up of several separate modules that can be replaced individually.
meaning: n. 单元，组件；模块；分离舱
exampleTranslation: 这款新的电脑模型由几个独立的模块组成，每个模块都可以单独更换。

example: He poured the jelly into a mould.
meaning: n. 模具，铸模；(独特) 类型；霉菌 vt. (⽤模具) 浇铸；将…塑造成 vi. vt. (使) 紧贴于，(使) 与…吻合
exampleTranslation: 他把果冻倒进模具里。

example: He used his colleague's illness as a pretext to leave the office early.
meaning: n. 借⼝，托辞
exampleTranslation: 他以同事生病为借口提前离开了办公室。

example: She has a pretty face.
meaning: adv. 相当，⾮常 adj. 漂亮的；赏⼼悦⽬的，动听的
exampleTranslation: 她有一张漂亮的脸庞。

example: Justice will prevail in the end.
meaning: vi. 盛⾏；占优势，占上⻛
exampleTranslation: 正义最终会获胜。

example: Poverty is prevalent in that rural area.
meaning: adj. 流⾏的，盛⾏的，普遍的
exampleTranslation: 在那个农村地区，贫困非常普遍。

example: She dances to the rhythm of the music.
meaning: n. 节奏，韵律；规律性变化
exampleTranslation: 她随着音乐的节奏跳舞。

example: He broke a rib in the accident.
meaning: n. 肋⻣；排⻣；肋材；罗纹 vt. (友善地) 开…的玩笑
exampleTranslation: 他在事故中折断了一根肋骨。

example: The girl wore a pink ribbon in her hair.
meaning: n. 丝带；带状物；绶带，勋带
exampleTranslation: 那个女孩在她的头发中戴着一条粉色的丝带。

example: I finally got rid of my old car.
meaning: vt. 使摆脱，使消除，使丢弃 adj. 摆脱了的，丢弃了的
exampleTranslation: 我终于把我那辆旧车处理掉了。

example: The book is filled with riddles and puzzles.
meaning: n. 谜，谜语；谜团，费解的事 vt. 使…满是窟窿
exampleTranslation: 这本书充满了谜语和难题。

example: We hiked along the ridge of the mountain.
meaning: n. ⼭脊；隆起 vt. 使隆起
exampleTranslation: 我们沿着山脊徒步行走。

example: That ridiculous rumor spread quickly online.
meaning: adj. 荒谬的，可笑的
exampleTranslation: 那个荒唐的谣言在网上迅速传播。

example: The rules in this school are very rigid.
meaning: adj. 严格的，死板的；固执的；僵硬的
exampleTranslation: 这个学校的规则非常严格。

example: We need to conduct a rigorous investigation to find out what really happened.
meaning: adj. 严格的，严厉的；缜密的，细致的
exampleTranslation: 我们需要进行严格的调查，以确定真正发生了什么。

example: The rim of the coffee cup was stained.
meaning: n. (圆形物体的) 边缘；轮圈 vt. 形成…的边沿
exampleTranslation: 咖啡杯的边缘沾上了污渍。

example: The speech sparked a riot in the city;.
meaning: n. 暴乱，骚乱；丰富多彩 vi. (⼈群) 发⽣骚乱，闹事
exampleTranslation: 这个演说在城市里引起了一场暴乱。

example: She remained static despite the ongoing changes around her.
meaning: adj. 静⽌的，停滞的；静电的 n. 静电⼲扰；静电；指责，抱怨
exampleTranslation: 她在周围的一切变化中仍然保持静止。

example: I will meet you at the train station.
meaning: n. ⻋站；站，所，局；电视台 vt. 派驻，使驻扎；置⾝于
exampleTranslation: 我会在火车站和你见面。

example: The car remained stationary in the traffic jam.
meaning: adj. 静⽌的；不变的，稳定的
exampleTranslation: 车辆在交通堵塞中一直处于静止状态。

example: I need to buy some new stationery for my office.
meaning: n. ⽂具；信纸，信笺
exampleTranslation: 我需要为我的办公室买一些新的文具。

example: Would you like your steak rare, medium, or well-done?
exampleTranslation: 你想要你的牛排是生的、五分熟还是全熟？

example: The kettle is letting off some steam.
meaning: n. 蒸汽；蒸汽动⼒；⽔汽 vi. 冒蒸汽；以蒸汽为动⼒⾏驶 vt. vi. 蒸
exampleTranslation: 水壶正在冒蒸汽。

example: As a mountaineer, he is used to climbing steep hills.
meaning: adj. 陡的；急剧的；(价格等) 过⾼的 vt. 浸泡 (⻝物)
exampleTranslation: 作为⼀名登山者，他习惯了爬陡峭的⼭坡。

example: His actions are completely against the stereotype of a policeman.
meaning: n. 成⻅，刻板印象 vt. 对…有成⻅
exampleTranslation: 他的行为完全颠覆了我对警察的刻板印象。

example: The steward on the plane offered me a beverage.
meaning: n. 乘务员，服务员；统筹⼈；管家
exampleTranslation: 飞机上的乘务员给我提供了一杯饮料。

example: He was eager to transcend his past and start a new life.
meaning: vt. 超出，超越
exampleTranslation: 他渴望超越过去，开始新的人生。

example: Transistor radios were a breakthrough in technology, they were small enough to take virtually anywhere.
meaning: n. 晶体管
exampleTranslation: 晶体管收音机是技术的一大突破，它们小到可以几乎带到任何地方。

example: The goods were lost in transit.
meaning: n. 运输；交通系统；过境，中转 vt. vi. 经过，穿过 (某⼀地区)
exampleTranslation: 货物在运输过程中丢失。

example: The transition from school to university can be difficult for many students.
meaning: n. 过渡，转变 vi. 过渡，转变
exampleTranslation: 许多学生可能会觉得从学校转到大学是个困难的过渡

example: Can you translate this document into French?
meaning: vt. vi. 翻译；(使) 转变；将…理解为… vi. 被翻译为
exampleTranslation: 你能把这份文件翻译成法语吗？

example: The window is transparent, and sunlight is pouring in.
meaning: adj. 透明的；明显的；公开的
exampleTranslation: 这扇窗户是透明的，阳光正洒进来。

example: The ancient monument has miraculously remained intact for centuries.
meaning: adj. 完整⽆缺的，未受损伤的
exampleTranslation: 这座古代纪念碑奇迹般地保存完好，已有几个世纪了。

example: The interface of the new software is user-friendly.
meaning: n. 交互界⾯；接⼝；交界⾯ vi. vt. (使)(与…) 相互联系
exampleTranslation: 新软件的接口用户友好。

example: Parents should not interfere in their children's marriages.
meaning: vi. ⼲涉，介⼊；妨碍，⼲扰；弄坏
exampleTranslation: 父母不应干预孩子的婚姻。

example: His interference in my work is very annoying.
meaning: n. ⼲涉，介⼊；(电波等的) ⼲扰
exampleTranslation: 他对我的工作的干扰让我很烦。

example: The police had to intervene in the fight.
meaning: vi. ⼲涉，介⼊；⼲扰；介于…之间 vt. vi. 打断，插嘴
exampleTranslation: 情景：冲突、打斗

example: She sat on the park bench and contemplated the beauty of the setting sun.
meaning: vt. 打算，考虑，沉思；端详，凝视
exampleTranslation: 她坐在公园的长凳上，注视着夕阳的美丽。

example: They contrived a clever plan to fool the guards.
meaning: vi. 设法做到 vt. 图谋，策划；发明，创造
exampleTranslation: 他们巧妙的设计了一个计划来愚弄警卫。

example: Online shopping offers a great level of convenience.
meaning: n. ⽅便，便利；便利设施
exampleTranslation: 在线购物提供了极高的便利。

example: The hotel is convenient to all public transportation.
meaning: adj. ⽅便的；附近的，⽅便到达的
exampleTranslation: 酒店交通便利，临近所有公共交通设施。

example: I had an interesting conversation with Michael yesterday.
meaning: n. 交谈，谈话
exampleTranslation: 昨天我和迈克尔有了一次很有趣的谈话。

example: She found the film interesting; conversely, I thought it was pretty boring.
meaning: adv. 相反地，反过来说
exampleTranslation: 中文翻译：她觉得这部电影很有趣；反过来，我觉得它相当无聊。

example: The conversion of raw data into meaningful information is a crucial part of data processing.
meaning: n. 转变，改变；(信仰的) 改变
exampleTranslation: 将原始数据转化为有意义的信息是数据处理的关键部分。

example: I need to convert these euros into dollars.
meaning: vt. vi. (使) 转变，改变；使改变 (信仰) vi. 可转变为，可变化成 n. 皈依者，改变信仰的⼈
exampleTranslation: 我需要把这些欧元换成美元。

example: They were convicted on evidence that was later proved to be false.
meaning: vt. 宣判有罪 n. 已决犯，囚犯
exampleTranslation: 他们因后来被证明是假的证据而被定罪。

example: His deep religious conviction influenced his entire life.
meaning: n. 定罪；坚定的信念；坚信
exampleTranslation: 他深深的宗教信念影响了他的整个生涯。

example: I finally managed to convince him to come to the party.
meaning: vt. 使确信，使信服；说服，劝服
exampleTranslation: 我终于说服他来参加派对了。

example: The party was lively and everyone was having a great time.
meaning: adj. 有活⼒的，活泼的，⽣动的 adj. 充满趣味的
exampleTranslation: 这个派对热闹非凡，每个人都玩得非常开心。

example: My liver was damaged by alcohol.
meaning: n. 肝脏
exampleTranslation: 我的肝脏被酒精损害了。

example: The only living relative I have is my sister.
meaning: adj. 活的，活着的；在使⽤的 n. ⽣计，收⼊；⽣活⽅式
exampleTranslation: 我唯一的在世亲戚就是我的姐姐。

example: Can you get a loaf of bread at the store?
meaning: n. (⾯包的) ⼀条 vi. 游荡，闲逛
exampleTranslation: 你能在杂货店买一条面包吗?

example: The bank approved the car loan.
meaning: n. 贷款；暂借 vt. 借出
exampleTranslation: 银行批准了汽车贷款。

example: We met in the hotel lobby.
meaning: n. ⻔廊，⼤厅；游说团体；游说 vt. vi. 游说 (从政者或政府)
exampleTranslation: 我们在酒店大堂见面

example: The locomotive is at the front of the train.
meaning: n. 机⻋，⽕⻋头 adj. 移动的，运动的
exampleTranslation: 火车头位于火车的最前端。

example: We stayed in a comfortable ski lodge.
meaning: n. 乡间⼩屋；⻔房；传达室；⽳ vi. (付款) 寄宿，租住 vt. 为…提供住宿；正式提出 (声明) vi. vt. (被) 固定，卡住
exampleTranslation: 我们在一个舒适的滑雪小屋住了下来。

example: He set himself lofty goals.
meaning: adj. ⾼耸的；崇⾼的；⾼傲的
exampleTranslation: 他给自己定下了崇高的目标。

example: He kept a detailed log of his travels.
meaning: n. 原⽊；正式记录，⽇志 vt. 记录；⾏驶；伐⽊ vi. 登录，注册
exampleTranslation: 他详细记录了他的旅行。

example: The long road crossed the desert.
meaning: adj. ⻓的；⻓时间的 adv. ⻓久地；很久地 vi. 渴望
exampleTranslation: 那条长路穿过沙漠。

example: We need to figure out the precise longitude and latitude to know our position.
meaning: n. 经度
exampleTranslation: 我们需要确定精确的经度和纬度才能了解我们的位置。

example: The store offers a 10% discount to all new customers.
meaning: n. 减价，折扣 vt. 不相信，不重视；打折出售
exampleTranslation: 这家店对所有新客户提供10%的折扣。

example: His failure did not discourage him from trying again.
meaning: vt. 打消…的念头，阻⽌；使灰⼼
exampleTranslation: 他的失败并没有打消他再次尝试的想法。

example: He was very discreet, he said nothing to her about his suspicions.
meaning: adj. (⾔⾏) 谨慎的；不显眼的
exampleTranslation: 他非常小心，对她一点都没有提到他的怀疑。

example: These small companies now have their own discrete identity.
meaning: adj. 分开的，分离的，各⾃的
exampleTranslation: 这些小公司现在有了自己明确的身份。

example: There's a discrepancy between your account and the witness's.
meaning: n. 差异，不符合
exampleTranslation: 你的说法和证人的有出入。

example: She often wears costumes as a disguise.
meaning: vt. 装扮，假扮；掩盖，掩饰 n. 伪装物，化装⽤具；伪装 (⾏为)
exampleTranslation: 她经常穿戴服装作为伪装。

example: His filthy habits fill me with disgust.
meaning: n. 厌恶，反感 vt. 使厌恶，使反感
exampleTranslation: 他肮脏的习惯让我感到恶心。

example: I dislike waiting in long lines.
meaning: vt. 不喜爱，厌恶 n. 厌恶感，反感；不喜欢的东西
exampleTranslation: 我不喜欢排长队等候。

example: She couldn't hide her dismay at the result.
meaning: n. (因惊愕⽽) 沮丧，忧虑 vt. 使担⼼，使失望
exampleTranslation: 她无法掩饰她对结果的失望。

example: Proper disposal of waste is crucial for our environment.
meaning: n. 丢掉，处理；(财产等) 处置，变卖
exampleTranslation: 合理的处理废物对我们的环境至关重要。

example: How do we properly dispose of this waste?
meaning: vi. 丢掉；处理 vt. 布置，安排；使倾向于
exampleTranslation: 如何正确处置这些废物？

example: He has a cheery disposition, always ready to help others.
meaning: n. 性情；倾向；布置，安排；处置
exampleTranslation: 他性情开朗，总是愿意帮助别人。

example: The family sold their country estate.
meaning: n. 庄园，地产；财产，遗产 n. 住宅区，⼯业区
exampleTranslation: 这家人卖掉了他们的乡村庄园。

example: He is held in high esteem by his colleagues.
meaning: n. 尊重，敬重 vt. 尊重，敬重
exampleTranslation: 他受到同事们的高度尊重。

example: The stars are eternal; they have remained unchanged for centuries.
meaning: adj. 永恒的，永远的；没完没了的
exampleTranslation: 星星是永恒的；它们几个世纪以来一直未曾改变。

example: Water evaporates quickly under the hot sun.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 蒸发，(使) 挥发 vi. 逐渐消失
exampleTranslation: 在炎热的太阳下，水会很快蒸发。

example: I am fond of reading books.
meaning: adj. 喜爱…的；深情的；难以实现的
exampleTranslation: 我喜欢阅读书籍。

example: He's no fool, he knew what he was doing.
meaning: n. 傻⽠，笨蛋；⼩丑，弄⾂ vt. 欺骗，愚弄 vi. 说蠢话，⼲傻事 adj. 傻的，愚蠢的
exampleTranslation: 他不是个傻瓜，他知道自己在做什么。

example: It was foolish of him to quit his job without having another one lined up.
meaning: adj. 愚蠢的，傻的；困窘的
exampleTranslation: 他在没有找到下一份工作的情况下辞去了他的职位，这是很愚蠢的。

example: I stepped on a thorn with my bare foot.
meaning: n. 脚，⾜；底部；英尺 vt. 负担费⽤
exampleTranslation: 我赤脚踩到了一根刺。

example: I heard the echo of his footsteps as he walked away.
meaning: n. 脚步声，⾜迹
exampleTranslation: 我听到他走远的脚步声的回音。

example: The mountains were shrouded in mist.
meaning: n. 薄雾，雾霭，⽔汽；液体喷雾 vt. vi. (使) 结雾；被泪⽔模糊 vt. 向…喷雾
exampleTranslation: 山脉被雾气所遮蔽。

example: I made a big mistake by losing my temper.
meaning: n. 错误 vt. 误解，误认为
exampleTranslation: 我发火是个大错误。

example: The mistress of the house welcomed the guests.
meaning: n. 情妇；⼥教师；⼥主⼈
exampleTranslation: 女主人欢迎了客人们。

example: Sometimes, people misunderstand my intentions because I don't express myself clearly.
meaning: vt. vi. 误解，误会
exampleTranslation: 有时，由于我不能清楚地表达自己，人们误解我的意图。

example: Your constant interruptions are a nuisance.
meaning: n. 讨厌的⼈，⿇烦的事；⾮法妨害
exampleTranslation: 你的不断打断真是令人厌烦。

example: His fingers were numb with cold.
meaning: adj. 失去知觉的；⿇⽊的，迟钝的 vt. 使失去知觉；使⿇⽊，使迟钝
exampleTranslation: 他的手指冻得麻木了。

example: Numerical analysis is a complex field of mathematics.
meaning: adj. 数字的，以数字表⽰的
exampleTranslation: 数值分析是数学的一个复杂领域。

example: There are numerous solutions to this problem.
meaning: adj. 众多的，许多的
exampleTranslation: 这个问题有无数的解决方法。

example: The wall of the nursery was painted with lovely pink.
meaning: n. 托⼉所；婴⼉室；⼉童室；苗圃 adj. 幼⼉教育的
exampleTranslation: 儿童房的墙面被粉刷成可爱的粉色

example: Parents want to nurture their children into responsible adults.
meaning: vt. 培养，养育；培养 (想法等) n. 培养，养育
exampleTranslation: 父母希望抚养他们的孩子成为负责任的大人。

example: Walnuts and cashews are types of nuts.
meaning: n. 坚果；怪⼈，疯⼦；…迷；螺⺟
exampleTranslation: 核桃和腰果是种类的坚果

example: Good nutrition is vital for good health.
meaning: n. 营养，滋养
exampleTranslation: 良好的营养对健康至关重要。

example: You ought to respect your parents.
meaning: modal. 应该
exampleTranslation: 你应当尊重你的父母。

example: There has been an outbreak of war in the Middle East.
meaning: n. (暴⼒活动、疾病等的) 爆发
exampleTranslation: 中东地区战争爆发。

example: I'd rather have an outdoor job than be stuck in an office all day.
meaning: adj. ⼾外的，室外的
exampleTranslation: 我宁愿有一份户外工作也不愿整天被困在办公室里。

example: She wore a fashionable outfit to the party.
meaning: n. 全套服装；团队 vt. 给…配置设备，供给服装
exampleTranslation: 她穿了一套时尚的服装去参加派对。

example: We plan an outing to the beach this weekend.
meaning: n. 远⾜，短途旅⾏
exampleTranslation: 我们计划这个周末去海滩游玩。

example: He is an outstanding football player.
meaning: adj. 杰出的；显著的；未⽀付的
exampleTranslation: 他是一个优秀的足球运动员。

example: She opened her own retail shop after years of working for someone else.
meaning: n. 零售 adv. 以零售⽅式 vt. 零售；(详细地) 讲述 vi. 以…价格零售
exampleTranslation: 她在为别人工作了很多年后开了自己的零售店。

example: Please retain your ticket for the duration of your journey.
meaning: vt. 保持，保留；储存；预聘 (律师)
exampleTranslation: 请在整个旅程中保留你的车票

example: The school has a high retention rate; over 90% of students return for their sophomore year.
meaning: n. 保持，保留；记忆⼒
exampleTranslation: 这所学校的保留率很高，超过90%的学生会回来读大二。

example: He will retire from his position next month.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 退休 vi. 退出，离开；退出⽐赛，退役
exampleTranslation: 他将在下个月退休。

example: She had no quick retort to his statement.
meaning: vt. 反驳，回嘴 n. 回应，反驳；曲颈瓶，蒸馏器
exampleTranslation: 她对他的陈述没有迅速的反驳。

example: Our troops were forced to make a retreat after heavy fighting.
meaning: vi. 撤退；后退；撤回 (计划)；躲避 n. 撤退；逃避；僻静处；静修
exampleTranslation: 这句话展示了“retreat”在语境中的用法。

example: He retrieved his lost wallet from the police station.
meaning: vt. 取回，找回；检索数据；挽回
exampleTranslation: 他从警察局取回了他丢失的钱包。

example: In retrospect, he made the right choice.
meaning: n. 回顾，回想
exampleTranslation: 回顾起来,他做了正确的选择。

example: The peasants were gathering in order to revolt against the tyrannical king.
meaning: n. 反叛，造反 vi. 反叛，造反 vt. 使惊骇，令⼈厌恶
exampleTranslation: 农民们正在聚集起来反抗暴君国王。

example: The French Revolution changed the course of history.
meaning: n. ⾰命；变⾰；旋转；旋转⼀周
exampleTranslation: 法国大革命改变了历史的进程。

example: These new technologies are revolutionary to the industry.
meaning: adj. ⾰命的；⾰命性的，突破性的 n. ⾰命者，⾰命家
exampleTranslation: 这些新技术对行业影响深远。

example: The Earth revolves around the Sun.
meaning: vi. 旋转；围绕；以…为中⼼
exampleTranslation: 地球围绕太阳旋转。

example: A tall stalk grew beside the fence.
meaning: n. 茎，秆，梗；柄状物 vt. vi. 跟踪；出没，作祟 vi. ⾼视阔步，怒⽓冲冲地⾛
exampleTranslation: 篱笆旁长出了一根高高的茎。

example: Be careful not to stain your shirt when you're eating spaghetti.
meaning: vt. vi. 弄脏 vt. 给…染⾊；玷污，败坏 (名声) n. 污点，污渍；染⾊剂，着⾊剂
exampleTranslation: 吃意面的时候注意别把衬衫弄脏。

example: They have a stake in the success of the business.
meaning: n. 股份；重⼤利益；赌注；桩 vt. 以…打赌，拿…冒险
exampleTranslation: 他们对这个商业的成功有着切身利害关系。

example: The bread became stale overnight.
meaning: adj. 不新鲜的；没有新意的；厌倦的 vi. vt. (使)变得不新鲜
exampleTranslation: 面包一夜之间变得不新鲜了。

example: She has a fruit and vegetable stall in the local market.
meaning: n. 货摊，摊位；牲畜棚；⼩隔间 vi. vt. (使) 熄⽕，抛锚；暂缓，搁置 vi. 故意拖延 (以赢得时间) vt. 拖住 (以赢得时间做某事)
exampleTranslation: 她在当地市场有一个水果和蔬菜摊位。

example: Rice is a staple food in many Asian countries.
meaning: adj. 主要的，基本的，重要的 n. 订书钉；基本⻝物；⽀柱产品 vt. ⽤订书钉装订
exampleTranslation: 在许多亚洲国家，稻米是主食。

example: I collected stamps when I was a child.
meaning: n. 邮票；印章，印记 vt. vi. 跺 (脚)，重踩；迈着重步⾛ vt. 在…上盖 (字样或图案等)
exampleTranslation: 我小时候是集邮的。

example: She stared at him in surprise.
meaning: vi. 盯着看，凝视 n. 盯着看，凝视
exampleTranslation: 她惊讶地看着他。

example: The plane crash was an unspeakable tragedy, with no survivors.
meaning: n. 不幸，惨剧；悲剧 (作品)
exampleTranslation: 这次飞机坠毁是不可言说的悲剧，没有生还者。

example: The loss of lives in the war is truly tragic.
meaning: adj. 悲惨的；悲剧的
exampleTranslation: 在这场战争中失去的生命真的是悲惨无比。

example: I take the tram to work every morning.
meaning: n. 有轨电⻋
exampleTranslation: 我每天早上乘坐有轨电车去上班。

example: As a violinist, he uses a bow to play the strings.
meaning: vi. 鞠躬；屈从于 vt. 低 (头)，垂 (⾸) n. 鞠躬；船头；⼸；蝴蝶结；琴⼸
exampleTranslation: 作为一位小提琴家，他使用弓来拉弦。

example: Regular exercise helps keep your bowels working well.
meaning: n. 肠；深处，内部
exampleTranslation: 定期的运动有助于保持你的肠道运作良好。

example: He ate a bowl of rice for lunch.
meaning: n. 碗；物体的碗状部分
exampleTranslation: 他午餐吃了一碗饭。

example: Many people are calling for a boycott of the company's products.
meaning: vt. 抵制 n. 抵制⾏动
exampleTranslation: 很多人正在呼吁抵制该公司的产品。

example: Please maintain regular contact with your supervisor.
meaning: n. 联系；接触；熟⼈；隐形眼镜 vt. 联系
exampleTranslation: 请定期和你的主管保持联系。

example: This box can contain all the documents.
meaning: vt. 容纳，包含；控制，遏制；克制
exampleTranslation: 这个盒子可以装下所有文件。

example: Don't let the paints contaminate the groundwater.
meaning: vt. 污染，弄脏；玷污，毒害
exampleTranslation: 不要让油漆污染地下水。

example: I bumped my head on the doorframe.
meaning: vi. vt. 猛碰，撞；颠簸⾏进 n. 碰撞 (声)；肿块；隆起，凸块
exampleTranslation: 我把头撞在了门框上。

example: Please don't burn the rubbish here.
meaning: vi. 燃烧；发烫；发亮 vt. vi. 烧毁；烧焦；晒伤，烫伤 n. 烧伤，烫伤
exampleTranslation: 请不要在这里烧垃圾。

example: He burst into the room without knocking.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 爆裂，胀开 vi. 猛冲；爆满，涨满；突然爆发 n. 迸发，爆发；爆裂，裂⼝
exampleTranslation: 他没敲门就闯进了房间。

example: We decided to bury him in the backyard.
meaning: vt. 埋葬；埋藏；覆盖；掩藏
exampleTranslation: 我们决定在后院埋葬他。

example: Crime rates rise sharply in the city.
meaning: n. 犯罪活动，罪⾏；罪过
exampleTranslation: 这个城市的**犯罪率**急剧上升。

example: The police are still looking for the criminals behind the theft.
meaning: adj. 犯罪的；刑事的；不道德的 n. 罪犯，犯⼈
exampleTranslation: 警察还在寻找这起偷窃案背后的罪犯。

example: He became a cripple after the car accident.
meaning: n. 残疾⼈，瘸⼦ vt. 使残废，使成瘸⼦；严重毁坏
exampleTranslation: 他在车祸后成为了一个残疾人。

example: The apple is crisp and juicy.
meaning: adj. 脆的，酥脆的；挺括的；凉爽的 n. 炸薯⽚；⽔果酥 vi. vt. (使) 变脆
exampleTranslation: 这个苹果又脆又多汁。

example: Each application is judged on its own merits and against a set of criteria.
meaning: n. 标准，准则
exampleTranslation: 每个申请都根据其自身的优点和一套标准进行评判。

example: The farmer harvested the crop in autumn.
meaning: n. 庄稼；收成；⼀批；短⻢鞭 vt. 剪短 (头发)；剪裁；啃吃 vi. 有收成；(意外地) 出现，发⽣
exampleTranslation: "秋天，农民收割了作物。"

example: Don't cross the road until the traffic light turns green.
meaning: vi. vt. 越过，渡过；相交 vt. 使交叉；反对 n. 叉号；⼗字架 adj. 恼怒的，⽣⽓的
exampleTranslation: 等待交通灯绿灯亮时再过马路。

example: The crow is known for its intelligence and adaptability.
meaning: n. 乌鸦 vi. 啼叫，打鸣；(婴⼉) 欢叫 vi. vt. ⾃鸣得意
exampleTranslation: 乌鸦以其聪明和适应性而闻名。

example: There was a large crowd at the concert.
meaning: n. ⼈群，观众；⼀伙⼈；群众 vt. 挤满，塞满；挤，靠近
exampleTranslation: 音乐会上有很多人。

example: The queen wore the crown on her head.
meaning: n. 王冠；王国；王权；冠军宝座；⽛冠 vt. 为…加冕；给…加顶；使圆满
exampleTranslation: 女王戴着皇冠。

example: The chef prepared an exquisite meal.
meaning: adj. 精美的；(感觉) 强烈的；敏锐的
exampleTranslation: 厨师烹饪了一顿精致的饭菜。

example: The car looks great from the exterior.
meaning: n. 外部，外观；外表，外貌 adj. 外⾯的，外部的
exampleTranslation: 从外观来看，这辆车非常好看。

example: External walls of the building.
meaning: adj. 外部的；对外的
exampleTranslation: 建筑物的外墙

example: He has an extra ticket to the game.
meaning: adj. 额外的，附加的 adv. 额外，另外；特别，格外 n. 另外收费的事物；临时演员
exampleTranslation: 他有一张比赛的额外票。

example: Scientists are learning how to extract sunlight from cucumbers.
meaning: n. 摘录，引⽂；浓缩物，精华 vt. 提取；拔出；摘录；设法获取
exampleTranslation: 科学家们正在学习如何从黄瓜中提取阳光

example: His extraordinary ability in music earned him a place in the world's most prestigious orchestra.
meaning: adj. ⾮凡的，出⾊的；⾮常奇特的
exampleTranslation: 他在音乐方面的非凡能力让他获得了世界最负盛名的管弦乐团的一个席位。

example: She has a friendly manner.
meaning: adj. 友好的；亲切的；⽆害的
exampleTranslation: 她的态度很友好。

example: Their friendship lasted for many years.
meaning: n. 友谊，朋友关系；友情，友爱
exampleTranslation: 他们的友谊持续了许多年。

example: I had quite a fright when I realized how close I was to the edge.
meaning: n. 惊骇，恐惧；惊吓，恐怖的体验
exampleTranslation: 情境:表达突然的害怕

example: Don't frighten me with your ghost stories.
meaning: vt. vi. 使害怕，吓唬
exampleTranslation: 不要用你的鬼故事吓我

example: The city is on the fringe of the desert.
meaning: n. 刘海；(地区等的) 边缘；流苏 adj. 边缘的，⾮主流的 vt. 形成…的边缘
exampleTranslation: 这个城市位于沙漠的边缘。

example: The small town lies on the frontier between the two countries.
meaning: n. 国界，边界；(知识的) 前沿
exampleTranslation: 小镇位于两国的边境。

example: Frost covered the windows of the car.
meaning: n. 霜冻，严寒天⽓；霜 vt. vi. (使) 结霜
exampleTranslation: 车子的窗户上盖满了霜。

example: Don't frown at me like that, it's not my fault.
meaning: vi. vt. 皱眉 n. 皱眉
exampleTranslation: 不要那样皱眉头看我，这不是我的错。

example: Could you fry the eggs for breakfast?
meaning: vt. vi. 油炸，油煎，油炒 vi. (被阳光) 灼伤，晒伤 n. 炸薯条；⻥苗
exampleTranslation: 你能用油煎一些鸡蛋作为早餐吗？

example: We use solar power as an alternative to traditional sources of fuel.
meaning: n. 燃料；刺激因素 vt. 给…提供燃料；助⻓，加剧 vt. vi. 加油
exampleTranslation: 我们使用太阳能作为传统燃料的替代。

example: He did not attend his father's funeral because he was out of the country.
meaning: n. 葬礼，丧礼
exampleTranslation: 他因为在国外，没有参加父亲的葬礼。

example: The climate in the tropical rainforest is extremely humid.
meaning: adj. 潮湿的，湿热的
exampleTranslation: 热带雨林的气候特别湿润。

example: The humidity is very high today, let's turn on the dehumidifier.
meaning: n. (空⽓) 湿度；潮湿
exampleTranslation: 今天湿度非常高，让我们打开除湿机。

example: He has a great sense of humour.
meaning: n. 幽默，幽默感；⼼情，情绪 vt. 迎合，迁就
exampleTranslation: 他有很强的幽默感。

example: I'll hunt for the photos in the attic.
meaning: vi. vt. 打猎，猎取；追踪，追捕；猎狐 vi. 搜寻，搜索 n. 搜寻，搜索；打猎
exampleTranslation: 我会在阁楼里找那些照片

example: He picked up a stone and hurled it at the car.
meaning: vt. 猛投；⼤声说出或喊出 vi. 呕吐
exampleTranslation: 他捡起一块石头猛地扔向汽车。

example: The hurricane caused extensive damage to the coastal town.
meaning: n. 飓⻛
exampleTranslation: 飓风对沿海小镇造成了广泛的破坏。

example: His theory started as a hypothesis.
meaning: n. 假说，假设
exampleTranslation: 他的理论起初只是一个假设。

example: She got hysterical when she heard the news.
meaning: adj. 歇斯底⾥的；极其可笑的
exampleTranslation: 当她听到那个消息的时候，她情绪失控起来。

example: He is credited with inventing the first computer.
meaning: vt. 发明，创造；捏造，虚构
exampleTranslation: 他被认为是第一台电脑的发明者。

example: The telephone was an amazing invention.
meaning: n. 发明物；发明；编造；创造⼒
exampleTranslation: 电话是一项了不起的发明。

example: We need to do an inventory check at the end of the month.
meaning: n. 存货清单；储备，存货，库存 vt. 开列…的清单，把…编⼊⽬录
exampleTranslation: 我们月底需要做一次库存盘点。

example: In photography, we sometimes invert colors to create unique effects.
meaning: vt. (使) 颠倒，逆转，倒置
exampleTranslation: 在摄影中，我们有时会倒转颜色来创造独特的效果。

example: I received an invitation to her wedding.
meaning: n. 邀请；请帖；招致
exampleTranslation: 我收到了她的婚礼请帖。

example: He took an inward breath and proceeded.
meaning: adj. 内⼼的，内在的；向内的 adv. 向内地；向内⼼地
exampleTranslation: 他吸了一口气，然后继续进行。

example: She had an oval face with big blue eyes.
meaning: adj. 椭圆形的 n. 椭圆形，椭圆形物体
exampleTranslation: 她有一张带有大蓝眼睛的椭圆形脸庞。

example: Her heart overflowed with gratitude.
meaning: vt. vi. 溢出，漫出；扩展出界 vi. 充满，挤满 n. 容纳不下的⼈或物；溢出(物)
exampleTranslation: 她的心充满了感激

example: A plane flew overhead during the picnic.
meaning: adv. 在头顶上，在空中 adj. 在头顶上，在空中的；经营开⽀的 n. 经营开⽀
exampleTranslation: 野餐时一架飞机从头顶飞过。

example: I did not mean to overhear, but they were speaking so loudly.
meaning: vt. 偶然听到，⽆意中听到
exampleTranslation: 我并不是有意去偷听，但他们说话的声音实在太大了。

example: An overnight frost had made the pavements slippery.
meaning: adv. 在夜间；突然，⼀夜之间 adj. 夜间的；突然的，⼀夜之间的
exampleTranslation: 整夜的霜使人行道变得滑

example: His overt display of wealth was distasteful.
meaning: adj. 公开的，明显的
exampleTranslation: 他公开炫耀财富的做法令人讨厌。

example: The runner from Canada has overtaken all his competitors.
meaning: vt. vi. 超 (⻋)，追上 (前⾯的⼈) vt. 赶超；(不幸等) 突然降临于
exampleTranslation: 加拿大的选手已经超过了所有的竞争者。

example: The rebels attempted to overthrow the government.
meaning: vt. 推翻，打倒，将…赶下台 n. (尤指⽤武⼒的) 推翻，打倒
exampleTranslation: 叛乱者试图推翻政府。

example: Employees who work overtime get paid extra.
meaning: n. 加班；加班费；加时赛
exampleTranslation: 加班的员工能得到额外的支付。

example: He is prone to accidents because he often drives too fast.
meaning: adj. 有…倾向的；俯卧的
exampleTranslation: 这句话展示了“prone”在语境中的用法。

example: Can you pronounce this word for me?
meaning: vt. 发⾳；正式宣布，宣告
exampleTranslation: 你能帮我读一下这个单词吗？

example: News agencies help to propagate the news across the globe.
meaning: vt. 宣传，传播 vt. vi. (动植物) 繁殖，繁衍
exampleTranslation: 翻译为:新闻媒体帮助全球传播新闻。

example: The government was accused of spreading propaganda about the benefits of its controversial policies.
meaning: n. 宣传，⿎吹
exampleTranslation: 政府被指责传播关于其有争议政策好处的宣传。

example: Moses was known as a prophet in the Old Testament.
meaning: n. 预⾔家；先知；宣扬者，倡导者
exampleTranslation: 这句话展示了“prophet”在语境中的用法。

example: The roof of the house needs repairing.
meaning: n. 屋顶，⻋顶；洞顶；颚部 vt. 给…盖顶，盖上屋顶
exampleTranslation: 这个房子的屋顶需要修复。

example: I bought a piece of rope from the hardware store.
meaning: n. 粗绳，线缆 vt. ⽤绳⼦捆 (或绑、系)
exampleTranslation: 我从五金店买了一根绳子。

example: Please rotate the handle to unlock the door.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 旋转；轮流做；轮换 (位置)
exampleTranslation: 请旋转把手以解锁门。

example: The food left in the fridge began to rot.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 腐烂 n. 腐烂，腐烂物；衰败；废话
exampleTranslation: 放在冰箱里的食物开始腐烂了。

example: Don't eat that apple; it's rotten.
meaning: adj. 腐烂的；恶劣的；腐败的
exampleTranslation: 别吃那个苹果，它烂掉了。

example: The track is very rough.
meaning: adj. 粗糙的；⼤致的；粗暴的 adj. 艰难的 n. 草稿，草图 adv. 粗鲁地，粗野地
exampleTranslation: 那条道路很崎岖。

example: They placed the chairs around a round table.
meaning: adj. 圆形的，环形的；整数的 adv. 旋转；周围；到处；调转⽅向 prep. 环绕；绕过；在…周围 n. 阶段；⽐赛阶段；回合
exampleTranslation: 他们把椅子摆在一张圆桌周围。

example: He gave me a roundabout answer when I asked him about his career plans.
meaning: n. 环岛；(游乐园的) 旋转圆台 adj. 绕远的；(说话) 拐弯抹⻆的
exampleTranslation: 他在我询问他关于职业计划时给我一个含糊其辞的答复。

example: The noise outside roused him from his deep sleep.
meaning: vt. 唤醒，叫醒；使…活跃；激发
exampleTranslation: 外面的噪音将他从深深的睡眠中唤醒。

example: She was upgraded to a suite on arrival at the hotel.
meaning: n. (酒店) 套房；⼀套家具；组曲
exampleTranslation: 她到达酒店时被升级到了套房。

example: The sum of 5 and 3 is 8.
meaning: n. ⾦额；总和，总数；全部；算数 vi. vt. 总结，概括
exampleTranslation: 5加3的总和是8.

example: Could you give me a summary of the book?
meaning: n. 总结，概要，概括 adj. 总结的；⽴即的，速决的
exampleTranslation: 你能给我这本书的摘要吗？

example: Climbing to the summit of the mountain is a feat in itself.
meaning: n. ⼭顶，顶峰；峰会，⾸脑会议
exampleTranslation: 意思一

example: The manager will summon the staff for a meeting.
meaning: vt. 召唤；传唤出庭；召开；请求
exampleTranslation: 经理将召集员工开会。

example: We watched the sunrise from the hilltop.
meaning: n. ⽇出 (时分)
exampleTranslation: 我们在山顶观看日出。

example: They watched the sunset from the hill and it was a sight to behold.
meaning: n. ⽇落 (时分)，傍晚；晚霞 adj. 定期废⽌的
exampleTranslation: 他们在山上观看日落，那景色美不胜收。

example: I like to feel the warm sunshine on my skin.
meaning: n. 阳光，⽇光
exampleTranslation: 我喜欢感受阳光温暖地洒在我的皮肤上。

example: They gave each other a big hug before leaving.
meaning: vt. vi. 拥抱，搂抱 vt. 抱紧；紧挨；(⾐物) 贴 (⾝) n. 拥抱，搂抱
exampleTranslation: 他们在离开前相互拥抱了一下。

example: That is a huge elephant.
meaning: adj. 巨⼤的，极多的，程度深的
exampleTranslation: 那是一头巨大的大象。

example: The hum of the refrigerator was the only sound in the room.
meaning: vi. vt. 哼 (歌) vi. 发嗡嗡声；(地⽅) 热闹，繁忙 n. 嗡嗡声，持续低沉的噪⾳
exampleTranslation: 冰箱的嗡嗡声是房间里唯一的声音。

example: The house is up for auction.
meaning: n. 拍卖 vt. 拍卖
exampleTranslation: 这座房子正在拍卖。

example: The play received a warm applause from the audience.
meaning: n. 观众，听众，读者；正式会⻅
exampleTranslation: 这部戏剧受到了观众的热烈掌声。

example: He forgot to turn on the audio during the online meeting.
meaning: adj. 录⾳的，⾳频的 n. 声⾳，⾳频
exampleTranslation: 他在线上会议中忘记打开音频了。

example: She has an excellent aural comprehension.
meaning: adj. 听觉的，听⼒的
exampleTranslation: 她的听力理解能力非常好。

example: These are authentic designer handbags.
meaning: adj. 真品的；真实的；正宗的
exampleTranslation: 这些是真正的设计师的手提包。

example: The road is too broad for the car to cross.
meaning: adj. 宽阔的；概括的；⼴泛的
exampleTranslation: 这条路对这辆车来说太宽了。

example: The radio station will broadcast the concert live tonight.
meaning: n. ⼴播节⽬，电视节⽬ vt. vi. ⼴播，播送 (节⽬) vt. 散布，使⼴为传播
exampleTranslation: 电台将在今晚直播音乐会。

example: As a noun： I have a bruise on my arm from playing football.
meaning: n. ⻘肿，瘀伤 vt. vi. (使) 出现伤痕，擦伤 vt. 打击，挫伤 (信⼼)
exampleTranslation: 我胳膊上足球踢打时淤了个血。

example: You should brush your teeth twice a day.
meaning: n. 刷⼦，画笔；刷；冲突；灌⽊丛 vt. 刷，涂；拂，掸 vi. vt. 轻擦，掠过
exampleTranslation: 你应该每天刷牙两次。

example: War is often a brutal and bloody affair.
meaning: adj. 野蛮的，残暴的；直⾔不讳的
exampleTranslation: 战争通常是残酷和血腥的。

example: The buds on the tree are beginning to burst.
meaning: n. 芽，苞，花蕾；⽼兄，伙计 vi. 发芽，⻓出花蕾
exampleTranslation: 树上的芽开始要爆发了。

example: Let's meet at the buffet for lunch.
meaning: n. ⾃助餐；(⽕⻋上的) 餐⻋ vt. (⻛、⾬等) 连续猛击，打击
exampleTranslation: 让我们在自助餐厅见面吃午饭。

example: There is a bug in this software that's causing difficulties.
meaning: n. ⾍⼦；故障；窃听器；⼩病 n. 热衷，着迷 vt. 装窃听器；使烦恼，使恼怒
exampleTranslation: 这个软件里有个bug，正在引发问题。

example: There's a crack in the window.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 破裂，裂开；砸开，破开 vt. 重击，猛击；找到解决⽅法 n. 裂缝；缝隙；爆裂声；尝试 adj. 训练有素的，⼀流的
exampleTranslation: 窗户上有一道裂缝。

example: The baby slept peacefully in the cradle.
meaning: n. 摇篮；发源地；(电话的) 听筒架 vt. 轻抱，轻托
exampleTranslation: 婴儿在摇篮里安静地睡着。

example: She has a love for arts and crafts.
meaning: n. ⼿艺；技巧；船；⻜⾏器；诡计 vt. 精⼼制作
exampleTranslation: 她热爱艺术和手工制作。

example: The stock market crashed, causing a loss of millions.
meaning: n. 撞⻋，坠机；碰撞声；暴跌 vi. vt. 碰撞，撞击；崩溃 vi. 使发出巨响；暴跌，贬值；睡觉 adj. 应急的，速成的
exampleTranslation: 股市崩盘，造成数百万的损失。

example: He is crazy about basketball.
meaning: adj. 疯狂的；狂热的；精神错乱的
exampleTranslation: 他对篮球疯狂痴迷。

example: I put cream in my coffee.
meaning: n. 奶油；乳膏，乳霜；淡⻩⾊；精髓 adj. 淡⻩⾊的 vt. 把…搅成糊状；彻底打败
exampleTranslation: 我在咖啡里加奶油。

example: The forest is teeming with creatures.
meaning: n. ⽣物；(具有某种特征的) ⼈
exampleTranslation: 森林里充满了各种生物。

example: The baby is starting to crawl on the floor.
meaning: vi. 爬，爬⾏；缓慢⾏进；巴结 n. 缓慢的速度；⾃由泳
exampleTranslation: 婴儿开始在地板上爬行。

example: The kid creeps into the room to avoid waking up his parents.
meaning: vi. 悄悄⾏进；匍匐⾏进；渐渐出现 n. 讨厌⻤；(对既定⽬标的) 偏离
exampleTranslation: 孩子悄悄进入房间，避免唤醒他的父母。

example: The crew of the ship successfully fought the storm.
meaning: n. 全体船员，机组⼈员；专业团队 vt. vi. (在…) 当船员
exampleTranslation: 船上的全体船员成功地挺过了暴风雨。

example: He is working on the draft of his speech for the conference.
meaning: n. 草稿；征兵；汇票；穿堂⻛ vt. 起草，草拟；征募；选派
exampleTranslation: 他正在准备会议的发言草稿

example: She was filled with a sense of dread.
meaning: vt. ⾮常害怕，极为担⼼ n. 恐惧，令⼈惧怕的事物
exampleTranslation: 意思是她被恐惧的感觉充满了。

example: She wore a beautiful dress to the party.
meaning: n. 连⾐裙；服装 vi. vt. (给…) 穿⾐服 vi. 穿正式服装 vt. 清洗，包扎；给…加调味酱
exampleTranslation: 她穿了一件漂亮的连衣裙去参加派对。

example: The boat began to drift out to sea.
meaning: vi. 漂流，漂；缓缓移动 vt. 使漂流，使漂浮 n. 雪堆；⽔流，⽓流；主旨；偏航
exampleTranslation: 船开始向海里漂去。

example: I made a hole in the wall using a drill.
meaning: n. 钻机；练习；演习；军事训练 vt. vi. 钻 (孔)；培训；进⾏军事训练
exampleTranslation: 使用情景：我用电钻drill在墙上凿了一个洞。-Imadeaholeinthewallusingadrill.

example: Drops of water drip from the leaves after the rain.
meaning: vi. (液体) 滴下 vi. vt. 滴 (⽔)，滴下 (液体)；充满 n. 滴落，滴⽔声；滴液；点滴瓶
exampleTranslation: 雨后，水滴从叶子上滴落。

example: I drop my pencil on the floor.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 落下；(使) 降低，减少 vt. 中途卸客；寄送；省略；终⽌ n. 滴，⽔珠；微量；下降；滴剂
exampleTranslation: 我的铅笔掉在了地板上。

example: Last year's severe drought destroyed the whole crop.
meaning: n. ⼲旱，旱灾
exampleTranslation: 去年严重的干旱摧毁了整个庄稼。

example: He was so panicky that he would drown in the shallow water.
meaning: vi. vt. (使…) 溺死，淹死 vt. (指声⾳) 盖过
exampleTranslation: 他过于惊慌，几乎在浅水中溺死。

example: He played a beat on the drum.
meaning: n. ⿎；⼤桶；⿎状物 vi. 打⿎，击⿎ vt. vi. 不停地击打
exampleTranslation: 他在鼓上敲出了节拍。

example: The team is preparing for an expedition to the Himalayas.
meaning: n. 远征，探险；探险队；短途旅⾏
exampleTranslation: 团队正在准备前往喜马拉雅的远征。

example: He was expelled from school for fighting.
meaning: vt. 开除；驱逐出境；排出
exampleTranslation: 他因为打架被学校开除。

example: We expend a lot of time and effort on this project.
meaning: vt. 花费，耗费
exampleTranslation: 我们在这个项目上花费了大量的时间和精力。

example: The company's annual expenditure on advertising is considerable.
meaning: n. 花费，开⽀；(时间等的) 消耗
exampleTranslation: 公司每年在广告上的支出都相当大。

example: He claimed the dinner as a business expense.
meaning: n. 费⽤；开⽀，开销
exampleTranslation: 他把晚餐的费用列为了商务开销。

example: His sudden departure requires an explanation.
meaning: n. 解释，理由；详细的说明
exampleTranslation: 他的突然离开需要一个解释。

example: He was explicit in his criticism of the government.
meaning: adj. 清楚的，明确的；露⻣的
exampleTranslation: 他对政府的批评十分直言不讳。

example: The bomb could explode at any moment.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 爆炸；突然发⽣ (危险) vi. (感情) 爆发；突然活跃；激增 vt. 推翻，驳倒，破除
exampleTranslation: 炸弹随时都可能引爆。

example: The explosion destroyed the whole building.
meaning: n. 爆炸 (声)；爆发，激增
exampleTranslation: 那场爆炸摧毁了整栋建筑。

example: The bomb was made with explosive materials.
meaning: adj. 易爆炸的；⼀触即发的；激增的 n. 炸药，爆炸物
exampleTranslation: 这个炸弹是用易爆物质制造的。

example: He is building a wooden frame for the mirror.
meaning: n. 框架；镜框；体形；体系；帧 vt. 给…做框；作伪证陷害；表达
exampleTranslation: 他正在为镜子制作一个木制的框架。

example: The house has a wooden framework.
meaning: n. 框架，结构
exampleTranslation: 这个房子有一个木制的框架。

example: Tom is always frank with his friends.
meaning: adj. 坦率的，直率的
exampleTranslation: 汤姆总是对朋友十分坦诚。

example: He was charged with fraud.
meaning: n. 诈骗 (罪)；骗⼦，骗局
exampleTranslation: 他被控诈骗。

example: Freedom of speech is a fundamental right in many countries.
meaning: n. ⾃由；不受…影响的状态
exampleTranslation: 许多国家都将言论自由视为基本人权。

example: I forgot to bring my coat and nearly froze to death.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 结冰；(使) 冻住；(使) 冻死 vi. 冰冻；(因害怕等) 不动，惊呆 vt. 冷藏；使定格；使固定；冻结 n. 冻结；停⽌；冰冻期；霜冻
exampleTranslation: 我忘了带外套，差点冻死。

example: The ship was loaded with freight.
meaning: n. 货物，货运；运费 vt. (⽤⻜机等) 运送，托运
exampleTranslation: 这艘船装满了货物。

example: The frequency of train service has been increased during peak hours.
meaning: n. 发⽣频率；频繁；(声波等) 频率
exampleTranslation: 繁忙时间段内火车的运行频率已经提高了。

example: This bus route is very frequent.
meaning: adj. 经常性的，频繁的 vt. 常到，常去，常出⼊于
exampleTranslation: 这个公交路线非常频繁。

example: The apples are fresh from the farm.
meaning: adj. 新鲜的；新近的；新的；淡的
exampleTranslation: 这些苹果是刚从农场送过来的。

example: The friction between the brake and the wheel slows the car.
meaning: n. 摩擦，摩擦⼒；⽭盾，不和
exampleTranslation: 刹车和轮胎间的摩擦使车减速了。

example: The country has suffered many years of civil strife.
meaning: n. 冲突，纠纷，纷争
exampleTranslation: 这个国家已经经历了多年的内战。

example: We must strive for excellence in all that we do.
meaning: vi. 努⼒，奋⽃，⼒争
exampleTranslation: 我们必须在所有我们做的事情中追求卓越。

example: We watched the mouse struggle to free itself from the glue trap.
meaning: vi. 努⼒；艰难地⾏进；⽃争；扭打 n. ⽃争，努⼒；扭打；难事
exampleTranslation: 我们看到老鼠挣扎着试图从黏鼠板中逃脱。

example: He decided to strip the old paint off the walls.
meaning: n. (纸、布料等的) 条；狭⻓地带 vt. 除去；全部拿⾛；拆卸；剥夺 vi. vt. 脱光⾐服，扒光…的⾐服
exampleTranslation: 他决定把墙上的旧漆剥掉。

example: The zebra has black and white stripes.
meaning: n. 条纹，线条；军阶条；种类
exampleTranslation: 斑马有黑色和白色的条纹。

example: She had a stroke and was taken to the hospital.
meaning: n. 击球；⼀击；⼀笔；中⻛；轻抚 n. (成功的) 举动；钟声；游泳姿势 vt. 轻抚，抚摸；轻触，轻拭
exampleTranslation: 她中风了，被送去了医院。

example: After dinner, they went for a stroll in the park.
meaning: vi. 散步，溜达，闲逛 n. 散步，溜达，闲逛
exampleTranslation: 晚饭后，他们去公园散了散步。

example: He is stronger than I thought.
meaning: adj. 强健的；强劲的；强烈的
exampleTranslation: 他比我想象得要强壮

example: He's as stubborn as a mule.
meaning: adj. 固执的，顽固的；难以对付的
exampleTranslation: 他倔强得就像一头骡子。

example: She rented a small studio to paint in.
meaning: n. 演播室；电影公司；⼯作室 n. 电影摄影棚；练舞房；单间公寓
exampleTranslation: 她租了一个小工作室用来画画。

example: I have a lot of stuff to do today.
meaning: n. 东西，物品；特质，原料 vt. 填满；把…塞进；制作动物标本
exampleTranslation: 今天我有很多事情要做。

example: I stumbled over a rock in the path.
meaning: vi. 绊脚；踉跄；结巴；出现问题 n. 绊倒；差错
exampleTranslation: 我在小路上被一个石头绊倒了。

example: He is a sturdy little boy.
meaning: adj. 牢固的，强壮的；坚定的
exampleTranslation: 他是一个健壮的小男孩。

example: Her writing style is clear and direct.
meaning: n. ⽅式；款式；时髦；⻛度；⻛格 vt. 把…设计成某种式样；称呼
exampleTranslation: 她的写作风格清晰直接。

example: The submarine dove deep to avoid the enemy destroyer.
meaning: n. 潜艇 adj. 海底的
exampleTranslation: 潜艇深深地潜入海中以避开敌人的驱逐舰。

example: The boat started to submerge into the water.
meaning: vt. vi. (使) 浸没，淹没，没⼊⽔中 vt. 掩盖，遮掩 (想法、感情等)
exampleTranslation: 这艘船开始下沉到水中。

example: I had to subtract the cost of the books from my total savings.
meaning: vt. vi. 减，减去
exampleTranslation: 我必须从我的总储蓄中减去书的费用。

example: His sudden departure left us in a state of shock.
meaning: adj. 突然的
exampleTranslation: 他突然的离开让我们震惊不已。

example: The children are tugging at my sleeve.
meaning: vi. vt. 拉，拖，拽 n. 拖船；猛拽；⼀股强烈的感情
exampleTranslation: 孩子们正使劲拉我的袖子。

example: Tuition fees have become a heated topic among students and their parents.
meaning: n. 讲授，教学；学费
exampleTranslation: 学费已经成为学生和他们的父母的热门话题。

example: He was humming a tune as he walked down the street.
meaning: n. 曲调，曲⼦ vt. 调⾳；调整；调频道
exampleTranslation: 他一边走下街一边作一曲子。

example: He drove through the tunnel.
meaning: n. 地道，隧道；(动物挖的) 洞⽳ vi. vt. 挖隧道，挖地道
exampleTranslation: 他驾车通过了隧道。

example: The use of wind turbines in power generation has been growing rapidly over the past decade.
meaning: n. 涡轮机
exampleTranslation: 过去十年间，风力涡轮机在发电中的应用得到了快速发展。

example: I have always wanted to visit Turkey for its unique culture and amazing cuisine.
meaning: n. ⽕鸡；⽕鸡⾁；失败之作
exampleTranslation: 我一直想去土耳其，因为那里有独特的文化和美味的食物。

example: John has hired a tutor to help him with his algebra.
meaning: n. 家庭教师；助教，导师 vt. 教授，辅导
exampleTranslation: 约翰雇了一个家教来帮助他学习代数。

example: This car has an automatic gearbox.
meaning: adj. ⾃动的；不⾃觉的；必然发⽣的 n. ⾃动⼿枪；⾃动换挡汽⻋
exampleTranslation: 这辆车配备了自动挡车箱。

example: The automation of this production line has increased efficiency.
meaning: n. ⾃动化，⾃动操作
exampleTranslation: 这条生产线的自动化提高了效率。

example: She is seeking autonomy at work.
exampleTranslation: 她在工作中追求自主。

example: She lives in an apartment on Park Avenue.
meaning: n. 街道；林荫⼤道；⽅法，途径
exampleTranslation: 她住在柏克大道上的一栋公寓里。

example: She tried to avert her eyes from the dead body.
meaning: vt. 防⽌，避免；转移⽬光，背过脸
exampleTranslation: 她试图避开那具尸体。

example: The results of the election still await.
meaning: vt. 等待，期待；即将发⽣于
exampleTranslation: 选举结果仍在等待中。

example: This house is in an awful state.
meaning: adj. 极坏的；⾮常的；可怕的 adv. ⾮常，极度地
exampleTranslation: 这个房子的状态真是糟透了。

example: The Earth's axis of rotation is tilted with respect to its orbital plane.
meaning: n. 轴，轴线
exampleTranslation: 地球的自转轴相对于其轨道平面有一个倾斜角。

example: He was troubled by the sheer bulk of the problem.
meaning: n. ⼤部分；⼤体积，⼤量
exampleTranslation: 他被这个问题的庞大规模困扰。

example: Tom was a bully in high school.
meaning: n. 恃强凌弱者，恶霸 vt. 欺负，恐吓，胁迫
exampleTranslation: 汤姆在高中时就是个恶霸。

example: She is pretty but she is not kind.
meaning: conj. 但是；然⽽；除…外 prep. 除了 adv. 仅仅 n. 借⼝
exampleTranslation: 她很漂亮，但是她不善良。

example: He pushed the button to turn on the TV.
meaning: n. 纽扣；按钮；按键；徽章 vi. vt. ⽤纽扣扣住
exampleTranslation: 他按下按钮打开了电视。

example: There's a lot of buzz about the new movie.
meaning: vi. 发出嗡嗡声；充满兴奋 (或活动) n. 嗡嗡声，蜂鸣声；喧闹
exampleTranslation: 关于新电影有很多的热议。

example: The book was written by Mark Twain.
meaning: prep. 被；通过；在…旁边；不迟于 prep. 经过；按照；⽤于乘除运算 adv. 经过
exampleTranslation: 这本书是由马克·吐温写的。

example: To avoid the city center, you can take the bypass.
meaning: n. 旁道，外环路；(⼼脏) 搭桥⼿术 vt. 绕过，绕…⾛；(做某事时) 避开
exampleTranslation: 为了避开市中心，你可以走旁道。

example: These are just crude estimates, we will do another round of calculation to ensure accuracy.
meaning: adj. 粗略的；粗糙的；天然的 n. 原油，⽯油
exampleTranslation: 这些只是粗略的估计，我们会做进一步的计算以确保准确性。

example: He was sentenced to a cruel punishment.
meaning: adj. 残酷的
exampleTranslation: 他被判处了残酷的惩罚。

example: I plan to cruise the Mediterranean this summer.
meaning: n. 乘船游览，航⾏ vi. vt. 乘船游览；慢速⾏驶，巡⾏ vi. 以平稳的速度⾏驶；轻易赢得
exampleTranslation: 我计划今年夏天在地中海上游览。

example: He crushed the plastic bottle and put it in the recycling bin.
meaning: vt. 压坏；捣碎；镇压；使⾮常伤⼼ vt. vi. (使) 变皱 n. 迷恋；拥挤的⼈群；果汁饮料
exampleTranslation: 这里的crush是用作动词，意为压碎。中文例句：他把塑料瓶压碎后放入回收箱。

example: The crust of this bread is really hard.
meaning: n. ⾯包⽪；酥⽪；硬层；地壳
exampleTranslation: 这个面包的皮真硬。

example: They found the quartz to be a kind of crystal.
meaning: n. 结晶，晶体；⽔晶；⽔晶玻璃
exampleTranslation: 他们发现石英是一种晶体。

example: The lecture was so dull that I fell asleep.
meaning: adj. 枯燥⽆味的；不明亮的；阴沉的 adj. 迟钝的；钝的；沉闷的 vt. vi. 使⿇⽊，使迟钝；(使) 变得暗淡
exampleTranslation: 那个演讲太无聊了，我都睡着了。

example: He made a dumb decision, leading to a big loss.
meaning: adj. 傻的；哑的；哑⼝⽆⾔的 vt. 降低…的理解难度
exampleTranslation: 表示"愚蠢的"

example: Don't dump litter here, it's against the law.
meaning: vt. 扔掉；抛弃；倾销；甩掉 (某⼈) n. 垃圾场，废物堆；邋遢场所
exampleTranslation: 不要在这里丢垃圾，这是违法的。

example: I had to duplicate the report because I lost the original one.
meaning: vt. 复制，复印；重复，重做 adj. 完全⼀样的，副本的 n. 复制品，副本
exampleTranslation: 我不得不复制报告，因为我丢失了原件。

example: We finished our work at dusk.
meaning: n. ⻩昏，傍晚
exampleTranslation: 我们在黄昏时分完成了工作。

example: He's not short, he's a dwarf.
meaning: n. ⼩矮⼈；侏儒 adj. (动植物) 矮⼩的 vt. 使显得矮⼩，使相形⻅绌
exampleTranslation: 他不是矮，他是个侏儒。

example: Many wildlife species dwell in the forest.
meaning: vi. 居住
exampleTranslation: 许多野生动物种类在森林中居住。

example: Can you tell me where to find hair dye?
meaning: vt. 给…染⾊ n. 染料
exampleTranslation: 你能告诉我在哪里可以找到染发剂吗?

example: The Han dynasty was noted for its profound influence on Chinese history.
meaning: n. 王朝，朝代；(商业等的) 家族
exampleTranslation: 汉朝以其对中国历史的深远影响而著名。

example: The bear's fur is dense and warm.
exampleTranslation: 熊的毛皮又厚又暖。

example: Can you furnish us with the necessary information?
meaning: vt. 布置，配备家具陈设；提供
exampleTranslation: 你能为我们提供必需的信息吗？

example: He moved further into the forest to avoid being seen.
meaning: adv. 更远；更久远；更进⼀步；此外 adj. 更多的，更进⼀步的，附加的 vt. 促进，增进
exampleTranslation: 他进一步深入森林以避免被看到。

example: I don't like the color of the dress. Furthermore, it's too expensive.
meaning: adv. ⽽且，此外，再者
exampleTranslation: 我不喜欢这件衣服的颜色。而且，它太贵了。

example: We need to replace the blown fuse in the car.
meaning: n. 保险丝；引信，导⽕线 vi. vt. (使) 融合，熔接；(使) 熔化
exampleTranslation: 我们需要替换车里烧断的保险丝。

example: He always makes a fuss over minor problems.
meaning: n. 紧张不安，⼤惊⼩怪 vi. (为⼩事) 烦恼；过分关⼼
exampleTranslation: 他总对一些小问题大惊小怪。

example: Iron is used to build bridges.
meaning: n. 铁；熨⽃；铁器；镣铐 vt. vi. 熨，烫平 adj. 坚强的，强硬坚定的
exampleTranslation: 铁被用来建造桥梁。

example: The irony of the situation is that the more we try to save money, the less we seem to have.
meaning: n. 有讽刺意味的情况；反语，讽刺
exampleTranslation: 讽刺的是，我们越是努力节省钱，却越是感觉没有钱。

example: Irrespective of the consequences, he always tells the truth.
meaning: adj. 不顾的，不考虑的
exampleTranslation: 不管结果怎样，他总是说真话。

example: Farmers irrigate their fields every morning.
meaning: vt. 灌溉；冲洗 (伤⼝)
exampleTranslation: 农民们每天早上都要灌溉他们的地。

example: Don't irritate your sister by taking her toys.
meaning: vt. 使烦躁，激怒；刺激 (⽪肤等)
exampleTranslation: 不要拿走你妹妹的玩具来惹她。

example: There is a beautiful isle in the middle of the lake.
meaning: n. (常⽤于地名) 岛
exampleTranslation: 湖中央有个美丽的小岛。

example: The remote village is isolated from the outside world.
meaning: vt. 使孤⽴；单独考虑；分离
exampleTranslation: 这个偏远的村庄与外界隔离开来。

example: Ivory poaching is a serious issue in some parts of Africa.
meaning: n. 象⽛；象⽛⾊；钢琴键
exampleTranslation: 撞，非洲的某些地区严重存在偷猎象牙的问题。

example: He has a musical ear.
meaning: adj. ⾳乐的；有⾳乐天赋的；悦⽿的 n. ⾳乐剧

example: He started to mutter about the price of popcorn in the cinema.

meaning: vt. ⽋ (钱)；⽋ (⼈情)；把…归功于

example: Our bodies need adequate protein to maintain health.
meaning: n. 蛋⽩质

example: The car manufacturer has built a prototype of its new model for testing.
meaning: n. 原型，雏形；典型

meaning: adj. ⾃豪的；傲慢的；⾃重的

meaning: n. 省份；(知识等) 范围，领域

example: He is a member of the British royalty.

example: He is manufacturing a car tire made of rubber.

example: His reply was rather rude.

example: I need to go to the supermarket to buy some groceries.
meaning: n. 超市

example: The jet flew at supersonic speed.

example: The chemist poured the solution into a cylinder.

example: I took my cue from her facial expression.

example: A cunning plan was devised to rescue the hostage.

example: The government has to curb the increasing crime rate.
meaning: vt. 控制，限制，抑制 n. 控制，限制，抑制；⻢路⽛⼦

example: Doctors are unable to find a cure for this disease.

example: She used a curling iron to curl her hair.

example: The curriculum includes math, science, and English.
meaning: n. 课程

example: The witch put a curse on him.

example: The road curves around the lake.

meaning: n. ⻛俗；个⼈习惯；惠顾；海关 adj. 定做的

example: Wipe the table surface clean.

example: The surgeon performed a complicated surgery successfully.
meaning: n. 外科医⽣

example: I have a surgery scheduled for next week.

exampleTranslation: 我觉得药片很难吞下去。

meaning: n. 沼泽 vt. 淹没；使应接不暇

example: He is sweeping the floor with a broom.
meaning: vt. vi. 打扫；席卷，横扫；迅速传播 vt. 清除；吹⾛，冲⾛；挥动；掠过 vi. 步态轻盈地⾛；突然袭来；蜿蜒 n. 打扫；挥动；⼴度；巡视
exampleTranslation: 他正在用扫帚扫地。

example: The swift runner crossed the finish line first.
meaning: adj. 快的，迅速的；快速移动的 n. ⾬燕

example: The dove is a universal symbol of peace.

example: She played the piano while he conducted the symphony.

example: Doctors have identified a new syndrome related to excessive computer use.

meaning: n. 综合，综合体；合成；电⼦合成

example: This shirt is made of synthetic materials.

example: I don't have much time.

example: I like to drink coffee in my favorite mug every morning.

example: He is convicted of murder.

example: There was a murmur of agreement from the audience.

example: She's capable of doing multiple tasks at the same time.
meaning: adj. 多个的，多种的 n. 倍数

example: Please multiply these numbers for me.
meaning: vi. vt. 乘；(使) ⼤量增加；(使) 繁殖
exampleTranslation: 请帮我乘这些数字。

example: A multitude of people attended the concert.
meaning: n. 众多，⼤量；⺠众；⼈群

example: The municipal authorities are planning to renovate the park.
meaning: adj. 城市的，市政的

example: She has a pulled muscle in her back.
meaning: n. 肌⾁；体⼒；实⼒，影响⼒ vi. vt. 挤

meaning: adj. 肌⾁的；肌⾁结实的，强壮的

example: He puffed out his cheeks in exasperation.

example: Pull the rope and the bell will ring.
meaning: vt. vi. 拉，拽；移开；(使⻋) 转向 vt. 拔出；拖；拉上；扭伤；扳动 n. 拉，拽；引⼒；诱惑；影响⼒
exampleTranslation: 拉这根绳子，铃就会响。

example: He could feel the pulse beating in his temples.

example: I need to pump up the tires on my bike.
meaning: n. 泵，抽⽔机，打⽓筒 vt. vi. ⽤泵输送 vi. (液体) 涌出；快速上下运动 vt. 快速摇动；盘问
exampleTranslation: 我需要给自行车胎打气。

example: He punched the wall in frustration.

example: He was always punctual for his appointments.
meaning: adj. 准时的，守时的

example: The school does not hesitate to punish students who break the rules.
meaning: vt. 处罚，惩罚；惩处 (犯罪⾏为)

example: This drink is made from pure fruit juice.
meaning: adj. 纯的，纯净的；纯粹的；纯真的

example: Please purify the water before drinking.
meaning: vt. 使纯净，净化；提纯，精炼

example: What is the purpose of your visit?
meaning: n. 意图，⽬标；毅⼒，决⼼

example: She reached into her purse and pulled out her wallet.
meaning: n. 钱包；资⾦，财⼒；奖⾦ vt. 噘嘴，撮起嘴唇
exampleTranslation: 她把手伸进包里，取出了钱包。

example: There is a rumour going around that the president is going to resign.
meaning: n. 谣⾔，传闻 vt. 谣传
exampleTranslation: 有一种传言，总统将要辞职。

example: She runs a small business.

exampleTranslation: 她经营一个小公司。

example: The most fascinating part about travelling is experiencing the rural lifestyle.
meaning: adj. 乡下的，乡村的

example: You shouldn't rush your decisions.
meaning: vi. vt. 冲；匆忙做 vt. 快速运输；突击抓捕 n. 冲；匆忙；忙碌；亢奋感；热潮
exampleTranslation: 你不应该仓促做决定。

example: The bike was left outside and has started to rust.
meaning: n. 锈，铁锈 vt. vi. (使) ⽣锈
exampleTranslation: 这辆自行车被放在了外面，开始生锈了。

example: He is a ruthless businessman who will stop at nothing to succeed.
meaning: adj. ⽆情的，残酷的

example: He is an attendant at the gym.
meaning: n. 服务员；侍从，随从 adj. 随之⽽来的，附带的
exampleTranslation: 他是健身房的服务员。

example: My father recommended his attorney to me.
meaning: n. 律师；代理⼈
exampleTranslation: 我爸爸把他的律师推荐给我。

example: The bright colors of the flower attract bees.
meaning: vt. 吸引；引起 (注意等)

example: She is an attractive woman.
meaning: adj. 漂亮的，有吸引⼒的
exampleTranslation: 她是一个有魅力的女人。

example: She gave me a bunch of grapes.
meaning: n. 串，束，扎；⼤量，⼤批；群体 vi. vt. (使)变紧，成皱褶
exampleTranslation: 她给我一串葡萄

example: He collected a bundle of firewood.
meaning: n. 捆，包；⼀批 (同类事物)；巨款 vt. 匆匆送⾛；捆绑销售

example: The burden of proof is on the prosecutor.
meaning: n. 负担，重担 vt. 使担负，使烦恼；使负重
exampleTranslation: 举证责任在于检方。

example: He works in the planning bureau of the city.
meaning: n. 局，司，处，署；办事处；⾐橱
exampleTranslation: 他在城市规划局工作。

example: The teacher complained about the bureaucracy of the school system.
meaning: n. 官僚制度，官僚主义；官僚
exampleTranslation: 老师抱怨学校系统的官僚主义。

example: The burglar broke into the house through a back window.
meaning: n. 破⻔盗窃者，窃贼
exampleTranslation: 窃贼通过后窗闯入了房子。

example: The troops are being deployed in the conflict zone.
meaning: n. 军队，部队；⼀群⼈ vi. 成群结队⽽⾏ adj. 军队的

example: We must hurry to catch the train.

example: He hurt his leg while playing football.

example: They constructed a small hut on the deserted island.

example: Hydrogen is the lightest and most abundant element in the universe.

exampleTranslation: 中文翻译:这种昆虫虽然很小，但可以造成很大的破坏。

example: I would like to invite you to my birthday party next week.
meaning: vt. 邀请；招致 n. 邀请，请柬

example: He keeps pennies and dimes in a jar.
meaning: n. 玻璃罐；缸，坛⼦；撞击 vt. vi. (使) 撞击；(使) 不快，(使) 吃惊 vi. (与…) 不和谐，不相配

example: She has a real passion for jazz music.
meaning: n. 爵⼠乐曲 vi. vt. 使某事更令⼈兴奋

example: I would like to join the club.
meaning: vt. vi. 成为…的⼀员；连接；汇合 vt. 参与，加⼊到…中，与…⼀道去

example: Keep the door closed during the test.

example: The kettle is boiling on the stove.
meaning: n. 烧⽔壶

example: He kicked the ball into the goal.

example: The next town is five kilometers away.

example: I could hear the knock at the door.
meaning: vi. 敲，击 vt. 猛⼒击打，撞 vt. vi. 碰上，撞上 n. 敲击声；打击，敲击，撞击
exampleTranslation: 名词

example: The students are performing an experiment in the lab.
meaning: n. 实验室
exampleTranslation: 同学们正在实验室做实验。

example: I leaned the ladder against the wall to paint the house.

example: I switched on the lamp to read my book.

example: We should protect the land from pollution.

example: My landlady comes around every first day of the month to collect the rent.

example: The landscape of the village surrounded by mountains is breathtaking.

example: Latin is no longer spoken as a native language.

example: There is a lavatory on the right side of the corridor.
meaning: n. 厕所，洗⼿间

example: The children are playing soccer on the lawn.

example: The lawyer explained the contract to us.

meaning: n. 解雇，裁员；歇⼯期，停⼯期

meaning: det. pron. 最⼩的，最少的，最低程度 的

example: The truck is carrying a heavy load of bricks.

example: Don't forget to lock the door when you leave.

example: A dolphin is a type of mammal that lives in the ocean.

example: Robert is the manager of our marketing department.

example: He has a very masculine approach to problem-solving.

example: She is pursuing a degree in Mathematics.

example: Daisies and buttercups sprinkled the vast meadow.

example: I would like to invite you to a meal on Sunday.

example: This watermelon is very sweet.
exampleTranslation: 这个西瓜很甜。

example: Would you like to see the menu?
meaning: n. 菜单；(显⽰器上的) 选单

example: There has been a lot of movement in the housing market recently.

example: The construction site is very noisy.

example: I have neither been to France nor Italy.

example: The wind is blowing from the northwest.

example: She auditioned and got a place in the school orchestra.

example: Iron ore is used to make steel.

example: He bought an ounce of gold.

example: I baked the bread in the oven.

example: The owl is a nocturnal bird of prey.

example: Iron combines with oxygen to form iron oxide.

example: Without an adequate supply of oxygen, humans cannot survive.

example: I bought a packet of cookies at the store.

example: He turned the page to continue reading.

example: The painting on the wall is famous.

example: The royal family lives in a grand palace.
meaning: n. 宫殿，总统府；王室；豪宅

example: I'm making pancakes in the pan.

example: He wore blue pants and a white shirt.

example: The bus was packed with passengers.

example: The cows are grazing in the pasture.

example: You need to be patient if you want to see significant results in your training.
meaning: n. 病⼈，患者 adj. 有耐⼼的

example: The lion raised its paw to swipe at the fly.

example: I am eating a bowl of pea soup.

example: We're all seeking for eternal peace.
meaning: n. 和平；平和，安静；和睦，融洽

example: She bought a basket of peaches from the market.

example: The peasant works from dawn to dusk in the fields.
meaning: n. 农⺠，佃农
