example: I usually get up at six.
meaning: adv. 通常地，惯常地
exampleTranslation: 我通常六点起床。

example: The answer is very important.
meaning: adv. 很，⾮常；完全，最，正是 adj. 正是的，恰好的 (加强语⽓)
exampleTranslation: 这个答案非常重要。

example: Add two tablespoons of vinegar to the salad.
meaning: n. 醋
exampleTranslation: 把两汤匙醋加到沙拉里。

example: She played a beautiful melody on the violin.
meaning: n. ⼩提琴
exampleTranslation: 她在小提琴上演奏了一首美妙的旋律。

example: Sally is a member of the college volleyball team.
meaning: n. 排球 (运动)
exampleTranslation: 莎莉是大学排球队的一员

example: The two nations were at war with each other over the territory dispute.
meaning: n. 战争；竞争；⻓期⽃争
exampleTranslation: 具体的翻译为：两个国家因领土争端而交战。

example: Mary boiled the water to make coffee.
meaning: n. ⽔；⽔域；⽔⾯；领海 vt. 灌溉；给…⽔喝；给…供⽔ vi. 充满眼泪；流⼝⽔
exampleTranslation: 玛丽煮水来泡咖啡。

example: We are going to the park.
meaning: pron. 我们
exampleTranslation: 我们要去公园。

example: The weather today is beautiful.
meaning: n. 天⽓；⽓象预报 vi. vt. (受⻛吹⾬打⽽) 褪⾊，变形 vt. 平安地渡过 (难关)
exampleTranslation: 今天的天气真好。

example: I see my parents once a week.
meaning: n. 周，星期
exampleTranslation: 我一周见一次我父母

example: I usually go hiking on the weekend.
meaning: n. 周末 vi. 过周末
exampleTranslation: 我通常在周末去徒步旅行。

example: They welcomed their guests into their home.
meaning: int. vi. vt. 欢迎 vt. 乐意接纳，欣然接受 adj. 受欢迎的 n. 迎接，欢迎
exampleTranslation: 他们欢迎客人到家里来。

example: You are doing well in your job.
meaning: adv. 好，对；彻底地；很 int. 哎呀，好啦 adj. 健康的；状态良好的 n. ⽔井；油井
exampleTranslation: 你的工作做得很好。

example: What did you learn from the story?
meaning: pron. det. 什么；…的事物；多么
exampleTranslation: 你从这个故事中学到了什么？

example: Call me when you arrive.
meaning: adv. pron. 什么时候 conj. 在…时；既然；虽然
exampleTranslation: 你到达时给我打电话。

example: Where did you put the keys?
meaning: adv. conj. 在哪⾥；在那个地⽅
exampleTranslation: 你把钥匙放在哪里了？

example: Which book do you prefer, the blue one or the red one?
meaning: pron. det. 哪⼀个，哪些；…的那个
exampleTranslation: 你更喜欢哪本书，蓝色的那本还是红色的那本？

example: Who left the window open?
meaning: pron. 谁
exampleTranslation: 谁把窗户开着了？

example: Whom did you meet at the party yesterday?
meaning: pron. 谁，什么⼈
exampleTranslation: 你昨天在聚会上见到了谁？

example: Whose jacket is on the chair?
meaning: det. pron. 谁的
exampleTranslation: 椅子上的夹克是谁的？

example: Why did the machine stop suddenly?
meaning: adv. conj. 为什么
exampleTranslation: 机器为什么突然停了？

example: My wife and I have been married for ten years.
meaning: n. 妻⼦，太太
exampleTranslation: 我和我妻子已经结婚十年了。

example: I will attend the meeting tomorrow.
meaning: modal. 将会；愿意；请…好吗 n. 意志；意愿；遗嘱 vt. ⽴定志向；⽴遗嘱赠与 vi. 想要，希望
exampleTranslation: 我将会参加明天的会议。

example: She opened the window to let in some fresh air.
meaning: n. 窗⼾；橱窗；窗⼝；(⽇程) 空当
exampleTranslation: 她打开窗户让新鲜空气进来。

example: He prefers red wine to white wine.
meaning: n. 葡萄酒；果蔬酒
exampleTranslation: 他更喜欢红酒而不是白酒。

example: I always look forward to winter because I love snow.
meaning: n. 冬天 vi. 过冬
exampleTranslation: 我总是期待冬天的到来，因为我喜欢雪。

example: I wish you a merry Christmas.
meaning: vt. vi. 希望；祝愿 n. 愿望；(书信中的) 祝福
exampleTranslation: 我祝你圣诞快乐。

example: My bottle is filled with water.
meaning: prep. 和…⼀起；具有，带有；以，⽤
exampleTranslation: 我的瓶子里装满了水。

example: He left without saying goodbye.
meaning: prep. adv. 没有，⽆
exampleTranslation: 介词用法：Heleftwithoutsayinggoodbye.-他没说再见就走了。

example: She is a brave woman.
exampleTranslation: 她是一个勇敢的女性。

example: It's a wonderful day for a picnic.
meaning: adj. 极好的，精彩的
exampleTranslation: 这是个野餐的好天气。

example: The artisan sculpted a beautiful statue from a piece of wood.
meaning: n. ⽊头，⽊材；树林，林⼦
exampleTranslation: 工匠用一块木头雕刻出了一个美丽的雕像。

example: I've just received word that our flight has been cancelled.
meaning: n. 单词，字；话语；诺⾔；消息 vt. 措辞，⽤词
exampleTranslation: 我刚收到一条消息，说我们的飞行已经被取消。

example: Our world is full of beauty if we have the eyes to see it.
meaning: n. 世界；界
exampleTranslation: 如果我们愿意去发现，我们的世界充满了美丽。

example: I would go, but I'm really tired.
meaning: modal. 将，将会；想；但愿；⽼是
exampleTranslation: 我本来会去的，但我实在太累了。

example: He answered the question wrong.
meaning: adj. 错误的；搞错的；有⽑病的 adv. 错误地，不正确地 n. 恶⾏；犯罪，罪恶 vt. 不公正地对待
exampleTranslation: 他回答这个问题错了。

example: The New Year begins on January 1st.
meaning: n. 年；⼀年时间；年岁；年级
exampleTranslation: 新的一年从1月1日开始。

example: The yellow flowers opened in spring.
meaning: adj. ⻩⾊的；⻩⽪肤的 n. ⻩⾊ vi. vt. (使) 变⻩
exampleTranslation: 黄色的花在春天开放。

example: Yes, I can help you tomorrow.
meaning: int. 是；好；对了 n. 表⽰同意的答复或⼈
exampleTranslation: 是的，我明天可以帮你。

example: I met him in the park yesterday.
meaning: adv. 在昨天 n. 昨天；近⽇，往昔 adj. 过去的，过时的
exampleTranslation: 我昨天在公园遇到了他。

example: I told you the truth.
meaning: pron. 你，你们
exampleTranslation: 我告诉你了真相。

example: She is a young lady with much to offer.
meaning: adj. 年轻的；年轻⼈的 n. 年轻⼈；幼崽，幼⻦
exampleTranslation: 她是一个能提供许多的年轻女士。

example: Your idea sounds practical.
meaning: det. 你的，你们的
exampleTranslation: 你的想法听起来很实用。

example: This umbrella is yours, not mine.
meaning: pron. 你的，你们的
exampleTranslation: 这把伞是你的，不是我的。

example: Believe in yourself and all that you are.
meaning: pron. 你⾃⼰
exampleTranslation: 翻译：相信你自己和你所有的一切。

example: The children can't wait to see the lions at the zoo.
meaning: n. 动物园
exampleTranslation: 孩子们迫不及待地想去动物园看狮子。

example: Interest will accrue if you keep your money in a savings account.
meaning: vi. (利益等) 逐渐形成 vt. vi. 积累 (钱款或债务)
exampleTranslation: 如果你把钱存入储蓄账户，利息将会累积。

example: He denied all the accusations against him.
meaning: n. 指控，谴责
exampleTranslation: 他否认了所有对他的指控。

example: You showed admirable restraint when dealing with those difficult customers.
meaning: adj. 令⼈钦佩的，值得赞美的
exampleTranslation: 你处理那些棘手的客户时表现得十分冷静，这非常值得赞赏。

example: Our firm provides advisory services to small businesses.
meaning: adj. 顾问的，提供咨询的 n. 警报，警告，通告
exampleTranslation: 我们的公司为小企业提供咨询服务。

example: To get some peace, I had to appease my angry neighbor by apologizing for the noise.
meaning: vt. 平息，安抚；绥靖
exampleTranslation: 这句话展示了“appease”在语境中的用法。

example: The company has received over 1000 applications and it will take some time to process these applicants.
meaning: n. 申请⼈
exampleTranslation: 公司已经收到了超过1000份申请，而处理这些申请人将需要一些时间。

example: Attentive parents can readily detect the signs of stress in their children.
meaning: adj. 专⼼的，留意的；体贴的
exampleTranslation: 这句话展示了“attentive”在语境中的用法。

example: Companies are finding ways to automate processes so employees can focus on creative work.
meaning: vt. 使…⾃动化
exampleTranslation: 公司正在找方法自动化流程，这样员工就可以专注于创造性工作。

example: He is my biological father.
meaning: adj. ⽣物的；⽣物性的；亲⽣的
exampleTranslation: 他是我亲生父亲。

example: The blacksmith forged the iron into a beautiful sword.
meaning: n. 铁匠
exampleTranslation: 那个铁匠将铁锤炼成了一把美丽的剑。

example: She has a bourgeois mentality, always worried about her social status.
meaning: adj. 中产阶级的；世俗的；资本家的 n. 中产阶级
exampleTranslation: 她有一种中产阶级的心态，总是担心自己的社会地位。

example: The river reaches a maximum breadth of 500 metres here.
meaning: n. 宽度；⼴泛，⼴度
exampleTranslation: 这条河在这里的最大宽度达到了500米。

example: We've made a major breakthrough in our negotiations.
meaning: n. 突破，重⼤进展 adj. 突破性的，取得重⼤成功的
exampleTranslation: 我们在谈判中取得了重大突破。

example: My new hat has a wide brim.
meaning: n. (容器的) 边，沿；帽檐 vi. 盛满 (液体)，充满 (容器)
exampleTranslation: 我新买的帽子有个宽宽的帽檐。

example: The flow of the brook is gentle and soothing.
meaning: n. ⼩溪，⼩河 vt. 容许，容忍
exampleTranslation: 小溪的流动温柔且安抚人心。

example: He sold his old car for a thousand bucks.
meaning: n. (⼀) 美元；雄⿅，公兔；⼩伙⼦ vt. 抵制，反抗 vi. (⻢) ⼸背四蹄跳起
exampleTranslation: 他把他的旧车卖了一千美元。

example: The Buddhist temple stands on the hill.
meaning: n. 佛教徒 adj. 佛教的
exampleTranslation: 那座佛教寺庙坐落在山上。

example: The police plan to bust the illegal operation.
meaning: vt. 打碎；突击搜捕 n. 半⾝像；胸部；萧条期；搜捕 adj. 破碎的，毁坏的；破产的
exampleTranslation: 警方计划破获这个非法活动。

example: My mother has become the primary caregiver for my grandfather.
meaning: n. 护理员
exampleTranslation: 我的母亲已成为我的祖父的主要照料者。

example: The wedding was held in a beautiful chapel.
meaning: n. ⼩教堂，⼩礼拜堂
exampleTranslation: 婚礼在一个漂亮的小教堂里举行。

example: Stop chattering and get to work.
meaning: vi. 喋喋不休；(⽛) 打颤；鸣叫 n. 唠叨的话；鸣叫声，啼啭声
exampleTranslation: 别再瞎扯淡了，快开始工作。

example: He wrote a chronicle of the year's events.
meaning: n. 编年史 vt. 按时间顺序记事
exampleTranslation: 他记录了一年中发生的事情

example: The citizenship course prepares new immigrants for Canadian citizenship.
meaning: n. 公⺠⾝份，国籍；公⺠义务
exampleTranslation: 新公民课程为新的移民准备成为加拿大公民。

example: Please pass me the clamp, I need to fix these pipes.
meaning: vt. vi. 紧紧抓住，被抓住，被夹紧 vt. 夹紧，固定；⽤夹锁锁住 n. 夹具，夹⼦
exampleTranslation: 请把夹子递给我，我需要把这些管子固定好。

example: This task requires a collaborative effort from our entire team.
meaning: adj. 合作的，协作的
exampleTranslation: 这项任务需要我们整个团队的共同努力。

example: His commitment to the work is very strong.
meaning: n. 承诺；献⾝，投⼊；义务
exampleTranslation: 他对工作的承诺十分坚定。

example: His competence as a manager is unquestionable.
meaning: n. 能⼒，才⼲；技能
exampleTranslation: 他的管理能力不容质疑。

example: Beethoven is a world-famous composer.
meaning: n. 作曲家
exampleTranslation: 贝多芬是世界著名的作曲家。

example: I constantly think about you.
meaning: adv. 持续不断地，经常地
exampleTranslation: 我时时刻刻都在想你。

example: There is a constraint on the amount of money we can spend on the project.
meaning: n. 限制，束缚；⾏为约束
exampleTranslation: 我们在这个项目上可以花费的资金有限制

example: There's a lot of contention about that issue.
meaning: n. 争执，争论；看法，观点
exampleTranslation: 那个问题有许多争议。

example: The power outage interrupted continuity in production.
meaning: n. 连续性；(电影等的) 镜头衔接
exampleTranslation: 停电打断了生产的连续性。

example: The city is riddled with corruption and crime.
meaning: n. 腐败，受贿；堕落，道德败坏
exampleTranslation: 这个城市充斥着腐败和犯罪。

example: He is interested in the mysteries of the cosmos.
meaning: n. 宇宙
exampleTranslation: 他对宇宙的奥秘感兴趣。

example: He was courageous enough to confront the bully.
meaning: adj. 勇敢的，⽆畏的
exampleTranslation: 他足够勇敢，敢于面对那个恶霸。

example: She has provided credible explanation for her actions.
meaning: adj. 可信的，可靠的；可接受的
exampleTranslation: 她为她的行动提供了可信的解释。

example: He was trying to crumble the cookies into small pieces.
meaning: vt. vi. (使) 粉碎，(使) 破裂 vi. 崩塌，破裂；衰落，崩溃
exampleTranslation: 他正在试图把饼干捏成小块。

example: The kitten is really cute.
meaning: adj. 可爱的；性感的；抖机灵的
exampleTranslation: 这只小猫真可爱。

example: The rain will dampen the picnic.
meaning: vt. 减弱，抑制 (热情等)；弄湿
exampleTranslation: 雨会让野餐变得潮湿。

example: The act of deception was discovered by the authorities.
meaning: n. 欺骗，受骗；诡计，骗局
exampleTranslation: 这种欺骗行为被当局发现了。

example: We put up decorations for the Christmas season.
meaning: n. 装饰品；装饰⻛格；勋章
exampleTranslation: 我们为圣诞季节布置了装饰品。

example: The defendant pleaded not guilty to the charges of theft.
meaning: n. 被告
exampleTranslation: 被告对盗窃指控抗辩无罪。

example: The water quality in the river has severely degraded over the years.
meaning: vt. 有辱…的⼈格；使恶化 vi. vt. (使) 降解
exampleTranslation: 这条河的水质多年来严重降低了。

example: He's under the delusion that he will be promoted soon.
meaning: n. 错觉，谬⻅；妄想，幻想
exampleTranslation: 他在幻想自己很快就会升职。

example: He gave a demonstration of how to cook the dish.
meaning: n. ⽰威游⾏；演⽰；证明，说明
exampleTranslation: 他做了一个如何烹饪这道菜的示范。

example: Diligence is the mother of good luck.
meaning: n. 勤奋，勤勉
exampleTranslation: 勤奋是成功的母亲。

example: His disapproval was evident in the frown on his face.
meaning: n. 不赞同，反对
exampleTranslation: 他的不满从他皱眉的脸上显而易见。

example: After the party, we had a lot of disposable plates to throw away.
meaning: adj. ⼀次性的；可⾃由⽀配的 n. ⼀次性⽤品
exampleTranslation: 派对过后，我们有好多一次性餐盘要扔掉。

example: His advice was completely disregarded by them.
meaning: vt. 不理会，不顾，忽视 n. 忽视，轻视
exampleTranslation: 他们完全无视了他的建议。

example: Her continuing dissatisfaction with her job led her to consider changing careers.
meaning: n. 不满意
exampleTranslation: 她对工作的持续不满促使她考虑换个职业。

example: Our company values diversity in the workplace.
meaning: n. 多样性；各种各样的⼈或事
exampleTranslation: 我们公司重视工作场所的多样性

example: He is working on his doctoral dissertation.
meaning: adj. 博⼠的，博⼠学位的
exampleTranslation: 他正在撰写他的博士论文。

example: Doubtless, this is the best restaurant in town.
meaning: adv. ⽆疑地，⼏乎肯定地
exampleTranslation: 无疑，这是镇上最好的餐馆。

example: You can download the application from the App Store.
meaning: vt. 下载 n. 下载 (的⽂件)
exampleTranslation: 你可以从AppStore下载这个应用。

example: The builder has designed a new drainage system for the construction site.
meaning: n. 排⽔，排⽔系统
exampleTranslation: 建筑商为建筑工地设计了一个新的排水系统。

example: Her health has improved dramatically.
meaning: adv. 急剧地，剧烈地；戏剧性地
exampleTranslation: 她的健康状况大大地改善了。

example: Tom is a high school dropout.
meaning: n. 辍学者
exampleTranslation: 汤姆是一个高中辍学者。

example: He was dubbed 'the next basketball sensation'.
meaning: vt. 将…戏称为；为…配⾳
exampleTranslation: 他被赞誉为下一个篮球奇才。

example: The deforestation has caused damage to the local ecosystem.
meaning: n. ⽣态系统
exampleTranslation: 过度的森林砍伐对当地的生态系统造成了破坏。

example: As an educator, it's important to keep up-to-date with the latest teaching methods.
meaning: n. 教师，教育⼯作者；教育家
exampleTranslation: 作为一个教育者，了解最新的教育方法是很重要的。

example: She is studying electronics at the university.
meaning: n. 电⼦学；电⼦技术；电⼦设备
exampleTranslation: 她在大学研究电子学。

example: The elevation of the sun above the horizon is getting higher.
meaning: n. 海拔，⾼度；提拔，晋升，提升
exampleTranslation: 太阳在地平线上方的升高程度越来越高。

example: The factory was fined for its illegal emission of toxic gases.
meaning: n. 排放物；(光、热等的) 排放
exampleTranslation: 工厂因非法排放有毒气体而被处以罚款。

example: Overfishing can endanger the balance of the ecosystem.
meaning: vt. 危及，使处于险境
exampleTranslation: 过度捕捞会危及生态平衡。

example: He has an enviable position in the company.
meaning: adj. 令⼈羡慕的，引起忌妒的
exampleTranslation: 他在公司中有着令人羡慕的地位。

example: Would you mind running an errand for me?
meaning: n. 差事，跑腿
exampleTranslation: 你能帮我跑个腿吗？

example: Essentially, we're looking at a fairly normal situation here.
meaning: adv. 本质上，根本上，基本上
exampleTranslation: 从本质上说，我们正在面对的是一个相当正常的情况。

example: He promised me his everlasting love.
meaning: adj. 永久的，永恒的；没完没了的
exampleTranslation: 他向我承诺了他永恒的爱。

example: His exemplary behavior set a good example for the rest of us.
meaning: adj. 典范的，可作榜样的
exampleTranslation: 他的模范行为是我们其他人的好榜样。

example: The mission to Mars was a great feat of space exploration.
meaning: n. 探索，勘探；研究，探究
exampleTranslation: 对火星的探索任务是太空探索的一项伟大壮举。

example: He is involved in several extracurricular activities such as basketball and drama club.
meaning: adj. 课外的；婚外的
exampleTranslation: 他参与了几个课外活动，如篮球和戏剧俱乐部

example: His father was extraordinarily patient.
meaning: adv. 极其，特别地
exampleTranslation: 他的父亲非常有耐心。

example: She has a facial every month to keep her skin healthy.
meaning: adj. ⾯部的，脸上的 n. ⾯部护理
exampleTranslation: 她每月都做面部护理，以保持皮肤健康

example: We should uphold the principle of fairness in every competition.
meaning: n. 公正，公平，合理
exampleTranslation: 我们应该在每一场比赛中坚守公平的原则。

example: He was caught in a web of deceit and falsehood.
meaning: n. 虚假；谎⾔；说谎
exampleTranslation: 他被一张由谎言和虚假编织的网罗住了。

example: Regular exercise is the key to fitness.
meaning: n. 健康；就某事⽽⾔的适合
exampleTranslation: 定期锻炼是保持健康的关键。

example: Yoga improves both your flexibility and balance.
meaning: n. 灵活性，可变性；柔韧性
exampleTranslation: 瑜伽能够改进你的灵活性和平衡性。

example: Just flip the switch and the lights will turn on.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 快速翻转 vt. 弹，抛；按；迅速转售 vi. ⼗分⽓愤，异常激动，神志不清 n. 空翻，筋⽃
exampleTranslation: 只需轻轻一按，灯就会亮。

example: The geographic diversity of this country is truly amazing.
meaning: adj. 地理的，地理学的
exampleTranslation: 这个国家的地理多样性真是惊人。

example: The statue was made of granite.
meaning: n. 花岗岩
exampleTranslation: 雕像是由花岗岩做成的。

example: I am going to visit my granny this weekend.
meaning: n. 奶奶，姥姥
exampleTranslation: 我这个周末要去看望我奶奶。

example: I usually buy my fruits and vegetables from the local greengrocer.
meaning: n. 蔬菜⽔果店；果菜商
exampleTranslation: 我通常在当地的蔬果店买水果和蔬菜。

example: The bank's security was compromised in a hack last year.
meaning: vi. vt. 劈，砍；⾮法侵⼊ (计算机) vi. 骑⻢ n. 雇佣⽂⼈；杂务⼈员；出租⻋
exampleTranslation: 去年这个银行的安全系统在一次黑客攻击中被破坏。

example: We need to halve the cake so everyone gets a piece.
meaning: vi. vt. (使) 减半 vt. 将…对半分
exampleTranslation: 我们需要把蛋糕切成两半，这样每个人都能分到一块。

example: We must hasten the production process to meet the deadline.
meaning: vt. 加速，加快 vi. 急忙做 (某事)；赶往 (某处)
exampleTranslation: 我们必须加快生产过程以赶得上截至日期。

example: He gave me a hearty welcome.
meaning: adj. 热情的；精⼒充沛的；丰盛的
exampleTranslation: 他热情地欢迎我。

example: The storm hit the city heavily, causing great damage.
meaning: adv. ⾮常，⼤量地，严重地；沉重地
exampleTranslation: 那场风暴重创了这座城市，造成了大量的损失。

example: His lack of education is a major hindrance to his career advancement.
meaning: n. 阻碍，妨碍者
exampleTranslation: 他的教育水平不足阻碍了他的事业发展。

example: Hooray, our team won the game!
meaning: int. 好极了，好哇
exampleTranslation: 太好了，我们队赢了比赛！

example: This city is the major hub for international travel.
meaning: n. (某地或活动的) 中⼼；轮毂
exampleTranslation: 这个城市是国际旅行的主要枢纽。

example: The lion has been known as the king of the hunter.
meaning: n. 猎⼈；搜寻者；猎狐⻢
exampleTranslation: 狮子一直被认为是猎人之王。

example: His politics are driven by pure idealism.
meaning: n. 理想主义；唯⼼主义，唯⼼论
exampleTranslation: 他的政治行为是纯粹的理想主义驱动的。

example: The country has a long history of immigration.
meaning: n. 移⺠，移⺠⼈数；移⺠局检查处
exampleTranslation: 这个国家有着悠久的移民历史。

example: The police had to imprison the suspect until the trial.
meaning: vt. 监禁，禁锢
exampleTranslation: 警方必须把嫌疑人关押起来等待审判。

example: It's improper to shout in public.
meaning: adj. 不合适的；不正当的；错误的
exampleTranslation: 在公众场合大声喊叫是不妥当的。

example: The report is inaccurate and misleading.
meaning: adj. 不准确的，有错误的
exampleTranslation: 报告是不准确且有误导性的。

example: The inadequacy of the school's sports facilities was a constant source of frustration.
meaning: n. 不⾜，不充分；不称职；缺点
exampleTranslation: 学校体育设施的不足常常让人感到挫败。

example: Your comments are highly inappropriate.
meaning: adj. 不适当的，不合适的
exampleTranslation: 你的评论非常不恰当。

example: He has an inclination to disregard rules.
meaning: n. 意向，倾向；斜坡，斜度；点头
exampleTranslation: 他有忽视规则的倾向。

example: These two systems are simply incompatible, we cannot integrate them.
meaning: adj. 不相容的；合不来的；不兼容的
exampleTranslation: 这两个系统简直是不兼容的，我们无法将它们整合在一起。

example: He was incompetent and was replaced after 6 months.
meaning: adj. ⽆能⼒的，⽆法胜任的 n. ⽆能的⼈，⽆法胜任的⼈
exampleTranslation: 他工作能力不足，六个月后就被取代了。

example: The report is incomplete without the final chart.
meaning: adj. 不完整的，不完全的，未完成的 n. (课程) 未修毕
exampleTranslation: 没有最后一张图表，这份报告是不完整的。

example: She lives independently from her parents.
meaning: adv. 独⽴地；分别地，单独地
exampleTranslation: 她独立于父母生活。

example: Her indirect reference to his past mistakes made him uncomfortable.
meaning: adj. 间接的；拐弯抹⻆的；绕远的
exampleTranslation: 她对他过去的错误的间接提及让他感到不安。

example: The policy has proved to be wholly ineffective.
meaning: adj. ⽆效果的，不起作⽤的
exampleTranslation: 这项政策被证明是完全无效的。

example: The old computer is very inefficient.
meaning: adj. 效率低的，能⼒差的
exampleTranslation: 这台旧电脑非常低效，消耗的能源过多。

example: If we continue to waste natural resources, we will inevitably face shortages in the future.
meaning: adv. 不可避免地，必然地
exampleTranslation: 如果我们继续浪费自然资源，我们将不可避免地面临未来的短缺。

example: He's always had an inferiority complex about his height.
meaning: n. 低等，劣等
exampleTranslation: 他对自己的身高一直有一种自卑感。

example: The government is trying to inflate the economy.
meaning: vt. vi. (使) 充⽓，膨胀；(物价) 涨⾼ vt. 夸⼤，吹嘘
exampleTranslation: 政府正在试图扩大经济规模。

example: His ingenuity and ability to think outside the box saved the day.
meaning: n. 聪明才智，独创⼒
exampleTranslation: 中文

example: He is known for his innovative thinking.
meaning: adj. 创新的，⾰新的，新颖的
exampleTranslation: 他以创新思维而闻名

example: Compared to the universe, our earth is insignificant.
meaning: adj. 不重要的，⽆⾜轻重的
exampleTranslation: 相比于宇宙，我们的地球微不足道。

example: The car passed their inspection.
meaning: n. 检查；视察
exampleTranslation: 这辆车通过了他们的检查。

example: The food is insufficient to feed everyone.
meaning: adj. 不充分的，不⾜的
exampleTranslation: 食物不够所有人吃。

example: Poor diet and lack of exercise have led to an increased intake of fat.
meaning: n. 摄取量；征召⼈数；进⼝
exampleTranslation: 饮食能量差和缺乏运动导致脂肪的摄入增加

example: The integration of data from various sources can increase the overall value of information.
meaning: n. 综合，整合；同化，融⼊；融合
exampleTranslation: 从各种来源整合数据可以增加信息的整体价值

example: His superior intellect helped him excel in school.
meaning: n. 智⼒，领悟⼒；才智⾮凡的⼈
exampleTranslation: 他卓越的理解力帮助他在学校中表现优秀。

example: She stared at him intensely.
meaning: adv. 极其；(活动) 激烈地；强烈地
exampleTranslation: 她深情地凝视着他。

example: The website is designed to be interactive.
meaning: adj. (⼈机) 交互的；互动的
exampleTranslation: 这个网站设计成了交互式的。

example: Both countries have an interdependence on each other for trade.
meaning: n. 互相依赖
exampleTranslation: 这两个国家在贸易方面相互依赖。

example: Interpersonal skills are essential for successful team work.
meaning: adj. ⼈际的
exampleTranslation: 人际交往能力对于团队工作的成功是必不可少的。

example: Her interpretation of the poem is quite unique.
meaning: n. 解释，解读，说明；表演，演绎
exampleTranslation: 她对这首诗的诠释很独特。

example: Thomas Edison was the inventor of the light bulb.
meaning: n. 发明者，发明家
exampleTranslation: 托马斯·爱迪生是电灯泡的发明者。

example: The quick brown fox has an irregular jumping pattern.
meaning: adj. 不整⻬的；不规则的；不正常的 n. ⾮正规军军⼈
exampleTranslation: 那只敏捷的棕色狐狸跳跃的模式很不规则。

example: The use of modern irrigation techniques increased the farmers' yield significantly.
meaning: n. 灌溉；(对伤⼝的) 冲洗
exampleTranslation: 利用现代灌溉技术显著提高了农民的产量。

example: The Eiffel Tower is a famous landmark in Paris.
meaning: n. 地标，标志性建筑；⾥程碑
exampleTranslation: 埃菲尔铁塔是巴黎的著名地标。

example: I usually take the leftover food for lunch the next day.
meaning: n. 吃剩的⻝物；遗留物 adj. 剩余的，未吃完的
exampleTranslation: 我通常将剩下的食物留到第二天午餐吃。

example: She pulled out her wallet from the red lining of her handbag.
meaning: n. 衬⾥，内衬；(⾝体器官的) 内膜
exampleTranslation: 她从手提包的红色内衬中拿出了她的钱包。

example: The radio station has millions of listeners.
meaning: n. 倾听者；收听，听众
exampleTranslation: 这个广播电台有数百万的听众。

example: The government's economic reforms have marginalized the poor.
meaning: vt. 使显得微不⾜道，使边缘化
exampleTranslation: 政府的经济改革使穷人更加边缘化。

example: His health has improved markedly.
meaning: adv. 明显地，显著地
exampleTranslation: 他的健康状况明显改善。

example: The frog jumped from the lily pad into the marsh.
meaning: n. 湿地，沼泽
exampleTranslation: 那只青蛙从睡莲叶子上跳进了湿地

example: The marshal led the parade through the city streets.
meaning: n. (英国) 陆军元帅，空军元帅 vt. 整理 (思路、想法等)；调集
exampleTranslation: 元帅带领队伍穿过城市的街道。

example: His philosophy of life was grounded in materialism, and he regarded material possessions as the most important thing in life.
meaning: n. 物质主义；唯物主义
exampleTranslation: 他的人生哲学基于物质主义，他认为物质财产是生命中最重要的事物。

example: His manners showed a great level of maturity.
meaning: n. 成熟；到期
exampleTranslation: 他的举止展示出高度的成熟。

example: The impact of the policy change is not immediately measurable.
meaning: adj. 可测量的；明显的，显著的
exampleTranslation: 政策变化的影响并不能立即衡量。

example: It's important to take your medication as directed by your doctor.
meaning: n. 药物
exampleTranslation: 按照医生的指示服用你的药物是很重要的。

example: The Mediterranean diet is famous for its nutritious value and health benefits.
meaning: adj. 地中海的，地中海地区的 n. 地中海，地中海地区
exampleTranslation: 这种地中海饮食因其营养价值和健康效益而出名。

example: I need to memorize all these formulas for the math test.
meaning: vt. 熟记，记住
exampleTranslation: 我需要记住数学考试的所有公式。

example: She was mentally and physically exhausted.
meaning: adv. 精神上，智⼒上，思想上
exampleTranslation: 她身心疲惫。

example: Copper has been important in the metallurgy for thousands of years.
meaning: n. 冶⾦学
exampleTranslation: 铜在冶金学中的重要性已经有几千年的历史了

example: There has been a large migration of people from rural areas into the cities.
meaning: n. (⼈的) 移居，(⻦或兽的) 迁徙
exampleTranslation: 从乡村地区向城市有大量的人口迁移。

example: Getting into college is a major milestone in one's life.
meaning: n. ⾥程碑，重⼤事件
exampleTranslation: 进入大学是人生的一个重要里程碑。

example: We strive for minimal interruptions during the class.
meaning: adj. 最⼩的，极少的，最低限度的
exampleTranslation: 我们努力让课程中的干扰减少到最低。

example: The town was built to support the mining operations.
meaning: n. 采矿 (业)
exampleTranslation: 那个城镇被建立是为了支持矿产开采。

example: There is a common misconception that healthy food is always expensive.
meaning: n. 错误观念，误解
exampleTranslation: 常有一种误解，健康食品总是很贵。

example: Don't let his sweet words misguide you.
meaning: vt. 错误地引导，把…引⼊歧途
exampleTranslation: 别让他甜言蜜语误导你。

example: I'm sorry if I misinterpreted your comments.
meaning: vt. 误解，曲解
exampleTranslation: 如果我误解了你的评论，我感到抱歉。

example: Physical mobility can be severely limited in people with disabilities.
meaning: n. 流动性；活动能⼒，移动能⼒
exampleTranslation: 残疾人的身体流动性可能受到严重限制。

example: Modesty is a virtue that is praised by all.
meaning: n. 谦虚，谦逊；(尤指⼥性的) 端庄
exampleTranslation: 谦虚是一种被所有人赞扬的美德。

example: Molecular biology is a rapidly developing field of science.
meaning: adj. 分⼦的，与分⼦有关的
exampleTranslation: 分子生物学是一个发展迅速的科学领域。

example: The infant mortality rate in low-income countries remains high.
meaning: n. 死亡率；死亡；必死性
exampleTranslation: 在低收入国家，婴儿死亡率依然很高。

example: They agreed to the plan mutually.
meaning: adv. 相互地，彼此，共同地
exampleTranslation: 他们互相同意了计划。

example: The fast food chain has gone nationwide.
meaning: adj. 全国性的，全国范围的 adv. 在全国范围内
exampleTranslation: 这个快餐连锁店已经覆盖了全国。

example: Success does not necessarily mean happiness.
meaning: adv. 必然地，不可避免地，必定地
exampleTranslation: 成功并不一定意味着幸福。

example: He's always been there for me when I was feeling needy.
meaning: adj. 贫苦的；需要情感⽀持的
exampleTranslation: 当我需要帮助时，他总是在我身边。

example: We bought some magazines at the newsstand.
meaning: n. 报摊，书报亭
exampleTranslation: 我们在报摊上买了一些杂志。

example: The children are laughing noisily in the garden.
meaning: adv. 吵闹地，喧闹地
exampleTranslation: 孩子们在花园里咯咯大笑。

example: Notably, he was awarded the Nobel Prize for his contribution to peace.
meaning: adv. 特别，尤其；明显地，显著地
exampleTranslation: 值得注意的是,他因为对和平的贡献被授予了诺贝尔奖。

example: I received a notification about the change in schedule.
meaning: n. 正式通知，正式通告
exampleTranslation: 我收到了关于改变日程的通知。

example: He was arrested for downloading obscene material from the internet.
meaning: adj. 下流的；骇⼈听闻的，不道德的
exampleTranslation: 他因为下载淫秽物品而被捕。

example: He is an observer of human behaviors.
meaning: n. 观察者，观察员；⽬击者
exampleTranslation: 他是一个人类行为的观察者

example: The government faces strong opposition on the new tax policy.
meaning: n. 反对；对⼿；反对党；对⽴
exampleTranslation: 政府在新的税收政策上面临强烈的反对。

example: There was a public outcry against the decision.
meaning: n. (公众的) 强烈抗议，呐喊
exampleTranslation: 对那个决定有很大的公众抗议声音。

example: His memory will outlive him.
meaning: vt. ⽐…活得⻓；⽐…经久
exampleTranslation: 他的记忆将超越他的生命。

example: Many companies choose to outsource their IT services to specialists.
meaning: vt. vi. 外包，外办
exampleTranslation: 许多公司选择将他们的IT服务外包给专家。

example: The advantages of this plan outweigh the disadvantages.
meaning: vt. 重于，⼤于，超过
exampleTranslation: 这个计划的好处超过了它的弊端。

example: I think you overestimate the power of your persuasion.
meaning: vt. ⾼估，过⾼估计 n. 过⾼的评估
exampleTranslation: 我觉得你过高地估计了你的说服力。

example: It's not as bad as you make it out to be.
meaning: vt. 夸⼤，夸张，⾔过其实
exampleTranslation: 我觉得你夸大了问题。它并不像你说的那么糟。

example: Persistence is the key to success in any endeavor.
meaning: n. 毅⼒，锲⽽不舍；持续存在
exampleTranslation: 坚持是成功的关键。

example: She made persistent efforts to lose weight.
meaning: adj. 执着的，锲⽽不舍的；持续的
exampleTranslation: 她坚持不懈地努力减肥。

example: His arguments were so persuasive that everyone agreed with him.
meaning: adj. 有说服⼒的，令⼈信服的
exampleTranslation: 他的论点如此有说服力，以至于每个人都同意他。

example: He is physically fit for the job.
meaning: adv. ⾝体上，外貌上；实际上
exampleTranslation: 他身体上很适合这份工作。

example: She plucked a grape from the bunch and popped it into her mouth.
meaning: vt. 摘，拔；拔⽑；使 (某⼈) 脱离 vt. vi. 弹拨 (乐器的弦) n. 胆识，胆量
exampleTranslation: 她从一串葡萄中拔下一颗放入口中。

example: It's pointless trying to keep this a secret.
meaning: adj. ⽆意义的，⽆益的，⽆⽬的的
exampleTranslation: 试图将这个秘密，是毫无意义的。

example: Plastic is a type of polymer, it is made of repeated units of monomers.
meaning: n. 聚合物，聚合体
exampleTranslation: 塑料是一种聚合物，由重复的单体单位构成。

example: He owns a large prairie in Wyoming.
meaning: n. (北美的) ⼤草原
exampleTranslation: 他在怀俄明州拥有一大片草原。

example: The best prevention against disease is a healthy diet and regular exercise.
meaning: n. 预防，防范
exampleTranslation: 对抗病症的最好预防就是健康的饮食和规律的运动。

example: He is primarily a painter, but he also writes poetry.
meaning: adv. 主要地
exampleTranslation: 他主要是个画家，但他也写诗。

example: The printer is out of ink, we need to buy some more.
meaning: n. 打印机；印刷⼯⼈，印刷公司
exampleTranslation: 打印机缺墨水了，我们需要买一些。

example: With years of practice, he has become proficient at playing piano.
meaning: adj. 熟练的，精通的
exampleTranslation: 经过多年的练习，他已经精通钢琴演奏了。

example: She is responsible for the promotion of the new book.
meaning: n. 晋升；促销；促进；晋级
exampleTranslation: 她负责新书的宣传工作。

example: The helmet provides protection for the head.
meaning: n. 保护，防卫；保护物；保障
exampleTranslation: 头盔为头部提供保护。

example: The author made some provocative statements in his book.
meaning: adj. 挑衅的，煽动的；挑逗的
exampleTranslation: 作者在他的书中发表了一些挑衅的言论。

example: He provides psychological support for the patients.
meaning: adj. ⼼理的；⼼理学的
exampleTranslation: 他为病人提供心理支持。

example: The psychologist analysed the patient's behaviour to understand their emotional state.
meaning: n. ⼼理学家
exampleTranslation: 这位心理学家分析了病人的行为，以理解他们的情绪状态。

example: They hired a PR firm to publicize the launch of their new product.
meaning: vt. 宣传，推⼴
exampleTranslation: 他们雇佣了一家公关公司来宣传他们新产品的发布。

example: I just bought a pumpkin for Halloween.
meaning: n. 南⽠
exampleTranslation: 我刚买了一个南瓜，准备万圣节。

example: Proper punctuation is essential for clear and effective writing.
meaning: n. 标点符号，标点⽤法
exampleTranslation: 正确的标点符号对清晰有效的写作至关重要。

example: He has puritan values, always living a frugal and disciplined life.
meaning: n. 禁欲者，苦⾏者；清教徒 adj. 清教徒的，禁欲苦⾏的
exampleTranslation: 他有清教徒的价值观，总是过着简朴和有纪律的生活。

example: His alibi for that night seems questionable.
meaning: adj. 有问题的，不确定的，可疑的
exampleTranslation: 他那天晚上的不在场证明似乎让人怀疑。

example: She sprinkled raisins over the salad.
meaning: n. 葡萄⼲
exampleTranslation: 她在沙拉上撒上了葡萄干。

example: I like to ramble through the woods on my day off.
meaning: vi. 闲逛；闲聊；(植物) 蔓⽣ n. 漫步，散步；闲扯，随笔
exampleTranslation: 我喜欢在休息日里在林中漫步。

example: She was randomly selected for a security check.
meaning: adv. 随机地，随意地，任意地
exampleTranslation: 她被随机抽查安全。

example: The nuclear reactor at Chernobyl experienced a catastrophic failure.
meaning: n. 核反应堆
exampleTranslation: 切尔诺贝利核反应堆发生了灾难性的故障。

example: He reaffirmed his commitment to the agreement.
meaning: vt. 重申，再次确定
exampleTranslation: 他再次确认他对协议的承诺。

example: After the earthquake, the city had to rebuild.
meaning: vt. 重建，重造；使恢复
exampleTranslation: 地震后，这个城市不得不重建。

example: I got the job through a recruiter at a job fair.
meaning: n. 招聘⼈员，征召⼈员
exampleTranslation: 我是通过在招聘会上的猎头获得这份工作的。

example: I think it's time to redefine our goals.
meaning: vt. 重新定义，重新界定
exampleTranslation: 我认为是时候重新定义我们的目标了。

example: You can click this link to redirect to the home page.
meaning: vt. 使改变⽤途；使改变⽅向或路线
exampleTranslation: 可以点击这个链接以重定向至主页。Youcanclickthislinktoredirecttothehomepage.

example: After a long struggle, John managed to regain control of the company.
meaning: vt. 重新得到，恢复；返回，重返
exampleTranslation: 经过长时间的抗争，约翰设法重新掌握了公司的控制权。

example: The reproductive system in humans includes structures like the uterus and ovaries in females and the testes in males.
meaning: adj. 繁殖的，⽣殖的；翻印的，复制的
exampleTranslation: 中文：人类的生殖系统包括女性的子宫和卵巢，男性的睾丸等结构。

example: After months of contemplation, he finally handed in his resignation.
meaning: n. 辞职信，辞职；屈从，顺从
exampleTranslation: 经过几个月的考虑，他最终递交了辞职信。

example: John come from a newly respectable family.
meaning: adj. 值得尊敬的；可观的，相当好的
exampleTranslation: 约翰来自一个新近得到人们尊重的家庭

example: The teacher expects the revision of my essay by tomorrow.
meaning: n. 修订，修改；修订稿；复习
exampleTranslation: 老师期望我明天完成对我的论文的修改。

example: The leaves rustle in the wind.
meaning: vt. vi. (使) 沙沙作响 vt. 偷窃 (牲⼝) n. 轻轻的摩擦声，沙沙声
exampleTranslation: 树叶在风中发出沙沙声。

example: She uses a scoop to measure the flour.
meaning: n. 勺，铲 (的量)；独家新闻 vt. vi. ⽤勺舀；(敏捷地) 抱起 vt. 抢先报道
exampleTranslation: 她用勺子量面粉。

example: Scrub the floor until it is clean.
meaning: vt. vi. 擦洗，刷洗 vt. 取消 (原有安排) n. 擦洗，刷洗；灌⽊丛；⼿术⾐
exampleTranslation: 把地板擦到干净为止。

example: After years of research, they made a sensational discovery.
meaning: adj. 轰动的；耸⼈听闻的；极好的
exampleTranslation: 在数年的研究后，他们做出了轰动性的发现。

example: His fingers had lost their sensitivity to cold.
meaning: n. 体贴；敏感性；过敏性；敏感
exampleTranslation: 他的手指已经对冷无感。

example: If the error persists, please contact the support team.
meaning: n. 传感器
exampleTranslation: 这句话展示了“sensor”在语境中的用法。

example: The pastor's sermon was about the importance of forgiveness.
meaning: n. 布道，讲道；说教，训导
exampleTranslation: 牧师的布道是关于宽恕的重要性。

example: Sexual reproduction is a natural process in humans.
meaning: adj. 性的；⽣殖的；性别的
exampleTranslation: 性生殖是人类的一种自然过程。

example: I took a shortcut through the park to get home faster.
meaning: n. 近路；(做某事的) 快捷办法
exampleTranslation: 我穿过公园走了一条捷径以更快的回家。

example: He sifted the flour into the bowl.
meaning: vt. 筛 (⾯粉、沙⼦等) vt. vi. 筛查，仔细查找
exampleTranslation: 他把面粉筛到碗里。

example: They all stood up simultaneously.
meaning: adv. 同时地，同步地
exampleTranslation: 他们同时起立。

example: He bought a new pair of sneakers for his basketball game.
meaning: n. 运动鞋
exampleTranslation: 他为篮球赛买了一双新的运动鞋。

example: He feeds the sparrows in the park every day.
meaning: n. ⿇雀
exampleTranslation: 他每天都在公园里喂麻雀。

example: His spatial awareness is impressive.
meaning: adj. 空间的，与空间有关的
exampleTranslation: 他对空间的感知能力很强。

example: He asked me to take notes, specifically the main points of the lecture.
meaning: adv. 明确地；专⻔地；确切地说
exampleTranslation: 他让我做笔记，特别是要记下讲座的要点。

example: It's important to standardize the process to ensure efficiency.
meaning: vt. 使标准化，使合乎标准
exampleTranslation: 重要的是使过程标准化以确保效率。

example: She prepared a beef stew for dinner.
meaning: n. 炖菜 vt. vi. 炖，煨 vi. 思考，担忧
exampleTranslation: 她为晚餐准备了一锅炖牛肉

example: We need a strategic plan to ensure we meet our sales targets.
meaning: adj. 战略性的
exampleTranslation: 我们需要一个战略性的计划来保证我们的销售目标。Weneedastrategicplantoensurewemeetoursalestargets.

example: The puppy must've strayed from its mother.
meaning: vi. ⾛失；离题，⾛神；有外遇 adj. ⾛失的，离群的；零星的 n. ⾛失的宠物；离群的⼈或物
exampleTranslation: 这只小狗一定是离开了它的妈妈。

example: The structural design of the building is amazing.
meaning: adj. 结构上的，构造上的
exampleTranslation: 这座建筑的结构设计令人惊叹。

example: His subconscious fear of spiders caused him to avoid the basement.
meaning: adj. 潜意识的 n. 潜意识
exampleTranslation: 他对蜘蛛的潜意识中的恐惧，使他避开了地下室。

example: He found work as a teacher and subsequently as a writer.
meaning: adv. 随后，后来，接着
exampleTranslation: 他先找到了教师的工作，后来成了一名作家。

example: The government has decided to subsidize public transportation.
meaning: vt. 给…发补贴，补助
exampleTranslation: 政府决定对公共交通进行补贴。

example: They lived in a suburban neighborhood.
meaning: adj. 郊区的；平淡乏味的，古板的
exampleTranslation: 他们住在一个郊区社区。

example: The doctor performed a surgical procedure to remove the tumor.
meaning: adj. 外科⼿术的；精确的
exampleTranslation: 医生进行了手术以切除肿瘤。

example: We should pursue a more sustainable lifestyle.
meaning: adj. 可持续的
exampleTranslation: 我们应当追求一种更为可持续的生活方式。

example: I'll swap my apple for your banana.
meaning: vi. vt. 交换；换班 vt. 替换 n. 交换
exampleTranslation: 我的苹果和你的香蕉交换。

example: The white dove is symbolic of peace.
meaning: adj. 象征性的，作为象征的
exampleTranslation: 白鸽象征着和平

example: Cross-country runners have to learn to adapt to different terrains.
meaning: n. 地形，地势，地带
exampleTranslation: 越野跑者必须学会适应不同的地形。

example: His thoughtless comments hurt her feelings.
meaning: adj. 粗⼼⼤意的，⽋考虑的
exampleTranslation: 他那不经思考的评语伤了她的心。

example: The Silence of the Lambs is a classic thriller that has stood the test of time.
meaning: n. 惊险⼩说 (或电影等)
exampleTranslation: 沉默的羔羊是经得起时间考验的经典惊悚片。

example: Her political career fell into titanic ruin overnight.
meaning: adj. 巨⼤的，⼒⼤⽆⽐的，重⼤的
exampleTranslation: 她的政治生涯在一夜之间变得破败不堪。

example: The football tournament was really exciting, and our team took the second place.
meaning: n. 锦标赛；(中世纪骑⼠的) ⽐武
exampleTranslation: 这个足球比赛非常激动人心，我们队获得了第二名。

example: He is a tramp with no fixed address.
meaning: n. 流浪汉；沉重的脚步声 vi. vt. (⻓时间地) ⽤沉重的脚步⾛
exampleTranslation: 他是一个没有固定住址的流浪者。

example: They had to traverse a dense forest to reach the village.
meaning: vt. 横越，横渡 n. (在陡坡上的)侧向移动
exampleTranslation: 他们必须穿越一片茂密的森林才能到达村庄。

example: Ultimately, the decision is yours.
meaning: adv. 最终，最后；归根结底，根本上
exampleTranslation: 最后，这个决定由你来做。

example: These cars are unaffordable for most people.
meaning: adj. 买不起的，负担不起的
exampleTranslation: 对于大部分人来说，这些汽车是承受不起的。

example: The unbiased jury delivered a fair verdict.
meaning: adj. 公正的，⽆偏⻅的
exampleTranslation: 公正无私的陪审团做出了公正的裁决。

example: The future is always uncertain.
meaning: adj. 不确定的，⽆把握的；不清楚的
exampleTranslation: 未来总是未知的。

example: Smoking is widely seen as an undesirable habit.
meaning: adj. 不良的，不合⼼意的，不想要的 n. 不良分⼦，不受欢迎的⼈
exampleTranslation: 吸烟被广泛视为一种不良的习惯。

example: The road surface is uneven, please drive carefully.
meaning: adj. 不平坦的；不规则的；不平衡的
exampleTranslation: 这条路面不平，请小心驾驶。

example: The seeds have been uniformly distributed over the field.
meaning: adv. ⼀致地，均匀地
exampleTranslation: 种子被均匀地撒布在田地里。

example: The earthquake had unprecedented power.
meaning: adj. 史⽆前例的，空前的
exampleTranslation: 这场地震力度前所未有。

example: It's unrealistic to expect to never make any mistakes in life.
meaning: adj. 不实际的，不现实的
exampleTranslation: 在生活中期望自己永不出错是不现实的。

example: It’s unreasonable to expect a quick result.
meaning: adj. 不合理的，不公正的
exampleTranslation: 指望快速得到结果是不合理的。

example: Many people dream of a utopia where there is no war or poverty.
meaning: n. 乌托邦，空想的完美世界
exampleTranslation: 很多人都梦想有一个没有战争和贫穷的乌托邦。

example: The bank has a large vault where all the money is kept.
meaning: n. 保险库；墓⽳；拱顶；撑杆跳 vi. vt. (⽤⼿撑或撑杆) 跳跃
exampleTranslation: 银行有一个大保险库，所有的钱都在那儿存放。

example: His face was contorted into a mask of vengeance.
meaning: n. 复仇，报复
exampleTranslation: 他的脸扭曲成了一个复仇的面孔。

example: Before you start your speech, visualize yourself delivering it successfully.
meaning: vt. 使形象化，想象，设想
exampleTranslation: 在你开始演讲之前，想象一下自己成功地演讲。

example: Tom is admired for his boundless vitality.
meaning: n. 活⼒，⽣命⼒，热情
exampleTranslation: 汤姆因其无尽的活力而受到许多人的羡慕。

example: We'll have to wade the stream.
meaning: vi. vt. 涉，蹚 (⽔) vi. 介⼊，插⼿；艰难地处理
exampleTranslation: 我们得涉过这条小溪。

example: The new ware in the local market is attracting a lot of customers.
meaning: n. 作…⽤的器⽫；…制品；货品
exampleTranslation: 本地市场中的新商品吸引了很多顾客。

example: The forest is home to a range of wildlife, like deer, birds and insects.
meaning: n. 野⽣动物，野⽣物种
exampleTranslation: 这片森林是鹿、鸟类和昆虫等各类野生生物的家园。

example: The heavy workload was causing him a lot of stress.
meaning: n. ⼯作量，⼯作负担
exampleTranslation: 他的工作压力很大，使他感到很大的压力。

example: The manager wants to create a positive workplace for her employees.
meaning: n. ⼯作场所
exampleTranslation: 经理希望为她的员工创造一个积极的工作环境。
